title_en: Aoki Ookami to Shiroki Meshika: Genchou Hishi
title_jp: 蒼き狼と白き牝鹿 元朝秘史
no_intro_name: Genghis Khan II - Clan of the Gray Wolf (USA)
overview_en: As in the first part you could participate in two conquests: Mongol conquest and world conquest. In the first you must unite all the little tribes of the country. The world conquest is more complex: You must use all your senses to make the world as you wish.
overview_zh: 《蒼狼與白鹿‧元朝秘史》是 1992 年 7 月 30 日由日本光榮發售的 PC-8801 歷史模擬遊戲。為「蒼狼與白鹿系列」第 3 部作品，以成吉思汗的生涯及蒙古帝國的興亡為題材，目標是統一歐亞大陸。系統承襲前作《蒼狼與白鹿‧成吉思汗》（1985），新增文化圈與氣候要素，人事面的重要性也更為強化。後續移植到多種日系電腦及 FC、Mega Drive、Mega CD、PC Engine、PlayStation 等家用機，並以《Super 蒼狼與白鹿‧元朝秘史》之名移植 SFC。
overview_jp:
『蒼き狼と白き牝鹿・元朝秘史』（あおきおおかみとしろきめじか・げんちょうひし）は、1992年7月30日に日本の光栄から発売されたPC-8801用歴史シミュレーションゲーム。
同社の『蒼き狼と白き牝鹿シリーズ』第3作目。チンギス・ハーンの生涯と、モンゴル帝国の興亡を題材としており、ユーラシア大陸の統一を目的とした作品である。基本的なゲームシステムは前作『蒼き狼と白き牝鹿・ジンギスカン』（1985年）を引き継いでおり、新たに文化圏や気候という要素が追加され、さらに人事面の重要性が強まった作品となっている。
開発は光栄が行い、プロデューサーはシブサワ・コウ、音楽はパソコン用ソフト『太閤立志伝』（1992年）を手掛けた作曲家の大島ミチルが担当している。
PC-8801版の発売後、様々な日本国産パソコンに移植された他、北米では『Genghis Khan II: Clan of the Gray Wolf』のタイトルでPC/AT互換機に移植された。また、ファミリーコンピュータ、メガドライブ、メガCD、PCエンジンSUPER CD-ROM2、PlayStationなど様々な家庭用ゲーム機にも移植され、『スーパー蒼き狼と白き牝鹿・元朝秘史』のタイトルでスーパーファミコンにも移植された。なお、PC-8801およびMSX2、ファミリーコンピュータでは最後の光栄作品となった。
『コーエー定番シリーズ』などの廉価版も発売され、2003年にはPC-9801版を復刻収録した『コーエー25周年パックVol.6』が発売された他、単品販売もされている。スーパーファミコン版はバーチャルコンソール対応ソフトとして2009年にWii、2015年にWii Uにて配信された。2017年にはSteamアプリ化され、Microsoft Windows 7、8.1、10用として発売された。

title_en: Aoki Ookami to Shiroki Meshika: Genchou Hishi
title_jp: 蒼き狼と白き牝鹿・元朝秘史＜ＭＥＧＡ-ＣＤ版＞
no_intro_name: Genghis Khan II - Clan of the Gray Wolf (USA)
overview_en: As in the first part you could participate in two conquests: Mongol conquest and world conquest. In the first you must unite all the little tribes of the country. The world conquest is more complex: You must use all your senses to make the world as you wish.
overview_zh: 與第一部分一樣，您可以參與兩種征服：蒙古征服和世界征服。首先，你必須團結全國所有的小部落。征服世界則更為複雜：你必須運用你所有的感官來按照你的意願創造世界。

overview_en:
Aq Renkan Awa (阿Q連環炮) is an unlicensed educational game for the Sega Mega Drive by C&E Inc. released in 1995.
There are five game modes. The first three are some variants of the normal gameplay: you are a student on a game board-like path. You roll a die to see how many spaces you move. At most spaces there is a building where you are asked five questions. If you get a certain number correct, you can stay at the spot you were in; otherwise you go back to the previous position. Play continues with the next player.
The fourth game mode has various minigames (TODO describe).
The fifth game mode is a basic quiz game show.
overview_zh:
阿Q連環炮是C&E Inc.於1995年發行的針對Sega Mega Drive的未經授權的教育遊戲。
有五種遊戲模式。前三個是正常遊戲玩法的一些變體：你是一個走在遊戲板式路徑上的學生。你擲骰子來看看你移動了多少個空格。大多數空間都有一棟建築物，您會被問到五個問題。如果你猜對了某個數字，你就可以留在原來的地方；否則你會回到之前的位置。下一位玩家繼續比賽。
第四種遊戲模式有各種迷你遊戲（TODO 描述）。
第五種遊戲模式是基本問答遊戲節目。

title_en: Aquatic Games Starring James Pond and the Aquabats, The
no_intro_name: Aquatic Games Starring James Pond and the Aquabats, The (USA)

overview_en:
Arcade Classics offers three classic Atari titles. It includes the following games:

Missile Command
Centipede
Pong (Ultrapong: both Pong and Hockey)

All games have selectable difficulty options. They contain a classic mode as well as a Genesis mode (SEGA mode in the Game Gear version), which enhances the graphics and adds new sound effects.
overview_zh:
Arcade Classics 提供三款經典的 Atari 遊戲。它包括以下遊戲：

飛彈司令部
蜈蚣
Pong（Ultrapong：乒乓球和曲棍球）

所有遊戲都有可選擇的難度選項。它們包含經典模式以及創世模式（Game Gear 版本中的 SEGA 模式），後者增強了圖形並新增了新的音效。

overview_en: Arch Rivals is a conversion of the hit Midway arcade game. It's a 2-on-2 basketball game that stands out from the crowd for its "no rules" approach. Fouling out other players is more than accepted, it's encouraged. Choose from twelve different teams and eight players, each with their own traits and personalities.
overview_zh: Arch Rivals是熱門Midway街機遊戲的轉換版。這是一場2對2的籃球比賽，以「無規則」的方式脫穎而出。排斥其他玩家是非常被接受的，這是鼓勵的。從十二個不同的隊伍和八個玩家中選擇，每個隊伍都有自己的特質和個性。

title_jp: アークス・オデッセイ
overview_en: Tonight is the night of the thousand years full moon! At this moment, four brave warriors are rushing up a steep, narrow mountain pass to an ancient ruined shrine. There, they will battle the Dark Lords of Castomira, and ultimately confront the Dark Sorceress. These warriors have pledged their lives to the troubled king of Arcus to recapture the mighty Sword of Light, which Castomira has stolen - the weapon used by Princess Leaty to defeat Castomira a thousand years before this night. They are Jedda the swordsman, Erin the warrior-maiden, Diana the archer, and Bead the magic stick-fighter. To defeat the enemy, the warriors will call upon their individual magic powers: Jedda will wield his fire magic; Erin will harness the power of the wind; Diana will use her healing rays of light; and Bead will mimic the magic of the dark lords. They must not falter in their quest, or the diabolical Castomira will assume absolute power, and darkness will reign... forever.
overview_zh: 今晚是千年月圓之夜！此刻，四位勇敢的武士正沿著陡峭狹窄的山口衝向一座古老的神殿遺址。在那裡，他們將與卡斯托米拉的黑暗領主作戰，並最終對抗黑暗女巫。這些戰士向陷入困境的阿庫斯國王發誓，要奪回卡斯托米拉偷走的強大光之劍——一千年前今晚利蒂公主用來擊敗卡斯托米拉的武器。他們是劍客吉達、少女武士艾琳、弓箭手戴安娜和魔杖鬥士比德。為了擊敗敵人，戰士們將召喚各自的魔法力量：吉達將使用他的火魔法；艾琳將利用風的力量；戴安娜將使用她的治癒光芒；珠子會模仿黑暗領主的魔法。他們決不能在他們的追求中猶豫不決，否則邪惡的卡斯托米拉將掌握絕對權力，黑暗將永遠統治。

overview_en:
Tee off by yourself or play 18 holes with a friend. Besides the One and Two Player modes there's also a practice mode, match play (head to head), and a full-blown international tournament, where you'll stroke it out against 15 competitors.

Tournament play lasts 12 rounds, 18 holes of golf each. Most rounds are standard "stroke" play but the seventh and eighth rounds are "match" games. Things really get serious when match game ends in a tie, and players move into a sudden death play-off.
overview_zh:
自己開球或與朋友一起打 18 洞。除了單人和雙人模式外，還有練習模式、比洞賽（一對一）和全面的國際錦標賽，您將在其中與 15 名競爭對手一較高下。

錦標賽共進行 12 輪，每輪 18 洞。大多數回合是標準的“比桿”比賽，但第七輪和第八輪是“比賽”比賽。當比賽以平局結束並且球員進入突然死亡附加賽時，事情變得非常嚴重。

overview_en: In the 30th century, Viking terrorists, led by the vicious Great Hilagi, are plundering and destroying planets throughout the Galaxy. They move in warships capable of travelling in Nether Space... and Earth is their next target. Now, there has been an assault on the laboratory of the renowned scientist Dr. Zerrek Keene, who, in a state near death, has summoned his granddaughter, Zana Keene. "Zana," he said, "while experimenting with Nether Space transmission, I caused a huge magnetic field to be formed around our planet, and it has attracted the attention of the barbaric Viking Terrorists." Dr. Keene pressed a keycard into her palm, and with his last breath, whispered, "Zana, use this... save Earth." Zana Keene, trained as a test pilot at the United Government Military Academy, knew what he had given her... access to the "Chameleon" ERX-75 space fighter - capable of combat in Nether Space, and of transforming itself into a robot - the strongest weapon ever developed by the United Earth Army. Zana Keene knew what she must do. "Use this... save Earth."
overview_zh: 30世紀，維京恐怖分子在邪惡的大希拉吉領導下，正在掠奪和摧毀整個銀河系的行星。他們乘坐能夠在下太空航行的戰艦……而地球就是他們的下一個目標。現在，著名科學家澤雷克·基恩博士的實驗室遭到襲擊，他在瀕臨死亡的狀態下召喚了他的孫女扎娜·基恩。 「扎娜，」他說道，「我在進行幽空傳送實驗時，讓我們的星球周圍形成了巨大的磁場，引起了野蠻的維京恐怖分子的注意。」基恩博士把一張鑰匙卡塞進她的手掌裡，用最後一口氣低聲說道：「扎娜，用這個…拯救地球。」扎娜·基恩在聯合政府軍事學院接受過什麼飛行器的機會，她知道什麼給太空能夠在下太空作戰，並能將自己變成機器人 - 地球聯合軍有史以來開發的最強武器。扎娜·基恩知道她必須做什麼。 「用這個…拯救地球。”

overview_en: Surprise yourself and impress your friends with astonishing graphics you can make in minutes. Animate them and your TV screen becomes a lively work of art. All with just your television and the 16-bit Genesis system. It's simply the easiest way to be an artist. Create masterpieces that run, jump, and dance! You can even record them on your VCR. It's better than a game... it's ART ALIVE! Turn your imagination loose with the gallery of tools: A rainbow of colors to paint with; 3 different pencil tips for freehand drawing; Circles, rectangles and squares in 3 different outline widths; Spray cans for shading patterns; An eraser and clear feature to make mistakes vanish; Over 50 supplied graphics and animations, including Sonic the Hedgehog and ToeJam & Earl, or create your own; Predrawn backdrops you can color with the fill bucket.
overview_zh: 《Art Alive!》是 SEGA 世嘉發行的 Mega Drive／Genesis 用繪圖工具軟體。北美於 1991 年 1 月 1 日、其他地區於 1992 年 3 月 27 日發售。本作沒有具體目標，可運用各種筆刷、填色、背景與動畫效果作畫，並以印有音速小子等角色的印章功能聞名。精神續作《Wacky Worlds Creativity Studio》於 1994 年僅在美洲發售。
overview_jp:
『アートアライブ』（Art Alive!）は、セガより発売されたメガドライブ・ジェネシス用のお絵かきツールである 。北米では1991年1月1日、それ以外の地域では1992年3月27日に発売された。アートアライブには具体的なゴールがなく、様々なブラシ、塗り潰し、背景、アニメーションなどを利用して絵を描くことができる。また、ソニックなどのキャラクターをあしらったスタンプで知られている 。
精神的な続編である『Wacky Worlds Creativty Studio』は1994年にアメリカ大陸のみで発売された。

overview_en:
Yuri Sakazaki has been kidnapped! Her big brother Ryo Sakazaki and Robert Garcia, his best friend, go search for her on the streets of South Town. As they go deeper and deeper they will find clues as to who ordered the kidnapping, the Sakazaki family's relation to the mob, and a person from their past.

This fighting game is a coin-op conversion of the Neo-Geo hit of the same name, and has all characters, stages, and moves featured in the arcade unit. Unlike the original arcade version, players can now play as Mr. Big and the elusive Mr. Karate.

The gameplay differs from most fighting games. In this game, you have a Spirit meter. A Spirit meter is in the game and will decrease as you perform special moves. It can be recharged, but doing so leaves you open to attack. When your health is almost gone, you can perform a secret combination that will unleash a deadly attack on your opponent - provided you have a full Spirit meter.
overview_zh:
坂崎由裡被綁架了！她的哥哥坂崎亮和他最好的朋友羅伯特·加西亞在南鎮的街道上尋找她。隨著他們越來越深入，他們會找到線索，瞭解誰下令綁架、坂崎家族與暴徒的關係以及他們過去的某個人。

這款格鬥遊戲是同名 Neo-Geo 熱門遊戲的投幣遊戲轉換版，擁有街機單元中的所有角色、階段和動作。與最初的街機版本不同，玩家現在可以扮演大人物先生和難以捉摸的空手道先生。

遊戲玩法與大多數格鬥遊戲不同。在這個遊戲中，你有一個精神表。遊戲中有一個精神表，當你執行特殊動作時，它會減少。它可以充電，但這樣做會讓你容易受到攻擊。當你的生命值幾乎耗盡時，你可以執行一個秘密組合，對你的對手發動致命的攻擊——前提是你有一個完整的精神表。

overview_en:
It is 50 B.C., and the entire Gaul (today's France) is conquered by the Romans. Only one village still remains independent, thanks to the incredible powers of its two great warriors, Asterix and Obelix. In the game, they must first of all liberate the village Orvio and rescue their friend Dogmatix.

The player can play as either Asterix or Obelix. They make their way through platform levels, fighting enemies by punching them, and jumping to access higher ares or to avoid falling down. There are also some items that the player can collect, such as bombs, with which the player can overcome obstacles and advance in the game.
overview_zh:
西元前50年，整個高盧（今天的法國）被羅馬人征服。只有一個村莊仍然保持獨立，這要歸功於兩位偉大戰士阿斯特里克斯和奧貝利克斯的不可思議的力量。在遊戲中，他們必須先解放 Orvio 村莊並拯救他們的朋友 Dogmatix。

玩家可以扮演 Asterix 或 Obelix。他們透過平臺關卡，透過拳打敵人來對抗敵人，並跳躍到更高的區域或避免跌倒。玩家還可以收集一些物品，例如炸彈，玩家可以使用它們克服障礙並在遊戲中前進。

title_en: Asterix and the Power of the Gods
no_intro_name: Asterix and the Power of the Gods (Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es)
overview_en: Emperor Caesar's forces have stolen the legendary shield of Vercingetorix and it is Asterix and Obelix's mission to return it to the Gaulish village. Play as either character as your adventure takes you through over 20 levels, through Lutetia, Egypt, Alexandria and Mesopotamia on your way to Rome itself!
overview_zh: 凱撒皇帝的軍隊偷走了維辛托里克斯的傳奇盾牌，阿斯特里克斯和奧貝利克斯的任務是將其帶回高盧村莊。扮演任一角色，冒險將帶您穿越 20 多個關卡，途經盧泰西亞、埃及、亞歷山大和美索不達米亞，前往羅馬！

title_jp: アトミックロボキッド
overview_en: In the 21st century, a blast of cosmic radiation bombarded Terra-12, a deep-space outpost of Earth, hideously mutating all transplanted life. A fleet of savage beings followed the radiation wave and invaded the planet, and began the systematic destruction of all remaining sentient life. Years of battling the alien 'governors' have gone by, and now only one hope survives to avenge the desperate terran colonists.
overview_zh: 《Atomic Robo-Kid》是 UPL 於 1988 年推出的大型電玩橫向捲軸射擊遊戲。1990 年於 PC Engine 推出改編移植版《Atomic Robo-Kid Special》，同年並移植至 Mega Drive 與 X68000，歐洲也推出 Amiga、Atari ST、Commodore 64 版本。2016 年作為 Arcade Archives 在 PS4、2018 年在 Switch 上重新發行。
overview_jp:
『アトミックロボキッド』 （ATOMIC ROBO-KID）は、1988年にUPLより稼働されたアーケード用横スクロールシューティングゲームである。
1990年にPCエンジンにアレンジ移植され『アトミックロボキッドスペシャル』のタイトルで発売された。また、同年にメガドライブやX68000に移植された他、欧州ではAmiga、Atari ST、コモドール64にも移植された。
2016年にはPlayStation 4用ソフトとして、2018年にはNintendo Switch用ソフトとしてアーケードアーカイブスにて配信された。

overview_en: The player takes the role of Chelnov, a coal miner who miraculously survives the malfunction and explosion of a nuclear power plant. Chelnov's body gains superhuman abilities due to the massive amount of radiation given off by the explosion, and a secret organization seeks to harness those abilities for its own evil purposes. Chelnov must battle and defeat the secret organization using his newfound abilities.
overview_zh: 玩家扮演切爾諾夫（Chelnov），一名煤礦工人，在核電站故障和爆炸中奇蹟般地生還。由於爆炸釋放出大量輻射，切爾諾夫的身體獲得了超人的能力，而一個秘密組織試圖利用這些能力來達到自己的邪惡目的。切爾諾夫必須利用他新發現的能力與秘密組織作戰並擊敗它。

overview_en:
There are three game modes: Exhibition match, Exhibition Tournament (where the player competes in a 32-player tournament), ATP Senior Tour Event (where the player chooses one of the retired players and competes in a 8-player tournament) and the ATP Tour, where it's possible to create a player and develop his skills by winning (or simply doing well) on tournaments, with one extra point on each round won.

Gameplay uses a simple 3-button layout, where the A button lobs the ball, B performs a controlled passing shot and C allows the fastest top spin shots, with the directional pad affecting the direction and depth of the shot.
overview_zh:
共有三種遊戲模式：表演賽、表演賽（玩家參加 32 人錦標賽）、ATP 高階巡迴賽（玩家選擇一名退休球員並參加 8 人錦標賽）和 ATP 巡迴賽，在巡迴賽中，可以透過在錦標賽中獲勝（或只是表現出色）來建立一名球員並發展他的技能，每贏一輪可額外加分。

遊戲玩法採用簡單的 3 按鈕佈局，其中 A 按鈕用於高球，B 按鈕執行受控傳球，C 按鈕允許最快的上旋球，方向鍵影響射門的方向和深度。

overview_en: Australian Rugby League is a 1995 rugby game by Electronic Arts for the Sega Mega Drive released exclusively in Australia and Europe.
overview_zh: 澳洲橄欖球聯盟 (Australian Rugby League) 是 1995 年由 Electronic Arts 為 Sega Mega Drive 在澳洲和歐洲獨家發行的橄欖球遊戲。

overview_en:
In just a few years, mankind has succeeded in destroying the environment and endangering all living species. Under the guidance of the evil Dr. Machino, robotic machines were built to turn the Earth into a soulless place without live nature. There is only one hero who can save the living beings of the planet - you, a little possum. Fight Dr. Machino's robots and liberate the Earth!

This is an action platformer very similar in gameplay style to Sonic games. The possum can jump and run very quickly, as well as spin to hurt the enemies and breeze through the levels. Various robotic creatures will will try to kill you during your journey to Dr. Machino's lair. You can either avoid or try to defeat them on your way.

UPC / Barcode: 031763065500
overview_zh:
在短短幾年內，人類成功地破壞了環境並危及所有生物物種。在邪惡的馬基諾博士的指導下，人們建造了機器人，將地球變成一個沒有生命、沒有生命的自然之地。只有一個英雄可以拯救地球上的生靈──你，一隻小負鼠。對抗馬奇諾博士的機器人並解放地球！

這是一款動作平臺遊戲，其遊戲風格與索尼克遊戲非常相似。負鼠可以快速跳躍和奔跑，還可以旋轉傷害敵人並輕鬆透過關卡。在您前往馬奇諾博士巢穴的旅途中，各種機器人生物將試圖殺死您。你可以在途中躲避或嘗試擊敗他們。

UPC/條碼：031763065500

title_en: Ayrton Senna's Super Monaco GP II
title_jp: アイルトン・セナ スーパーモナコＧＰ II
no_intro_name: Ayrton Senna's Super Monaco GP II (Japan, Europe) (En,Ja)
overview_en: Ayrton Senna's Super Monaco GP II is an arcade-style Formula One racing video game developed and manufactured by Sega, and the follow-up to Super Monaco GP. The game was released for the Sega Master System, Sega Mega Drive, and the Sega Game Gear, appearing in the United States on 16 July 1992, Japan on 17 July 1992, and sometime later in 1992 in Europe. Along with boasting the most "realistic physics",[1] it was the best received console driving game at the time of release, the game was also endorsed by the then Formula One champion Ayrton Senna, who won the race more times than any other driver, with six victories, and five races consecutively between 1989 and 1993. The game's development was also assisted by Senna, who supplied his own advice about the tracks featured in the game.
overview_zh: 艾爾頓·希南的《超級摩納哥 GP II》是一款由世嘉開發和製造的街機風格一級方程式賽車遊戲，是《超級摩納哥 GP》的後續作品。該遊戲針對 Sega Master System、Sega Mega Drive 和 Sega Game Gear 發布，於 1992 年 7 月 16 日在美國上市，於 1992 年 7 月 17 日在日本上市，並於 1992 年稍後在歐洲上市。除了擁有最“真實的物理原理”，[1]，它是發行時最受好評的控制檯駕駛遊戲，該遊戲還得到了當時的一級方程式冠軍艾爾頓·塞納 (Ayrton Senna) 的認可，他贏得比賽的次數比任何其他車手都多，在 1989 年至 1993 年間連續贏得了 6 場比賽和五場比賽。遊戲的發展也得到了塞納的協助，他對遊戲中的賽道提供了自己的建議。

overview_en: Just when he thinks it's safe to date... He totals the car! When the star dust settles B.O.B. finds himself marooned on a hostile, back water planet, light years from home. Worse yet, the planet is inhabited by the gnarliest creatures and killer machines he's ever seen. You've got to help B.O.B. blast his way through the alien goon squads and onward to the rendezvous with his galactic babe! Featuring over 45 grueling levels! Six tricked-out gadgets! Six grades of ammo, including fire and lasers! More than 40 menacing enemies and bosses galore! Lightning-fast rocket rides!
overview_zh: 就在他以為約會已經安全的時候…他把車毀了！當星塵落定時，B.O.B.發現自己被困在一個充滿敵意的閉水星球上，距離家鄉數光年。更糟的是，這個星球上住著他所見過的最粗糙的生物和殺手機器。你必須幫助BOB。殺出一條血路，穿過外星暴徒小隊，前往與他的銀河寶貝的會合點！擁有超過 45 個令人筋疲力盡的關卡！六個被騙的小玩意！六級彈藥，包括火焰和雷射！超過 40 個來勢洶洶的敵人和頭目！快如閃電的火箭之旅！

title_en: Back to the Future Part III
no_intro_name: Back to the Future Part III (Europe)
overview_en:
Back to the Future III is a collection of four arcade games. Marty McFly and Doc Brown have traveled back through time to the year 1885 - and they're soon deep in trouble when they face "Mad Dog" Tannen's gang and have to find a way to return to the present. This game takes four scenes from the Hollywood movie Back to the Future III and turns them into arcade sequences:
•Buckboard Chase: Doc Brown goes horseback in an attempt to save Hill Valley's lovely school teacher Clara. This game of quick ducking, jumping and shooting alternates between a side-scrolling and a top-down perspective.
•Shooting Gallery: The name says it all. A classic game of aim-and-shoot, spiced up by hidden extras and bonus targets.
•Pie Throwing: Meet the Mad Dog gang. They have guns, and you have... cream pies. It's an isometric version of the shooting gallery, only with ammo. And the targets shoot back.
•The Train: Basically a side-scrolling beat-em-up on train wagons with some ducking and jumping. Get rid of the mechanics and collect speed logs to push the engine to a magic 88 mph.
overview_zh:
回到未來 III 是四款街機遊戲的集合。馬蒂·麥克弗萊和布朗博士穿越回 1885 年，當他們面對“瘋狗”坦南的幫派時，他們很快就陷入了麻煩，必須找到回到現在的方法。該遊戲採用了好萊塢電影《回到未來 III》中的四個場景，並將它們轉變為街機序列：
•巴克板追逐：布朗博士騎馬試圖拯救山谷可愛的學校老師克拉拉。這款快速躲避、跳躍和射擊的遊戲在橫向捲軸和自上而下的視角之間交替。
•射擊場：顧名思義。一款經典的瞄準射擊遊戲，還有隱藏的額外內容和獎勵目標。
•丟派：認識瘋狗幫。他們有槍，而你有…奶油餡餅。這是射擊場的等距版本，只有彈藥。目標還擊。
•火車：基本上是火車車廂上的橫向捲軸格鬥遊戲，帶有一些躲避和跳躍。擺離線械裝置並收集速度日誌，將引擎推至神奇的 88 英里/小時。

overview_en: A prince and princess were in love with each other until a jealous demon turned the happy couple into a set of stone paddles; resembling that of the pinball kind. Suddenly, a ball came into existence that could use the prince and princess in order to defeat the demons that now rule over the kingdom
overview_zh: 王子和公主彼此相愛，直到嫉妒的惡魔將這對幸福的情侶變成了一組石槳；類似於彈珠型別。突然，一個球出現了，可以利用王子和公主來擊敗現在統治王國的惡魔

overview_en:
A turn based strategy war game only released in Japan.

The world of Bahumut is divided into eight powerful countries, four of which are ruled by humans or human-like creatures, while the other four are ruled by evil forces. These countries constantly wage war against one another trying to dominate and destroy the others. It's the player's job to choose which country to control and make it the most powerful country in all of Bahumut.  
 
At the beginning of each turn, you control your leader and take certain actions such as: recruit soldiers, declare war, engage in diplomatic talks, ect. In battles you can control several units of soldiers or magical creatures you can summon to assist you in battle.
overview_zh: 《巴哈姆特戰記》（Record of Bahamut War）是 1991 年由 SEGA 世嘉發售的模擬遊戲，可雙人同時遊玩。玩家操控騎士、龍、巫師等多元種族部隊，於奇幻大陸上展開領土爭奪戰。
overview_jp: 『バハムート戦記』 (RECORD OF BAHAMUT WAR) は、1991年にセガから発売されたシミュレーションゲーム。2人同時プレイ可能。

title_jp: 爆伝 アンバランスゾーン

overview_en: Ball Jacks (ボールジャックス) is a 1993 game for the Sega Mega Drive by Namco released exclusively in Japan and Europe. The game is a "sports game" with a unique sport involving grabbing balls from a conveyor belt on end end of the screen and dropping them into another. Whether or not this is a renamed port of another game is presently unknown.
overview_zh: Ball Jacks（ボールジャックス）是 Namco 於 1993 年在日本和歐洲獨家發行的 Sega Mega Drive 遊戲。該遊戲是一款“體育遊戲”，其獨特的運動包括從螢幕一端的傳送帶上抓取球並將其扔進另一個傳送帶中。目前尚不清楚這是否是另一款遊戲的重新命名埠。

title_en: Ballz 3D - Fighting at Its Ballziest ~ Ballz 3D - The Battle of the Ballz
no_intro_name: Ballz 3D - Fighting at Its Ballziest ~ Ballz 3D - The Battle of the Ballz (Europe)

title_en: Ballz 3D - The Battle of the Ballz
no_intro_name: Ballz 3D - The Battle of the Ballz (USA, Europe)

overview_en:
Help Barbie become a great fashion model! This is an arcade game with many different activities to participate in.

In each level, Barbie starts by going left to right with forced scrolling. She has a default speed and can speed up as well. She must avoid moving obstacles by moving up and down and controlling her speed. If she hits one, she loses a chance and it's game over if she runs out of chances. She must pick up items which grant point bonuses and extra chances.
overview_zh:
幫助芭比成為出色的時裝模特兒！這是一款街機遊戲，有許多不同的活動可供參加。

在每個關卡中，芭比首先從左向右強制滾動。她有預設速度，也可以加速。她必須透過上下移動並控制速度來避免移動障礙物。如果她擊中了一個，她就會失去一次機會，如果她用完機會，遊戲就結束了。她必須拾取可以獲得積分獎勵和額外機會的物品。

title_en: Bare Knuckle II: Shitou e no Requiem
title_jp: ベア・ナックルII 死闘への鎮魂歌
no_intro_name: Bare Knuckle II - Shitou e no Requiem ~ Streets of Rage II (Japan, Europe) (En,Ja)
overview_zh: 《格鬥三人組 II 死鬥的安魂曲》（海外名：Streets of Rage 2）是 1992 年 12 月 20 日先於北美由日本 SEGA 世嘉發售的 Mega Drive 橫向捲軸動作（Belt-scroll）遊戲，日本則於 1993 年 1 月 14 日推出。為《格鬥三人組》系列第 2 作，為救出被囚禁的 Adam，Axel、Blaze、職業摔角手 Max 與 Adam 的弟弟 Sammy 起身對抗強敵，被視為系列最高傑作。1993 年移植 Game Gear，1994 年於歐洲移植 Sega Master System。
overview_jp:
『ベア・ナックルII 死闘への鎮魂歌』（ベア・ナックルツー しとうへのレクイエム、海外名：Street of Rage 2）は、1992年12月20日に北米にて日本のセガから発売されたメガドライブ用ベルトスクロールアクションゲーム。日本では1993年1月14日に発売された。
同社の『ベア・ナックル』シリーズの第2作目である本作は、囚われたアダムを救う為、アクセル、ブレイズ、そしてプロレスラーのマックス、アダムの弟のサミーが立ち上がる。シリーズ中でも最高傑作との評価が高い。
1993年にゲームギアに移植された他、1994年には欧州にてセガ・マスターシステムに移植された。2003年にはセガゲーム本舗の1作としてWindowsにて発売、2007年にはWii用ソフトとしてバーチャルコンソールにて配信された他、Xbox 360用ソフトとしてXbox Live Arcadeにて配信された。2015年にはセガ3D復刻プロジェクトの1作としてニンテンドー3DSにて配信された。その他、PlayStation 2およびゲームキューブ用ソフト『ソニック ジェムズ コレクション』（2005年）やPlayStation 3およびXbox 360用ソフト『ソニック アルティメット ジェネシスコレクション』（2009年）などのオムニバスソフトに収録された。

title_en: Bare Knuckle II - Shitou e no Requiem ~ Streets of Rage II
no_intro_name: Bare Knuckle II - Shitou e no Requiem ~ Streets of Rage II (Japan, Europe)

overview_en:
Streets of Rage 3, known in Japan as Bare Knuckle III (ベア・ナックルIII?) and subtitled Tekken Seiten (鉄拳聖典 lit. Iron Fist Scriptures?) in pre-release media and the official soundtrack release, is a side-scrolling beat 'em up released by Sega in 1994 for the Sega Mega Drive/Genesis. It is the last part of the Streets of Rage series. It was later released for the Japanese version of Sonic Gems Collection for the Nintendo GameCube and PlayStation 2, and for the Wii Virtual Console on September 24, 2007. The game also appeared in Sonic's Ultimate Genesis Collection for Xbox 360 and PlayStation 3.

The game had featured several enhancements over Streets of Rage and Streets of Rage 2 such as a more complex plot, multiple endings, longer levels, increased difficulty, more in-depth scenarios (with interactive levels and the return of traps like pits) and faster gameplay (with dash and dodge moves). Weapons could now only be used for a few times before breaking and could now be integrated with unique moves with certain characters, hidden characters were added and a few cutscenes were included to give the story greater depth.
The game is more fast-paced than its predecessors. Running and vertical-dodge moves were added (only Skate could run in Streets of Rage 2), and most player attacks deal less damage than in the predecessors. The level timer has been replaced with a "power meter" that, when full, allows players to perform special moves without draining the player's life bar.

Unlike the first and second game, weapons in Street of Rage 3 can only be used a fixed number of times. However, additional weapon special attacks could be performed. The game also features return of SOR1 team attacks in which two characters work together to perform a powerful attack as in the first game. Blitz moves, performed while players run, were altered so that they can be upgraded in strength over the course of the game. The player would have to earn a set amount of points on one life to upgrade it. Losing a life would put the blitz move down a level, but the upgraded moves could still be performed by pressing X on a 6 button controller, followed by a button sequence.

Traps in stages were brought back from the original game, for example, enemies can once again be thrown into pits or off the side of an elevator.

Enemy AI was expanded so more enemies can pick up weapons, block attacks, employ co-operative attacks (usually, a Big Ben-like enemy will throw one of the Garcia enemies at the character to smack them down), and even steal exposed food items to regain health.

The Japanese version of the game also brought back of riding a Motorcycle, which was removed from the Western release of the game.
overview_zh:
《怒之鐵拳 3》在日本的預發行媒體和官方原聲帶中被稱為《Bare Knuckle III》（ベア・ナッkuruIII？），副標題為《鐵拳聖典》。這是《憤怒之鐵拳》系列的最後一部。隨後，該遊戲在任天堂 GameCube 和 PlayStation 2 的《索尼克寶石合集》日文版中發布，並於 2007 年 9 月 24 日在 Wii 虛擬控制檯上發布。該遊戲也出現在 Xbox 360 和 PlayStation 3 的《索尼克終極創世合輯》中。

該遊戲對《憤怒之街》和《憤怒之街 2》進行了多項改進，例如更複雜的情節、多個結局、更長的關卡、更高的難度、更深入的場景（具有互動關卡和坑等陷阱的返回）以及更快的遊戲玩法（帶有衝刺和閃避動作）。武器現在在損壞之前只能使用幾次，現在可以與某些角色的獨特動作相結合，新增隱藏角色，並包含一些過場動畫，以使故事更具深度。
該遊戲比前作節奏更快。增加了奔跑和垂直躲避動作（《憤怒之鐵拳 2》中只有滑板可以奔跑），大多數玩家攻擊造成的傷害比前作要少。關卡計時器已被「功率計」取代，當功率計滿時，玩家可以執行特殊動作，而不會耗盡玩家的生命值。

與第一部和第二部遊戲不同，《憤怒之街3》中的武器只能使用固定次數。然而，可以執行額外的武器特殊攻擊。遊戲也回歸了 SOR1 團隊攻擊，與第一款遊戲一樣，兩個角色齊心協力進行強大的攻擊。閃電戰動作是在玩家奔跑時進行的，經過修改，以便他們可以在遊戲過程中升級力量。玩家必須在一次生命中獲得一定數量的積分才能升級它。失去生命會使閃電戰動作降低一個級別，但升級後的動作仍然可以透過按 6 個按鈕控制器上的 X，然後按下按鈕序列來執行。

分階段的陷阱從原版遊戲中恢復過來，例如，敵人可以再次被扔進坑裡或從電梯旁邊扔下去。

敵人人工智慧得到了擴充套件，因此更多的敵人可以拿起武器、格擋攻擊、進行合作攻擊（通常，像大本鐘一樣的敵人會向角色扔一個加西亞敵人，將其擊倒），甚至竊取暴露的食物以恢復生命值。

日本版遊戲也恢復了騎乘摩托車的功能，而該功能在西方版本的遊戲中已被刪除。

title_en: Bare Knuckle - Ikari no Tekken ~ Streets of Rage
no_intro_name: Bare Knuckle - Ikari no Tekken ~ Streets of Rage (World) (Rev A)

title_jp: ベア・ナックル 怒りの鉄拳
no_intro_name: Bare Knuckle - Ikari no Tetsuken ~ Streets of Rage (World) (Rev A)
overview_zh: 《格鬥三人組》（Bear Knuckle）是 1991 年 8 月 SEGA 世嘉於 Mega Drive 推出的橫向捲軸動作（Belt-scroll）遊戲，亦為其系列名稱。標題「Bare Knuckle」源自拳擊術語「赤手肉搏」。本系列為類似 Capcom 卡普空《快打旋風》系統的清版動作遊戲，至 2020 年共推出 4 部作品。第 1 作音樂由古代祐三製作。海外版以《Streets of Rage》之名發售。古代祐三的音樂備受好評，各作發售同期皆推出原聲 CD。
overview_jp:
『ベア・ナックル』は、1991年8月にメガドライブで発売されたセガのベルトスクロールアクションゲーム、およびそのシリーズの名称である。タイトルの「ベアナックル」は、素手で戦うことを指すボクシング用語ベアナックル・ボクシングに由来する。
本シリーズは、『ファイナルファイト』（カプコン）と類似したシステムのベルトスクロールアクションゲームであり、2020年までに4作が発売された。
第一作の音楽は古代祐三が制作しており、『II』と『III』は川島基宏との共作である（古代の担当曲は『II』は全20曲中17曲、『III』は全27曲中16曲である）。
日本国外では "Streets of Rage"（ストリーツ・オブ・レイジ）のタイトルで販売された。これはのちにメガCD用ソフト『セガクラシック アーケードコレクション』の収録作品の1つとして、『I』のみ逆輸入されている。
古代祐三のサウンドワークは評価が高く、各作品の発売と同時期に、アルファレコードよりサウンドトラックCDが発売された。また、2007年8月10日に5pb.から発売されたCD『古代祐三 BEST COLLECTION Vol.2』には、本シリーズ3作品と『ザ・スーパー忍』の音楽がまとめて収録されている。5pb.版CDには『I』のアルファレコード版CDにあったアレンジ曲は入っていないが、その代わり『III』のアルファレコード版CDで未収録だった曲が入っている。
セガにおけるシリーズ展開は『III』で一区切りとなったが、『III』の発売から26年後の2020年4月30日、同作の10年後を描いた『ベア・ナックルIV』が発売された。
また、『IV』発売までの間、このシリーズに影響を受けた世代による続編的なアプローチの作品がセガ以外のメーカーで、いくつか試みられている（詳細は#続編の構想を参照）。

overview_en: In the game you play street basketball two-on-two with your friends on with computer. So there are no referees, no fouls, and no shot clock, but the teams called by the names of cities such as Phoenix or Chicago. You can choose your player from 16 available players, including Barkley himself.
overview_zh: 在遊戲中，你和你的朋友在電腦上進行街頭籃球二對二的比賽。因此，沒有裁判，沒有犯規，也沒有進攻時間，但球隊以菲尼克斯或芝加哥等城市的名字命名。您可以從 16 名可用球員中選擇您的球員，包括巴克利本人。

overview_en:
This game is a sequel to Barkley: Shut Up and Jam!. It is a street basketball game which means no referees to enforce fouls and no shot clock to force a player to take a shot. The game features an exhibition and a tournament mode.

In exhibition mode the player chooses 2 players out of a possible 10 to play in a 2 on 2 game. The game can either be played for 3 minutes, 5 minutes, or til the first team gets to either 21 or 50 points depending on what option is chosen.
overview_zh:
遊戲是《巴克利：閉嘴和果醬！ 》的續集。這是一場街頭籃球比賽，沒有裁判強制犯規，也沒有進攻時鐘強迫球員投籃。遊戲設有表演賽和錦標賽模式。

在表演賽模式中，玩家從 10 名可能的玩家中選擇 2 名參加 2 對 2 遊戲。比賽可以進行 3 分鐘、5 分鐘，或直到第一隊得到 21 分或 50 分，具體取決於選擇的選項。

overview_en:
Barney is a friendly dinosaur who likes playing with children. One day Barney and his little friends decide to play hide-and-seek game. Barney's task is to find the children and the presents they have hidden.

Barney travels across four different levels. On each one there are five children and five presents to find. You can only jump in the game when there are higher platforms to access. Despite being a platformer, this is not an action game, since Barney can't die and there is no quick reaction required to complete the game. The game is designed for little children and has a very low difficulty level.
overview_zh:
巴尼是一隻友善的恐龍，喜歡和孩子們一起玩耍。有一天，巴尼和他的小朋友決定玩捉迷藏遊戲。巴尼的任務是找到孩子們以及他們隱藏的禮物。

巴尼穿越了四個不同的層次。每張上面都有五個孩子和五件禮物可供尋找。只有當有更高的平臺可以訪問時，您才能進入遊戲。儘管是平臺遊戲，但這不是動作遊戲，因為巴尼不會死，也不需要快速反應來完成遊戲。該遊戲是為小孩子設計的，難度很低。

title_en: Barver Battle Saga - Tai Kong Zhan Shi
no_intro_name: Barver Battle Saga - Tai Kong Zhan Shi (China) (Unl)
overview_en: Barver Battle Saga: Tai Kong Zhan Shi – Mo Fa Zhan Shi (BARVER BATTLE SAGA 太空戰士 魔法戰士) is a 1996 RPG by Chuanpu for the Sega Mega Drive. The game was released in Taiwan and Russia with titles that make it seem connected to Square Enix's franchise Final Fantasy, which has never been released on a Sega system.
overview_zh: 《Barver Battle Saga: Tai Kong Zhan Shi – Mo Fa Zhan Shi》（BARVER BATTLE SAGA 太空戰士 魔法戰士）是 Chuanpu 於 1996 年為世嘉 Mega Drive 製作的角色扮演遊戲。該遊戲在臺灣和俄羅斯發行，其標題看起來與史克威爾艾尼克斯的《最終幻想》系列有關，而後者從未在世嘉系統上發行過。

overview_en:
The player starts off choosing an angler. Then the player can either go to the bait shop, practice pond, or start in the tournament. In the bait shop, choices of baits, lines, rods, reels, fish finders, and boat engines are available for purchase. The practice pond mode is just where the player can cut his teeth on the game mechanics without consequence.

The tournament mode is the main part of the game. Players start out in a fishing boat. Some of the factors that can affect your fishing are temperature, wind speed, water clarity and time of day. After casting the line, the game goes from an above the lake view to a side view of the lake water depths. Then it's just up to the player to attract the fish with the bait, and after the fish is caught on the hook, reel it in.
overview_zh:
玩家開始選擇釣魚者。然後玩家可以去魚餌店、練習池，或是開始比賽。在魚餌商店，可以購買各種魚餌、魚線、釣竿、捲線器、探魚器和船用引擎。練習池塘模式正是玩家可以在不產生任何後果的情況下練習遊戲機制的地方。

錦標賽模式是遊戲的主要部分。玩家從一艘漁船上開始。影響釣魚的一些因素包括溫度、風速、海水透明度和一天中的時間。拋線後，遊戲從湖面上方檢視變成湖水深度側檢視。然後玩家就可以用魚餌來吸引魚了，魚上鉤後，就可以把它收起來了。

overview_en: Don't miss your chance to compete in the most realistic fishing game for the Genesis. Featuring pro bass anglers George Cochran, Shaw Grigsby Jr., Gary Klein, Tom Mann Jr., Dee Thomas and Kevin VanDam, BASS MASTERS CLASSIC PRO EDITION brings world championship bass fishing indoors! Compete as one of six actual pro fishermen or as an amateur enthusiast in the Bass Masters Classic. Fish the waters in five three-day tournaments at five different lakes. Rich graphics recreate the outdoor fishing experience in vivid detail. Choose your rod, reel, lure, and even boat engine.
overview_zh: 不要錯過參加最真實的 Genesis 釣魚遊戲的機會。 BASS MASTERS CLASSIC PRO EDITION 以專業鱸魚釣手 George Cochran、Shaw Grigsby Jr.、Gary Klein、Tom Mann Jr.、Dee Thomas 和 Kevin VanDam 為主角，將世界冠軍鱸魚釣魚帶到室內！作為六名真正的職業漁民之一或作為業餘愛好者參加低音大師經典賽。在五個不同湖泊的五場為期三天的錦標賽中釣魚。豐富的圖形以生動的細節再現戶外釣魚體驗。選擇您的釣竿、釣線輪、魚餌，甚至船用引擎。

overview_en: Batman is a 1990 Mega Drive side-scrolling action platformer video game developed and released by Sunsoft in Japan on July 27, 1990.
overview_zh: 蝙蝠俠是一款 1990 年 Mega Drive 橫向捲軸動作平臺遊戲，由 Sunsoft 開發並於 1990 年 7 月 27 日在日本發行。

title_jp: バットマン フォーエヴァー
overview_en:
The Real Game Begins! BATMAN FOREVER! Brace yourself for endless action with BATMAN FOREVER! BATMAN and ROBIN blast into GOTHAM CITY in a duo-player fighting game! Armed with over 125 incredible attacks, fierce combat moves, and an arsenal of gadgets, the DYNAMIC DUO are ready to battle the diabolical minds of TWO-FACE and THE RIDDLER! Without question... it's BATMAN FOREVER! Featuring over 80 unbelieveable stages! Incredible 3-D computer-rendered graphics! Real digitized characters and backgrounds! Team up as Batman and Robin and find tons of secret rooms and hidden surprises!

UPC / Barcode: 021481800194
overview_zh:
真正的遊戲開始了！永遠的蝙蝠俠！做好準備，與永遠的蝙蝠俠一起迎接無盡的行動吧！蝙蝠俠和羅賓在雙人格鬥遊戲中衝進哥譚市！活力二人組擁有超過 125 種令人難以置信的攻擊、激烈的戰鬥動作和大量的小工具，準備好與 TWO-FACE 和 THE RIDDLER 的邪惡思想作戰！毫無疑問...這是永遠的蝙蝠俠！擁有超過 80 個令人難以置信的舞臺！令人難以置信的 3D 電腦渲染圖形！真實的數位化角色和背景！扮演蝙蝠俠和羅賓，發現大量秘密房間和隱藏的驚喜！

UPC/條碼：021481800194

title_jp: バットマン・リターンズ
overview_en:
The Genesis title based on Batman Returns is a platform game in which the Dark Knight must traverse five action-filled levels on his way to confront the Penguin.

Areas include the rooftops of Gotham City, Max Shreck's department store, the Red Triangle Circus and the sewers. Besides run-and-jump action, there's also a lot of combat in the game, as many of the Penguin's henchmen stand in Batman's way. He can knock them out with punches and kicks and a number of extra weapons stored in his utility belt. These include batarangs, which come in standard and self-seeking varieties, and smoke bombs that stun enemies for a while. In addition, Batman can shoot from his grappling gun and unleash a deadly swarm of bats towards enemies. All of these weapons have limited ammo, however, that must be collected.

Other special tools Batman can use include the grappling hook to reach high places or swing across chasms, and his cape, which can be used to slow falls.

Each of the five levels features several boss battles against Catwoman, the Penguin and others.
overview_zh:
基於《蝙蝠俠大顯神威》的《創世記》是一款平臺遊戲，其中黑闇騎士必須穿越五個充滿動作的關卡才能對抗企鵝。

區域包括哥譚市的屋頂、麥克斯·史萊克的百貨公司、紅色三角馬戲團和下水道。除了奔跑和跳躍的動作之外，遊戲中還有很多戰鬥，因為許多企鵝人的追隨者擋住了蝙蝠俠的道路。他可以用拳打腳踢以及儲存在他的多功能腰帶中的一些額外武器來擊倒他們。其中包括蝙蝠鏢（有標準型和自尋式型），以及使敵人昏迷一段時間的煙霧彈。此外，蝙蝠俠還可以用他的擒抱槍射擊並向敵人釋放致命的蝙蝠群。然而，所有這些武器的彈藥都有限，必須收集。

蝙蝠俠可以使用的其他特殊工具包括用於到達高處或跨越裂縫的抓鉤，以及可用於減緩墜落速度的斗篷。

五個關卡中的每一關都有與貓女、企鵝等人的幾場 Boss 戰。

overview_en:
The Genesis title based on Batman Returns is a platform game in which the Dark Knight must traverse five action-filled levels on his way to confront the Penguin.

Areas include the rooftops of Gotham City, Max Shreck's department store, the Red Triangle Circus and the sewers. Besides run-and-jump action, there's also a lot of combat in the game, as many of the Penguin's henchmen stand in Batman's way. He can knock them out with punches and kicks and a number of extra weapons stored in his utility belt. These include batarangs, which come in standard and self-seeking varieties, and smoke bombs that stun enemies for a while. In addition, Batman can shoot from his grappling gun and unleash a deadly swarm of bats towards enemies. All of these weapons have limited ammo, however, that must be collected.

Other special tools Batman can use include the grappling hook to reach high places or swing across chasms, and his cape, which can be used to slow falls.

Each of the five levels features several boss battles against Catwoman, the Penguin and others.
overview_zh:
基於《蝙蝠俠大顯神威》的《創世記》是一款平臺遊戲，其中黑闇騎士必須穿越五個充滿動作的關卡才能對抗企鵝。

區域包括哥譚市的屋頂、麥克斯·史萊克的百貨公司、紅色三角馬戲團和下水道。除了奔跑和跳躍的動作之外，遊戲中還有很多戰鬥，因為許多企鵝人的追隨者擋住了蝙蝠俠的道路。他可以用拳打腳踢以及儲存在他的多功能腰帶中的一些額外武器來擊倒他們。其中包括蝙蝠鏢（有標準型和自尋式型），以及使敵人昏迷一段時間的煙霧彈。此外，蝙蝠俠還可以用他的擒抱槍射擊並向敵人釋放致命的蝙蝠群。然而，所有這些武器的彈藥都有限，必須收集。

蝙蝠俠可以使用的其他特殊工具包括用於到達高處或跨越裂縫的抓鉤，以及可用於減緩墜落速度的斗篷。

五個關卡中的每一關都有與貓女、企鵝等人的幾場 Boss 戰。

overview_en:
The Joker lives again in Sunsoft's sequel to their NES original. The Joker has somehow managed to escape from Arkham Asylum once again, and Batman must fight him across seven stages to restore peace to Gotham City.

Batman carries a gauntlet shooting basic bullets by default. This can be upgraded with weapon powerups located in boxes throughout the level, giving access to homing and energy weapons. Every upgrade weapon can be charged up for a secondary attack, different for each weapon. Batman also has a slide useful against most enemies and some bosses. 

Boss fights introduce a system where life is measured by points instead of tick marks or bars. In these sections, Batman has significantly more health, and can take many more hits when rumbling with these stronger foes.

Levels include a snowy landscape, moving train, military base, and sewers. Two levels require you to run and dodge explosions while vehicles keep pace in the background. Some levels also have Batman activate a jetpack and play through a short side-scrolling shooter. 

This game is one of the few Batman games that was not based directly on a movie or television series.
overview_zh:
小丑再次出現在 Sunsoft 的 NES 原版續作中。小丑不知何故再次逃離了阿卡漢瘋人院，蝙蝠俠必須在七個階段與他戰鬥，以恢復高譚市的和平。

蝙蝠俠預設攜帶手套射擊基本子彈。這可以透過位於整個關卡中的盒子中的武器強化進行升級，從而可以使用尋的武器和能量武器。每個升級武器都可以為二次攻擊充電，每種武器的情況不同。蝙蝠俠還有一個對付大多數敵人和一些首領的幻燈片。 

Boss 戰引入了一種系統，其中生命是透過點而不是刻度線或條來衡量的。在這些部分中，蝙蝠俠的生命值顯著提高，並且在與這些更強大的敵人戰鬥時可以承受更多的打擊。

關卡包括雪景、移動的火車、軍事基地和下水道。兩個關卡要求您奔跑並躲避爆炸，同時車輛在後臺保持速度。有些關卡還讓蝙蝠俠啟動噴射揹包並透過短篇橫向捲軸射擊遊戲進行遊戲。 

該遊戲是少數不直接基於電影或電視劇的蝙蝠俠遊戲之一。

overview_en:
Let the battle begin.

This is your chance to battle the diabolical Joker for the freedom of Gotham City.

Incredibly strong and armed to the teeth with a vengeance, Batman is prepared to put his life on the line to seek out The Joker and put an end to his evil reign of terror.

But it will not be easy. With the help of the Batmobile, Batwing, and you, Batman will face an army of deadly enemies as he leaps, flies, and dodges their fire on his way to The Joker's hideaway.

Prepare yourself for thrilling excitement, action-packed adventure, and awesome power. The Joker awaits you!
overview_zh:
讓戰鬥開始吧。

這是你與邪惡的小丑戰鬥，爭取哥譚市自由的機會。

蝙蝠俠身強力壯，武裝到牙齒，帶著復仇的心，準備冒著生命危險去尋找小丑，結束他邪惡的恐怖統治。

但這並不容易。在蝙蝠車、蝙蝠翼和你的幫助下，蝙蝠俠在前往小丑藏身處的途中將面對致命敵人的大軍，他將跳躍、飛行並躲避他們的火力。

準備好迎接令人興奮的刺激、動感十足的冒險和強大的力量。小丑在等你！

overview_en:
Gil Hazard, president of the Hazard Foundation, is secretly Professor G, the leader of the evil Dark Hazard organization. He has designs on world domination, and has plans to use the power of golf toward this end; this is the Battle Golfer project. Yui Mizuhara and Ran Ryuzaki are two ordinary high school girls who just so happen to be golf prodigies, and so are prime candidates for the Battle Golfer project. They are abducted by Professor G, but are rescued by a mysterious man before they can be taken under his control. 

Having escaped, Yui hears about a golf tournament being held by the Hazard Foundation, and suspecting more nefarious plans, she secretly enters the tournament to stop him for good.
overview_zh: 《Battle Golfer 唯》是 1991 年 2 月 15 日由 SEGA 世嘉發售的 Mega Drive 高爾夫遊戲，採用 4 Mbit ROM 卡帶。融合高爾夫競技與漫畫風敘事，玩家在故事中與各式對手對戰。
overview_jp: 『バトルゴルファー唯』（バトルゴルファーゆい）は、1991年2月15日にセガが発売したメガドライブ用ゴルフゲーム。4メガビットロムカセットでリリースされた。

overview_en:
Trouble Shooter, known in Japan as Battle Mania (バトルマニア), is a scrolling shooter developed and published by Vic Tokai for the Mega Drive/Genesis in 1991. The game was given a very distinct theme of self-parody between the enemies, story and dialogue. A sequel titled Battle Mania Daiginjō (バトルマニア 大吟醸) was also released for the Mega Drive in Japan and Korea only.

Genre(s): Shooter
overview_zh: 《Battle Mania》是 1992 年 3 月 6 日由 Vic Tokai 發售的 Mega Drive 射擊遊戲。
overview_jp: 『バトルマニア』は、1992年3月6日にビック東海から発売されたメガドライブ用シューティングゲームである。

title_zh: 戰鬥瑪莉亞 2 大吟釀
overview_en:
Trouble Shooter, known in Japan as Battle Mania (バトルマニア), is a scrolling shooter developed and published by Vic Tokai for the Mega Drive/Genesis in 1991. The game was given a very distinct theme of self-parody between the enemies, story and dialogue. A sequel titled Battle Mania Daiginjō (バトルマニア 大吟醸) was also released for the Mega Drive in Japan and Korea only.

Genre(s): Shooter
overview_zh: 《Battle Mania 大吟釀》是 1993 年 12 月 24 日由 Vic Tokai 發售的 Mega Drive 射擊遊戲，為《Battle Mania》系列第 2 作。
overview_jp: 『バトルマニア大吟醸』（バトルマニアだいぎんじょう）は、1993年12月24日にビック東海から発売されたメガドライブ用シューティングゲームである。

overview_en: A group calling itself the Kikokukyou have resurrected the leader of Blackball, the antagonist group of the original game, and the Trouble Shooters are called to stop Blackball and destroy Kikokukyou.
overview_zh: 一個自稱「鬼國協」的組織復活了原版遊戲中的敵對組織「黑球」的領導者，「麻煩射手」被召集來阻止「黑球」並摧毀「鬼國協」。

overview_en:
Battle Squadron is a classic arcade style shooter for 1 or 2 players, and a spiritual successor to Hybris. You take a space ship and fly it over a high tech hostile surface, and then into an organic setting. .

You can control the number of 'credits' you have from 1 to 3. You choose how many lives you get. You also get to choose the max number of enemy bullets and their speed.

You get powerups along the way that modify your weapons, and also the "Nova Smart Bomb".
overview_zh:
Battle Squadron 是一款適合 1 或 2 名玩家的經典街機風格射擊遊戲，也是 Hybris 的精神繼承者。你駕駛一艘太空船，將其飛越高科技的敵對錶面，然後進入有機環境。 。

您可以控制您擁有的“學分”數量，從 1 到 3。您可以選擇獲得多少生命。您還可以選擇敵人子彈的最大數量及其速度。

你會在修改武器的過程中獲得能量提升，還有「新星智慧炸彈」。

overview_en:
The player decides which race they want to play (Human, Orc, Dwarf or Elf) each with their own strengths and weaknesses. It is then a matter of clearing out areas of opponents and finding items to enhance your character's and companions abilities.

There are many traps to avoid and death is a constant in what most people would find a very tough game.

Gameplay for leader is action-oriented, with a menu that allows to Parley/Travel/Rally Troops, change formations or use items. The leader attacks with Melee and Projectile buttons. Some classes are more reliant on teammates than others. "Parley" allows you to buy (but not sell) items, or buy a Safe Pass (skip the area)
overview_zh:
玩家根據自己的優勢和劣勢決定自己想要玩的種族（人類、獸人、矮人或精靈）。然後就是清除對手區域並尋找物品來增強角色和同伴能力的問題。

在大多數人看來這是一款非常艱難的遊戲，有很多陷阱需要避免，死亡是一個常數。

領導者的遊戲玩法以行動為導向，選單允許談判/旅行/集結部隊，改變陣型或使用物品。領導者使用近戰和投射按鈕進行攻擊。有些班級比其他班級更依賴隊友。 「Parley」允許您購買（但不能出售）物品，或購買安全通行證（跳過該區域）

title_en: BattleTech - A Game of Armored Combat
no_intro_name: BattleTech - A Game of Armored Combat (USA)
overview_en:
The 31st century is a brutal and violent place. The galaxy is racked by a devastating war waged with gigantic 75-ton BattleMechs teeming with the most ruinous weapons that science can create. MechWarriors like you are needed to pilot the "Madcat" Heavy OmniMech on desperate missions against enemy installations! This is the world of BATTLETECH! Alone against the relentless onslaught of hordes of enemy defenders, you'll need skill and cunning to knock out your objectives. Steer your lumbering 'Mech into the savage fury of a hornet's nest of attackers, and cut loose with the Madcat's incredible firepower to lay waste to all before you! Fight to the last for a victory that will bring you honor and glory! And if honor isn't motivation enough, it helps to remember that the enemy doesn't take prisoners...

The game has the player control a Mech outfitted with an arsenal of missiles and energy weapons in missions that take place on a large map. The player can freely roam around and explore the mission's map before tackling the objectives of the stage. The main single player mode in the came is a campaign that tasks them with several objectives spanning various missions. These can be getting to objective points, clearing out enemies, or escorting convoys across the map. The game contains a cooperative two player mode where one player controls the bottom half of the Mech to navigate it around the battlefield while the other player controls the top half of the Mech and its arsenal independently.
overview_zh:
31世紀是一個殘酷、暴力的世紀。銀河係正遭受一場毀滅性戰爭的折磨，戰爭的重達 75 噸的巨型戰機配備了科學所能製造的最具毀滅性的武器。像您這樣的機甲戰士需要駕駛「Madcat」重型全機甲，執行對抗敵方設施的絕望任務！這就是 BATTLETECH 的世界！獨自對抗成群結隊的敵方防禦者的無情攻擊，你需要技巧和狡猾來摧毀你的目標。駕駛你笨重的機甲衝進攻擊者的馬蜂窩，用狂貓令人難以置信的火力衝鋒陷陣，將你面前的一切夷為平地！戰鬥到最後以獲得勝利，這將為您帶來榮譽和榮耀！如果榮譽還不足以激勵你，那麼記住敵人不會俘虜俘虜會有所幫助...

遊戲讓玩家控制裝備飛彈和能量武器的機甲，執行在大地圖上進行的任務。在實現階段目標之前，玩家可以自由漫遊並探索任務地圖。主要的單人遊戲模式是一場戰役，要求他們完成跨越不同任務的多個目標。這些任務可以是到達目標點、清除敵人或護送車隊穿越地圖。遊戲包含兩人合作模式，其中一名玩家控制機甲的下半部以在戰場上導航，而另一名玩家則獨立控制機甲的上半部及其武器庫。

overview_en: After her defeat by the Galactic Corporation at the battle of Canis Major, the evil Dark Queen and her renegade space troops retreat to the outer reaches of the universe, hiding out in dark spaces between the stars. Meanwhile, on board the spaceship Vulture, Professor T. Bird and the trio of Battletoads - Rash, Zitz and Pimple - are escorting the Princess Angelica back to her home planet, where her father, the Terran Emperor, awaits her safe arrival. Along the way, Pimple, the biggest Battletoad, takes Angelica out for a cruise in the Toadster to a nearby Leisure Station, but the Dark Queen ambushes them before they can get there, and they are kidnapped and carried away to Ragnarok's World, the Dark Queen's planet. Professor Bird sends remaining Battletoads down on Ragnarok to save Pimple and Angelica, but it will be a hard battle against planet's dangerous environments, traps and Dark Queen's troops. They have to go a long way from the planet's rough surface to deep caves and landed Gargantua and ultimately to the Tower of Shadows, where the Dark Queen awaits.
overview_zh: 《忍者蛙》（Battletoads）是英國 Rare 開發、Tradewest 於 1991 年發行的橫向捲軸動作遊戲。日本紅白機版由 Messiah 發售，Game Gear 與 Mega Drive 版則由 SEGA 世嘉發售。1993 年於北美推出的 Game Boy 版以《Battletoads in Ragnarok's World》之名發售。玩家操作三隻擬人化戰鬥蛙以拳腳與誇張變形動作擊敗敵人。
overview_jp:
『バトルトード』（Battletoads）は、イギリスのレアが開発しTradewestより1991年発売された横スクロールアクションゲーム。日本では、ファミリーコンピュータ版がメサイヤから、ゲームギア版とメガドライブ版がセガから発売された。
1993年に北米で発売されたゲームボーイ版のタイトルは『Battletoads in Ragnarok's World』となっている。

overview_en: When a battlecruiser the size of a city and called the Colossus smashes out of the moon, its laser cannon glowing menacingly, you can bet it ain't gonna be makin' no social calls... You can bet it's gonna be creating some bad n' crazy mayhem on good ol' planet Earth - 'specially when you know that the dreaded Dark Queen and the shady Shadow Boss are on board just rarin' to rock n' roll... The dastardly duo are about to unleash their most monstrous plan yet - from their secret lunar base they intend to launch an invasion that'll make them masters of the world... Neutralized by deadly glooming rays, Earth's forces are powerless... That is, until the Dragons join the 'Toads! Take a 'toadacious trip with the dream ticket as those terrific twins Billy and Jimmy Lee team up with Zitz, Flash and Pimple against the combined might of the gruesome twosome and their mindless minions Big Blag, Abobo, Robo-Manus and Roper, in a 'toadally terminal new adventure! So lets get mad, bad n' crazy once again as the BATTLETOADS join DOUBLE DRAGON in THE ULTIMATE TEAM!
overview_zh: 當一艘名為巨像號的戰列巡洋艦從月球上墜落時，它的鐳射炮發出威脅性的光芒，你可以打賭它不會發出任何社交電話……你可以打賭它會在美好的地球上製造一些糟糕而瘋狂的混亂——特別是當你知道可怕的黑暗女王和陰暗的影子老大就在船上，正在瘋狂地搖滾的混亂——特別是當你知道他們可怕的黑暗女王和陰暗的影子老大就在船上，正在瘋狂地搖滾……迄今為止的可怕地搖滾……他們迄今為止最可怕的二人組 -他們打算從他們的秘密月球基地發起一場入侵，使他們成為世界的主人......被致命的陰暗射線中和，地球的力量變得無能為力......也就是說，直到龍加入“蟾蜍！”帶著夢想門票踏上一場“大膽的旅行”，比利和吉米·李這對雙胞胎與齊茲、弗萊士和皮普爾聯手對抗這對可怕波波的二人組以及他們愚蠢的大爪、阿珀羅、卡梅羅、阿珀羅的二人組以及他們愚蠢的大爪、阿珀羅的聯合冒險、阿珀羅的那麼，隨著 BATTLETOADS 加入雙龍成為終極團隊，讓我們再次瘋狂、瘋狂吧！

title_jp: ビースト・ウォリアーズ
overview_en:
Beast Warriors was released roughly around the same time as Treco’s Fighting Masters which while not a great game it’s certainly has some entertainment value. Now being a fan of Telenet you’d think I’d side with Battle Monsters being the better monster battler. Sadly not. Telenet’s Riot team have produced one hell of a steaming pile of crap. In fact you can tell right away that this game is going to be a dud as soon as you pass the title screen. No options or decent game modes to choose from. Basically you get Player VS CPU or Player VS Player. That’s it.

In game graphics are average at best although there is quite a bit of sprite flicker at times when two beasts line up against each other. Not really acceptable in a game when you only have 2 moving characters on screen. Mind you, the audio is far worse than the graphics. Awful tunes with what I think are a few grunts from the beasts. The samples are that low in quality that I can hardly tell.

But wait, maybe this game looks and sounds so bad because it plays so well? Afraid not. Beast Warriors plays just how it looks and sounds, awful. The controls are ropey, collision detection is a mystery at times and the AI of the CPU seems to pull off moves that just wouldn’t be possible. There’s no question about it. The best aspect of Beast Warriors is the cover art which to be fair is very nice. If you’re the kind of person who buys games for their cover art then I’d say this would be on top of your shopping list but for the rest of us this game should be flushed down the toilet with the rest of the shit.
overview_zh:
《Beast Warriors》與 Treco 的《格鬥大師》大約在同一時間發布，雖然不是一款出色的遊戲，但它確實具有一定的娛樂價值。現在作為 Telenet 的粉絲，你可能會認為我會支援《Battle Monsters》成為更好的怪物戰鬥者。遺憾的是沒有。 Telenet 的 Riot 團隊製造了一堆熱氣騰騰的垃圾。事實上，一旦你經過標題畫面，你就可以立即看出這款遊戲將是一個失敗的遊戲。沒有選項或不錯的遊戲模式可供選擇。基本上你會得到玩家 VS CPU 或玩家 VS 玩家。就是這樣。

在遊戲中，圖形充其量只是平均水平，儘管當兩隻野獸相互對抗時有時會出現相當多的精靈閃爍。當螢幕上只有 2 個移動角色時，這在遊戲中是不可接受的。請注意，音訊比圖形差得多。曲調很糟糕，我認為是野獸發出的一些咕嚕聲。這些樣品的品質很低，我幾乎無法判斷。

但是等等，也許這個遊戲看起來和聽起來都很糟糕，因為它玩得很好？恐怕不是。 《野獸無雙》的演奏方式看起來和聽起來都很糟糕。控制裝置很笨拙，碰撞偵測有時是一個謎，CPU 的人工智慧似乎可以完成不可能的動作。毫無疑問。 《野獸無雙》最好的方面是封面藝術，公平地說非常漂亮。如果你是那種為了封面藝術而購買遊戲的人，那麼我想說這將是你購物清單的首位，但對於我們其他人來說，這款遊戲應該和其他垃圾一起沖進馬桶。

overview_en:
War of the Manmade Monsters!

Life Science industries of the future have created the world's greatest sports warriors. Averaging 25 feet tall and weighing several tons each, these gigantic wrestlers grapple for the ultimate championship!

Control your own titanic beast and master the various deathblow techniques. Use prize money to beef up your giant or enroll him in battle training events. Work with a Life Science team to create the most powerful fighter ever built by man!

-Choose from a variety of bizarre and mighty Super Beasts!
-Defeat the domestic champion to take on World-ranked players.
-1 or 2 player earth-shaking, blockbusting action!
overview_zh:
人造怪物之戰！

未來的生命科學產業創造了世界上最偉大的體育戰士。這些巨大的摔角手平均身高 25 英尺，體重數噸，為爭奪最終冠軍而奮鬥！

控制你自己的泰坦巨獸並掌握各種致命一擊技巧。使用獎金來增強你的巨人或讓他參加戰鬥訓練活動。與生命科學團隊合作，創造人類有史以來最強大的戰鬥機！

-從各種奇怪而強大的超級野獸中進行選擇！
-擊敗國內冠軍，挑戰世界排名選手。
-1或2名玩家驚天動地、轟動一時的動作！

title_en: Beauty and the Beast - Belle's Quest
no_intro_name: Beauty and the Beast - Belle's Quest (USA)

title_en: Beauty and the Beast - Roar of the Beast
no_intro_name: Beauty and the Beast - Roar of the Beast (USA)

overview_en:
Based on the successful cartoon 'Beavis and Butt-head', the game is very faithful to the series.

It game stars at the home of Beavis and Butt-head - and from there you can choose to go to different locations like: Turbo mall 2000, the street, burger world, hospital, GWAR concert and more... your main goal is to find money to the GWAR concert.
overview_zh:
遊戲以成功的卡通「比維斯與大頭」為基礎，非常忠於該系列。

遊戲的主角是 Beavis 和 Butt-head 的家 - 從那裡你可以選擇去不同的地點，如：Turbo mall 2000、街道、漢堡世界、醫院、GWAR 音樂會等等......你的主要目標是為 GWAR 音樂會籌集資金。

overview_en: The snobby, selfish prince of Shatt Kingdom unknowingly aids a great threat to his world after he switches places with a beggar who looks just like him. Wanting only to escape the daily drudgery of his palace life, he has no idea what evil lies in wait around every corner. This careless brat of a boy is now the last chance for his kingdom to remain in peace, rather than be enveloped in chaos. Guide him on his way to learning the path of a true prince, and save his world from sinking into darkness.
overview_zh: 沙烏地王國勢利、自私的王子在與一個長得一模一樣的乞丐交換位置後，不知不覺地給他的世界帶來了巨大的威脅。他只想逃離宮廷生活中的日常苦差事，卻不知道每個角落都潛伏著什麼邪惡。這個粗心的小男孩現在是他的王國保持和平而不是陷入混亂的最後機會。引導他走上真正王子的道路，拯救他的世界免於陷入黑暗。

title_en: Best of the Best - Championship Karate
no_intro_name: Best of the Best - Championship Karate (Europe)
overview_en: Best of the Best Championship Karate is a realistic fighting game. After you choose your fighter for his parameters (strength, stamina and resistance), you can choose from 55 different moves. You can now train your fighter at a gym before the real fights. To master the game, one must alternate training and fights, as training improves stamina, strength and resistance. Be careful, loosing a fight reduces those parameters, so you have to be ready before getting on the ring !
overview_zh: 最佳冠軍空手道是一款逼真的格鬥遊戲。在根據戰士的引數（力量、耐力和抵抗力）選擇戰士後，您可以從 55 種不同的動作中進行選擇。現在，您可以在真正的戰鬥之前在健身房訓練您的拳擊手。為了掌握這項運動，必須交替訓練和戰鬥，因為訓練可以提高耐力、力量和抵抗力。小心，輸掉一場比賽會降低這些引數，所以你必須在上擂臺之前做好準備！

overview_en: Three games in one cartridge! NOAH'S ARK: Help Noah fill the ark with animals before the big flood arrives. SAVE BABY MOSES: It's you against Pharaoh's soldiers as you try to carry baby Moses safely down the Nila River. DAVID & GOLIATH: Play young David as a shepherd defending the family's flock. After rounding up the sheep, David meets his ultimate challenge by battling the mighty Goliath!
overview_zh: 一卡帶三款遊戲！諾亞方舟：在大洪水到來之前幫助諾亞把動物裝滿方舟。拯救小摩西：當你試圖帶著小摩西安全地沿著尼拉河順流而下時，你將與法老計程車兵對抗。大衛與歌利亞：飾演年輕的大衛，飾演牧羊人，保衛家人的羊群。圍捕羊群後，大衛迎接了他的終極挑戰，與強大的歌利亞戰鬥！

overview_en:
The game features 24 college football teams from the 1993 season and 24 of the all-time college teams since 1978. Play modes include exhibition, playoffs and all-time playoffs.

The playbook consists of 56 offensive plays and 52 defensive plays. On offense, running backs can dive, spin and hurdle. Also, passing is dealt with by having the receivers in their own windowed boxes. When on defense, defenders can dive at the ball carrier, and raise hands to block kicks or intercept passes.

The game also features four weather conditions (fair, windy, rain and snow), and three different quarter lengths (20, 40 and 60 minutes).
overview_zh:
該遊戲擁有 1993 年賽季的 24 支大學橄欖球隊和 1978 年以來的 24 支歷史大學橄欖球隊。比賽模式包括表演賽、季後賽和歷史季後賽。

該戰術由56個進攻戰術和52個防守戰術組成。在進攻中，跑衛可以俯衝、旋轉和跨欄。此外，透過將接收器放在自己的視窗盒子中來處理傳球。防守時，防守球員可以撲向持球者，並舉手阻擋踢球或攔截傳球。

遊戲還具有四種天氣條件（晴天、刮風、下雨和下雪）和三種不同的季度長度（20、40 和 60 分鐘）。

overview_en:
The game features 24 college football teams from the 1993 season and 24 of the all-time college teams since 1978. Play modes include exhibition, playoffs and all-time playoffs.

The playbook consists of 56 offensive plays and 52 defensive plays. On offense, running backs can dive, spin and hurdle. Also, passing is dealt with by having the receivers in their own windowed boxes. When on defense, defenders can dive at the ball carrier, and raise hands to block kicks or intercept passes.

The game also features four weather conditions (fair, windy, rain and snow), and three different quarter lengths (20, 40 and 60 minutes).

該戰術由56個進攻戰術和52個防守戰術組成。在進攻中，跑衛可以俯衝、旋轉和跨欄。此外，透過將接收器放在自己的視窗盒子中來處理傳球。防守時，防守球員可以撲向持球者，並舉手阻擋踢球或攔截傳球。

遊戲還具有四種天氣條件（晴天、刮風、下雨和下雪）和三種不同的季度長度（20、40 和 60 分鐘）。

overview_en:
You are Kenji Ohara, a motor boat expert. The evil Dr. Orca has kidnapped your sister Kim. Together with your best friend Luka you must find his hideout on a deserted island, and rescue your sister from his clutches. But that won't be easy, as Dr. Orca has sent his henchmen to stop you!

This is a sailing action game. You navigate your motor boat from a third person perspective view, increasing and decreasing your speed, avoiding yachts and other obstacles, and shooting down the enemies who are trying to stop you.
overview_zh:
你是大原健二，摩托艇專家。邪惡的奧卡博士綁架了你的妹妹金。你必須和你最好的朋友盧卡一起在荒島上找到他的藏身之處，並從他的手中救出你的妹妹。但這並不容易，因為虎鯨博士已派出他的追隨者來阻止你！

這是一款航海動作遊戲。您從第三人稱視角駕駛摩托艇，增加和降低速度，避開遊艇和其他障礙物，並擊落試圖阻止您的敵人。

overview_en:
TWISTED, TOXIC MUTOIDS ON THE RAMPAGE!

Grotesque biological horrors terrorize the planet Avaron. Command Plasma Rings, Implosion Pods, and Seeker Lasers to blast mutoids into oblivion. Aim white-hot fireballs at mega amoebas and nuclear crabs. Cut down poisonous electro-worms and gut-grabbing insects.

Scream down cavernous mineshafts. Dive to the ocean floor. Pierce the defenses of the Biowar Lab complex, piloting your ship to the lab's core. There, the unspeakable awaits.

• Battle awesome bio-beasts through 8 levels of stunning graphics and non-stop bone-rattling action!
• Choose between 4 Bioship fightercraft - each with 4 completely different weapons systems.
• Ingest Energy Seeds to power your ship and fight the horrors of a biogenetic nightmare.
overview_zh:
扭曲、有毒的類人狂暴！

怪異的生物恐怖使阿瓦隆星球陷入恐懼。命令等離子環、內爆莢和導引雷射將類變體炸毀。將白熱火球瞄準巨型變形蟲和核蟹。消滅有毒的電蟲和抓腸昆蟲。

尖叫著衝下洞穴般的礦坑。潛入海底。突破生化戰爭實驗室綜合體的防禦，駕駛你的太空船前往實驗室的核心。在那裡，難以言喻的等待著。

• 透過 8 個令人驚嘆的圖形關卡和不間斷的驚心動魄的動作，與可怕的生物野獸戰鬥！
• 在 4 架 Bioship 戰鬥機中進行選擇 - 每架都有 4 種完全不同的武器系統。
• 攝取能量種子為你的飛船提供動力並對抗生物遺傳噩夢的恐怖。

overview_en:
Uchuu Senkan Gomora (宇宙戦艦ゴモラ), is a shoot-em-up by UPL, originally released in 1990 for the arcade, and then ported to the Sega Mega Drive in 1991. While the arcade version was released overseas (in the US under license from American Sammy under the name Bio-Ship Paladin), the MD version was only released in Japan — however an American title screen is present in the ROM and displayable if the region is set to US, which may mean a US release was planned (this is unconfirmed). It is UPL's only Mega Drive game — they would go bankrupt shortly after publishing it (the later Task Force Harrier EX was ported and published by Treco).

A shoots your weapons; the laser weapon from your main ship can be charged by holding A. B allows you to take control of a beam shot. While B is held down, the D-pad will move a box-shaped target on the screen and A will shoot beam shots toward the target. C is listed as "PAD MODE" but does not appear to do anything. In each level, you can get orbs which give you either subships that shoot weapons diagonally or certain powerups (such as an automatically moving beam target or doubling the size of your ship).

Pressing Start at the title screen gives you a configuration menu where you can, among other things, choose to play one of two 2-player modes. Normal 2-player mode is 2-player cooperative (two ships on screen at once), while another option allows the second player to take control of the beam laser while you take control of the main ship.
overview_zh: 《宇宙戰艦 Gomora》是 1990 年 11 月由 UPL 推出的大型電玩橫向捲軸射擊遊戲，海外名為《Bio-ship Paladin》。玩家操作自機 Gomora，目的是阻止入侵行星 Atlantal 的敵軍。可雙人同時遊玩，全 9 關 1 周破關。逐漸巨大化的自機與攻防一體的雷射光束帶來獨特戰略性。設計師為藤澤勉。家用版於 1991 年發售 Mega Drive 版。
overview_jp:
『宇宙戦艦ゴモラ』（うちゅうせんかんゴモラ）は、1990年11月にUPLからリリースされたアーケード用横スクロールシューティングゲーム。日本国外では『Bio-ship Paladin』のタイトルでリリースされた。
自機のゴモラを操作して惑星アトランタルを侵略することを目的としている。
2人同時プレイ可能。全9面。1周エンド。徐々に巨大化する自機、攻防一体のビームによる独特の戦略性が特徴。ゲームデザイナーは藤沢勉。
家庭用は1991年にメガドライブ版が発売。2021年にアーケードアーカイブスの1作品としてPlayStation 4版とNintendo Switch版が配信された。

title_jp: 美少女戦士セーラームーン
overview_en: Bishoujo Senshi Sailor Moon (美少女戦士セーラームーン) is a beat 'em up arcade game developed by Arc System Works and TNS and published by Ma-Ba, based on the Sailor Moon anime & manga series. This game originally released in 1993 by Angel for the Super Famicom. This version was never released outside Japan.
overview_zh: 《美少女戩士セーラームーン》是一款由 Arc System Works 和 TNS 開發、Ma-Ba 發行的街機遊戲，改編自《美少女戰士》動漫和漫畫系列。該遊戲最初由 Angel 於 1993 年為 Super Famicom 發行。該版本從未在日本以外地區發行。

title_jp: ブラックホールアサルト

overview_en: The evil Dark Lady has unleashed an onslaught of barbarians and beasts upon the land, and it's your duty to come face-to-face with all that she can throw at you in an attempt to protect your homeland. In BLADES OF VENGEANCE, you can choose your gladiator from three different classes: Huntress, Warrior, or Sorcerer. Each character has its own special powers and abilities, so you'll have to decide which one best fits your fighting style and then get ready for the fight of your life! Along with your standard weapons battle-axe, rapier, mace, crossbow, and fireball you can also make yourself invincible with special armor and weapons that are strewn about each of the eight levels. If you've got the strength and courage to defeat all eight of the bosses, then you'll have a shot at the Dark Lady are you ready?
overview_zh: 邪惡的黑暗女士在這片土地上釋放了野蠻人和野獸的猛攻，你有責任面對她向你發起的一切，以保護你的家園。在《復仇之刃》中，你可以從三個不同的職業中選擇你的角鬥士：女獵手、戰士或巫師。每個角色都有自己的特殊能力和能力，所以你必須決定哪一個最適合你的戰鬥風格，然後為你一生的戰鬥做好準備！除了你的標準武器——戰斧、細劍、狼牙棒、十字弓和火球之外，你還可以使用分佈在八個關卡中的特殊盔甲和武器讓自己立於不敗之地。如果您有力量和勇氣擊敗全部八個 Boss，那麼您將有機會挑戰黑暗女士，您準備好了嗎？

overview_en: It has been four years since Jason's Encounter with the Plutonium Boss and the radioactive mutants under the Earth. His only reminder of the incident is S.O.P.H.I.A., the vehicle he used to stop them, which he has hidden in an abandoned barn. One day, one bolt of lightning struck the house and caused the ceiling to crumble, knocking Jason unconscious. When Jason woke up, S.O.P.H.I.A. was in pieces and the parts he had collected from his first dealings with the Mutant Bosses were missing. Little does Jason know that there are more lightning beings where the first one came from and they are planning to destroy the Earth. The beings started digging towards the Earth's core in order to shift the planet's weight off its axis, leading to total annihilation. The parts from S.O.P.H.I.A. are being used to create a robotic army to assist the being in accomplishing their mission. Now, Jason must stop them, but he won't make it without the help of S.O.P.H.I.A. Since he can't recover the parts, he decided to redesign it to better prepare himself for the ordeal facing him. After 29 days, S.O.P.H.I.A. was completely rebuilt and ready for battle. Remembering where he saw the being's footsteps, Jason jumped in his vehicle and headed towards the mountains where the challenge begins.
overview_zh: 距離傑森遭遇鈽老大和地球下的放射性變種人已經過了四年。他唯一記得這起事件的是 S.O.P.H.I.A.，他用來阻止他們的車輛，他把它藏在一個廢棄的穀倉裡。有一天，一道閃電擊中了房子，導致天花板崩塌，傑森昏迷不醒。當傑森醒來時，S.O.P.HI.A.已經支離破碎，而他在第一次與變種人老大打交道時收集到的零件也不見了。傑森幾乎不知道，第一個閃電生物的來源地還有更多閃電生物，他們正計劃毀滅地球。這些生物開始向地心挖掘，以使地球的重量偏離其軸心，從而導致徹底的毀滅。零件來自 S.O.P.H.I.A.被用來建立一支機器人軍隊來協助人們完成他們的使命。現在，傑森必須阻止他們，但如果沒有索菲亞的幫助，他就無法成功。由於他無法恢復零件，他決定重新設計它，以便更好地為自己面臨的磨難做好準備。 29 天后，S.O.P.H.I.A.已完全重建並準備戰鬥。傑森想起了他在哪裡看到了這個生物的足跡，他跳上自己的車，朝著挑戰開始的山脈駛去。

title_en: Blockbuster World Video Game Championship II
no_intro_name: Blockbuster World Video Game Championship II (USA)
overview_en:
In 1995 Blockbuster organized their second Video Game Championship. There were two categories, up to 13 and over 14 years old. You also had to choose to compete on the SNES or Genesis. From June 14th to July 9th there was a Store Championship Competition, then the WVGC-Finals. Each store had to award a Store Champions with a prize of free rentals for the next two years (two games a month).

The best eleven players then won a trip to San Francisco for the final fight in August, inside the GamePro (gaming magazine) HQ.
overview_zh:
1995 年，Blockbuster 組織了第二屆電玩錦標賽。有兩個類別，13歲以下和14歲以上。您還必須選擇在 SNES 或 Genesis 上競爭。 6 月 14 日至 7 月 9 日舉行了商店冠軍賽，然後是 WVGC 決賽。每家商店都必須授予商店冠軍，並授予其未來兩年免費租賃的獎勵（每月兩場比賽）。

最好的 11 名選手隨後贏得了前往舊金山參加 8 月在 GamePro（遊戲雜誌）總部內進行的最後一場比賽的機會。

overview_en: Blockout is a Tetris variant with an added twist: it's in 3D. The player can rotate the blocks in 3D in order to fit them into the pit they are being guided into. Advanced users can play this game with odd three-dimensional pieces, or change the size of the pit, for depth of between 6 and 18 piles, and width and length of between 3 and 7.
overview_zh: Blockout 是俄羅斯方塊的變體，但又增加了一點：它是 3D 的。玩家可以以 3D 方式旋轉方塊，以便將它們放入被引導進入的坑中。進階使用者可以用奇數的三維棋子來玩這個遊戲，或是改變坑的大小，深度為 6 到 18 堆，寬度和長度在 3 到 7 之間。

overview_en:
Bloodshot, known as Battle Frenzy in Germany, is a Sega Mega Drive and Sega Mega-CD game developed by Domark. It is notable for being a 3D first person shooter - one of the few available for the Sega Mega Drive and the only game of this genre for the Sega Mega-CD.

Bloodshot was only released in Mega Drive cartridge form throughout Europe and Australia. It was exclusive to the Sega Channel in North America where it was called by its German name, Battle Frenzy. It is assumed the game was retitled to make the game sound less violent, though the game does not contain any blood ("Bloodshot" is a code name for the fictional "Battle Frenzy" chip implanted in the player").

The Sega Mega-CD version was also exclusive to Europe until 2003, when a North American version under the Battle Frenzy name was released. This version was developed and published by Good Deal Games without the consent of Domark or Acclaim.
overview_zh:
Bloodshot，在德國被稱為Battle Frenzy，是由Domark開發的Sega Mega Drive和Sega Mega-CD遊戲。它以 3D 第一人稱射擊遊戲而聞名，是 Sega Mega Drive 上可用的少數遊戲之一，也是 Sega Mega-CD 上唯一的此類遊戲。

《Bloodshot》僅以 Mega Drive 卡帶形式在歐洲和澳洲發行。它是北美世嘉頻道的獨家產品，在那裡它的德文名稱是“Battle Frenzy”。據推測，遊戲被重新命名是為了讓遊戲聽起來不那麼暴力，儘管遊戲不包含任何血液（“Bloodshot”是植入玩家體內的虛構“Battle Frenzy”晶片的代號）。

Sega Mega-CD 版本也是歐洲獨有的，直到 2003 年發布了名為 Battle Frenzy 的北美版本。此版本由 Good Deal Games 未經 Domark 或 Acclaim 同意而開發和發布。
