overview_en: Bio-Hazard Battle is a horizontally scrolling space shooter. You can choose one of the four ships, each one having its own attacks. During the game, you can upgrade your ships' weapons by collecting colored balls floating around. You can store up to three different weapons at the same time, executing attacks in different directions.
overview_zh: 《生化危機之戰》是一款水平滾動的太空射擊遊戲。您可以選擇四艘船中的一艘，每艘船都有自己的攻擊方式。在遊戲過程中，你可以透過收集周圍漂浮的綵球來升級你的船隻的武器。您最多可以同時儲存三種不同的武器，並向不同的方向執行攻擊。

overview_en: You navigate your pony through various locations, collecting horseshoes on your way and "paying" them at level gates to pass to another location. You can explore the locations in any order you wish, traveling directly between them or using teleportation pictures. The game has more adventure than action elements. Crystal Pony cannot die in the game; if an enemy hits her, she merely loses one of her horseshoes. The only battles are against the witch, occurring every time you use a gem at the correct place. The pony would automatically jump over obstacles, but you can also make her jump with a corresponding button. You can get extra items by interacting with various objects and characters, pressing the action button.
overview_zh: 你駕駛你的小馬穿過不同的地點，在路上收集馬蹄鐵，並在關卡處「支付」它們以前往另一個地點。您可以按照您希望的任何順序探索地點，直接在地點之間旅行或使用傳送圖片。遊戲的冒險元素多於動作元素。水晶小馬在遊戲中不會死亡；如果敵人擊中她，她只會失去一隻馬蹄鐵。唯一的戰鬥是與女巫的戰鬥，每次您在正確的位置使用寶石時都會發生。小馬會自動跳過障礙物，但你也可以使用對應的按鈕讓她跳躍。您可以透過與各種物體和角色互動並按下操作按鈕來獲得額外的物品。

overview_en: Curse (カース) is a 1989 Sega Mega Drive shoot-'em-up by Micronet released exclusively in Japan. You play as a ship that has to save an alien planet from destruction caused by a neighboring planet that had mysteriously changed from friend to enemy over the course of centuries.
overview_zh: Curse (カーsu) 是 Micronet 於 1989 年在日本獨家發行的 Sega Mega Drive 射擊遊戲。你扮演一艘船，必須拯救一個外星星球，使其免受鄰近星球造成的破壞，幾個世紀以來，該星球從朋友神秘地變成了敵人。

overview_en: Cutie Suzuki no Ringside Angel (キューティー鈴木の リングサイドエンジェル) or Cuty Suzuki no Ringside Angel is a wrestling game developed by Copya System and published exclusively in Japan in 1990 by Asmik. In the game, you play as one of nine female Japanese pro wrestlers fighting to the top of the league. There are four modes: one-player tournament, two-player tournament, two-player match, or watch the computers play with the characters/field of your choice. There are five fields (New Face, Straw Berry, White Snow, Star Light, and Grand Champion). Each field is one half of a normal wrestling ring that the competitors can move around a la Golden Axe
overview_zh: Cutie Suzuki no Ringside Angel（キューティー鈴木の rinkuサイドエンジェル）或Cuty Suzuki no Ringside Angel是一款由Copya System開發並由Asmik System1990年在日本獨家發行的遊戲。在遊戲中，您將扮演九名日本職業摔角手之一，爭奪聯盟的冠軍。有四種模式：單人錦標賽、雙人錦標賽、雙人比賽，或觀看電腦與您選擇的角色/場地進行比賽。共有五個領域（新面孔、草莓、白雪、星光、總冠軍）。每個場地都是普通摔角場的一半，參賽者可以繞著金斧頭移動

title_jp: キューティー鈴木のリングサイドエンジェル
overview_zh: 《Cutie 鈴木的 Ringside Angel》是 1990 年 12 月 12 日由 Asmik 為 Mega Drive 發售的女子摔角遊戲，由日本團隊開發。
overview_jp: 『キューティー鈴木のリングサイドエンジェル』（キューティーすずきのリングサイドエンジェル）は、1990年12月12日にアスミックからメガドライブ用として発売された日本のゲームソフト。

overview_en:
Cutthroat Island is a 1995 action-adventure platform game that was developed by Software Creations and published by Acclaim Entertainment for various consoles. It is based on the film Cutthroat Island. When the game was first released, it featured a promotion by which players could find hidden treasure chests in the game and enter a contest to win real world prizes.

Based on the feature film of the same title, the game casts players in the role of renegade treasure hunters. The player is able to choose between two characters: Morgan Adams, a female character who wields a rapier; or William Shaw, a buccaneer who is armed with a sword. The game features single-player and two-player action modes and features two different gameplay styles to choose from: Swordplay and Brawling.

The player's character must battle through 10 levels, encountering various foes such as pirates, redcoats and harbour masters. In addition to all the swordplay, level two requires players to flee from prison guards in a quarry cart, and level five puts player atop a runaway horse-drawn carriage. As the player progresses through the game several items such as knives, bombs, bottles, torches, hammers, pistols, and other weapons are collectable.
overview_zh:
《割喉島》是一款 1995 年的動作冒險平臺遊戲，由 Software Creations 開發並由 Acclaim Entertainment 發行，適用於各種遊戲機。它是根據電影《割喉島》改編的。當遊戲首次釋出時，它推出了一項促銷活動，玩家可以在遊戲中找到隱藏的寶箱並參加競賽以贏得現實世界的獎品。

遊戲改編自同名劇情片，玩家將扮演叛逆的寶藏獵人。玩家可以在兩個角色之間進行選擇：摩根·亞當斯，一個揮舞劍的女性角色；或者威廉·肖，一個手持劍的海盜。遊戲具有單人和兩人動作模式，並具有兩種不同的遊戲風格可供選擇：劍術和鬥毆。

玩家的角色必須在 10 個關卡中戰鬥，並遇到各種敵人，如海盜、英國軍人和港口管理員。除了所有的劍術之外，第二級要求玩家乘坐採石車逃離獄警，而第五級則讓玩家登上一輛失控的馬車。隨著玩家在遊戲中前進，可以收集一些物品，例如刀、炸彈、瓶子、火把、錘子、手槍和其他武器。

overview_en: A first person shooter that requires you to think things through rather than just attack anything that moves. This game preceded Wolfenstein 3D by a number of years, and while the walls were not ray cast, but solid fill polygons, it was still one of the earliest simulations to tackle a human viewpoint with complete, 360 degree freedom of movement.
overview_zh: 第一人稱射擊遊戲要求你仔細思考事情而不是隻是攻擊任何移動的東西。這款遊戲比德軍總部 3D 早了很多年，雖然牆壁不是光線投射，而是實心填充多邊形，但它仍然是最早以完全 360 度移動自由度處理人類視角的模擬遊戲之一。

overview_en:
ESWAT: City Under Siege, released in Japan as Cyber Police ESWAT, is a 1990 side-scrolling platform video game for the Sega Genesis/Mega Drive video game consoles.

City Under Siege was based on the arcade game Cyber Police ESWAT released a year earlier in 1989. The console game maintains the main characters, plot and some of its enemies from the arcade game, but features some different levels, weapons, and bonuses.

The game is a side-scrolling platformer similar to Shinobi. The game is set in the near future, where the player controls a blonde police officer named Duke Oda who, over a series of levels, turns into the cyborg E.S.W.A.T. At first, as a rookie member of the Cyber Police force in the city of Liberty, the player has to clean the streets of an overwhelming crime wave and terminate the most wanted criminals. In the first and second levels of the game, the completely human Duke Oda can only utilize a single shot weapon and can only survive one hit. A second hit will kill him.

A mysterious and high-tech organization, named "E.Y.E.", quickly threatens to take over the entire city and, after being promoted at the end of the second level, Duke Oda is given power armor called the "ICE Combat Suit". With this suit the player can use new and more lethal weapons; "Super Shot", a plasma rifle, rockets, and a devastating fire attack if he finds them. The player also has access to a jet pack with limited fuel that replenishes over time. Finally, this armor will allow the player to take more damage before being defeated. Unfortunately, because the suit makes him larger, it is harder for him to dodge enemy attacks. The final boss of the game, the leader of E.Y.E., is revealed to be a robot with artificial intelligence that is attempting to replicate its own ICE Combat Suits to take over Liberty.
overview_zh:
《ESWAT：圍攻之城》在日本發行時名為“網路警察 ESWAT”，是一款 1990 年面向 Sega Genesis/Mega Drive 影片遊戲機的橫向捲軸平臺影片遊戲。

《City Under Siege》改編自 1989 年發布的街機遊戲《網路警察 ESWAT》。這款主機遊戲保留了街機遊戲中的主要角色、情節和一些敵人，但具有一些不同的關卡、武器和獎勵。

遊戲是一款類似忍者的橫向捲軸平臺遊戲。遊戲背景設定在不久的將來，玩家控制一位名叫杜克·奧達（Duke Oda）的金髮警察，經過一系列關卡後，他變成了機器人 E.S.W.A.T.。首先，身為自由城網路警察部隊的新人，玩家必須清理街道上鋪天蓋地的犯罪浪潮，並消滅頭號通緝犯。在遊戲的第一關和第二關中，完全人類的織田公爵只能使用單發武器，並且只能在一次擊中中倖存。第二次攻擊就會殺死他。

一個名為「E.Y.E.」的神秘高科技組織迅速威脅要佔領整個城市，在第二級末晉升後，織田公爵獲得了名為「ICE戰鬥服」的動力裝甲。有了這套套裝，玩家可以使用新的、更具殺傷力的武器； 「超級射擊」、等離子步槍、火箭，如果他發現它們，還會遭受毀滅性的火力攻擊。玩家還可以使用有限燃料的噴氣揹包，並隨著時間的推移進行補充。最後，這套盔甲將使玩家在被擊敗之前承受更多傷害。不幸的是，由於這套衣服使他變得更大，他更難躲避敵人的攻擊。遊戲的最終 Boss，E.Y.E. 的領導者，被發現是一個具有人工智慧的機器人，試圖複製自己的 ICE 戰鬥服來接管自由。

overview_en: Cyberball brings this fast and furious action to life. Gameplay is essentially the same as the real sport, although the 'downs' are replaced by the bomb's heat gradually increasing towards 'critical'. After this it will explode and possession will be swapped. This is prevented when you cross the 50-yard line, lose possession or score a touchdown, in which cases it resets to 'cool'. Field goals and punts are not featured - the only kick is the initial kick-off you receive.
overview_zh: 《Cyberball》是 1988 年由 Atari Games 推出的大型電玩運動類遊戲，以未來機器人美式足球為題材。
overview_jp: サイバーボールは、1988年にアタリゲームズから稼働されたアーケード用のスポーツゲーム。

overview_en: You are a member of the Galatic Unity Agency on routine patrol in deep space when your patrol ship is damaged after accidently passing through a meteor storm and starts to lose control, smashing into a nearby planet and blacking out. The next thing you remember you are rummaging through scrap metal and welding together steel to make parts for weapons. You have become a cyborg slave in a munitions factory for the Cydrek Federation, a twisted machine with a human brain, unable to comprehend your situation, clouded by cybernetic programming until one day your human side finally starts to break through. You remember everything and realize that the Cydrek Federation is building an army to take on the G.U.A. and you must stop it. You must take on the entire Federation using your new cybernetic body and stop them from taking over the universe.
overview_zh: 你是銀河統一機構的成員，在深空進行例行巡邏，你的巡邏船在意外穿過流星風暴後受損，並開始失去控制，撞向附近的一顆行星並陷入黑暗。接下來你記得你正在翻找廢金屬並將鋼材焊接在一起以製造武器零件。你已經成為 Cydrek 聯邦軍火工廠中的半機械人奴隸，一臺帶有人腦的​​扭曲機器，無法理解你的處境，被控制論程式設計所籠罩，直到有一天你的人性一面終於開始突破。你記得一切，並意識到 Cydrek 聯邦正在組建一支軍隊來對抗 G.U.A.你必須阻止它。你必須使用你的新控制體對抗整個聯邦，並阻止他們接管宇宙。

overview_en: Super Hero Daffy Duck PI armed with his bubble gun, sleuths his way around 6 different levels of Hollywood Film Sets to recover Yosemite Sam's Stolen Movie Awards. Amazing cartoon quality graphics and animation will pull you into Daffy's Wacky Quacky Adventure.
overview_zh: 超級英雄達菲鴨 PI ​​手持泡泡槍，在 6 個不同級別的好萊塢電影佈景中搜尋，以奪回優勝美地山姆被盜的電影獎。令人驚嘆的卡通品質圖形和動畫將帶您進入達菲的古怪嘎嘎冒險。

overview_en:
There lived a wealthy family whose heirs were two daughters: Regine and Dahna. These two sisters were born with a strange magic that could enable them to summon the elements and other impossible things; it was this magic that many within the spiritual underworld lusted after, particularly Regine whose powers grew stronger with age. On Dahna's seventh birthday, the sisters' parents were murdered in a violent kidnapping attempt, but the wreckage separated the sisters and Dahna escaped.

Dahna hid in secrecy, but eventually took shelter in a nearby village where she honed her magic and combat abilities under the guidance of the village sorcerer Magh. Ten years later, a mysterious invasion force led by an evil sorceress attacked her village and kidnapped Magh, prompting Dahna on her first battle.
overview_zh:
有一個富裕的家庭，其繼承人有兩個女兒：雷吉娜（Regine）和達娜（Dahna）。這兩姊妹天生就擁有一種奇怪的魔法，可以讓她們召喚元素和其他不可能的東西；這種魔法是許多靈界人士所嚮往的，尤其是隨著年齡的增長，力量越來越強的雷吉娜。達娜 (Dahna) 七歲生日那天，姐妹倆的父母在一次暴力綁架企圖中被謀殺，但殘骸將姐妹分開，達娜 (Dahna) 逃脫了。

達娜秘密躲藏起來，但最終在附近的一個村莊避難，在那裡她在村莊巫師馬格的指導下磨練了自己的魔法和戰鬥能力。十年後，由邪惡女巫率領的神秘入侵勢力襲擊了她的村莊並綁架了瑪格，促使達娜踏上了她的第一次戰鬥。

overview_en:
In Japanese, the term Daikoukai Jidai refers to the "age of discovery," a period that dates back to the fifteenth and seventeenth centuries, when European explorers sailed for alternative routes to Asia because of the blockade Of the Ottoman Empire of the terrestrial trade routes.
This period was characterized by the rivalry between Spain and Portugal, the advent of colonization and exploration in general. In the next video games, other countries would also be involved. Some historical events of this time like the Treaty of Tordesillas, are also mentioned.
The different renditions of this series contain many references to the historical background, but like Pirates !, the most treacherous aspects of this era are idealized to create an adventurous and exciting environment.
overview_zh: 《大航海時代》是 1990 年 5 月 18 日由日本光榮發售的 PC-8801mkIISR 模擬遊戲（光榮稱之為 Recoeation Game）。為《大航海時代系列》第 1 作。玩家扮演 16 世紀葡萄牙沒落貴族 Ferrero 家的繼承人，以航海家身分提升名聲、奪回失去的爵位為目標，並可透過提升名聲與公主結婚等多元玩法為特色。製作人為 Fukuzawa Eiji，音樂由菅野洋子擔當。1992 年移植 Mega Drive 時不僅圖像品質提升，指令操作也經過簡化。
overview_jp:
『大航海時代』（だいこうかいじだい）は、1990年5月18日に日本の光栄から発売されたPC-8801mkIISR用シミュレーションゲーム（同社はリコエイションゲームと呼称）。便宜上、「大航海時代I」「初代」と呼ぶこともある。
同社の『大航海時代シリーズ』第1作目。プレイヤーは主人公の16世紀のポルトガルの没落貴族フェレロ家の後継ぎとして航海者となり、失われた爵位を取り戻すことが目的である。名声ポイントを高めて高い爵位を取得する事や王女との結婚を目的としている点などを特徴としている。
開発は光栄が行い、プロデューサーはフクザワ・エイジ、音楽は同社のパソコン用ソフト『三國志』（1985年）や『信長の野望・全国版』（1986年）などを手掛けた菅野よう子が担当している。
PC-88SR版の発売後、他の日本国産パソコン各機種に移植された他、アメリカ合衆国においても『Uncharted Waters』のタイトルでMacintoshやPC/AT互換機に移植され、1991年にはファミリーコンピュータに移植された。その他、1992年にメガドライブに移植された時にはグラフィックの品質が向上した他、コマンド操作の簡略化がされている。『スーパー大航海時代』のタイトルでスーパーファミコンに移植された。2004年には携帯電話ゲームとして『Mobile大航海時代』のタイトルで配信された。PC-9801版の復刻収録は『コーエー25周年記念パック Vol.3』、『コーエー定番シリーズ』として単品発売「my GAMECITY クラシックゲーム館」でのブラウザゲーム版、Steamでのダウンロード販売で行われている。
後に続編となるPC-9801用ソフト『大航海時代II』（1993年）が発売され、以後シリーズ化された。

overview_en: Daikoukai Jidai II (大航海時代II) is the sequel to Koei's simulation game Daikoukai Jidai, both a part of their Rékoeition Series. It was first released in 1993 on various Japanese computers before being ported to a variety of other systems, including to the Sega Mega Drive (1994; US/JP) and Sega Saturn (1997; JP). Western releases called the game New Horizons.
overview_zh: 《大航海時代 II》是 1993 年 2 月 10 日由日本光榮發售的 PC-9801 歷史模擬遊戲。為《大航海時代系列》第 2 作。本作可從 6 名主角中選 1 人，達成各自最終目的並提升名聲後獲得國家最高爵位。基本系統承襲前作，新增國家及名聲等新系統。SFC 版開始介面與系統大幅改善，後續 Mega Drive、PS、Saturn 版皆以此為基礎。製作人為 Shibusawa Kou，音樂由菅野洋子繼續擔任。
overview_jp:
『大航海時代II』（だいこうかいじだい・ツー）は、1993年2月10日に日本の光栄から発売されたPC-9801用歴史シミュレーションゲーム。
同社が提唱するリコエイションゲームである『大航海時代シリーズ』第2作目。本作では6人の主人公から1人を選択し、最終目的を達成して名声を得た上で国家の最高爵位を獲得する形式へと変更された。基本的なゲームシステムは前作『大航海時代』（1990年）を踏襲しているが、新たな国が追加された他、名声などの新システムが採用されている。
開発は光栄が行い、プロデューサーはシブサワ・コウ、音楽は前作に引き続き菅野よう子が担当している。
PC-9801版の発売後に様々な日本国産パソコン機種や家庭用ゲーム機などに移植されたが、スーパーファミコン版の時点でインターフェースやゲームシステムが大幅に改善され、以後そのシステムを基にメガドライブ、PlayStation、セガサターンにも若干仕様が変更されて移植された。スーパーファミコン版およびメガドライブ版は北米にて『New Horizons』のタイトルで発売され、さらにPC/AT互換機に移植された。また、『コーエー定番シリーズ』などの廉価版シリーズや、PC-9801版の復刻版である『コーエー25周年記念パック Vol.7』にも収録された。2007年には『Mobile大航海時代2』のタイトルで携帯電話ゲームとして配信された。スーパーファミコン版はバーチャルコンソール対応ソフトとして2009年にWii、2013年にWii Uにてそれぞれ配信された。
後に続編となるパソコン用ソフト『大航海時代III Costa del Sol』（1996年）が発売された他、本作のシステムを流用したPlayStation用ソフト『大航海時代外伝』（1997年）が発売された。

overview_en:
Daimakaimura is a 1989 Mega Drive video game developed by Sega R&D2 and released by Sega in Japan on August 3, 1989.

3 years after the events of the last game monsters and demons have returned and a beam of light struck through Princess Prin Prin taking her soul. Now its up to the knight Arthur to defeat the evil Lucifer and restore the souls of Prin Prin and the people.
overview_zh: 《大魔界村》（Ghouls 'n Ghosts）是 Capcom 卡普空開發、1988 年運行的大型電玩橫向捲軸動作遊戲。為《魔界村》系列第 2 作，騎士亞瑟為救公主再度展開冒險，以高難度與華麗演出聞名。
overview_jp: 『大魔界村』（だいまかいむら、英題：Ghouls 'n Ghosts）は、カプコンが開発した1988年稼働のアーケード用横スクロールアクションゲーム。

overview_en:
Dangerous Seed (デンジャラスシード) is a 1989 arcade shoot-'em-up by Namco ported to the Sega Mega Drive in 1990. Both versions were released exclusively in Japan.

The Moon Diver is a ship consisting of three sub-ships, sometimes called wings: Alpha, Beta, and Gamma. You must stop an alien invasion whose base is Danger Seed by going through several "tubes;" however before the game starts Beta and Gamma break off and you must begin with Alpha alone.

A shoots a normal shot which can be rapidfired. B shoots a bomb (you have a limited supply of bombs). As you pass through each tube, your ship collects wings; use C to change the arrangement of wings. Powerups are collected as in most schmups.
overview_zh: 《Dangerous Seed》是 1989 年 12 月 NAMCO 發售的大型電玩。受外星人攻擊的人類駕駛可三機合體的宇宙戰艦「Moon Diver」迎擊敵人，是一款縱向捲軸射擊遊戲。家用版於 1990 年發售 Mega Drive 版，遊戲系統相較大型電玩版有較大幅度改編。
overview_jp:
『デンジャラスシード』 (Dangerous Seed) とは、1989年12月にナムコが発売した業務用ビデオゲーム。異星人から攻撃を受けた人類が、3機合体が可能な宇宙船「ムーンダイバー」を操縦して迎撃する縦スクロールシューティングゲームである。
家庭用は1990年にメガドライブ版が発売。メガドライブ版はアーケード版からゲームシステムが大きくアレンジされている（詳細は#メガドライブ版を参照）。また、アーケード版の移植としては、2022年にアーケードアーカイブスの1作品としてPlayStation 4版とNintendo Switch版が配信されている。
以下、特記なき限りオリジナルであるアーケード版について解説する。

overview_en:
Long time ago, the planet of Darius went into ruin but Proco and Tiat of Darius gave birth to a new planet and named it Orga. After the passing of many centuries, Proco Jr. and Tiat Young receive a strange radio broadcast from the galaxy. They discover the radio broadcast is a mayday signal from another descendant of Darius. They board the Silverhawk, preparing to defeat an evil force and journey to the galaxy.
Darius II or Sagaia, as it is known in the West, is the second installment in Taito's shoot 'em up series. Its main distinguishing features are the non-linear level system and the enemies, which are different kinds of seafood.
overview_zh: 《Darius II》是 1989 年 TAITO 發售的大型電玩。為橫向捲軸射擊遊戲，是大型電玩 Darius 系列第 2 作。海外版名為《SAGAIA》，不僅標題不同，內容也有差異。
overview_jp:
『ダライアスII』 (DARIUS II) は、1989年にタイトーが発売したアーケードゲーム。横スクロールのシューティングゲームで、アーケードゲームとしてはダライアスシリーズの第2作目。
日本国外での名称は『SAGAIA』。単に名前が違うだけでなく内容も異なる。（詳細は本項「#海外版『SAGAIA』」を参照）

overview_en:
The Black Knight has brought misery to the land, and the end way to end this is to enter his haunted house to slay him. You are the brave adventurer taking on this quest through 14 increasingly-tough zones.

The bulk of the game is side-viewed, involving single screens to pass through, which incorporate ropes, cages and trapdoor. There are enemies walking, flying and hovering through this, and many of them respawn. Unusually your weapon to take them on (rocks) can be thrown through 360 degrees, which aims to make the gameplay more realistic and methodical. The screens were linked by hub screens, which the player passes through simply by clicking on a door.
overview_zh:
黑騎士為這片土地帶來了苦難，結束這一切的最終方法就是進入他的鬼屋殺死他。您是勇敢的冒險家，將穿越 14 個日益艱難的區域來完成這項任務。

遊戲的大部分內容都是側視的，涉及要穿過的單一螢幕，其中包括繩索、籠子和活板門。有敵人在其中行走、飛行和盤旋，其中許多會重生。不同尋常的是，你用來對付它們的武器（岩石）可以 360 度投擲，這旨在使遊戲玩法更加真實和有條理。這些螢幕透過中心螢幕連線起來，玩家只需點選一扇門即可穿過中心螢幕。

title_en: Dark Wizard: Yomigaerishi Yami no Madoushi
title_jp: ダークウィザード 蘇りし闇の魔導士

title_en: Dark Wizard - Yomigaerishi Yami no Madoushi
no_intro_name: Dark Wizard - Yomigaerishi Yami no Madoushi (Japan)

overview_en:
Super Real Darwin is a 1987 arcade shoot-'em-up by Data East. Sega ported it to the Sega Mega Drive and released it in 1990 exclusively in Japan under the name Darwin 4081 (ダーウィン４０８１).

The game controls like a regular shoot-'em-up: A and C shoot bullets, B drops bombs; there is rapidfire. However, unlike regular shoot-'em-ups where weapons are upgraded through powerups, your ship "evolves" to survive situations and get past obstacles. Evolution occurs with the Evol (small faces with an E on them) and B-Evol (darker Evols). Each pickup adds a new evolution state to the list. After a particular amount of time, one evolution wears off and the next evolution is chosen. The DNA powerup does provide a more permanent weapon upgrade, but will merely just make the existing weapons stronger. You can hold up to nine DNA powerups.
overview_zh:
《超級真實達爾文》是 Data East 於 1987 年推出的街機射擊遊戲。世嘉將其移植到世嘉 Mega Drive 上，並於 1990 年在日本獨家發售，名為 Darwin 4081（ダーウィン４０８１）。

遊戲的操控方式就像普通的射擊遊戲一樣：A和C發射子彈，B投下炸彈；有速射。然而，與透過升級武器來升級武器的常規射擊遊戲不同，你的飛船會「進化」以在各種情況下生存並越過障礙。進化發生在 Evol（帶有 E 的小臉）和 B-Evol（較暗的 Evol）。每個拾取器都會在清單中新增一個新的進化狀態。經過一段特定的時間後，一次進化就會消失，並選擇下一個進化。 DNA 強化確實提供了更永久的武器升級，但只會讓現有武器變得更強。您最多可以容納九個 DNA 強化道具。

overview_en: Will and Rick were like two peas in a pod or more accurately, two cowpokes in a corral. In other words, these two cowboys were best of friends and nothing could tear them apart that is, until Jenny came to town. Since her arrival, the two best friends have become bitter rivals, each vying for her attention and affection. When Jenny's father decides to send her on a trip around the world, Will and Rick decide to race each other to see which one of them will accompany her. Through deserts, icebergs, shark-infested waters, and even ancient ruins these two go head-to-head in the wackiest race you've ever seen. In split-screen action, you and your opponent (either the computer or a friend) will have to use fancy footwork and a few tricks to be the first to the finish line and win Jenny's heart.
overview_zh: 威爾和瑞克就像一個豆莢裡的兩顆豌豆，或者更準確地說，就像一個畜欄裡的兩隻牛。換句話說，這兩個牛仔是最好的朋友，沒有什麼能讓他們分開，直到珍妮來到鎮上。自從她到來後，這兩個最好的朋友就成了死敵​​，各自爭奪她的注意力和感情。當珍妮的父親決定送她去環遊世界時，威爾和瑞克決定互相比賽，看看誰會陪伴她。穿越沙漠、冰山、鯊魚出沒的水域，甚至遠古廢墟，這兩個人將在你見過的最古怪的比賽中正面交鋒。在分割畫面動作中，你和你的對手（電腦或朋友）必須使用花俏的步法和一些技巧才能第一個衝過終點線並贏得珍妮的心。

overview_en: A tennis game featuring both an exhibition and a tournament mode. In the head to head exhibition mode, the player can choose their opponent (with the higher ranked opponents being better than the lower ranked ones). The tournament mode allows for 16 different players to compete to become the champion. Both of these modes can be played on either grass, hard, or a clay court. The player can also choose whether to be either a left or right handed tennis player.
overview_zh: 具有表演賽和錦標賽模式的網球比賽。在對決表演模式中，玩家可以選擇自己的對手（排名高的對手比排名低的對手更好）。錦標賽模式允許 16 名不同的玩家競爭成為冠軍。這兩種模式都可以在草地、硬地或紅土球場上進行。玩家也可以選擇是左手還是右手網球運動員。

title_jp: デビッド・ロビンソン バスケットボール

overview_en:
David Robinson's Supreme Court is a basketball game with both exhibition and tournament modes. Choose one out of four fictional teams and then draft various skilled fictional players onto the team. Exhibition mode lets the player choose to either player 3 on 3 or 5 on 5 while tournament mode only allows for 5 on 5 play. The game also features a roleplaying mode where the player takes the role of and controls only one player on the court.

Tournament mode lets the players team play the three other teams with the prize being a chance to go up against David Robinson's All-Stars. Speaking of which, David Robinson offers commentary at the halftime of games.
overview_zh:
大衛羅賓遜的最高法院是一款具有表演賽和錦標賽模式的籃球遊戲。從四支虛構球隊中選擇一支，然後將各種技術精湛的虛構球員選入球隊。表演賽模式允許玩家選擇 3 對 3 或 5 對 5 的比賽，而錦標賽模式只允許 5 對 5 的比賽。遊戲還具有角色扮演模式，玩家只能扮演並控制球場上的一名球員。

錦標賽模式讓球員團隊與其他三支球隊比賽，獎品是與大衛羅賓遜的全明星隊對抗的機會。說到這裡，大衛羅賓遜在比賽中場休息時發表了評論。

overview_en:
The Davis Cup is an annual international team event in men's tennis. The participating countries, consisting of different players, compete in both singles and doubles matches. The entire championship has been made available in this game, and the matches are played using a third-person perspective.

There are different types of courts and difficulty levels. Aside from the championship, you can also practice, enter tournaments or play exhibition matches. Work along with a friend as a team or compete in singles matches. Aside from the familiar strokes, timing is important to determine the amount of spin.
overview_zh:
戴維斯盃是一年一度的國際男子網球團體賽事。參賽國家由不同的選手組成，進行單打和雙打比賽。整個錦標賽都在這款遊戲中提供，比賽採用第三人稱視角進行。

有不同型別的球場和難度等級。除了錦標賽之外，您還可以練習、參加錦標賽或參加表演賽。與朋友一起團隊合作或參加單打比賽。除了熟悉的擊球之外，時機對於確定旋轉量也很重要。

title_en: Davis Cup Tennis ~ Davis Cup World Tour
no_intro_name: Davis Cup Tennis ~ Davis Cup World Tour (USA, Europe) (July 1993)
Davis Cup World Tour Tennis (USA, Europe)

overview_en:
Daze Before Christmas is a Christmas-themed platformer developed by Funcom and published by Sunsoft for the Sega Mega Drive in 1994 and later for the SNES. You play as Santa Claus, tasked with saving all of his elves and retrieving his plans from the evil Timekeeper.

Daze Before Christmas is notable for being the only Mega Drive game on record to be released exclusively in Australia. According to interviews with with Funcom programmer Carl-Henrik Skarstedt and Sunsoft developer David Siller, manufacturing was actually cancelled shortly after the first run had shipped due to quality issues.
overview_zh:
Daze Before Christmas 是一款由 Funcom 開發的聖誕節主題平臺遊戲，由 Sunsoft 於 1994 年為 Sega Mega Drive 發行，後來又為 SNES 發行。你扮演聖誕老人，負責拯救他所有的精靈，並從邪惡的計時員那裡取回他的計劃。

Daze Before Christmas 因其是有史以來唯一一款在澳洲獨家發行的 Mega Drive 遊戲而聞名。根據對 Funcom 程式設計師 Carl-Henrik Skarstedt 和 Sunsoft 開發人員 David Siller 的採訪，由於品質問題，在第一批產品發貨後不久，生產實際上被取消了。

overview_en: You are Joe, a young American who has been secretly training to become a powerful fighter. One day, he meets an old martial artist who tells him he should travel all over the world to meet other teachers and to learn from them. During his travels, Joe encounters many other fighters, and has to become more and more skillful in order to prove that he is the greatest fighter in the world.
overview_zh: 你是喬，一個年輕的美國人，一直在秘密訓練成為一個強大的戰士。有一天，他遇到了一位老武術家，老武術家告訴他應該走遍世界各地去見其他老師並向他們學習。在旅途中，喬遇到了許多其他戰士，他必須變得越來越熟練，才能證明自己是世界上最偉大的戰士。

title_en: Death and Return of Superman, The
no_intro_name: Death and Return of Superman, The (Europe)

title_jp: デスブリンガー 秘められた紋章

title_en: Death Bringer - The Knight of Darkness
no_intro_name: Death Bringer - The Knight of Darkness (Japan)

overview_en:
Taking place in the future year 2140, the nine of the ten Galactic Federations had gained unwarranted control over galaxy flight traffic and territory. This has caused the one remaining Federation to suffer a loss of supplies and space pirate attacks. The dispute can only be settled through a warranted duel with the Federation’s one duelist to fight against the collective nine alien duelists representing the nine Galactic Federations in control of the space traffic ways, otherwise known as The Super 9’s. The player assumes the role of Barrett Jade, a mecha pilot to win back the space ways and duel against the nine other duelists.

Players started the game off with their first duel with a set number of ammunition for their weapons; the player’s robot had a total of three weapons indicated by all three buttons on the controller. Once the player completed the duel, they would go through a type of Bonus Stage that would qualify them for the next duel as well as increase their score and money. Players could then purchase more ammunition or even new weapons for their robot at a local shop. Players had to time their attacks and aim precisely for key locations of their opponents body. Some enemies could regenerate missing parts of their body (including their head) while some enemies depended on particular mechanical parts to evade fire. If the player ran out of ammunition for all their weapons before the duel was over, they would lose a life and restart the duel over (with the same amount of ammunition they started the duel with). If the duel timer ran out before the duel was over, the player would also lose a life and restart the duel.
overview_zh:
故事發生在未來的 2140 年，十個銀河聯邦中的九個對銀河飛行交通和領土進行了無理的控制。這導致僅存的聯邦遭受物資損失和宇宙海盜襲擊。這場爭端只能透過與聯邦的一名決鬥者進行一場有保證的決鬥來解決，以對抗代表九個銀河聯邦控制太空交通方式的九名外星決鬥者，也稱為超級九人。玩家扮演機甲飛行員巴雷特·傑德（Barrett Jade），奪回太空通道，與其他九名決鬥者進行決鬥。

玩家以一定數量的武器彈藥開始他們的第一次決鬥；玩家的機器人總共擁有三種武器，由控制器上的所有三個按鈕指示。一旦玩家完成決鬥，他們將經歷一種獎勵階段，這將使他們有資格參加下一次決鬥，並增加他們的分數和金錢。然後，玩家可以在當地商店為他們的機器人購買更多彈藥甚至新武器。玩家必須掌握攻擊時機並精確瞄準對手身體的關鍵部位。有些敵人可以再生身體缺少的部分（包括頭部），而有些敵人則依靠特定的機械部件來躲避火力。如果玩家在決鬥結束前耗盡了所有武器的彈藥，他們將失去生命並重新開始決鬥（使用與開始決鬥相同數量的彈藥）。如果決鬥計時器在決鬥結束前耗盡，玩家也會失去生命並重新開始決鬥。

title_en: Dennin Aleste: Nobunaga and his Ninja Force
overview_zh: 《電忍 Aleste Nobunaga and his Ninja force》是 1992 年 11 月 27 日由 Compile 為 Mega CD 推出的縱向捲軸射擊遊戲，海外版名為《ROBO ALESTE》。玩家操作主角 Aleste 擊敗各關 Boss 過關，全 12 關。屬於 Mega CD 遊戲中少見視覺場景較少的作品。標題原本為《雷忍 Aleste》，卻因提案者在公司內部問卷誤寫為「電忍」並於會議通過，而成為現名。
overview_jp:
『電忍アレスタ Nobunaga and his Ninja force』（でんにんアレスタ - ノブナガ・アンド・ヒズ・ニンジャ・フォース）は、1992年11月27日にコンパイルからメガCD用として発売された縦スクロールシューティングゲーム。日本国外では『ROBO ALESTE』のタイトルで発売された。
主人公アレスタを操り、ステージのボスを倒し、クリアしていくシューティングゲーム。全12ステージ。メガドライブのCD-ROMのゲームのなかで珍しくビジュアルシーンが少ない。
タイトルは元々『雷忍アレスタ』であったが、社内アンケートを集計する際に提案者が誤って『電忍アレスタ』と書いてしまい、そのまま会議で通ってしまったため現在のタイトルとなった。
PnP機・メガドライブミニ2への移植にかかわった奥成洋輔によると、日本国内とそれ以外の地域で発売されたバージョンとでは、仕様に若干の差異があるとされている。

title_en: Dennin Aleste - Nobunaga and His Ninja Force
no_intro_name: Dennin Aleste - Nobunaga and His Ninja Force (Japan)

title_en: Desert Strike - Return To The Gulf
no_intro_name: Desert Strike - Return To The Gulf (USA)
overview_en:
The first game in the Strike series. A year after the Gulf War, a self-styled general named Kilbaba (Muababa in the GBA version) takes over an Arab Emirate and threatens to start World War III against his western enemy, the United States. The whole world holds its breath as the President has chosen you to destroy Kilbaba and his terrorist army before he launches a nuclear attack on the world!

You must fly a specially designed AH-64A Apache on a series of missions to rescue missing-in-action characters, destroy power plants, blow apart SCUD missiles, etc. to take out the enemy defense while trying to find out Kilbaba's plans.

The player controls the helicopter from an overhead, isometric perspective. The Apache is equipped with three weapon types: a machine gun and two types of missiles of different strength. During the missions, the player must beware anti-aircraft guns, missile launchers and tanks, outmaneuvering enemy fire or destroying the enemy weaponry. The Apache is destroyed if its fuel runs out, or if the armor (functioning as health) is completely depleted. However, armor can be replenished by bringing back MIA soldiers and prisoners of war back to the landing zone. There are also fuel, ammo and armor pickups available on the field.
overview_zh:
《Strike》系列的第一款遊戲。海灣戰爭一年後，一位自稱為將軍的基爾巴巴（GBA 版本為穆巴巴）接管了一個阿拉伯酋長國，並威脅要對他的西方敵人美國發動第三次世界大戰。整個世界都屏住了呼吸，因為總統選擇你在基爾巴巴對世界發動核攻擊之前摧毀他和他的恐怖軍隊！

你必須駕駛一架專門設計的 AH-64A 阿帕奇執行一系列任務，營救失蹤的角色、摧毀發電廠、炸毀飛毛腿導彈等，以摧毀敵人的防禦，同時試圖找出基爾巴巴的計劃。

玩家從頭頂的等距視角控制直升機。阿帕奇裝備了三種武器：一挺機槍和兩種不同威力的導彈。在執行任務期間，玩家必須提防高射炮、導彈發射器和坦克，以智取勝敵人的火力或摧毀敵人的武器。如果阿帕奇的燃料耗盡，或者裝甲（充當生命值）完全耗盡，阿帕奇就會被摧毀。然而，可以透過將 MIA 士兵和戰俘帶回登陸區來補充裝甲。戰場上還提供燃料、彈藥和裝甲皮卡。

title_jp: デザートストライク 灣岸作戦
no_intro_name: Desert Strike - Wangan Sakusen ~ Desert Strike (Japan, Korea) (Ja)

title_en: Desert Strike - Wangan Sakusen ~ Desert Strike
no_intro_name: Desert Strike - Wangan Sakusen ~ Desert Strike (Japan, Korea)

title_jp: デトネイター・オーガン

overview_en: Devil Crash (JP)/Devil's Crush (US) is a pinball game ghost-developed by Compile under license from Naxat Soft for the TurboGrafx-16, as part of Naxat's Crush series of pinball games. Technosoft acquired a license to port the game to the Sega Mega Drive, calling it Devil Crash MD (デビルクラッシュＭＤ) and releasing it in Japan. They would then license it to Tengen for localization overseas; Tengen censored a few graphics deemed too Satanic for western audiences and released the final product as Dragon's Fury in the US and Europe despite the TurboGrafx-16 version having been released internationally beforehand. While Naxat furthered the series itself, Tengen would later release a sequel, Dragon's Revenge, not under license from anyone.
overview_zh: Devil Crash（日本）/Devil's Crush（美國）是一款彈珠遊戲 Ghost，由 Compile 在 Naxat Soft 的許可下為 TurboGrafx-16 開發，是 Naxat's Crush 系列彈珠遊戲的一部分。 Technosoft 獲得了將遊戲移植到 Sega Mega Drive 的許可，並將其命名為 Devil Crash MD（デビルクラッシュＭＤ）並在日本發行。然後他們將其授權給天正進行海外本地化； Tengen 審查了一些對西方觀眾來說過於邪惡的圖形，並在美國和歐洲發布了最終產品《龍之怒》，儘管 TurboGrafx-16 版本已經在國際上發布。雖然 Naxat 進一步推進了該系列本身，但 Tengen 後來在未獲得任何人許可的情況下發布了續集《龍之復仇》。

overview_en: "Devilish" is different from other paddle games by letting you play with two paddles. The lower one behaves just like a usual paddle - you use it to prevent the ball from dropping down. The upper one can move and turn, allowing you to hit the ball from different angles and from different parts of the screen. You advance through levels by destroying bricks and enemies, going up until the level boss enemy appears.
overview_zh: 《Devilish》與其他槳遊戲不同，它讓你用兩個槳來玩。下部的球拍就像普通的球拍一樣 - 您可以用它來防止球掉落。上面的那個可以移動和轉動，讓你可以從不同的角度和螢幕的不同部分擊球。你可以透過摧毀磚塊和敵人來推進關卡，直到關卡頭目敵人出現。

overview_en:
This is one of the games based on the Dick Tracy movie. You are Dick Tracy, a police detective who enjoys a peaceful life with his wife. But his wife's father is murdered by a local gangster named Big Boy Caprice, and Dick Tracy is now out for revenge. The game doesn't follow the exact plot of the movie, but simply lets Dick Tracy fight his way through several levels until he faces his archenemy.

This is a platform shooter/"beat-'em-up" game. Plenty of gunmen will attack our hero from all the sides. Dick can only move to the right or to the left. He can use his pistol gun to take out enemies who are in front or behind him. Since he can't approach enemies who attack from the depth of the screen, he can dispose of them using his machine gun. When the enemy is too close, Dick will punch him instead of shooting.
overview_zh:
這是根據迪克·特雷西電影改編的遊戲之一。你是迪克·特雷西，一名警探，與妻子過著平靜的生活。但他妻子的父親被當地一個名叫大男孩卡普里斯的黑幫謀殺了，迪克·特雷西現在開始復仇。 The game doesn't follow the exact plot of the movie, but simply lets Dick Tracy fight his way through several levels until he faces his archenemy.

這是一款平臺射擊遊戲/“清版”遊戲。許多槍手將從四面八方攻擊我們的英雄。迪克只能向右或向左移動。他可以用手槍幹掉他前面或後面的敵人。由於他無法接近從螢幕深處攻擊的敵人，因此他可以使用機槍消滅他們。當敵人太近時，迪克會打他而不是開槍。

overview_en: Dino Dini's Goal is a soccer computer game released by Virgin Games in 1993. It is considered by many to be the "true" sequel to Kick Off 2 (in preference to the official Kick Off 3), as Kick Off's creator Dino Dini had moved from Anco Software and was responsible for all Goal's engineering and game design. Goal! introduced improved dynamics and A.I. over Kick Off 2, as well as other innovative features, such as multiple camera views. The game shipped 60,000 units on the first day of release.
overview_zh: Dino Dini's Goal 是 Virgin Games 於 1993 年發布的足球電腦遊戲。它被許多人認為是 Kick Off 2 的「真正」續集（優先於官方的 Kick Off 3），因為 Kick Off 的建立者 Dino Dini 已從 Anco Software 跳槽並負責 Goal 的所有工程和遊戲設計。目標！引入了改進的動力學和人工智慧。 Kick Off 2 以及其他創新功能，例如多攝影機視野。遊戲發行首日期貨量達 6 萬套。

overview_en: Dino Land is a dinosaur themed pinball machine. You basically have the shoot your pinball at dinosaur targets. As you go along, you get more points after you have hit all the dinosaur targets in the board. There are 4 pinball boards, one on ground with ground creatures, an air one that represents flying creatures, a sea level which has sea creatures, and a boss level where you are trying to save your girlfriend from the boss.
overview_zh: 恐龍樂園是一款以恐龍為主題的彈珠臺。你基本上可以用彈珠射擊恐龍目標。隨著你的前進，在擊中棋盤上的所有恐龍目標後，你會獲得更多積分。有 4 個彈珠板，一個在地面上，有地面生物，一個在空中，代表飛行生物，一個在海平面上，有海洋生物，還有一個 Boss 關卡，在這個關卡中，你要試圖從老闆手中救出你的女朋友。

overview_en: "Dinosaurs For Hire" does not really have a plot. Unknown monsters and weird robotic creatures attack the Earth. For some reason, the only ones who can stop the invasion are the three Dinosaurs for Hire: Archie, a tyrannosaurus rex and their leader; the triceratops Lorenzo, lover of fine food, fine wine, and fine clothes, and the one-eyed, unpredictable stegosaurus Reese. Each dino has its own strengths and weaknesses. You guide the dinosaur of your choice through the platform levels of the game. You are equipped with a gun: tons of enemies will attack you from all the sides, so your best bet will be walking with the fire button pressed down. You can shoot to all the directions and also engage in melee combat when the enemy is too close. Each level has a boss enemy waiting for you in the end. There is also a cooperative two-player mode.
overview_zh: 《僱傭恐龍》其實沒有什麼劇情。未知的怪物和奇怪的機器人生物攻擊地球。由於某些原因，唯一能夠阻止入侵的人是三隻僱用恐龍：阿奇，霸王龍和他們的首領；三角龍洛倫佐，熱愛美食、美酒和漂亮衣服，還有獨眼、難以捉摸的劍龍里斯。每個恐龍都有自己的優點和缺點。您可以引導您選擇的恐龍透過遊戲的平臺等級。你配備了一把槍：大量的敵人會從四面八方攻擊你，所以你最好的選擇是按住開火按鈕行走。你可以向各個方向射擊，也可以在敵人太近時進行近戰。每個關卡最後都有一個頭目敵人在等著你。還有兩人合作模式。

title_en: Disney Collection, The - QuackShot Starring Donald Duck + Castle of Illusion Starring Mickey Mouse
no_intro_name: Disney Collection, The - QuackShot Starring Donald Duck + Castle of Illusion Starring Mickey Mouse (Europe)

overview_en:
Disney's Aladdin is a 1993 Genesis video game developed by Virgin Games Inc. and Disney Software and released by Sega of America in the USA on October 19, 1993.

It is based on the movie, Aladdin, which was produced by Walt Disney Feature Animation and released in theaters on November 11, 1992.

Sega presents a Disney/Virgin Games co-production of Disney's Aladdin. Hang onto your carpet for action and fun! Aladdin slashes his shining scimitar to fight through Agrabah, escape the Sultan's dungeon, survive the fiery Cave of Wonders, snatch the Genie's Lamp, and save Princess Jasmine from the evil Jafar!

• All-new technology creates animation so smooth, it's like watching a real animated film!
• Aladdin battles thieves and desert warriors, and barely dodges danger on his high-speed carpet! Survive Jafar's troops for a dash through special bonus rounds!
• Hilarious! Palace Guards drop their drawers and camels spit dirt wads. Aladdin ping-pongs like a pinball inside the Genie's Lamp!
• Academy Award winning music straight from the movie, with favorites like "A Whole New World," "Friend Like Me," and more!
overview_zh:
迪士尼的阿拉丁是一款 1993 年創世紀電玩遊戲，由 Virgin Games Inc. 和迪士尼軟體開發，並由美國世嘉於 1993 年 10 月 19 日在美國發行。

它改編自華特迪士尼動畫長片製作的電影《阿拉丁》，於 1992 年 11 月 11 日在影院上映。

世嘉推出迪士尼與維珍遊戲公司聯合製作的迪士尼阿拉丁。抓住你的地毯，享受行動和樂趣！阿拉丁揮舞著閃亮的彎刀，穿越阿格拉巴，逃離蘇丹的地牢，在熾熱的奇蹟洞穴中生存，奪取精靈燈，並從邪惡的賈法爾手中拯救茉莉公主！

• 全新技術讓動畫變得如此流暢，就像觀看真正的動畫電影一樣！
• 阿拉丁與小偷和沙漠戰士作戰，並在高速飛毯上勉強躲避危險！在賈法爾的部隊中倖存下來，衝過特別獎勵回合！
• 搞笑！宮殿守衛放下抽屜，駱駝吐出一團泥土。阿拉丁像精靈燈裡的彈珠一樣打乒乓球！
• 直接取自電影的奧斯卡音樂，其中包括「全新世界」、「像我這樣的朋友」等最受歡迎的音樂！

overview_en: Falchion is an ace pilot in the Space Defense Force, and the pilot of a space ship known as Divine. On his way back to his home planet, daydreaming about girls, Divine's computer picks up a transmission from a nearby planet. Answering the transmission, it turns out to be a distress call from a beautiful woman on the Water Planet. "Save me..." she pleads, "and I will lend you my power." Falchion, lonely bachelor in space that he is, can't say no to a pretty face, and flies off towards the Water Planet.
overview_zh: 法爾奇昂是太空防衛軍的王牌飛行員，也是一艘名為「神聖」的太空船的飛行員。在返回家鄉星球的途中，迪萬做著關於女孩的白日夢，他的電腦收到了來自附近星球的傳輸訊號。接聽通訊，原來是水星球一位美女的求救訊號。 「救救我……」她懇求道，「我會把我的力量借給你。」法爾奇奧是太空中孤獨的單身漢，他無法對一張漂亮的臉說不，於是飛向了水星球。

overview_en:
DJ Boy (DJボーイ) is a 1989 beat 'em up arcade game developed by Kaneko. It was published in Japan by Kaneko and in North America by Sammy.

DJ Boy, also known as DJ Kid, was designed as a standard side-scrolling beat'em up game partially based on the hip-hop culture of the U.S. cities. What made the game unique at the time was the fact that many of the characters rode around on roller skates rather than walking or running.

The premise of the home console game: A young man named Donald J. Boy (DJ Boy) is a roller fighter taking part of an ultimate fight-race known as "Rollergame", taking place in Cigaretch City, located on the outskirts of New York City. Many people were excited to see DJ Boy, but a roller fighter gang known as the Dark Knights want him out of the competition. Their leader, Heavy-Met Tony, calls his gang to kidnap his girlfriend Maria, who also comes into town and defeat DJ Boy. DJ Boy must rescue Maria, defeat the Dark Knights, and win the Rollergame competition in one adventure. The arcade plot tells a different story. Two rollerskaters named Bob & Tom (the two playable characters) were breakdancing to the beat of their boombox, until it got stolen from rollerskater thieves (possibly the Dark Knights), in which they must find and defeat them in order to retrieve what is rightfully theirs.

DJ Boy skates across various stages and utilizes hand-to-hand combat moves in order to defeat opponents, culminating with a battle with a boss at the end of each level. Along the path, the player also encounters prizes, which then can be used later to purchase Power-ups from a store located at the end of each level (in the home version, the arcade simply tallied these as points). In the console versions of the game, as another game, River City Ransom, the "prizes" consist of coins that are dropped by defeated enemies, or food items like burgers that restore health.
overview_zh:
DJ Boy (DJボーイ) 是一款由 Kaneko 於 1989 年開發的街機遊戲。該書在日本由 Kaneko 出版，在北美由 Sammy 出版。

DJ Boy，也稱為 DJ Kid，是一款標準的橫向捲軸清版遊戲，部分基於美國城市的嘻哈文化。當時這款遊戲的獨特之處在於，許多角色都穿著溜冰鞋而不是步行或跑步。

家用遊戲機遊戲的前提：一位名叫唐納德·J·博伊（DJ Boy）的年輕人是一名輪滑戰士，參加了一場名為“Rollergame”的終極格鬥比賽，比賽地點位於紐約市郊區的 Cigaretch 城。許多人很高興看到 DJ Boy，但一個被稱為“黑闇騎士”的輪滑戰士團夥希望他退出比賽。他們的頭目重金屬託尼 (Heavy-Met Tony) 打電話給他的幫派綁架了他的女朋友瑪麗亞 (Maria)，瑪麗亞也來到鎮上並擊敗了 DJ Boy。 DJ 男孩必須在一次冒險中營救瑪麗亞、擊敗黑闇騎士並贏得滾軸遊戲比賽。街機情節講述了一個不同的故事。兩個名叫鮑勃和湯姆（兩個可玩角色）的輪滑運動員隨著他們的音箱的節奏跳霹靂舞，直到它被輪滑盜賊（可能是黑闇騎士）偷走，他們必須找到並擊敗他們，才能取回屬於他們的東西。

DJ Boy 在各個階段滑冰，並利用肉搏戰動作來擊敗對手，並在每個關卡結束時與 Boss 進行戰鬥，達到高潮。沿著這條路，玩家還會遇到獎品，然後可以使用這些獎品從每個關卡末尾的商店購買能量道具（在家庭版本中，街機將這些簡單地記錄為分數）。在遊戲的主機版本中，與另一款遊戲《River City Ransom》一樣，「獎品」包括被擊敗的敵人掉落的硬幣，或恢復健康的漢堡等食品。

overview_en:
Disney's Donald Duck takes the starring role in this side-scrolling platform game. As the detective Maui Mallard, he's on the trail of a long lost Idol, which has recently vanished. Early on, Maui can also switch between his normal self and Ninja Maui, and with all the creepy voodoo enemies he'll encounter throughout his adventure, he's going to need all the help he can get.

As previously mentioned, there are two personalities to Maui, and as a result, two different sets of controls. Normal Maui carries a bug gun, which can fire a variety of different insect ammo, from basic bugs, to the more powerful lightning and fire bugs. It's also possible for Maui to combine bugs to pack a more powerful blast at his enemies.
overview_zh:
迪士尼的唐老鴨在這款橫向捲軸平臺遊戲中擔任主角。身為偵探毛伊野鴨，他正在追蹤一位失蹤已久、最近又消失的偶像。在早期，毛伊島還可以在正常的自我和忍者毛伊島之間切換，並且在整個冒險過程中他會遇到所有令人毛骨悚然的巫毒敵人，他將需要所有可以獲得的幫助。

如前所述，毛伊島有兩種性格，因此有兩組不同的控制項。普通毛伊島攜帶一把蟲子槍，可以發射各種不同的昆蟲彈藥，從基本的蟲子到更強大的閃電和火蟲。毛伊還可以結合蟲子對敵人發動更強大的爆炸。

title_en: Dong Gu Ri Te Chi Jak Jeon
no_intro_name: Dong Gu Ri Te Chi Jak Jeon (Korea)
Buck Rogers - Countdown to Doomsday (USA, Europe)
overview_en:
This version of Buck Rogers: Countdown to Doomsday retains most of the story and the core gameplay of the computer version of the same name, but differs in several gameplay- and interface-related aspects.

The main differences involve reduction of some of the skills and equipment types present in the computer version. Limitations have been imposed on character creation as well: there are only four character classes (Warrior, Rocketjock, Medic, and Rogue) and three races (Human, Desert Runner, and Tinker) to choose from, as opposed to five character classes and six races in the computer release.

In the computer version, first-person view and pseudo-3D graphics were used for navigation, while combat was viewed from isometric perspective. In this release, isometric view is used both for navigation and combat, the player-controlled party visible from third-person perspective.
overview_zh:
此版本的《巴克羅傑斯：末日倒數》保留了同名電腦版的大部分故事和核心遊戲玩法，但在幾個遊戲玩法和介面相關方面有所不同。

主要區別在於減少了電腦版本中存在的一些技能和裝置型別。角色建立也受到限制：只有四個角色類別（戰士、火箭運動員、醫生和盜賊）和三個種族（人類、沙漠奔跑者和修補匠）可供選擇，而電腦版本中有五個角色類別和六個種族。

在電腦版本中，使用第一人稱視角和偽3D圖形進行導航，而戰鬥則是從等距視角觀看。在此版本中，等距檢視用於導航和戰鬥，玩家控制的一方從第三人稱視角可見。

title_en: Doraemon: Yume Dorobou to 7 Nin no Gozans
title_jp: ドラえもん 夢どろぼうと７人のゴザンス 7
no_intro_name: Doraemon - Yume Dorobou to 7 Nin no Gozans (Japan)

overview_en: Double Clutch is an overhead racing game similar to Super Off Road. One or two players choose from four different drivers, each with their own special ability, then head out for a race on one of four different tracks. Of course, the goal is to be the first to finish three laps of the course, but watch out for your opponents; bump into them or the terrain and your vehicle will take damage. Take too much damage and it's game over! After each race, winnings can be used to upgrade or repair the vehicle. There are three difficulty levels, which affect how quickly the vehicle takes damage. There is also a practice mode where the player can freely choose any track.
overview_zh: Double Clutch 是一款類似 Super Off Road 的架空賽車遊戲。一到兩位玩家從四位不同的車手中進行選擇，每位車手都有自己的特殊能力，然後前往四個不同賽道之一參加比賽。當然，我們的目標是第一個跑完三圈，但要小心你的對手；撞到它們或地形，您的車輛將會受到損壞。受到太多傷害，遊戲就結束了！每場比賽結束後，獎金可以用來升級或修復車輛。共有三個難度級別，這會影響車輛損壞的速度。還有練習模式，玩家可以自由選擇任何曲目。

overview_en: The player takes control of martial artist Billy Lee, or his twin brother Jimmy , as they fight their way into the turf of the Black Warriors gang in order to rescue their common love interest Marian. The player character has a repertoire of martial art techniques which they can perform by using the joystick and three action buttons (kick, jump, and punch) individually or in combination. Techniques ranges from basic punches and kicks, to more elaborate maneuvers like hair grabbing moves or elbow punches.
overview_zh: 玩家控制武術家比利李或他的雙胞胎兄弟吉米，殺入黑武士團夥的地盤，以營救他們共同的愛人瑪麗安。玩家角色擁有一套武術技巧，他們可以透過單獨或組合使用操縱桿和三個動作按鈕（踢、跳和拳擊）來執行這些技巧。技術範圍從基本的拳打腳踢，到更複雜的動作，如抓頭髮或肘擊。

overview_en: The original martial arts adventure continues - all the hard-hitting arcade action is at your command! Battle your way across the globe with awesome special moves and lethal weapons straight from the arcade! Whether it's a swirling Hurricane Kick or a staggering One Armed Head Butt, you have what it takes to crush ruthless enemies in the Double Dragon adventure of a lifetime! Battle across America, China, Japan and Italy to your ultimate challenge in Egypt!
overview_zh: 原汁原味的武術冒險仍在繼續——所有激烈的街機動作都在你的指揮之下！直接從街機中使用令人敬畏的特殊動作和致命武器，在全球範圍內戰鬥！無論是旋轉的颶風踢還是驚人的單臂頭撞，你都有能力在一生難忘的雙龍冒險中粉碎殘酷的敵人！跨越美國、中國、日本和義大利，挑戰埃及的終極挑戰！

overview_en:
Double Dragon II: The Revenge (ダブルドラゴンII ザ・リベンジ) is the sequel to Double Dragon. It was released for the arcades in early 1989, although it has a copyright date of 1988 due to the prototype testing conducted that year. The arcade version was essentially an improved version of the first game, featuring revamped graphics, a different combat system, new bosses and all new music, while retaining the same level structures and enemy characters from the first game. The Famicom/NES version, released by Technos at the end of the same year, was a completely different game that shared only the basic premise and a few superficial similarities in levels and character designs.

The Sega Mega Drive version, released by PALSOFT exclusively in Japan in 1991, is notably the only console version of the game that was actually a conversion of the arcade game, as the later PC Engine version released in 1993 by Naxat Soft was a remake of the aforementioned Famicom version. However, the Mega Drive version was poorly received by critics and was never picked up for export release as a result.

While the Mega Drive version has no official credits, it is known that the sound conversion was handled by Hitoshi Sakimoto, while Masaharu Iwata, who composed the game over theme for this version, claims that Quest may had handled the actual conversion.
overview_zh:
《雙截龍 II：復仇》（ダブルドラゴンII ザ・ribenジ）是《雙截龍》的續作。它於 1989 年初在街機遊戲廳發布，但由於當年進行了原型測試，其版權日期為 1988 年。街機版本質上是第一款遊戲的改進版本，具有改進的圖形、不同的戰鬥系統、新老闆和所有新音樂，同時保留與第一款遊戲相同的關卡結構和敵人角色。同年年底，Technos 發布了 Famicom/NES 版本，這是一款完全不同的遊戲，僅具有基本前提，在關卡和角色設計上有一些表面上的相似之處。

PALSOFT 於 1991 年在日本獨家發行的 Sega Mega Drive 版本是該遊戲唯一一個實際上是街機遊戲轉換的遊戲機版本，因為 Naxat Soft 於 1993 年發行的後來的 PC Engine 版本是上述 Famicom 版本的重製版。然而，Mega Drive 版本並沒有受到評論家的好評，因此從未被出口發行。

雖然 Mega Drive 版本沒有官方製作人員名單，但眾所周知，聲音轉換是由崎本仁 (Hitoshi Sakimoto) 處理的，而為該版本創作遊戲結束主題的巖田正治 (Masaharu Iwata) 則聲稱 Quest 可能處理了實際的轉換。

title_en: Double Dragon V - The Shadow Falls
no_intro_name: Double Dragon V - The Shadow Falls (USA)
overview_en: The Shadow Master, who has created a deadly virus which he plans to destroy the world with, is waiting for you at the end of the path to victory. You'll have to fight your way through many evil characters before you face the Shadow Master. Beat him, and the world is saved for another day.
overview_zh: 暗影大師創造了一種致命的病毒，並計劃用它來毀滅世界，他正在勝利之路的盡頭等著你。在面對暗影大師之前，你必須與許多邪惡角色戰鬥。打敗他，世界就得救了。

overview_en:
The Playoff Edition expands dramatically on the original in a number of ways:•16 teams of 12 (fictitious) players each
 - All players individually rated for various skills (Shooting %, Stamina, etc.)
 - Three play modes: Exhibition, Playoff (with password feature), and Multiplayer
 - 8-way multiplayer support with the Sega "Team Player" adapter
overview_zh:
季後賽版在許多方面對原版進行了大幅擴充套件：• 16 支球隊，每支 12 名（虛構）球員
 - 對所有球員的各種技能進行單獨評分（投籃百分比、耐力等）
 - 三種遊戲模式：表演賽、季後賽（附密碼功能）和多人遊戲
 - 使用 Sega“Team Player”介面卡支援 8 路多人遊戲

overview_en:
Dr. Robotnik's Mean Bean Machine is a 1993 Genesis video game developed by Sega CS1 and Compile and released by Sega of America in the USA on November 26, 1993.

Evil Dr. Robotnik has invented a machine that turns good folks into rotten robots! Village bean folk from the planet Mobius are being rounded up by the Doctor's henchbots and thrown into his dungeons. There they await their turn in his latest evil masterpiece!

• An addicting, fun-filled puzzle! Unite four beans of the same color so they can stick together and escape!
• Defeat characters from the Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog TV series, including Dr. Robotnik and his wicked henchbots!
• Three ways to play! Challenge a friend, go head-to-head with Dr. Robotnik, or practice on your own.
overview_zh:
《機器人博士的平均豆機》是一款 1993 年 Genesis 電子遊戲，由 Sega CS1 和 Compile 開發，並由 Sega of America 於 1993 年 11 月 26 日在美國發行。

邪惡的機器人博士發明瞭一種機器，可以將好人變成腐爛的機器人！來自莫比烏斯星球的鄉村豆人被博士的追隨者圍捕並扔進他的地牢。他們在那裡等待著他最新的邪惡傑作！

• 令人上癮、充滿樂趣的謎題！將四顆相同顏色的豆子聯合起來，這樣它們就可以粘在一起並逃脫！
• 擊敗《刺蝟索尼克歷險記》電視劇中的角色，包括機器人博士和他邪惡的追隨者！
• 三種玩法！挑戰朋友，與 Robotnik 博士正面交鋒，或自己練習。

title_jp: ドラゴンボールＺ 武勇列伝
title_zh: 七龍珠 Z 武勇列傳
overview_en: Dragon Ball Z: Buyū Retsuden (ドラゴンボールＺ 武勇列伝 Doragon Bōru Zetto Buyū Retsuden?, Dragon Ball Z: Intense Martial Transmission), released as Dragon Ball Z: L'Appel du Destin (Dragon Ball Z: The Call of Destiny?) in France and Spain and as Dragon Ball Z in Portugal, is a fighting game released for the Mega Drive. It was released in Japan on April 1, 1994 and Europe in 1994. The playable characters are Goku, Gohan, Krillin, Piccolo, Vegeta, Captain Ginyu, Recoome, Frieza, Future Trunks, Android 18, and Cell.
overview_zh: 《七龍珠 Z：武勇列傳》（ドラゴンボー· Drive 發行的格鬥遊戲。它於1994年4月1日在日本發行，並於1994年在歐洲發行。可玩的角色有悟空、悟飯、克林、短笛、貝吉塔、基紐上尉、雷庫姆、弗力札、未來特南克斯、人造人18和沙魯。

title_en: Dragon Ball Z - L'Appel du Destin
no_intro_name: Dragon Ball Z - L'Appel du Destin (France)

title_jp: ドラゴンズアイ プラス 上海III

overview_en: Imagine an adventure game in the format of pinball, and you get Dragon's Fury. Your hero is a small silver ball, and your battlefield is a three-tiered pinball machine. Using your ball, you can defeat monsters, rack up points, and enter bonus stages. If you play with enough skill, you can trigger all sorts of point-accumulating bonuses. If you get one billion points, you get to fight the final boss and view the ending to the game.
overview_zh: 想像一下彈珠形式的冒險遊戲，你會得到《龍之怒》。你的英雄是一個小銀球，你的戰場是一個三層彈珠臺。使用你的球，你可以擊敗怪物、累積積分並進入獎勵階段。如果你玩得夠熟練，你可以觸發各種累積積分的獎勵。如果你獲得了 10 億分，你就可以與最終的 Boss 戰鬥並檢視遊戲的結局。

overview_en:
Dragon's Revenge is a sequel to Dragon's Fury (Devil's Crush).

The table for this fantasy pinball game is three screens tall with medieval and dragon graphics. Each of the three screens has a pair of flippers at the bottom and the table elements are all animated and numerous monsters roam the screen.

The object is to hit wandering monsters and certain groups of creatures to open up the gateway to a sub-level. The single screen sub levels offer multi-ball play and are the key to scoring high.
overview_zh:
《龍之復仇》是《龍之怒》（《惡魔粉碎》）的續集。

這款奇幻彈珠遊戲的桌子有三個螢幕高，上面有中世紀和龍的圖形。三個螢幕的底部都有一對鰭狀肢，桌面元素都是動畫的，螢幕上漫遊著無數的怪物。

目標是擊中徘徊的怪物和某些生物群，以開啟通往次級關卡的大門。單螢幕子關卡提供多球遊戲，是獲得高分的關鍵。

title_jp: ドラゴンスレイヤー英雄伝説
overview_en:
Dragon Slayer: Eiyuu Densetsu (ドラゴンスレイヤー英雄伝説), called Dragon Slayer: The Legend of Heroes outside Japan, is the sixth main game in Falcom's Dragon Slayer series, following Sorcerian. It was first released on the NEC PC-88 in 1989 and would eventually find its way onto a number of other consoles. In 1994, Sega Falcom produced a port to the Sega Mega Drive released exclusively in Japan.

As with other main series Dragon Slayer games, Eiyuu Densetsu recevied its own sequels in a subseries, the first of which is Dragon Slayer: Eiyuu Densetsu II, also ported to the Mega Drive by Sega Falcom. In the main series, it was followed by Lord Monarch, which also had a Mega Drive adaptation produced by Sega Falcom.
overview_zh:
《屠龍者：英雄傳說》（ドラゴンsureイヤー英雄伝説），在日本以外被稱為《屠龍者：英雄傳說》，是Falcom繼《魔導士》之後的《屠龍者》系列的第六部主打遊戲。它於 1989 年首次在 NEC PC-88 上發布，並最終出現在許多其他遊戲機上。 1994 年，Sega Falcom 製作了 Sega Mega Drive 的移植版，並在日本獨家發售。

與其他主要係列《屠龍者傳說》遊戲一樣，《英雄傳說》在子系列中也獲得了自己的續集，其中第一個是《屠龍者：英雄傳說 II》，也由世嘉 Falcom 移植到 Mega Drive。在主系列中，緊隨其後的是《君主勳爵》，該系列也有世嘉 Falcom 製作的 Mega Drive 改編版。

title_jp: ドラゴンスレイヤー英雄伝説II
overview_en:
Dragon Slayer: The Legend of Heroes II (ドラゴンスレイヤー英雄伝説II) is the sequel to Dragon Slayer: Eiyuu Densetsu within the eponymous subseries (whether or not it is also part of the main Dragon Slayer series is unknown) released by Falcom in 1992 for the NEC PC-88. As with Eiyuu Densetsu, it was ported to a number of systems, including to the Sega Mega Drive in 1995 by Sega Falcom exclusively in Japan.

The Dragon Slayer series would continue with Lord Monarch, which also saw an entry on the Mega Drive. However, with the next The Legend of Heroes game, Eiyuu Densetsu III: Shiroki Majou, Falcom decided to break the series away from Dragon Slayer. This third game was ported to the Sega Saturn in 1998.
overview_zh:
《屠龍英雄傳 II》（ドラゴンsureイヤー英雄伝説II）是 Falcom 於 1992 年在 NEC PC-88 上發布的同名子系列《屠龍英雄傳》的續作（是否也是屠龍主系列的一部分尚不清楚）。與《英雄傳說》一樣，它被移植到許多系統，包括 1995 年由 Sega Falcom 在日本獨家移植到 Sega Mega Drive。

《屠龍者》系列將在《君主》中繼續，該系列也出現在 Mega Drive 上。然而，在下一款《英雄傳說》遊戲《英雄傳說 III：白木魔條》中，Falcom 決定將該系列從《屠龍者》中分離出來。第三款遊戲於 1998 年移植到 Sega Saturn。

overview_en:
Dragon: The Bruce Lee Story is a action/fighting game in which you play Bruce Lee, the infamous martial arts master.

As you go through the different levels, the game follows the format of the 1993 Universal movie of the same name, but is not identical to it.

As Bruce Lee, you can perform a wide variety of high-flying martial arts moves, roundhouse kicks, flying kicks, flying chops and throws. Defeat a multitude of new opponents and build up your Chi in order to gain special abilities and weapons.
overview_zh:
Dragon: The Bruce Lee Story 是一款動作/格鬥遊戲，您在其中扮演臭名昭著的武術大師李小龍。

當你透過不同的關卡時，遊戲遵循 1993 年環球同名電影的格式，但又有所不同。

身為李小龍，你可以表演各種高空武術動作、迴旋踢、飛踢、飛劈和投擲。擊敗眾多新對手並增強你的真氣以獲得特殊能力和武器。

overview_en: Duke cracked his knuckles and smirked, 'I need a stiff drink... a shower... and, a soft-skinned belly to lie my head on.' A nearby moniter flickered on, and an incredibly ugly face spoke an ominous message: 'The moon assault Overlord has been defeated, as was our Battlelord on Earth. But while Duke Nukem has been distracted our main attack wave has begun it's final assault on Earth. We shall obliterate all resistance.' 'Guess again, freak show, ' Duke growled. 'Duke's coming back to town, and the last thing that's gonna go through your mind before you die... is my size 13 boot!
overview_zh: 杜克捏著指關節，傻笑道：「我需要喝一杯烈酒……洗個澡……還有一個柔軟的肚子可以讓我的頭靠在上面。」附近的監視器閃爍起來，一張極其醜陋的臉發出了不祥的資訊：「月球突擊霸主已經被擊敗，我們地球上的戰將也被擊敗了。」但是，當毀滅公爵被分散注意力時，我們的主波對地球的最後一次攻擊。我們將消滅所有抵抗。 「再猜猜，怪胎表演，」杜克咆哮道。 「杜克要回城了，在你死之前你腦子裡想到的最後一件事就是……我的 13 號靴子！”

title_en: Dune II - Kampf um den Wuestenplaneten
no_intro_name: Dune II - Kampf um den Wuestenplaneten (Germany)

title_en: Dune II - The Battle for Arrakis
no_intro_name: Dune II - The Battle for Arrakis (Europe)

overview_en:
Westwood Studios' real-time strategy classic Dune II received a major overhaul when ported to the Sega Genesis. While the basic concept remains the same, the game features all-new graphics, streamlined controls, changes to the tech tree as well as completely new levels.

As in the original game, the player controls the troops of one of three noble Houses, called by the Emperor to mine the Spice Melange on the planet Arrakis, also known as Dune. A series of consecutive battles must be won by mining spice, constructing a base and building units to attack the enemy.

The rather complex menu-based controls of the original game have been replaced by a context-sensitive cursor system, where a unit reacts according to what is below the cursor - either moving to a destination or attacking an enemy unit, for example.
overview_zh:
Westwood Studios 的即時戰略經典遊戲《沙丘 II》在移植到 Sega Genesis 後進行了重大修改。雖然基本概念保持不變，但遊戲具有全新的圖形、簡化的控制、技術樹的變化以及全新的關卡。

與原版遊戲一樣，玩家控制三個貴族家族之一的軍隊，受皇帝召喚，在阿拉基斯星球（也稱為沙丘）上開採香料混合物。必須透過開採香料、建造基地和建造部隊來攻擊敵人來贏得一系列連續的戰鬥。

原始遊戲相當複雜的基於選單的控制已被上下文敏感的遊標系統所取代，其中單位根據遊標下方的內容做出反應 - 例如，要麼移動到目的地，要麼攻擊敵方單位。

title_jp: ダンジョンマスターIIスカルキープ
overview_en:
Thunder Force III is a 1990 Mega Drive video game developed and released by Technosoft in Japan on June 8, 1990.

The famous shoot 'em up series Thunder Force reaches its third installment. Eight new levels of non-stop action, as always packed with gargantuan bosses. 

What made Thunder Force stand apart from the other shooters, the ability to switch weapons on the fly, hasn't changed a bit. However, the original mix of side-scrolling and top-view levels that was present in Thunder Force II has been dropped; only the side-scrolling levels remain.
overview_zh:
Thunder Force III 是一款 1990 年 Mega Drive 電玩遊戲，由 Technosoft 於 1990 年 6 月 8 日在日本開發並發行。

著名的射擊遊戲系列《雷霆力量》迎來了第三部。八個新的不間斷行動關卡，一如既往地充滿了巨大的頭目。 

Thunder Force 與其他射擊遊戲的差別在於即時切換武器的能力，這一點並沒有改變。然而，《Thunder Force II》中原來的橫向捲軸和俯檢視關卡組合已被放棄；只剩下橫向捲軸關卡了。

title_en: Dungeons _ Dragons - Warriors of the Eternal Sun
no_intro_name: Dungeons _ Dragons - Warriors of the Eternal Sun (USA)
overview_en:
Dungeon & Dragons: Warriors of the Eternal Sun is set in the world of Mystara, a setting of the Dungeons & Dragons game. The characters find themselves in a strange, red-hued world in which the horizon slopes upward in all directions, eventually vanishing into a crimson haze at the limits of sight. Their mission is to find and make allies in this new world or else the kingdom and its culture will perish.

The player leads a party of four characters (either the default party or one that the player has created). Characters and races can be chosen from the normal D&D options. The gameworld is viewed from an isometric perspective and the characters can roam around in realtime. Battles are turn based. Like most role-playing games, the gaming experience focuses on exploration, inventory management and character development.
overview_zh:
《龍與地下城：永恆之陽的勇士》以《龍與地下城》遊戲的背景－邁斯塔拉世界為背景。角色們發現自己身處在一個奇怪的紅色世界，地平線向四面八方傾斜，最終消失在視線極限處的深紅色薄霧中。他們的使命是在這個新世界中尋找並結交盟友，否則王國及其文化將會滅亡。

玩家領導一支由四個角色組成的隊伍（預設隊伍或玩家建立的隊伍）。角色和種族可以從正常的 D&D 選項中選擇。遊戲世界是從等距視角觀看的，角色可以即時漫遊。戰鬥是回合製的。與大多數角色扮演遊戲一樣，遊戲體驗專注於探索、庫存管理和角色發展。

overview_en:
Dyna Brothers 2 (ダイナブラザース２) is the sequel to Dyna Brothers, and is a Sega Mega Drive simulation game released exclusively in Japan.

CRI also released an expanded version on the Japanese Sega Channel, Dyna Brothers 2: Sega Channel Special (ダイナブラザーズ２スペシャル). This version has since been rereleased on the Japanese Virtual Console, from which the ROM comes from. Whether or not there was a North American release as such is unknown.
overview_zh:
《Dyna Brothers 2》（ダイナブラザーsu２）是《Dyna Brothers》的續作，是一款在日本獨家發行的 Sega Mega Drive 模擬遊戲。

CRI也在日本世嘉頻道上發表了擴充版《Dyna Brothers 2: Sega Channel Special》（ダイナブラザーズ２スペシャル）。此版本已在日文虛擬控制檯（ROM 的來源）上重新發布。北美是否發行尚不清楚。

no_intro_name: Dyna Brothers 2 - Sega Channel Special (Japan) (Sega Channel)
overview_en: A special version of Dyna Brothers 2 only released on Sega Channel in Japan for the Sega Mega Drive.
overview_zh: Dyna Brothers 2的特別版本僅在日本的世嘉頻道上為世嘉Mega Drive發布。

title_jp: ダイナミックカントリークラブ
ダイナマイトデューク
overview_en:
A top scientist decides to utilise a secret formula to develop his very own army of evil mutant warriors, so he can become ruler of the world. It is up to Dynamite Duke: a man who is armed with a cybernetic arm along with a machine gun.

Dynamite Duke (Japanese: ダイナマイトデューク Hepburn: Dainamaito Dūku?) is a 1989 action arcade game developed by Seibu Kaihatsu. It was later ported to the Sega Master System, Sega Mega Drive and Sharp X68000. Being a Cabal-based shooter, it can be considered a follow-up to Seibu's Empire City: 1931 and Dead Angle.
overview_zh:
一位頂尖科學家決定利用一個秘密配方來發展他自己的邪惡突變戰士軍隊，這樣他就可以成為世界的統治者。這取決於炸藥杜克：一個裝備控制論手臂和機關槍的人。

Dynamite Duke（日文：ダイナマイトデューク Hepburn：Dainamaito Dūku？）是一款由 Seibu Kaihatsu 開發的 1989 年動作街機遊戲。後來它被移植到 Sega Master System、Sega Mega Drive 和 Sharp X68000 上。作為一款基於 Cabal 的射擊遊戲，它可以被認為是西武的《帝國城：1931》和《死角》的後續作品。

title_jp: ダイナマイトヘッディー
overview_en:
Dynamite Headdy is a platformer... with a difference. You control a little character whose main attack comes from his disembodied head. Yes, years before Rayman appeared, we already had a hero who used detachable appendages to attack his enemies.

Rather than the traditional power-ups, Dynamite Headdy enables you to swap your head for different kinds – such as heads that heal you or heads that stick on to walls. You use your head in order to climb up on platforms as well, as you can grab hold of things with it, and on certain stages of the Mega Drive/Genesis version it is used to turn the game into a side-scrolling shooter, as you gain a propeller, jet, or bird head. Basically, Dynamite Headdy is just a traditional platformer at heart.
overview_zh: 《Dynamite Headdy》是 1994 年 8 月 5 日由日本 SEGA 世嘉發售的 Mega Drive 與 Game Gear 橫向捲軸動作遊戲。主角 Headdy 可拋出自己的頭撞擊敵人，並更換各式各樣的頭部裝備獲得不同能力。
overview_jp: 『ダイナマイトヘッディー』（Dynamite Headdy）は、1994年8月5日に日本のセガから発売されたメガドライブおよびゲームギア用横スクロールアクションゲーム。

overview_en:
The story of the game is connected to that of El Viento. Earnest Evans is a brave treasure hunter. His grandfather was a famous archaeologist who searched for three legendary idols in the 1930s. It was said that those idols could bring disaster upon the Earth if fallen into the wrong hands. But despite his efforts, he could never find even one of the idols. Now it's up to the grandson to continue his work, fifty years later. But the evil syndicate leader Brady Tressider has his own plans, and will do anything to stop Earnest...

This is an action platform game in which you control Earnest Evans, armed with his trusty whip. The hero can jump, climb ropes, crouch, and crawl. There are plenty of obstacles on the levels (bottomless pits, spikes, crushing bridges, lava, etc.), as well as gangsters and monsters to dispose of.
overview_zh:
遊戲的故事與 El Viento 的故事有關。歐內斯特·埃文斯是一位勇敢的尋寶者。他的祖父是一位著名的考古學家，曾在1930年代尋找三尊傳奇神像。據說這些神像如果落入壞人之手，可能會為地球帶來災難。但儘管他竭盡全力，卻始終未能找到哪怕一位偶像。五十年後，現在輪到孫子繼續他的工作了。但邪惡集團頭目布雷迪·特雷西德有他自己的計劃，並將不惜一切代價阻止歐內斯特…

這是一款動作平臺遊戲，您可以控制厄尼斯特·埃文斯 (Earnest Evans)，手持他值得信賴的鞭子。英雄可以跳躍、爬繩、蹲伏和爬行。關卡中有大量障礙物（無底坑、尖刺、破碎橋樑、熔岩等），還有需要消滅的歹徒和怪物。

overview_en:
The story of the game is connected to that of El Viento. Earnest Evans is a brave treasure hunter. His grandfather was a famous archaeologist who searched for three legendary idols in the 1930s. It was said that those idols could bring disaster upon the Earth if fallen into the wrong hands. But despite his efforts, he could never find even one of the idols. Now it's up to the grandson to continue his work, fifty years later. But the evil syndicate leader Brady Tressider has his own plans, and will do anything to stop Earnest...

This is an action platform game in which you control Earnest Evans, armed with his trusty whip. The hero can jump, climb ropes, crouch, and crawl. There are plenty of obstacles on the levels (bottomless pits, spikes, crushing bridges, lava, etc.), as well as gangsters and monsters to dispose of.
overview_zh:
遊戲的故事與 El Viento 的故事有關。歐內斯特·埃文斯是一位勇敢的尋寶者。他的祖父是一位著名的考古學家，曾在1930年代尋找三尊傳奇神像。據說這些神像如果落入壞人之手，可能會為地球帶來災難。但儘管他竭盡全力，卻始終未能找到哪怕一位偶像。五十年後，現在輪到孫子繼續他的工作了。但邪惡集團頭目布雷迪·特雷西德有他自己的計劃，並將不惜一切代價阻止歐內斯特…

這是一款動作平臺遊戲，您可以控制厄尼斯特·埃文斯 (Earnest Evans)，手持他值得信賴的鞭子。英雄可以跳躍、爬繩、蹲伏和爬行。關卡中有大量障礙物（無底坑、尖刺、破碎橋樑、熔岩等），還有需要消滅的歹徒和怪物。

overview_en:
Earthworm Jim is a 1994 Genesis video game developed by Shiny Entertainment and released by Playmates Interactive Entertainment in the USA on October 26, 1994.

EAT DIRT!

When a superpowered spacesuit falls on an ordinary earthworm, he transforms into the head-whipping laser-blasting hero, Earthworm Jim! Use Jim's new-found powers to fight evil and save the Princess, uh... What's-Her-Name? Groovy!
overview_zh:
《蚯蚓吉姆》是一款 1994 年 Genesis 電玩遊戲，由 Shiny Entertainment 開發，並於 1994 年 10 月 26 日在美國由 Playmates Interactive Entertainment 發行。

吃土！

當超能力太空衣落在一隻普通的蚯蚓身上時，他就變身為令人頭暈的鐳射爆破英雄，蚯蚓吉姆！使用吉姆新發現的力量來對抗邪惡並拯救公主，呃......她的名字是什麼？好極了！

overview_en:
Earthworm Jim 2 is a 1995 Genesis video game developed by Shiny Entertainment and released by Playmates Interactive Entertainment in the USA on November 15, 1995.

TWO TIMES THE FUN! TWO TIMES THE EXCITEMENT!

Two times two is four! Too much to list, but keep reading:
From Evil the Cat's 'Circus of the Scars' to the planet of Meat, join Jim on a madcap chase across the galaxy. Saving cows, thwarting lawyers, and outsmarting Psy-Crow are all in a day's work for Jim. Are you up to the challenge? Can you handle the awesome new weapons? Excellent! Then stop reading this. Take it up to the front counter and try it at home! Trust no one, play it yourself... or EAT DIRT!

THE FUN STUFF
• Over 5 new weapons to choose from! Guns, guns, guns, guns!
• Uses patented Animotion II and Silicon Graphics 3D characters!
• Untraditional level designs that only Shiny Entertainment is capable of creating!
• Returning favorite characters: Princess What's-Her-Name, Psy-Crow, Peter Puppy, Bob the Goldfish, and several new villains as well!
• See Jim in disguise as a blind cave salamander (no, really... we're not kidding on this one!)
• Whip, run, jump, fly, and Snott swing your way to victory!
overview_zh:
《蚯蚓吉姆 2》是一款 1995 年 Genesis 電玩遊戲，由 Shiny Entertainment 開發，並於 1995 年 11 月 15 日在美國由 Playmates Interactive Entertainment 發行。

兩倍的樂趣！兩倍的興奮！

二乘二等於四！太多了，無法列出，但請繼續閱讀：
從邪惡貓的「疤痕馬戲團」到肉食星球，與吉姆一起踏上銀河系的瘋狂追逐之旅。拯救乳牛、挫敗律師、智勝精神病烏鴉，這些都是吉姆一天的工作。你準備好迎接挑戰了嗎？你能駕馭這些超棒的新武器嗎？出色的！然後停止閱讀本文。拿到前臺並在家嘗試！不相信任何人，自己玩……或吃土！

有趣的事情
• 超過 5 種新武器可供選擇！槍，槍，槍，槍！
• 使用專利的Animmotion II 和Silicon Graphics 3D 角色！
• 只有Shiny Entertainment 才能創造的非傳統關卡設計！
• 最受喜愛的角色回歸：公主什麼名字、精神病烏鴉、小狗彼得、金魚鮑勃以及幾個新的反派！
• 看到吉姆偽裝成一隻盲目的洞穴蠑螈（不，真的…我們不是在開玩笑！）
• 鞭打、奔跑、跳躍、飛行和 Snott 揮舞你的勝利之路！

overview_en:
Ecco Jr. is a prequel to Ecco the Dolphin, set during his childhood. Together with his friends Tara the Whale and Kitney the Dolphin, Ecco goes looking for the legendary blue whale. Released after the two main Ecco games, this title is geared towards younger children with simplified gameplay, lacking the difficulty of the other Ecco games. The game also contains a number of educational facts about dolphins.

Set in the same underwater world, players choose one of the three characters to solve a series of challenges. These all involve harmless exploration and solving small puzzles with no foes or violent gameplay. The characters need to use their abilities to locate animals, herd seahorses, retrieve a sea lion's lost ball, swim through rings and locate glyphs. After completing the main tasks, a large glyph needs to be located to end the level. The characters can be switched at any time during gameplay, but they all have the same abilities. One button is used to send out a sonar pulse to locate items while another boosts the animal. Most levels take less than a minute to complete and there are eighteen levels in total.
overview_zh:
小艾科是《海豚艾科》的前傳，故事發生在他的童年時期。艾科與他的朋友鯨魚塔拉和海豚基尼一起尋找傳說中的藍鯨。該遊戲在兩款主要的 ECCO 遊戲之後發布，面向年齡較小的兒童，遊戲玩法簡化，缺乏其他 ECCO 遊戲的難度。遊戲還包含許多有關海豚的教育事實。

以同一個海底世界為背景，玩家選擇三個角色之一來解決一系列挑戰。這些都涉及無害的探索和解決沒有敵人或暴力遊戲的小謎題。角色需要利用自己的能力來定位動物、放牧海馬、找回海獅失去的球、遊過環以及定位字形。完成主要任務後，需要找到一個大字形才能結束關卡。角色可以在遊戲過程中隨時切換，但他們都具有相同的能力。一個按鈕用於發出聲納脈衝來定位物品，而另一個按鈕則用於增強動物。大多數關卡只需不到一分鐘即可完成，總共有十八個關卡。

title_jp: エコー・ザ・ドルフィン
overview_en:
Ecco the Dolphin is a 1992 Genesis video game developed by Novotrade and released by Sega of America in the USA on December 19, 1992.

You are Ecco, a powerful young dolphin. A mysterious storm has swept your family from the sea. The search to find them will take you through vast underwater realms of treachery, beauty, and adventure. Use your sonar to discover hidden caverns and unlock the secrets of crystal glyphs. Charge packs of bloodthirsty sharks. Dive deep... but don't linger too long, because you're a mammal and need air to breathe. In your quest, you'll discover that more than your family's safety is at stake. The fate of the whole world rests on your wits and fins.

• Explore over 25 giant levels of solving puzzles and fighting denizens of the sea.
• 8 Megs of aquatic excitement with password save.
• Knife through the waters, flip above the waves, with motions created from real dolphins.
overview_zh: 《Ecco the Dolphin》是由 Novotrade International 開發、SEGA 世嘉發行的 Mega Drive 動作冒險遊戲，後續移植到多種主機。玩家操作海豚 Ecco，在海洋中探索並拯救被神秘力量吸走的同伴。本條目主要說明 Mega Drive 版內容。
overview_jp:
『エコー・ザ・ドルフィン』(英名:Ecco the Dolphin) は、Novotrade Internationalによって開発され、セガより発売されたメガドライブ用のアクションアドベンチャーゲームであり、のちに様々な機種に移植された。
本記事では主にメガドライブ版について詳しく説明をする。

title_jp: エコー・ザ・ドルフィン２
overview_en:
Ecco the Dolphin is a 1992 Genesis video game developed by Novotrade and released by Sega of America in the USA on December 19, 1992.

You are Ecco, a powerful young dolphin. A mysterious storm has swept your family from the sea. The search to find them will take you through vast underwater realms of treachery, beauty, and adventure. Use your sonar to discover hidden caverns and unlock the secrets of crystal glyphs. Charge packs of bloodthirsty sharks. Dive deep... but don't linger too long, because you're a mammal and need air to breathe. In your quest, you'll discover that more than your family's safety is at stake. The fate of the whole world rests on your wits and fins.

• Explore over 25 giant levels of solving puzzles and fighting denizens of the sea.
• 8 Megs of aquatic excitement with password save.
• Knife through the waters, flip above the waves, with motions created from real dolphins.
overview_zh:
《Ecco the Dolphin》是一款 1992 年 Genesis 電子遊戲，由 Novotrade 開發，並由美國世嘉於 1992 年 12 月 19 日在美國發行。

你是艾科，一隻強壯的年輕海豚。一場神秘的風暴將你的家人從海上捲走了。尋找它們的過程將帶你穿越充滿背叛、美麗和冒險的廣闊水下王國。使用聲納發現隱藏的洞穴並解開水晶符號的秘密。向嗜血的鯊魚衝鋒。潛入深處…但不要停留太久，因為你是哺乳動物，需要空氣來呼吸。在你的探索中，你會發現受到威脅的不僅僅是家人的安全。整個世界的命運取決於你的智慧和鰭。

• 探索超過 25 個巨大關卡，解決謎題並與海洋居民戰鬥。
• 8 兆的水上刺激，附密碼儲存。
• 以真實海豚的動作，在水中劃破水面，在海浪之上翻轉。

no_intro_name: Ecco the Dolphin CD (Japan) (Disc 1) (Ecco the Dolphin)

overview_en:
Ecco: The Tides of Time is a 1994 Genesis video game developed by Novotrade and released by Sega of America in the USA on September 24, 1994.

Ecco is older, stronger, and engulfed by dangers! The evil Vortex has shattered the mystical Asterite. Ecco and Trellia, a beautiful dolphin of the future, cross 100 million years of time to save the dolphins and all life on Earth!

• Ecco morphs! Charge a metasphere to become a shark with all its fighting power! Change into a seagull and fly! Safely swim past dangers as a jellyfish!
• Over 40 levels of spectacular aquatic adventure, with password save.
• Five levels of challenging 3D travel through the vast waters of the open ocean!
overview_zh:
《Ecco：時光之潮》是一款 1994 年 Genesis 電子遊戲，由 Novotrade 開發，並由美國世嘉於 1994 年 9 月 24 日在美國發行。

艾科變得更老、更強壯，但也被危險吞噬！邪惡的漩渦粉碎了神秘的星石。艾科和特雷利亞，一隻美麗的未來海豚，跨越一億年的時間來拯救海豚和地球上的所有生命！

• ECCO 變形！充能異能體，發揮其全部戰鬥力，成為鯊魚！變身海鷗，飛翔吧！像水母一樣安全地遊過危險！
• 超過 40 級的壯觀水上冒險，可儲存密碼。
• 五個等級的挑戰性 3D 旅行，穿越廣闊的海洋！
