title_en: Egawa Sugoru no Super League CD
no_intro_name: Egawa Sugoru no Super League CD (Japan)

title_en: Egawa Suguru no Super League CD
title_jp: 江川卓のスーパーリーグＣＤ

title_en: Egawa Suguru no Super League CD
no_intro_name: Egawa Suguru no Super League CD (Japan)

overview_en:
El Viento (エル・ヴィエント Eru Viento?, derived from Spanish meaning "The Wind") is a 2D platform video game released by Wolf Team and published by Renovation Products for the Sega Mega Drive/Sega Genesis game console in 1991. It is the second in a trilogy of games, which include Earnest Evans and Anett Futatabi.
The game possesses many references to H. P. Lovecraft's esteemed Cthulhu Mythos.
The game shares the same fictional universe with Earnest Evans, and happens several years later.

New York City, 1928. A mad religious leader known as Henry seeks to awaken the ancient and malevolent god Hastur. A sorceress named Restiana offers herself to Henry as a sacrifice for a cause which will bring the inevitable down fall of mankind.

There are some people that have descended from Hastur's ancient bloodline, one of which is the young Peruvian sorceress, Annet Myer. With some assistance from Earnest Evans, Annet attempts to stop the cult from resurrecting Hastur using the very spells of this bloodline.
overview_zh:
El Viento（エル・ヴィエentto Eru Viento？，源自西班牙語，意為「風」）是一款 2D 平臺電玩遊戲，由 Wolf Team 發行，並由 Renovation Products 於 1991 年為 Sega Mega Drive/Sega Genesis 遊戲機發行。它是遊戲三部曲中的第二部，其中包括 Earnest Evans 和 Anett Futatabi。
遊戲中有許多參考文獻來自 H. P. Lovecraft 的受人尊敬的克蘇魯神話。
該遊戲與歐內斯特·埃文斯共享同一個虛構宇宙，並且發生在幾年後。

紐約，1928 年。一位名叫亨利的瘋狂宗教領袖試圖喚醒古老而惡毒的神哈斯塔。一位名叫雷斯蒂安娜的女術士向亨利獻出自己作為犧牲品，以實現人類不可避免的滅亡。

有些人是哈斯塔古老血統的後裔，其中之一就是年輕的秘魯女巫安妮特·邁爾。在歐內斯特·埃文斯的幫助下，安妮特試圖阻止邪教使用該血統的咒語復活哈斯塔。

title_jp: エレメンタルマスター
overview_en: Gyra has usurped the throne, and his minions are pillaging and plundering throughout the countryside. The kingdom is doomed unless someone can stop this madness and restore order to the land. You are the ELEMENTAL MASTER, and you're the only person with the power to put an end to Gyra's reign of terror. Harnessing the power of the elements fire, water, wind, and the earth you use them as your very own weapons to fight all that is evil in the world. You'll be up against Gyra's most ruthless henchmen as you battle through eight levels of intense action. But you've got the power of magic on your side, and if you can master the five spells at your disposal, you'll be a nearly unstoppable force. Of course, when you're single-handedly taking on an entire army, the odds are stacked against you. But with the power of the elements, you're the only one who can stop Gyra and his army.
overview_zh: 吉拉篡奪了王位，他的爪牙在鄉村各地進行掠奪和掠奪。除非有人能夠阻止這種瘋狂並恢復這片土地的秩序，否則王國註定要滅亡。你是元素大師，也是唯一有能力結束吉拉恐怖統治的人。利用火、水、風和土元素的力量，你用它們作為自己的武器來對抗世界上所有的邪惡。當你在八個關卡的激烈行動中戰鬥時，你將面對吉拉最殘酷的追隨者。但你擁有魔法的力量，如果你能掌握五個可用的咒語，你將成為一支幾乎不可阻擋的力量。當然，當你單槍匹馬對抗整支軍隊時，你的勝算就很渺茫了。但憑藉元素的力量，你是唯一能夠阻止吉拉和他的軍隊的人。

overview_en: Eliminate Down is an Action game, developed by Aprinet and published by Soft Vision International, which was released in Japan in 1993.
overview_zh: Eliminate Down是一款動作遊戲，由Aprinet開發、Soft Vision International發行，於1993年在日本發行。

overview_en: A hockey game released in Sweden in late 1994. The gameplay is based on the NHL games but it's starring the teams and players from the swedish hockey league Elitserien.
overview_zh: 1994 年底在瑞典發布的曲棍球遊戲。遊戲玩法基於 NHL 比賽，但主角是瑞典曲棍球聯賽 Elitserien 的球隊和球員。

overview_en: A hockey game released in Sweden in late 1995. The gameplay is based on the NHL games but it's starring the teams and players from the swedish hockey league Elitserien.
overview_zh: 1995 年底在瑞典發布的曲棍球遊戲。遊戲玩法以 NHL 比賽為基礎，但主角是瑞典曲棍球聯賽 Elitserien 的球隊和球員。

overview_en:
The skies are populated by zeppelins, large battleships and flying fortresses. In this age of steel, the Motorhead Empire has conquered and enslaved almost the entire planet. The last free nation, the Republic of Silverhead, tries to bring the Motorhead Empire down using its newly developed weapon, the lightning bomb.

Apart from its unusual Steampunk setting, Steel Empire is a fairly traditional side-scrolling shooter. At the beginning of every level, the player gets to choose between a striker plane and a zeppelin. While the plane is faster, the zeppelin has a longer life bar and can therefore sustain more damage. Both ships use the same standard weapon, which can be fired forwards or backwards, as well as bombs that are released automatically while firing. Also available is a limited number of lightning bombs that damage or destroy all enemies on screen.

Defeated enemies often drop power-ups, including hearts that replenish health, lightning bombs, bonus points, 1-UPs, options and experience points.

Options are small "drones" that fly alongside the player's ship and mimic its behaviour.

Experience points can be collected to level up the ships' weapons (up to level 20) and thereby increase their fire power.
overview_zh:
天空中佈滿了齊柏林飛船、大型戰艦和飛行堡壘。在這個鋼鐵時代，摩托頭帝國征服並奴役了幾乎整個星球。最後一個自由國家，銀頭共和國，試圖使用其新開發的武器——閃電炸彈來摧毀摩托頭帝國。

除了不尋常的蒸氣龐克背景之外，《鋼鐵帝國》還是一款相當傳統的橫向捲軸射擊遊戲。在每個關卡開始時，玩家都可以在前鋒飛機和齊柏林飛艇之間進行選擇。雖然飛機速度更快，但齊柏林飛艇的生命條更長，因此可以承受更多傷害。兩艘船都使用相同的標準武器，可以向前或向後發射，以及發射時自動釋放的炸彈。還提供數量有限的閃電炸彈，可以傷害或摧毀螢幕上的所有敵人。

被擊敗的敵人通常會掉落能量道具，包括補充生命值的心、閃電炸彈、獎勵積分、1-UP、選項和經驗值。

選項是小型“無人機”，它們沿著玩家的船飛行並模仿其行為。

可以收集經驗值來升級船艦的武器（最高 20 級），從而增強火力。

overview_en:
ESPN Baseball Tonight is a baseball game with both exhibition and playoff modes. Other modes included are both practice (both pitching and batting) and Home Run Derby modes. The game contains 28 real MLB teams but no actual players. Gameplay options include being able to turn errors on or off and to have assisted fielding on or off.

Gameplay has the behind the batter viewpoint, whether pitching or batting. One thing to note when fielding, the player must manually throw the ball back to the pitcher for the game to continue.
overview_zh:
ESPN Baseball Tonight 是一場具有表演賽和季後賽模式的棒球比賽。其他模式包括練習（投球和擊球）和本壘打大賽模式。遊戲包含 28 支真實的 MLB 球隊，但沒有真實的球員。遊戲選項包括能夠開啟或關閉錯誤以及開啟或關閉輔助防守。

遊戲玩法有擊球手背後的視角，無論是投球還是擊球。守場時需要注意的一件事是，球員必須手動將球丟回給投手，比賽才能繼續。

overview_en:
ESPN Baseball Tonight is a baseball game with both exhibition and playoff modes. Other modes included are both practice (both pitching and batting) and Home Run Derby modes. The game contains 28 real MLB teams but no actual players. Gameplay options include being able to turn errors on or off and to have assisted fielding on or off.

Gameplay has the behind the batter viewpoint, whether pitching or batting. One thing to note when fielding, the player must manually throw the ball back to the pitcher for the game to continue.
overview_zh:
ESPN Baseball Tonight 是一場具有表演賽和季後賽模式的棒球比賽。其他模式包括練習（投球和擊球）和本壘打大賽模式。遊戲包含 28 支真實的 MLB 球隊，但沒有真實的球員。遊戲選項包括能夠開啟或關閉錯誤以及開啟或關閉輔助防守。

遊戲玩法有擊球手背後的視角，無論是投球還是擊球。守場時需要注意的一件事是，球員必須手動將球丟回給投手，比賽才能繼續。

overview_en:
ESPN National Hockey Night was one of the many hockey games released back in the day. This one featured all the NHL teams for its time, but lacked an official players license.

It had four game modes to choose from: Exhibition, Challenge, Playoff, and Season. The game also features both a horizontal and vertical perspective of the ice, battery backup to save progress and also featured the voice of Bill Clement for play-by-play commentary.
overview_zh:
ESPN 國家冰球之夜是當時發布的眾多冰球比賽之一。這支球隊囊括了當時所有的 NHL 球隊，但缺乏官方球員執照。

它有四種遊戲模式可供選擇：表演賽、挑戰賽、季後賽和賽季。遊戲還具有水平和垂直的冰面視角、用於儲存進度的備用電池，以及比爾·克萊門特 (Bill Clement) 的聲音進行逐場解說。

overview_en:
ESPN National Hockey Night was one of the many hockey games released back in the day. This one featured all the NHL teams for its time, but lacked an official players license.

It had four game modes to choose from: Exhibition, Challenge, Playoff, and Season. The game also features both a horizontal and vertical perspective of the ice, battery backup to save progress and also featured the voice of Bill Clement for play-by-play commentary.
overview_zh:
ESPN 國家冰球之夜是當時發布的眾多冰球比賽之一。這支球隊囊括了當時所有的 NHL 球隊，但缺乏官方球員執照。

它有四種遊戲模式可供選擇：表演賽、挑戰賽、季後賽和賽季。遊戲還具有水平和垂直的冰面視角、用於儲存進度的備用電池，以及比爾·克萊門特 (Bill Clement) 的聲音進行逐場解說。

overview_en:
ESPN Speed World is a generic racing game that is made to resemble NASCAR.  The player is given a stock car and can tune the car from the angle of the spoiler, to the setting of the shocks, and up to the pressure of the tires.

There are three different types of speedways to race on: Super Speedway, Short Track and Road Courses  with 5 different tracks for each to choose from.  Players can choose to race against the computer that has all 23 other stock cars on the track at once or play head-to-head on a split screen against a friend.
overview_zh:
ESPN Speed World 是一款類似 NASCAR 的通用賽車遊戲。  玩家將獲得一輛原廠車，可以從擾流板的角度、減震器的設定以及輪胎的壓力等方面對汽車進行調整。

共有三種不同型別的賽道可供比賽：超級賽道、短道和公路賽道，每種賽道有 5 條不同的賽道可供選擇。  玩家可以選擇與賽道上同時擁有所有其他 23 輛原廠車的電腦進行比賽，也可以在分割畫面上與好友進行正面交鋒。

overview_en:
ESPN Sunday Night NFL was one of the many football games released back in the day. It features all 28 official NFL teams and their respective logos, but doesn't feature a license from the NFLPA, so there are no actual players names in the game.

There are four different game modes to choose from: Playoffs, Single Game, Season and another season mode that lets the player act out the 1994 NFL season schedule.  It also had variable weather conditions that the players on the field would react to and a battery back-up to save games.  It also featured Chris Berman, who not only graced the front cover but also gives commentary as well.
overview_zh:
ESPN Sunday Night NFL 是當時發布的眾多橄欖球比賽之一。它包含所有 28 支官方 NFL 球隊及其各自的徽標，但沒有 NFLPA 的許可，因此遊戲中沒有實際的球員姓名。

有四種不同的遊戲模式可供選擇：季後賽、單場比賽、賽季和另一種賽季模式，讓玩家扮演 1994 年 NFL 賽季賽程。  它還具有場上球員會做出反應的多變天氣條件以及用於儲存比賽的備用電池。  克里斯·伯曼 (Chris Berman) 不僅為封面增光添彩，還發表評論。

overview_en:
ESPN Sunday Night NFL was one of the many football games released back in the day. It features all 28 official NFL teams and their respective logos, but doesn't feature a license from the NFLPA, so there are no actual players names in the game.

There are four different game modes to choose from: Playoffs, Single Game, Season and another season mode that lets the player act out the 1994 NFL season schedule.  It also had variable weather conditions that the players on the field would react to and a battery back-up to save games.  It also featured Chris Berman, who not only graced the front cover but also gives commentary as well.
overview_zh:
ESPN Sunday Night NFL 是當時發布的眾多橄欖球比賽之一。它包含所有 28 支官方 NFL 球隊及其各自的徽標，但沒有 NFLPA 的許可，因此遊戲中沒有實際的球員姓名。

有四種不同的遊戲模式可供選擇：季後賽、單場比賽、賽季和另一種賽季模式，讓玩家扮演 1994 年 NFL 賽季賽程。  它還具有場上球員會做出反應的多變天氣條件以及用於儲存比賽的備用電池。  克里斯·伯曼 (Chris Berman) 不僅為封面增光添彩，還發表評論。

overview_en:
ESWAT is the toughest fighting force alive! ESWAT means Enchanted Special Weapons and Tactics!

You're staring straight into the evil E.Y.E., a power-mad horde of vicious terrorists. But, you are the ultimate crimebuster. Decimate their front lines with your lead-belching Gatling gun! Incinerate their mobs with your spinning flamethrower! Start as an ESWAT rookie and blast your way up to become an awesome supercop - more machine than man!

Metal attack! Annihilate helicopters, machines, and maniac robots. Feel the heat while bulldozing crazed "experiments." Hear, see, and smell the danger when sewer ooze turns into man-hungry goo. Grapple with bionic monsters to face the final showdown!

Stay glued to your weapons through 8 missions of grueling combat! You have the ultra-tech gear and the guts to survive! The ESWAT force is waiting. Hit the streets!
overview_zh:
ESWAT 是當今最頑強的戰鬥力量！ ESWAT 的意思是魔法特殊武器和戰術！

你直視著邪惡的眼睛，一群權力瘋狂的邪惡恐怖份子。但是，你是最終的犯罪剋星。用你的鉛彈加特林機槍摧毀他們的前線！用你的旋轉火焰噴射器燒毀他們的怪物！從 ESWAT 菜鳥開始，一路猛衝，成為一名出色的超級警察 - 更像是機器而不是人！

金屬攻擊！消滅直升機、機器和瘋狂的機器人。感受推土機瘋狂「實驗」的熱度。當下水道軟泥變成人類飢餓的黏液時，聽到、看到、聞到危險。與仿生怪物搏鬥，面對最後的對決！

緊握你的武器，完成 8 項艱苦的戰鬥任務！你擁有超高科技的裝備和生存的勇氣！ ESWAT 部隊正在等待。走上街頭！

title_jp: エターナルチャンピオンズ
overview_en:
From various time periods of past, present and future, nine fighters killed in an unjust manner find themselves given a second chance for life. An alien being, known only as the Eternal Champion, brings back the fighters into a competition for one reason: to find one among them worthy of being resurrected, giving them a chance to avert their death and tip the balance between good and evil.

The fighters range from different eras of Earth's History: Larcen, the cat burglar. Jetta, the circus acrobat. Blade, the futuristic bounty hunter. Midknight, the vampiric bio-chemist. Rax, the cyborg. Shadow, the corporate assassin. Slash, the neanderthal. Trident, a Atlantean warrior. And Xavier, a warlock and alchemist.
overview_zh: 《Eternal Champions》是 1994 年 2 月 18 日由 SEGA 世嘉發售的 Mega Drive 對戰格鬥遊戲。北美於 1993 年 12 月、歐洲於 1994 年 1 月 16 日發售。各跨時代戰士為了重寫自己的死亡命運齊聚一堂進行戰鬥。
overview_jp: エターナルチャンピオンズ（ETERNAL CHAMPIONS）は、1994年2月18日にセガより発売されたメガドライブ用対戦型格闘ゲームである。アメリカでは1993年12月に、ヨーロッパでは1994年1月16日に発売。

title_en: Eternal Champions - Challenge From The Dark Side
no_intro_name: Eternal Champions - Challenge From The Dark Side (Europe)

overview_zh: 《歐洲戰線》是 1991 年 12 月 21 日由日本光榮發售的 PC-8801/SR 戰略模擬遊戲。為同公司繼《提督的決斷》（1989）後以二戰為題材的「WWII 遊戲系列」第 2 作。以二戰歐洲戰線為題材，並非貫穿全劇情，而是以地圖為單位攻略劇本的回合制策略遊戲。製作人為 Shibusawa Kou，音樂由日本電視台動畫《魯邦三世》（1977-1980）作曲家大野雄二擔當。後續移植至多種日系電腦及 SFC、Mega Drive 等家用機。
overview_jp:
『ヨーロッパ戦線』（ヨーロッパせんせん）は、1991年12月21日に日本の光栄から発売されたPC-8801/SR用戦略シミュレーションゲーム。
同社の『提督の決断』（1989年）に続く、第二次世界大戦を題材にした「WWIIゲームシリーズ」の第2作。第二次世界大戦におけるヨーロッパ戦線を題材としており、全体を通したシナリオは存在せず、マップ単位でシナリオを攻略していくターン制ストラテジーとなっている。
開発は光栄が行い、プロデューサーはシブサワ・コウ、音楽は日本テレビ系テレビアニメ『ルパン三世』（1977年 - 1980年）などを手掛けた作曲家の大野雄二が担当している。
PC-9801版の発売後、様々な日本国産パソコン各機種に移植された他、スーパーファミコンおよびメガドライブなどの家庭用ゲーム機に移植された。1994年には北米にて『Operation Europe: Path to Victory』のタイトルでスーパーファミコンおよびメガドライブ、PC/AT互換機用ソフトとして発売された。PC-98版を復刻収録した『コーエー25周年記念パック Vol.2』も発売され、後に『コーエー定番シリーズ』で単品発売もされている。

overview_en: European Club Soccer is a football game developed by Krisalis Software and published by Virgin Games for the Sega Mega Drive in 1992. It is a derivative of Krisalis' earlier football game, Manchester United Europe, specifically the version released for the 16-bit Amiga and Atari ST computers in early 1991.
overview_zh: 《European Club Soccer》是一款由 Krisalis Software 開發並由 Virgin Games 於 1992 年在 Sega Mega Drive 上發行的足球遊戲。它是 Krisalis 早期足球遊戲《Manchester United Europe》的衍生版本，特別是 1991 年初針對 16 位 Amiga 和 Atari ST 電腦發布的版本。

title_jp: ホリフィールドボクシング

overview_en: Leaping from the pages of the popular comic book come the Ex-Mutants. Choose Shannon or Ackroyd as you weave your way through the nuclear wasteland to battle the minions of the evil Sluggo and restore the human race!
overview_zh: 前變種人是從流行漫畫書跳出來的。選擇夏農或艾克羅伊德，在核荒原中穿行，與邪惡斯拉戈的爪牙作戰，拯救人類！

overview_en: The player assumes the role of Ranger X, piloting a powered exoskeleton who leads the fight back for his home planet against the invading Rahuna forces. Ranger X is equipped with a jet pack and an assortment of weapons. The jet pack allows for short periods of flight, the duration of which is limited by the jet pack's temperature. Upon overheating, the player must land and wait for cool down. Alongside Ranger X's standard pulse rifle, the player has access to various special weapons including a flamethrower and homing attacks. Unlike the pulse rifle, the special weapons drain a power bar, which can only be recharged when Ranger X is in a bright light source. This special arsenal can be increased by collecting power ups scattered across the levels. On certain levels, the player may also control a supporting vehicle - an Ex-Up, such as Indra - a futuristic motorcycle, a premise described as "RoboCop on a Harley".
overview_zh: 玩家扮演 Ranger X 的角色，駕駛動力外骨骼，領導家鄉星球對抗入侵的 Rahuna 軍隊。 Ranger X 配備了噴氣揹包和各種武器。噴氣揹包允許短時間飛行，其持續時間受到噴氣揹包溫度的限制。過熱時，玩家必須著陸並等待冷卻。除了 Ranger X 的標準脈衝步槍外，玩家還可以使用各種特殊武器，包括火焰噴射器和尋的攻擊。與脈衝步槍不同，特殊武器會消耗能量條，只有當 Ranger X 處於明亮光源時才能重新充電。這個特殊的武器庫可以透過收集分散在各個關卡中的能量來增加。在某些關卡中，玩家還可以控制輔助車輛 - Ex-Up，例如 Indra - 一種未來派摩托車，其前提被描述為「哈雷機甲戰警」。

overview_en: Exile is a sequel to XZR. Like its predecessor, it is an action role-playing game with platforming elements, set in a fictionalized version of the Middle East and other world regions in 13th century. Travel and exploration occur in the traditional overhead view of RPGs, while the battles and dungeons are side-scrolling mazes, similar to Wanderers from Ys. Experience points are awarded for defeating enemies. Leveling-up automatically raises Sadler's attributes. Sadler fights with swords and can also cast offensive and restorative spells. Weapons, armor and items can be bought and sold in towns.
overview_zh: 《Exile》是《XZR》的續作。與前作一樣，它是一款帶有平臺元素的動作角色扮演遊戲，背景設定在虛構的 13 世紀中東和其他世界地區。旅行和探索發生在角色扮演遊戲的傳統俯檢視中，而戰鬥和地下城則是橫向捲軸迷宮，類似於《伊蘇》中的《流浪者》。擊敗敵人可獲得經驗值。升級會自動提升薩德勒的屬性。薩德勒用劍戰鬥，也可以施展攻擊性和恢復性法術。武器、盔甲和物品可以在城鎮中買賣。

title_jp: エグザイル 時の狹間へ

title_en: Exodus - Journey to the Promised Land
no_intro_name: Exodus - Journey to the Promised Land (USA) (Unl)
overview_en:
Crystal Mines is a 1989 unlicensed puzzle game for the NES by Color Dreams. When they established Wisdom Tree, they repackaged the game twice: in 1991 as Exodus: Journey to the Promised Land and in 1992 as Joshua & The Battle of Jericho, with Joshua labeled a sequel to Exodus. These two versions would be remade for the Sega Mega Drive in 1993 and 1994, respectively.
Though the games do have a TMSS check, they will only do the $A14000 write if they detect the region of the console they are running on as US — therefore, the games will only boot on either any US Mega Drive or on any other Model 1 Mega Drive without TMSS (making that a partly useless form of region lockout).

Gameplay of both versions is identical: you are the main character (Moses or Joshua, respectively) and you must collect all the bags with M on them (Joshua: coins with $ on them) scattered throughout each maze. A and C shoot; you can hold them down for rapidfire. Shooting destroys blockades and enemies. Once all the M bags are gathered, find the exit to move on to the next level. In between each level, you must answer a bunch of questions related to the story of the Bible of the game's theme; getting them wrong appears to be inconsequential to the outcome of the game (this needs investigation).
overview_zh:
Crystal Mines 是 Color Dreams 於 1989 年在 NES 上推出的一款未經授權的益智遊戲。當他們建立智慧樹時，他們對遊戲進行了兩次重新包裝：1991年命名為《出埃及記：應許之地之旅》，1992年命名為《約書亞與耶利哥之戰》，其中《約書亞》被稱為《出埃及記》的續集。這兩個版本分別於 1993 年和 1994 年為 Sega Mega Drive 進行了重製。
雖然遊戲確實有 TMSS 檢查，但只有當它們檢測到執行的控制檯區域為美國時，它們才會執行 $A14000 寫入 — 因此，遊戲只能在任何美國 Mega Drive 或任何其他沒有 TMSS 的 Model 1 Mega Drive 上啟動（這使得區域鎖定成為部分無用的形式）。

兩個版本的遊戲玩法是相同的：你是主角（分別是摩西或約書亞），你必須收集散佈在每個迷宮中的所有帶有 M 的袋子（約書亞：帶有 $ 的硬幣）。 A和C拍攝；你可以按住它們進行快速射擊。射擊摧毀障礙物和敵人。收集完所有 M 袋後，找到出口進入下一關。在每個關卡之間，你必須回答一堆與遊戲主題的聖經故事相關的問題；犯錯似乎對遊戲結果無關緊要（這需要調查）。

title_jp: アイ・オブ・ザ・ビホルダー
overview_zh: 《Eye of the Beholder》是 1991 年由美國 Strategic Simulations, Inc. 發售的 PC/AT 相容機角色扮演遊戲。玩家操作冒險隊伍，依大魔法師 Khelben 的神諭調查自城市地下逼近的邪惡存在。系統與世界觀以桌上角色扮演遊戲《進階龍與地下城第 2 版》（1989）為基礎，採 3D 即時呈現的地下城探索玩法。由 Westwood Studios 開發。日本由 Pony Canyon 移植 PC-9800 系列與 Mega CD，Capcom 卡普空移植 SFC。Mega CD 版音樂由古代祐三、川島基宏負責，音效由崎元仁負責。
overview_jp:
『アイ・オブ・ザ・ビホルダー』 (Eye of the Beholder) は、1991年にアメリカ合衆国のStrategic Simulations, Inc.から発売されたPC/AT互換機用ロールプレイングゲーム。
主人公であるパーティ一向を操作し、大魔法使いケルベンのお告げによって発覚した都市の地下より迫りくる邪悪な存在を捜索する事を目的としている。ゲームシステムおよび世界設定はテーブルトークRPG『アドバンスト・ダンジョンズ&ドラゴンズ第2版』（1989年）をベースにしている。画面は3D形式で表示され、ゲーム中はリアルタイムで時間が進行していく他、戦闘以外にも様々な指示を与えられる自由度の高いシステムを特徴としている。
開発はアメリカ合衆国のWestwood Studiosが行い、開発ディレクターはパソコン用ソフト『DragonStrike』（1990年）を手掛けたブルット・W・スペリー、プログラムはNES用ソフト『A Nightmare on Elm Street』（1989年）を手掛けたフィリップ・W・ゴロー、音楽はパソコン用ソフト『Mars Saga』（1988年）を手掛けたポール・S・ムードラが担当している。
同年にAmigaに移植された他、日本ではポニーキャニオンによりPC-9800シリーズとメガCD、カプコンによりスーパーファミコンに移植された。メガCD版の音楽は『ベア・ナックルシリーズ』（1991年 - 1994年）の古代祐三・川島基宏が、効果音を崎元仁が担当している。元々のPC版がマウス操作を前提に作られているため、スーパーファミコン版はスーパーファミコン・マウスに、メガCD版はセガマウスにそれぞれ対応していた。
後に続編となる『アイ・オブ・ザ・ビホルダーII ザ・レジェンド・オブ・ダークムーン』（1991年）、『アイ・オブ・ザ・ビホルダーIII アサルト・オン・ミス・ドラナー』（1993年）が発売された（後述）。また、日本国外では「DOS/V」版（英語版）の3部作を合わせたものがトリロジー版としてCD-ROMで発売されていた。

overview_en:
This game allows the player to take control of an F-117A Stealth Fighter. The game is broken down into either an arcade or campaign mode.

In the arcade mode, the player can decide the number of enemy air and ground units, the environment, length of mission, and the difficulty level. This mode allows the player to hone their skills in order to prepare for the campaign mode. 

The campaign mode is the main part of the game and contains 30 missions. The game includes nine theaters of combat such as training missions in the Nevada Desert, to the conflict in Panama, and also to the Gulf War. Each mission has a primary object that must be destroyed in order to advance to the next mission.
overview_zh:
遊戲允許玩家控制一架F-117A隱形戰鬥機。遊戲分為街機模式或戰役模式。

在街機模式中，玩家可以決定敵方空中和地面單位的數量、環境、任務長度和難度等級。此模式讓玩家磨練自己的技能，為戰役模式做好準備。 

戰役模式是遊戲的主要部分，包含 30 個任務。遊戲包括九個戰區，例如內華達沙漠的訓練任務、巴拿馬衝突以及海灣戰爭。每個任務都有一個主要物體，必須摧毀該物體才能進入下一個任務。

title_jp: Ｆ１１７ステルスオペレーション:ナイトストーム

overview_en: The second in the series features campaigns in Lybia, the Persian Gulf, The Middle East and Vietnam, making for a total of 250,000 miles of potential action and danger. Primary and secondary aerial and ground-based targets must be destroyed on each of these. You are armed with a cannon, AMRAAM long-range air-to-air missile, Sidewinder short-range air-to-air missile, and the Maverick air-to-ground missile.
overview_zh: 該系列的第二部將在利比亞、波斯灣、中東和越南展開戰役，總共 250,000 英里的潛在行動和危險。必須摧毀其中每一個的主要和次要空中和地面目標。您配備大砲、AMRAAM 遠端空對空飛彈、響尾蛇短程空對空飛彈和 Maverick 空對地飛彈。

overview_en: This simulation puts you in the cockpit of the F-22. You can choose from 3 difficulty settings and fly strike missions in 4 theaters of war (United States, Iraq, Korea and Russia) with increasing difficulty. You can also challenge aces from each theater and design custom missions. To complete a mission, you usually have to destroy both ground and air targets, including several MiG types, helicopters and tanks in addition to ground structures. Use realistic weapons like Sidewinder and Maverick missiles.
overview_zh: 此模擬將您帶入 F-22 的駕駛艙。您可以從 3 種難度設定中進行選擇，並在 4 個戰區（美國、伊拉克、韓國和俄羅斯）執行飛行打擊任務，難度逐漸增加。您還可以挑戰每個戰區的王牌並設計自訂任務。為了完成任務，你通常必須摧毀地面和空中目標，除了地面建築物外，還包括多種米格機、直升機和坦克。使用響尾蛇和特立獨行飛彈等現實武器。

overview_en:
F1 Circus MD (Ｆ１サーカスＭＤ) is a 1991 racing game by Nihon Bussan for the Sega Mega Drive in their F1 Circus series, which also contains a Mega CD game.

The game is a typical Formula 1 racing game. In World Championship mode, you are limited to a predefined course set, but you may choose your team, lap count, vehicle specifics, etc. Races are presented in a top-down view. A accelerates, B breaks, Up shifts down, Down shifts up, and C opens a menu.
overview_zh:
F1 Circus MD（F１サーカsuＭＤ）是 Nihon Bussan 於 1991 年為 F1 Circus 系列中的 Sega Mega Drive 製作的賽車遊戲，其中還包含 Mega CD 遊戲。

該遊戲是一款典型的一級方程式賽車遊戲。在世界錦標賽模式中，您僅限於預先定義的課程設定，但您可以選擇您的團隊、圈數、車輛細節等。比賽以自上而下的檢視呈現。 A加速，B中斷，Up向下移動，Down向上移動，C開啟選單。

overview_en: F1: World Championship Edition is the sequel to F1. It was released for the Sega Mega Drive and Sega Game Gear in 1995. It was only released in Europe and Australia.
overview_zh: F1：世界錦標賽版是《F1》的續作。它於 1995 年為 Sega Mega Drive 和 Sega Game Gear 發布。僅在歐洲和澳洲發布。

overview_en:
The rules conforms to the shows, divided into rounds until a family reaches 300 points and the "Three Strikes" rule. It also featured the new "Bulls Eye Round" that was introduced to the show at the time.

To answer questions, the player uses the D-pad to move a cursor and pressing the required button in order to select that letter and spell out their answer. Players can also battle each other as well as customize their family to their liking, from their appearance, hobbies, intelligence and occupations and customize the rules to suit the player.
overview_zh:
規則與節目一致，分為幾輪，直到一個家庭達到300分為止，並採用「三擊」規則。它還採用了當時在節目中引入的新“Bulls Eye Round”。

為了回答問題，玩家使用方向鍵移動遊標並按下所需的按鈕來選擇該字母並拼出答案。玩家還可以互相戰鬥，也可以根據自己的喜好自訂他們的家庭，從他們的外表、愛好、智力和職業，並自訂適合玩家的規則。

overview_en: Join Mickey Mouse on his most magical adventure ever: FANTASIA. You're on a search for musical notes, whisked away by an evil wind. Start in the Master's workroom, and hurry! Cast spells to turn stampeding brooms and bubbling pots of goo into stardust before they stomp you! Use Magic to hop inside floating bubbles. Bounce on poisonous mushrooms to knock their tops off. Leap over pits of ooze in an ancient jungle where dinosaurs rumble. Everywhere you go, grab spell books, crystal balls, and dinosaur eggs for more magic powers! Explore world after world! Dive into dangerous seas filled with snapping creatures. Zoom high into space and dodge speeding stars! On Bald Mountain, witches and wailing goblins chase you through fiery lava. Can Mickey escape with the notes, so the music can play again? It's up to you!
overview_zh: 與米老鼠一起踏上他有史以來最神奇的冒險：幻想曲。你正在尋找被邪惡的風吹走的音符。從大師的工作室開始，快點！施展法術，在踩踏的掃帚和冒泡的粘液罐踩到你之前將它們變成星塵！使用魔法跳入漂浮的氣泡中。在有毒蘑菇上彈跳，將其頂部擊落。跳過恐龍隆隆作響的古老叢林中的軟泥坑。無論你走到哪裡，拿起咒語書、水晶球和恐龍蛋以獲得更多魔法力量！探索一個又一個世界！潛入充滿鱷魚生物的危險海洋。放大到太空並躲避飛馳的星星！在禿頭山，女巫和哀嚎的妖精會在熾熱的熔岩中追趕你。米奇能否帶著音符逃脫，讓音樂再次響起？由你決定！

title_jp: ファンタジア ミッキーマウス・マジック
overview_en: Join Mickey Mouse on his most magical adventure ever: FANTASIA. You're on a search for musical notes, whisked away by an evil wind. Start in the Master's workroom, and hurry! Cast spells to turn stampeding brooms and bubbling pots of goo into stardust before they stomp you! Use Magic to hop inside floating bubbles. Bounce on poisonous mushrooms to knock their tops off. Leap over pits of ooze in an ancient jungle where dinosaurs rumble. Everywhere you go, grab spell books, crystal balls, and dinosaur eggs for more magic powers! Explore world after world! Dive into dangerous seas filled with snapping creatures. Zoom high into space and dodge speeding stars! On Bald Mountain, witches and wailing goblins chase you through fiery lava. Can Mickey escape with the notes, so the music can play again? It's up to you!
overview_zh: 與米老鼠一起踏上他有史以來最神奇的冒險：幻想曲。你正在尋找被邪惡的風吹走的音符。從大師的工作室開始，快點！施展法術，在踩踏的掃帚和冒泡的粘液罐踩到你之前將它們變成星塵！使用魔法跳入漂浮的氣泡中。在有毒蘑菇上彈跳，將其頂部擊落。跳過恐龍隆隆作響的古老叢林中的軟泥坑。無論你走到哪裡，拿起咒語書、水晶球和恐龍蛋以獲得更多魔法力量！探索一個又一個世界！潛入充滿鱷魚生物的危險海洋。放大到太空並躲避飛馳的星星！在禿頭山，女巫和哀嚎的妖精會在熾熱的熔岩中追趕你。米奇能否帶著音符逃脫，讓音樂再次響起？由你決定！

overview_en:
Fantastic Dizzy (The Fantastic Adventures of Dizzy outside Europe & Australia) is a 1991 video game developed by Codemasters. It was published to several platforms, including Sega Mega Drive/Genesis, Master System, Game Gear, NES,[1] Amiga and DOS.

The game was originally intended to be released in time for Christmas in 1990, but because of a legal action between Codemasters and Nintendo over the Game Genie the title was released in April 1991, making it miss the Christmas rush it was originally slated for. Furthermore only sold 125,000 units instead of the expected 500,000.[citation needed] Despite this, the game was awarded the 'NES Adventure Game of the Year 1991' by Game Players Magazine and given the coveted 'Parents Choice Award'.[citation needed]
overview_zh:
Fantastic Dizzy（歐洲和澳洲以外的 Dizzy 的奇幻冒險）是 Codemasters 於 1991 年開發的一款電玩遊戲。它已釋出到多個平臺，包括 Sega Mega Drive/Genesis、Master System、Game Gear、NES、[1] Amiga 和 DOS。

該遊戲原本打算在 1990 年聖誕節期間發布，但由於 Codemasters 和任天堂之間就 Game Genie 提起的法律訴訟，該遊戲於 1991 年 4 月發布，使其錯過了原定的聖誕高峰期。此外，該遊戲僅售出 125,000 份，而非預期的 500,000 份。 [需要引用] 儘管如此，該遊戲仍被《遊戲玩家》雜誌評為“1991 年度 NES 冒險遊戲”，並獲得了令人垂涎的“家長選擇獎”。 [需要引用]

overview_en:
Fastest 1 (ファステスト・ワン) is a 1991 racing game for the Sega Mega Drive by Human. It is seemingly similar to Human's Human Grand Prix series for the SNES.

Renovation Products was set to release the game overseas as Speedway Pro Challenge, but the release was cancelled for unknown reasons. Box shots have been leaked to the Internet somehow.

The game is a generic 3D racing game. B accelerates and Up and Down change gears.
overview_zh:
Fastest 1（fasutesuto・wanan）是一款 1991 年由 Human 為 Sega Mega Drive 打造的賽車遊戲。它看起來與 SNES 上的 Human's Human Grand Prix 系列類似。

Renovation Products 原本計劃在海外發行這款遊戲，名稱為《Speedway Pro Challenge》，但發行因不明原因被取消。盒子的照片不知何故洩漏到了網路上。

該遊戲是一款通用的3D賽車遊戲。 B 加速並上下變速。

overview_en:
Southtown City plays host to the King of Fighters Tournament. Andy & Terry Bogard take part in the tournament cause winning the tournament is the only way they can defeat Geese Howard. Geese Howard controls Southtown City and killed their father several years ago. Also taking part is Joe Higashi, a Japanese kickboxer. Select either Joe, Andy or Terry, visit several locations in Southtown City and win that tournament!

Fatal Fury is a 2D fighter and is the first game in a series of one-on-one fighting games by SNK. It's a conversion of the original Fatal Fury arcade game. This first game does not yet feature the series' trademark pseudo 3D mode (which allows you to move between the foreground & background while fighting). Includes a two-player vs. mode.
overview_zh:
南鎮市舉辦拳皇錦標賽。安迪·博加德和特里·博加德參加比賽，因為贏得比賽是他們擊敗吉斯·霍華德的唯一途徑。吉斯·霍華德控制了南鎮市，並在幾年前殺死了他們的父親。參加比賽的還有日本跆拳道運動員東喬。選擇喬、安迪或特里，參觀南鎮市的多個地點並贏得錦標賽！

《餓狼傳說》是一款 2D 格鬥遊戲，也是 SNK 推出的一系列一對一格鬥遊戲中的第一款遊戲。它是原版《餓狼傳說》街機遊戲的轉換版。第一款遊戲尚未採用該系列標誌性的偽 3D 模式（讓您在戰鬥時在前景和背景之間移動）。包括兩人對戰模式。

overview_en: After Geese Howard's death in the original Fatal Fury, a mysterious nobleman becomes the sponsor of the new "King of Fighters" tournament. This time, the tournament is held worldwide with fighters around the globe competing. As the single player mode progresses, the mysterious challenger begins defeating the participants from the previous Fatal Fury game, searching for the man responsible for defeating Geese.
overview_zh: 在原版《餓狼傳說》中吉斯·霍華德去世後，一位神秘貴族成為了新的「拳皇」錦標賽的贊助商。這次，比賽在全球舉行，來自世界各地的拳擊手將齊聚一堂。隨著單人遊戲模式的進展，神秘的挑戰者開始擊敗先前《餓狼傳說》遊戲中的參與者，並尋找擊敗鵝的人。

overview_en:
The world is in danger of falling into total darkness unless some brave soul is able to take the Holy Goblet from the talons of the evil Dragon. 

In FATAL LABYRINTH, you're Trykaar, the swordsman who is chosen to enter Dragonia Castle and obtain the Goblet from the Dragon. Inside the castle, you'll find new weapons and magic that will come in handy as you wind through the mazes of the castle. But you don't have a map it would be useless anyway, as the castle is always changing shape. As you inch your way through the dark and dank dungeons of the Castle, watch out for the heinous creatures that inhabit the nooks and crannies. 

Remember, the world is counting on your strength and bravery!
overview_zh:
除非有勇敢的靈魂能夠從惡龍的利爪中奪走聖杯，否則世界將面臨陷入徹底黑暗的危險。 

在 FATAL LABYRINTH 中，你是特雷卡爾，被選中進入 Dragonia 城堡並從龍那裡獲得聖杯的劍客。在城堡內，你會發現新的武器和魔法，當你蜿蜒穿過城堡的迷宮時，它們會派上用場。但你沒有地圖，無論如何它都是無用的，因為城堡總是在改變形狀。當您緩慢地穿過城堡黑暗潮濕的地牢時，請留意棲息在角落和縫隙中的令人髮指的生物。 

請記住，世界正在指望您的力量和勇敢！

overview_en: This is a vertical platformer with horizontal wrap-around. For the entertainment of the futuristic masses, you play a criminal that has been inserted into a mechanical body with the promise that if you succeed in surviving through all the levels (there are many and they are hard), you will be set free. You start each level at the bottom, near pooling liquid which will soon rise, at your immediate peril. Navigate the level from bottom to the exit at the top before the liquid rises and kills you. There are many other foes that fly around, causing you damage and basically annoying you to spit. Most levels must be navigated through a series of keyed gates, doors, or portals. These shaped keys are scattered around the map and must by picked up and used only on the gates they match individually. Twist: You can only carry one special weapon (triple shot, laser beam, or vertical shot) and one tool (key, liquid-freeze, or a red herring) at a time. This game requires a lot of memorization of enemy movement patterns and optimum routes. A unique feature is that when you die, you can watch a replay and take over at any point to continue your game. You can also hit the HELP button at the start of each level to view a map, helping you plan your route.
overview_zh: 這是一款水平環繞的垂直平臺遊戲。為了娛樂未來大眾，你扮演一個被插入機械身體的罪犯，並承諾如果你成功地透過所有級別（有很多而且很難），你將被釋放。你從底部開始每一層，靠近很快就會上升的池液體，你會面臨立即的危險。在液體上升並殺死你之前，從底部導航到頂部的出口。還有許多其他敵人在周圍飛來飛去，對你造成傷害，基本上會煩你吐口水。大多數關卡都必須透過一系列帶鑰匙的大門、門或門戶。這些形狀的鑰匙分散在地圖周圍，必須拾取並僅在它們單獨匹配的門上使用。扭曲：你一次只能攜帶一件特殊武器（三連發、雷射光束或垂直射擊）和一件工具（鑰匙、液體凍結物或紅鯡魚）。這個遊戲需要大量記住敵人的移動模式和最佳路線。一個獨特的功能是，當你死亡時，你可以觀看重播並隨時接管以繼續你的遊戲。您也可以點選每個關卡開始處的「幫助」按鈕來檢視地圖，幫助您規劃路線。

《FATMAN》是 1989 年 10 月由美國 Activision 發售的 PC/AT 相容機 2D 對戰格鬥遊戲，原名《Tongue of the Fatman》。功夫冠軍主角「Rex」挑戰如同 Jabba the Hutt 般的巨漢帝王「Mondu the Fat」。以充滿外星人與機器人的 SF 世界觀，以及被吃掉、壓死等衝擊性殘虐場景為特色。日本由 Sanritsu 電氣以《Fatman》之名於 Mega Drive 推出，後續海外版改名為《Slaughter Sport》。
overview_jp:
『ファットマン』(FATMAN)は、1989年10月にアメリカ合衆国のアクティビジョンより発売されたPC/AT互換機用2D対戦型格闘ゲーム。原題は『Tongue of the Fatman』。
主人公のカンフーチャンピオン「レックス」がジャバ・ザ・ハットのごとき巨漢の帝王「マンデュー・ザ・ファット」に挑む内容となっている。エイリアンやロボットなどSF色あふれる世界観や食べられたり圧死したりなどのショッキングな残虐シーンを特徴としている。
開発は『上海II ドラゴンズアイ』（1990年）を手掛けたブライアン・A・ライスが行い、ゲーム・デザインはブライアンと『F-14 Tomcat』（1990年）を手掛けたマーク・D・ウォーターマンが担当、音楽は『The Last Ninja』（1987年）を手掛けたラッセル・リエブリックが担当している。
1990年に欧米にてコモドール64用ソフトとして『Mondu's Fight Palace - Tounge Of The Fatman』のタイトルで発売された。日本国内ではサンリツ電気よりメガドライブ用ソフト『ファットマン』のタイトルで発売され、その後日本国外にて『Slaughter Sport』のタイトルで発売された。

maker: Tec Toy Indústria de Brinquedos S.A.
publisher: Tec Toy Indústria de Brinquedos S.A.
overview_en:
Férias Frustradas do Pica-Pau (roughly translated as Woody Woodpecker's Frustrated Vacations) is a platform game developed and published by Tectoy and released exclusively in Brazil for the Sega Mega Drive and Sega Master System. It stars cartoon character Woody Woodpecker on a quest to save his friends.

Férias Frustradas do Pica-Pau is unusual in that it keeps a non-shaded cartoon style throughout the entire game.
overview_zh:
Férias Frustradas do Pica-Pau（大致翻譯為啄木鳥伍迪的挫敗假期）是一款由 Tectoy 開發和發行的平臺遊戲，並在巴西為 Sega Mega Drive 和 Sega Master System 獨家發行。該片由卡通人物啄木鳥伍迪主演，他致力於拯救他的朋友。

Férias Frustradas do Pica-Pau 的不同尋常之處在於它在整個遊戲中保持了無陰影的卡通風格。

overview_en:
Following F1 Grand Prix Nakajima Satoru, Varie produced another racing simulation using the license. This time the racing is from a first person view aping Super Monaco Grand Prix. The car setup can be modified before you take to the track

There is a Time Attack mode, allowing you to go for as fast a laptime as possible on any of the game's 20 circuits (which include the 16 tracks of the 1992 Formula 1 season), as well as a full season mode, with qualifying and the race itself. Weather can be customised in the Time Attack mode but is randomly chosen in Grand Prix mode, while you can only choose one of the D-tier teams (the 4 weakest of the 16) in grand Prix mode, but can drive for McLaren, Williams et al in Time Attack.
overview_zh:
繼 F1 大獎賽中島悟之後，Varie 使用該許可證製作了另一款賽車模擬遊戲。這次的比賽是從第一人稱視角模仿超級摩納哥大獎賽。在上賽道之前可以修改賽車設定

計時賽模式可讓您在遊戲的 20 條賽道（包括 1992 年一級方程式賽季的 16 條賽道）中的任意賽道上盡可能快地跑出圈速，還有完整賽季模式，包括排位賽和正賽。計時賽模式中天氣可以自訂，但大獎賽模式中天氣是隨機選擇的；大獎賽模式中只能選擇 D 級車隊之一（16 支中最弱的 4 支車隊），但計時賽模式中可以為麥克拉倫、威廉斯等車隊駕駛。

overview_en: In this isometric football game, 51 national teams are represented to play in two game modes: Exhibition and Tournament (a series of seven games on four continents, with a final against the World All-Stars), with the ability to set time, difficulty level, see cutscenes after goals and if players are free to kick each other around without (many) fouls.
overview_zh: 在這款等距足球遊戲中，有 51 支國家隊以兩種遊戲模式進行比賽：表演賽和錦標賽（在四大洲舉行的七場比賽，決賽對陣世界全明星），可以設定時間、難度級別、檢視進球後的過場動畫以及球員是否可以在沒有（多次）犯規的情況下自由踢對方。

overview_en:
Based on international teams (with fictional player names), their abilities in each skill area rated out of 10 to give the player an overall impression of how good they are. The options available follow the standard set: fouls and offsides can be toggled on and off, the match length can be set, and if the timer operates continuously, or only while the ball is in play. Gameplay privileges quick runs, short passes and blistering shots outside the penalty box, and set pieces are controlled by moving a box into the target area for the ball, and then passed, lobbed or kicked directly. On the tactical side, formations can be selected, with 5 different strategies also available (although not all of these combinations make sense) as can the team Coverage - the areas which defenders, midfielders and strikers cover.

UPC / Barcode: 014633072556
overview_zh:
基於國際球隊（具有虛構的球員名字），他們在每個技能領域的能力評分為 10 分，以便讓球員對他們的整體印像有多麼好。可用選項遵循標準設定：可以開啟和關閉犯規和越位，可以設定比賽長度，以及計時器是否連續執行，或僅在比賽進行時執行。遊戲玩法以快速跑動、短傳和禁區外的猛烈射門為特色，定位球是透過將一個盒子移動到目標區域來控制球，然後直接傳球、吊球或踢球。在戰術方面，可以選擇陣型，還可以選擇 5 種不同的策略（儘管並非所有這些組合都有意義），也可以選擇球隊覆蓋範圍 - 後衛、中場和前鋒覆蓋的區域。

UPC/條碼：014633072556

overview_en:
Based on international teams (with fictional player names), their abilities in each skill area rated out of 10 to give the player an overall impression of how good they are. UPC/條碼：014633072556

overview_en:
After the first game proved to be a worldwide success, EA developed this sequel exclusively for Sega's 16-bit console. The biggest change from FIFA International Soccer are obviously the dozens of club teams from England, France, Germany, Italy, The Netherlands, United States, Spain and Brazil, taking the team number tally to over 200. This also increased the number of competitions, with each country having it's own League, Tournament and Playoff. Also new, a battery backup allowed to save up to four competitions in the cartridge, replacing passwords. For those who want to settle things the fast way, a Penalty Shootout training mode was added.

UPC / Barcode: 014633073843
overview_zh:
在第一款遊戲獲得全球成功後，EA 專門為世嘉 16 位元遊戲機開發了這款續作。與《FIFA國際足球》最大的變化顯然是來自英格蘭、法國、德國、義大利、荷蘭、美國、西班牙和巴西的數十支俱樂部球隊，球隊數量達到200多支。這也增加了比賽的數量，每個國家都有自己的聯賽、錦標賽和季後賽。另外，還有一個新功能，備用電池可以在卡帶中儲存多達四項比賽，從而更換密碼。對於那些想快速解決問題的人，增加了點球大戰訓練模式。

UPC/條碼：014633073843

overview_en:
FIFA Soccer 96 was extremely popular at the time of release. It was hailed as the first really successful FIFA release, and opened the way for yearly revisions of the concept.

There were a number of factors that made FIFA96 stand out from the crowd of other football sims. Firstly, the game's commentary was revolutionary at the time -- the renowned British commentator John Motson comments all the incidents and happenings on the pitch in real-time. The ambient commentary is varied, and systems with more than the minimum memory level get extra commentary phrases.
overview_zh:
《FIFA Soccer 96》在發行時非常受歡迎。它被譽為第一個真正成功的 FIFA 版本，並為每年修改這一概念開闢了道路。

有很多因素使《FIFA96》從其他足球模擬遊戲中脫穎而出。首先，比賽的解說在當時是革命性的——英國著名解說員約翰·莫特森實時評論了球場上的所有事件和發生的事情。環境評論多種多樣，超過最低記憶體等級的系統會獲得額外的評論短語。

overview_en:
This iteration of the FIFA lineage includes commentary from John Motson with summaries from Andy Gray, with the between-match sections covered by Des Lynam. All player moves are from David Ginola using the MotionBlending technology. Full interactive replays are included.

You can play a league or cup tournament, and practice your skills before playing. The game can be tailored to action or simulation style, with fouls, injuries and offsides available to toggle on or off. This version also includes a 6 vs 6 indoor play mode, and various multiplayer options
overview_zh:
FIFA 血統的這個迭代包括 John Motson 的評論和 Andy Gray 的總結，以及 Des Lynam 涵蓋的比賽間隙部分。所有球員動作均來自 David Ginola，使用 MotionBlending 技術。包括完整的互動式重播。

您可以參加聯賽或盃賽，並在比賽前練習您的技能。遊戲可以根據動作或模擬風格進行定製，可以開啟或關閉犯規、受傷和越位。該版本還包括 6 對 6 室內遊戲模式以及各種多人遊戲選項

title_jp: ファイティングマスターズ
overview_en: A Giant Red Sun will go Nova within hours... 12 Star systems will be destroyed... One contest will decide who, or what, survives... Climb into the interstellar ring! Go One-on-One with another player, or battle for the survival of your civilization! 12 different Alien champions to select! From the snapping, tearing claws of Zygrunt to the bludgeoning ecto-clubs of Rotundo, each warrior has a deadly force all their own!
overview_zh: 一顆巨大的紅日將在數小時內進入新星... 12 個恆星系統將被摧毀... 一場競賽將決定誰或什麼能夠倖存... 爬進星際環！與其他玩家進行一對一的戰鬥，或為你的文明的生存而戰！ 12 位不同的外星冠軍可供選擇！從齊格倫特的猛烈撕裂利爪到羅通多的猛擊式外棍，每個戰士都擁有自己的致命力量！

overview_en: The game features a single season boxing championship run. You can select from a group of fictional fighters: Dynamite Joe - The Miracle Man, Fernando Gomez - The South American Eagle, Kim Nang - The Korean Comet, King Jason - The Black King, The Detroit Kid, The Invincible Black Panther.
overview_zh: 《Final Blow》是 1989 年由 TAITO 推出的大型電玩拳擊遊戲。為同公司大型電玩基板「F2 System」第 1 彈，據傳開發期僅 3 個月。
overview_jp:
『ファイナルブロー』 (FINAL BLOW) は、1989年にタイトーからリリースされたアーケード用ボクシングゲームである。
同社のアーケードゲーム基板「F2システム」の第1弾である。開発期間はわずか3か月だったという。

overview_en: The player assumes the role of Howard Bowie, the hero soldier of the El Sharia Military Nation's foreign legion and commander of the unit known as "Team Undead". It is 100 years in the future and weapons of mass destruction have been banned from the field of war. Fighting is now done with the futuristic power armor known as the New Age Power Suit (NAP). Howard is assigned to use his K-19 Phantom NAP to infiltrate enemy territory to Point A-46K Bloody Axis and destroy the sole remaining weapon of mass destruction.
overview_zh: 玩家扮演霍華德·鮑伊，伊斯蘭教法軍事國家外籍軍團的英雄戰士，也是「不死隊」部隊的指揮官。 100年後，大規模殺傷性武器已被禁止進入戰爭領域。現在，戰鬥由被稱為新時代動力套裝（NAP）的未來派動力裝甲完成。霍華德被指派使用他的 K-19 Phantom NAP 滲透敵方領土至 A-46K 血腥軸心並摧毀僅存的大規模殺傷性武器。

title_jp: ファイアームスタング
overview_en: The game is a very standard horizontal scrolling shoot em' up with only one type of available weapon and a bomb weapon. Players took on a fictional campaign in a World War II setting as a USAAF fighter pilot in a titular P-51 Mustang against the Nazi Luftwaffe and the Imperial Japanese Navy Air Service.
overview_zh: 《USAAF Mustang》是由 NMK 開發、UPL 於 1990 年 6 月發售的大型電玩。以二戰為題材，玩家駕駛美軍戰鬥機「Mustang」與日軍展開空戰，是可雙人同時遊玩的橫向捲軸射擊遊戲。1991 年由 TAITO 取得 NMK 授權，將 Mega Drive 版改名為《Fire Mustang》發售。
overview_jp:
『USAAF ムスタング』（USAAF Mustang）はNMKが開発し、UPLが1990年6月に発売した業務用ビデオゲーム。第二次世界大戦を題材に、アメリカ軍の戦闘機「ムスタング」を操縦して日本軍と空中戦を繰り広げる、2人同時プレイが可能な横スクロールシューティングゲームである。
1991年にはNMKの許諾を受けて、タイトーがメガドライブ版を『ファイアームスタング』と改題した上で発売。また、2021年にはハムスターが『アーケードアーカイブス』の1作品として、PlayStation 4とNintendo Switch向けにアーケード版の移植版を発売した。

overview_en:
Fire Shark, released in Japan as Same! Same! Same! (鮫！鮫！鮫！), is a 1989 arcade shoot-'em-up by Toaplan ported to the Sega Mega Drive in 1990. This is one of the few Mega Drive ports developed by Toaplan themselves.

Like many of the Mega Drive Toaplan ports, each regional release of the game contains multiple regional versions, of which European and US settings "Fire Shark" is slightly easier than Japan setting "鮫！鮫！鮫！". Unusually, the carts released in each region appear to be slightly different; actual differences are currently unknown.

On an alternate Earth, heavy-arms producing nation S Corps starts invading other countries, and the Tiger Shark, a biplane, seems to be the only hope for stopping S Corps. There are three endings, depending on the difficulty level.
overview_zh:
《Fire Shark》在日本發行，名為《Same!》相同的！相同的！ (鮫！鮫！鮫！) 是 Toaplan 於 1989 年移植到 Sega Mega Drive 的一款街機射擊遊戲。這是 Toaplan 自己開發的少數 Mega Drive 移植遊戲之一。

與許多Mega Drive Toaplan移植一樣，遊戲的每個地區發行都包含多個地區版本，其中歐洲和美國設定的“Fire Shark”比日本設定的“鮫！鮫！鮫！”稍微容易一些。不同尋常的是，每個地區發布的推車似乎略有不同；實際差異目前未知。

在另一個地球上，重型武器生產國 S 軍團開始入侵其他國家，而虎鯊雙翼飛機似乎是阻止 S 軍團的唯一希望。根據難度的不同，共有三種結局。

overview_en:
In the quarter-muncher Fix-It Felix Jr., the thick-headed thug Wreck-It Ralph tries to destroy a building while the daring do-gooder Fix-It Felix repairs the damage with his magic hammer.

This "arcade" game is the basis of the Disney animated movie Wreck-It Ralph. In the film, Ralph is the bad guy, but that doesn't mean he is a "bad" guy, -- it's just his job to be a heartless demolisher so that Felix can save the day. But countless games where Ralph has played the villain has taken its toll, and after becoming the outcast of his mostly-wrecked town, Ralph is ready to look for more out of his pixelated life.

Fix-It Felix Jr. is seen in the movie Wreck-It Ralph, and Disney has produced promotional display cabinets as part of the marketing of the film. Whether this arcade game itself will be released for the public to play is unknown at this time; a web version of the game is playable courtesy of Disney.
overview_zh:
在《Fix-It Felix Jr.》中，笨蛋暴徒 Wreck-It Ralph 試圖摧毀一座建築物，而勇敢的行善者 Fix-It Felix 用他的魔法錘修復了損壞的地方。

這款「街機」遊戲是迪士尼動畫電影《無敵破壞王》的基礎。在電影中，拉爾夫是壞人，但這並不意味著他是一個「壞」人，他的工作只是成為一個無情的破壞者，以便菲利克斯能夠拯救世界。但拉爾夫扮演反派的無數遊戲已經造成了損失，在成為他那座幾乎被毀壞的小鎮的棄兒之後，拉爾夫準備從他的畫素化生活中尋找更多。

小菲利克斯在電影《無敵破壞王》中出現，迪士尼製作了宣傳展示櫃作為電影行銷的一部分。目前尚不清楚這款街機遊戲本身是否會發布供大眾玩。迪士尼提供了該遊戲的網路版本。

overview_en: The year is 2142. After escaping from a sinister facility, Conrad B. Hart awakes in the middle of a jungle, with no memory of who he is or why people are trying to kill him.
overview_zh: 故事發生在 2142 年。康拉德·B·哈特 (Conrad B. Hart) 從一處險惡設施中逃出後，在叢林中醒來，不記得自己是誰，也不記得人們為什麼要殺死他。

overview_en:
The year is 2142. The player takes control of Conrad B. Hart, a man who has lost his memory. After barely escaping from hostile aliens, Conrad's bike crashes on an unknown planet. Conrad finds himself in the jungle, and from that moment on his quest for survival and his lost identity begins.

Flashback: The Quest for Identity incorporates elements of platforming, shooting, and problem-solving. The game can be described as a "cinematic platformer" (commonly referred to as Prince of Persia-style), following a design philosophy that was also manifested in Delphine Software's previous work, Another World. Compared to that game, Flashback focuses more on platforming and exploration of large levels.
overview_zh:
時間是 2142 年，玩家控制了失去記憶的康拉德·B·哈特 (Conrad B. Hart)。康拉德的腳踏車險些逃離敵對的外星人後，在一個未知的星球上墜毀。康拉德發現自己身處叢林，從那一刻起，他開始尋求生存和失去的身份。

《閃回：身份探索》融合了平臺跳躍、射擊和解決問題的元素。該遊戲可以被描述為「電影平臺遊戲」（通常被稱為波斯王子風格），其設計理念也體現在 Delphine Software 的前作《另一個世界》中。與該遊戲相比，Flashback 更注重平臺跳躍和大關卡的探索。

The year is 2142. The player takes control of Conrad B. Hart, a man who has lost his memory. After barely escaping from hostile aliens, Conrad's bike crashes on an unknown planet. Conrad finds himself in the jungle, and from that moment on his quest for survival and his lost identity begins.

Compared to that game, Flashback focuses more on platforming and exploration of large levels.
overview_zh:
時間是 2142 年，玩家控制了失去記憶的康拉德·B·哈特 (Conrad B. Hart)。康拉德的腳踏車險些逃離敵對的外星人後，在一個未知的星球上墜毀。康拉德發現自己身處叢林，從那一刻起，他開始尋求生存和失去的身份。

《閃回：身份探索》融合了平臺跳躍、射擊和解決問題的元素。該遊戲可以被描述為「電影平臺遊戲」（通常被稱為波斯王子風格），其設計理念也體現在 Delphine Software 的前作《另一個世界》中。與該遊戲相比，Flashback 更注重平臺跳躍和大關卡的探索。

overview_en:
The feathers really start to fly when Flicky the Bluebird meets Tiger the treacherous cat and Iggy the instigating lizard in this zany, fun-filled arcade hit. See, it's like this: Tiger and Iggy are trying to trap the crazy Chirps.

Tiger and Iggy will stop at nothing. So hop over them. Or fling anything at them - a tea cup, a flower pot, an apple. Then shuffle, scuttle, and fly through maze after maze - dazzling ones, dark ones, silly ones, scary ones - gathering up Chirps as you go.

Lead as many Chirps as you can to safety. The more Chirps you rescue, the higher your score. And the closer you get to the Bonus Round where you catch catapulted Chirps with your net. So come join the fun. But don't count your chickens before you catch them...
overview_zh:
在這款滑稽、充滿樂趣的街機遊戲中，當藍鳥 Flicky 遇到姦詐的貓 Tiger 和煽動性的蜥蜴 Iggy 時，羽毛真的開始飛揚。看，事情是這樣的：老虎和伊吉正試圖捕獲瘋狂的嘰嘰喳喳。

老虎和伊吉將不擇手段。所以跳過他們。或向他們丟任何東西——茶杯、花盆、蘋果。然後拖著腳步、飛快地飛過一個又一個迷宮——令人眼花繚亂的、黑暗的、愚蠢的、可怕的——邊走邊收集嘰嘰喳喳的聲音。

盡可能引導 Chirp 到達安全地帶。您拯救的 Chirp 越多，您的分數就越高。你越接近獎勵回合，就可以用網子捕捉彈射的嘰嘰喳喳。所以快來加入樂吧。但在抓住雞之前不要數它們......

overview_en:
Flink (released in North America as The Misadventures of Flink), is a 2D scrolling platform video game developed by Psygnosis.

The Amiga CD32 and Sega CD versions are reliant on CD-ROM media to store large levels, highly detailed graphics, and high-quality music. The Mega Drive version is a cut-down version.

Flink is one of the few Amiga CD32 titles not to see a release for the Amiga home computer system, on which the CD32's hardware was based. The majority of titles released for the CD32 were essentially the versions developed for Amiga home computers, taking only minor advantage of the CD-ROM medium with extra levels, CD audio, and/or FMV sequences.

The creators, Erwin Kloibhofer and Henk Nieborg, were also responsible for the games The Adventures of Lomax and Lionheart.
overview_zh:
Flink（在北美發行為 The Misadventures of Flink）是 Psygnosis 開發的一款 2D 滾動平臺視訊遊戲。

Amiga CD32 和 Sega CD 版本依靠 CD-ROM 媒體來儲存大關卡、高度詳細的圖形和高品質音樂。 Mega Drive 版本是精簡版本。

Flink 是少數沒有針對 Amiga 家用電腦系統發布的 Amiga CD32 遊戲之一，CD32 的硬體正是基於該系統。為 CD32 發布的大多數遊戲本質上都是為 Amiga 家用電腦開發的版本，僅少量利用了帶有額外等級、CD 音訊和/或 FMV 序列的 CD-ROM 媒體。

創作者 Erwin Kloibhofer 和 Henk Nieborg 也負責《洛馬克斯歷險記》和《獅心王》遊戲。

overview_en:
Flink (released in North America as The Misadventures of Flink), is a 2D scrolling platform video game developed by Psygnosis.

The Amiga CD32 and Sega CD versions are reliant on CD-ROM media to store large levels, highly detailed graphics, and high-quality music. The Mega Drive version is a cut-down version.

Flink is one of the few Amiga CD32 titles not to see a release for the Amiga home computer system, on which the CD32's hardware was based. The majority of titles released for the CD32 were essentially the versions developed for Amiga home computers, taking only minor advantage of the CD-ROM medium with extra levels, CD audio, and/or FMV sequences.

The creators, Erwin Kloibhofer and Henk Nieborg, were also responsible for the games The Adventures of Lomax and Lionheart.
overview_zh:
Flink（在北美發行為 The Misadventures of Flink）是 Psygnosis 開發的一款 2D 滾動平臺視訊遊戲。

Amiga CD32 和 Sega CD 版本依靠 CD-ROM 媒體來儲存大關卡、高度詳細的圖形和高品質音樂。 Mega Drive 版本是精簡版本。

Flink 是少數沒有針對 Amiga 家用電腦系統發布的 Amiga CD32 遊戲之一，CD32 的硬體正是基於該系統。為 CD32 發布的大多數遊戲本質上都是為 Amiga 家用電腦開發的版本，僅少量利用了帶有額外等級、CD 音訊和/或 FMV 序列的 CD-ROM 媒體。

創作者 Erwin Kloibhofer 和 Henk Nieborg 也負責《洛馬克斯歷險記》和《獅心王》遊戲。

overview_en:
Flux is a music visualizer software developed by EXP for the Sega Mega Drive and released by Virgin Interactive exclusively in Europe. When the Mega Drive is connected to a Sega Mega-CD, an audio CD is in the CD tray, and this cartridge in the Mega Drive, Flux will have the Mega CD play the music on the CD and show various user-configurable effects (the default being a two-channel oscilloscope). B pauses playback, Left and Right skip tracks, and Start brings up the configuration panel.

The cartridge works for two reasons — the Mega CD supports using a cartridge as a boot image (this was also done with Wonder Library) and supports having the boot image access the CD drive for audio playback. Kega Fusion can emulate all this specifically for Flux; instructions are in its readme file. It requires a small modification to its configuration file and a European Mega CD BIOS to work.
overview_zh:
Flux 是 EXP 為 Sega Mega Drive 開發的音樂視覺化軟體，由 Virgin Interactive 在歐洲獨家發行。當Mega Drive連線到Sega Mega-CD時，CD託盤中有一張音訊CD，而Mega Drive中的這個盒帶，Flux將使Mega CD播放CD上的音樂並顯示各種使用者可配置的效果（預設為兩通道示波器）。 B 暫停播放，向左和向右跳過曲目，然後開始調出配置面板。

這個盒式磁帶的工作有兩個原因 - Mega CD 支援使用盒式磁帶作為啟動映像（這也是透過 Wonder Library 完成的）並支援讓啟動映像存取 CD 驅動器以進行音訊播放。 Kega Fusion 可以專門為 Flux 模擬所有這些；說明位於其自述檔案中。它需要對其設定檔進行少量修改並使用歐洲 Mega CD BIOS 才能運作。

title_jp: フォアマン フォーリアル
overview_en:
Before marketing fat-reducing grills, boxing legend George Foreman endorsed this boxing game with a 3rd-person view similar to Punch Out. A full range of punches and jabs are available, with full round-by-round scoring from the judges. You can choose from 3-12 rounds, and there are 2 camera views as well as an automatic switch option.

You can play simple exhibition matches or tournaments, or launch into a career mode. In this you start at the bottom of the world rankings, and must reach the top by beating the game's players, who other than George are all fictitious boxers with varying strengths and weaknesses. The coach gives advice before each fight to help highlight weaknesses in your play. There are passwords for each round.
overview_zh:
在行銷減脂烤架之前，拳擊傳奇人物喬治·福爾曼（George Foreman）認可了這款具有類似於 Punch Out 的第三人稱視角的拳擊遊戲。提供全方位的拳擊和刺拳，並由評審逐輪評分。您可以選擇 3-12 輪，有 2 個攝影機檢視以及自動切換選項。

您可以參加簡單的表演賽或錦標賽，或進入職業模式。在這款遊戲中，你從世界排名墊底開始，必須透過擊敗遊戲中的玩家達到頂峰，除了喬治之外，這些玩家都是虛構的拳擊手，具有不同的優勢和劣勢。教練在每次比賽前都會給予建議，以幫助突顯你比賽中的弱點。每輪都有密碼。

title_jp: フォゴットンワールズ
overview_en:
Many years have passed since mankind dominated the Earth. Invaders from another galaxy have nearly destroyed our planet in their attempt to add it to their evil Empire. Led by Lord Bios, the alien horde has crushed all opposition. YOU are the last hope. You must face their assault in personal, deadly combat. Equipped with an anti-gravity device and armed with photon gun, you will seek and destroy the minions of the Empire.

In your attempt to overthrow the dark Lord, you will fight the strangest and strongest creatures from around the universe. Do battle with the lizardmen, the shapeless ones, and the fierce bronze dragon. But you're not completely alone in your quest for freedom. You can upgrade your weapons system at several locations scattered throughout the lands.
overview_zh: 《Lost Worlds》是 1988 年 7 月運行的 Capcom 卡普空大型電玩橫向捲軸射擊遊戲。海外與家用移植版均改名為《Forgotten Worlds》。為 CP System 基板用軟體第 1 彈。玩家操作戰士在末世景象中對抗敵軍。1988 年度《Gamest》大獎獲得綜合大獎第 2 名、最佳射擊獎第 2 名等多項殊榮。
overview_jp:
『ロストワールド』 (Lost Worlds) は、1988年7月に稼働したカプコンのアーケード用横スクロールシューティングゲーム。日本国外および家庭用移植版では、タイトルが『フォゴットンワールド』 (Forgotten Worlds) に変更されている。業務用システム基板CPシステム用ソフトの第一弾。
アーケード版は後にPlayStation 2およびXbox用ソフト『カプコン クラシックス コレクション』（2005年）に収録された他、PlayStation Portable用ソフト『Capcom Classics Collection Remixed』（2006年）に収録された。メガドライブ版は2008年にWii用ソフトとしてバーチャルコンソールにて配信された。
アーケード版はゲーム誌『ゲーメスト』の企画「第2回ゲーメスト大賞」（1988年度）において、大賞2位、ベストシューティング賞2位、ベストエンディング賞3位、ベストグラフィック賞1位、ベストVGM賞9位を獲得した他、ゲーメストムック『ザ・ベストゲーム』（1991年）にて第26位を獲得した。

title_en: Formula 1 World Championship - Beyond The Limit
no_intro_name: Formula 1 World Championship - Beyond The Limit (Europe)

title_en: Formula One World Championship - Beyond the Limit
no_intro_name: Formula One World Championship - Beyond the Limit (Europe)

overview_en:
Baseball player Frank Thomas licensed one of the first baseball games to use motion-captured 3D graphics and multiple camera angles. 28 stadia have been rendered in 3D, and each has its own visible and significant differences. 

There are 6 distinct game modes, allowing for single exhibition matches as well as full seasons on the playoffs. There is also a Home Run Derby mode, allowing the player to pelt the ball out of the ground for points. 

You can choose pitchers and batters, based on their statistics and form. Bowling options are set to define the delivery, with fastballs and curveballs as well as more precise setting of pace and height. Fielding is optional - it's best to leave this to the computer at first You can always alter the infield and outfield depth and shift.
overview_zh:
棒球運動員弗蘭克·託馬斯 (Frank Thomas) 獲得了第一款使用動作捕捉 3D 圖形和多個攝影機角度的棒球遊戲的許可。 28 個視場已以 3D 形式渲染，每個視場都有其明顯且顯著的差異。 

有 6 種不同的遊戲模式，允許單場表演賽以及整個賽季的季後賽。還有一個全壘打德比模式，允許玩家將球擊出地面以獲得分數。 

您可以根據投手和擊球手的統計資料和狀態來選擇他們。保齡球選項可定義投球方式，包括快球和曲線球以及更精確的速度和高度設定。守備是可選的 - 最好首先將其留給計算機您可以隨時更改內野和外野的深度和移動。

overview_en:
Your task in this arcade conversion is to guide a frog across a treacherous road and river, and to safety at the top of the screen. Both these sections are fraught with a variety of hazards, each of which will kill the frog and cost you a life if contact is made.

The road is full of cars and trucks, at variable speeds. The river water itself is fatal, as are the snakes which hover within on later levels. Frogger must use the arrangement of logs, turtles (which are only there for a short time) and alligators (but stay away form their faces), and then jump into one of the open home-cells, ideally one containing a fly for extra points. Once all holes have been filled, you move onto the next, harder, level.
overview_zh:
在這個街機轉換中，你的任務是引導青蛙穿過危險的道路和河流，並到達螢幕頂部的安全地點。這兩個部分都充滿了各種危險，如果發生接觸，每種危險都會殺死青蛙並導致您喪命。

路上擠滿了汽車和卡車，速度不一。河水本身是致命的，在後面的樓層盤旋的蛇也是如此。青蛙必須使用原木、海龜（它們只在那裡呆很短的時間）和鱷魚（但遠離它們的臉）的排列，然後跳進一個開放的家庭牢房，最好是裡面有一隻蒼蠅的牢房，以獲得額外的分數。一旦所有的洞都被填滿，你就會進入下一個更難的關卡。

title_en: From TV Animation Slam Dunk: Kyougou Makkou Taiketsu!
title_jp: テレビアニメ・スラムダンク強豪真っ向対決！
no_intro_name: From TV Animation Slam Dunk - Kyougou Makkou Taiketsu! (Japan)

overview_en:
Funny World is an action game where the player must shoot strange animals as they move across the screen. On each stage a set number of "funnys" will cross the screen, and the player must shoot a certain number of them before they can safely reach the other side. To make things harder, some will walk, some will run, and some will move erratically; from time to time a female funny will cross the screen, which if shot will cause the player to lose a life. They player also has a certain number of boulders they can drop, which will hit any funny on the screen that may be out of the player's range. If enough funnys are hit, the player moves on to the next stage.

Balloon Boy is an action game where the player controls a boy at the bottom of the screen who must shoot at balloons floating across the top. When shot, the balloons will release either a trap or an item, and the boy must collect the items while avoiding the traps. If all the balloons are destroyed before the time runs out, the player moves on to the next stage.
overview_zh:
《Funny World》是一款動作遊戲，玩家必須射擊在螢幕上移動的奇怪動物。在每個階段，一定數量的「搞笑」會穿過螢幕，玩家必須射擊一定數量的「搞笑」才能安全到達另一邊。更困難的是，有些人會走路，有些人會跑，有些人會不穩定地移動；螢幕上時不時會出現一個搞笑的女性，如果被擊中，玩家就會喪命。玩家還可以掉落一定數量的巨石，這些巨石會擊中螢幕上可能超出玩家範圍的任何有趣的東西。如果有足夠的搞笑內容，玩家就會進入下一階段。

氣球男孩是一款動作遊戲，玩家控制螢幕底部的一個男孩，他必須射擊漂浮在頂部的氣球。射擊時，氣球會釋放陷阱或物品，男孩必須在避開陷阱的同時收集物品。如果在時間耗盡之前所有氣球都被摧毀，玩家將進入下一階段。

title_jp: ふしぎの海のナディア
overview_en: Fushigi no Umi no Nadia (ふしぎの海のナディア) is a 1991 adventure game for the Sega Mega Drive by Namco released exclusively in Japan to tie into the Fushigi no Umi no Nadia anime series. An English-language fan translation was released in July 2011.
overview_zh: 《Fushigi no Umi no Nadia》（ふしぎの海のナデia）是一款 1991 年由 Namco 在日本獨家發行的 Sega Mega Drive 冒險遊戲，與《Fushigi no Umi no Nadia》動畫系列相關聯。 2011 年 7 月發布了英文粉絲翻譯版。

title_en: FX Unit Yuki - The Henshin Engine
no_intro_name: FX Unit Yuki - The Henshin Engine
FZ Senki Axis ~ Final Zone (Japan, USA) (En)
FZ Senki Axis ~ Final Zone (Japan, USA)

overview_en:
The game puts the player in a fighter plane, dog fighting other planes. Once the player takes too many hits or the game-timer runs out the game is over. The player earns more time and advances stages by achieving goals that are set each stage. The player initially starts with limited armament which is replenished by completing missions.
Players choose what targets to destroy, like ships, jet fighters, or tanks. Eventually, players will attack bosses such as War Balloon, the Bomber, and the final adversary, an enemy ace who uses the same plane as the player, except with enhanced durability and strength.

UPC / Barcode: 010086011203
overview_zh:
遊戲將玩家置於一架戰鬥機中，與其他飛機戰鬥。一旦玩家受到太多打擊或遊戲計時器耗盡，遊戲就會結束。玩家透過實現每個階段設定的目標來贏得更多時間並晉級。玩家一開始擁有有限的武器，可以透過完成任務來補充。
玩家選擇要摧毀的目標，例如船隻、噴射戰鬥機或坦克。最終，玩家將攻擊諸如戰爭氣球、轟炸機等 Boss，以及最終的對手，即與玩家使用同一架飛機的敵方王牌，但其耐用性和強度有所增強。

UPC/條碼：010086011203

overview_en:
Late one night, the malevolent Thump enters the Gadget Kingdom's castle and steals the Gadget King's gem. The king wakes up the next morning to find that his gem was stolen. The king then summons Bop and Bump to reclaim his stolen possession from Thump.

Gameplay consists of flying through six air and water levels: Gadget Bay, Zeppelin Attack, The Lost City, Sub Attack, The Crystal Lake and Thump's World. Although the game continually scrolls throughout its stages, the player can fly in all directions on the screen. Bop and Bump come equipped with a spring glove mechanism that lets the player punch either up, down, right or left, which is used to defeat enemies.

Defeated enemies drop coins. There are also chests littered throughout the stages which contain coins also. These coins can be spent at a shop where the player can purchase upgrades.

The game also contains bonus stages where the objective is to open all the chests in a limited amount of time.
overview_zh:
一天深夜，惡毒的桑普進入了小玩意兒王國的城堡，偷走了小玩意王的寶石。國王第二天早上醒來，發現他的寶石被偷了。國王隨後召喚波普和邦普從桑普手中奪回被竊的財產。

遊戲玩法包括飛越六個空中和水面：Gadget Bay、Zeppelin Attack、The Lost City、Sub Attack、The Crystal Lake 和 Thump's World。儘管遊戲在整個階段中不斷滾動，但玩家可以在螢幕上向各個方向飛行。 Bop 和 Bump 配備了彈簧手套機制，可讓玩家向上、向下、向右或向左擊打，用於擊敗敵人。

擊敗敵人會掉落金幣。各個階段還散佈著一些箱子，裡面也裝有硬幣。這些硬幣可以在玩家可以購買升級的商店中使用。

遊戲還包含獎勵階段，目標是在有限的時間內開啟所有寶箱。

overview_en:
It's the year 300x. The Earth has been ravaged by careless humans, leaving an uninhabitable, polluted wasteland. The space terrorists, Gulfer, plan to harvest the pollution to make some sort of garbage weapon. The good guys, the Leezaluth, aren't happy about that, so they decide they have to blow up the Earth before Gulfer gets at it. They give Earth an ultimatum: destroy Gulfer or Leezaluth destroys Earth. To help them out, Leezaluth gives Earth's last hero, Dan, a special weapon: the TOZ system.

Why don't the Leezaluth just stop Gulfer themselves? It's not exactly clear.

So, we have the premise for a side scrolling shooter. The star attraction here is the TOZ system. The TOZ is an orb that follows your ship around, and can be shot at enemy ships to absorb their weapons. Using the TOZ, Dan will fight through 8 stages filled with lots of enemies and really large bosses.
overview_zh:
今年是 300x 年。地球被粗心的人類蹂躪，留下了一片無法居住、被汙染的荒地。太空恐怖分子格爾弗計畫收集汙染來製造某種垃圾武器。好人，利扎魯斯人，對此並不滿意，所以他們決定必須在格爾弗到達之前炸毀地球。他們給地球下了最後通牒：摧毀Gulfer或Leezaloth摧毀地球。為了幫助他們擺脫困境，利扎魯斯給了地球最後一位英雄丹一件特殊武器：TOZ 系統。

為什麼利札魯斯人不親自阻止海灣人？目前還不太清楚。

所以，我們有了橫向捲軸射擊遊戲的前提。這裡的明星景點是 TOZ 系統。 TOZ 是一個跟隨你的船隻的球體，可以向敵方船隻射擊以吸收他們的武器。使用 TOZ，Dan 將透過 8 個充滿大量敵人和真正大頭目的關卡。

overview_en:
By the year 3000 AD, the human race had progressed almost to the point of perfection. With no more poverty, war, or discrimination, the worries of mankind seemed to be over.

But the human race had created a new crisis for themselves. They had no idea how to defend themselves, or how to survive a major holocaust - the long period of peace had diminished their survival instinct. The United Earth Government decided that they needed to stimulate this instinct to the people, to revive their will to fight for their lives if the need arose. So they developed an awesome simulated war environment, run by a super computer - the Gain Ground system.

However, something went wrong while testing the system. It refused all input and went berserk, and all of its creators became its captives. The government sent a rescue party, but they too fell captive to robotic soldiers. After several more futile attempts, one last rescue party was assembled - but if this one failed, then the entire system world would have to be destroyed.

Three brave soldiers, carefully selected for the last attempt, have entered this vast, hostile battleground - determined to survive and to save their fellow men.
overview_zh: 《Gain Ground》是 SEGA 世嘉的固定畫面射擊遊戲。日本於 1988 年 11 月起作為大型電玩運行，採用 Sega System 24 基板。玩家操作各時代英雄，於指定關卡擊敗敵人或將同伴帶到出口過關。後續移植至家用主機與 PC。
overview_jp:
『ゲイングランド』 (GAIN GROUND) は、セガの固定画面シューティングゲーム。日本では、1988年11月よりアーケードゲームとして稼働を開始した。アーケード版のシステム基板はセガ・システム24を使用している。
後に家庭用ゲーム機やPC用ゲームとして移植版がリリースされている。詳細は#他機種版を参照。
アーケード版はゲーム誌『ゲーメスト』の「第3回ゲーメスト大賞」にて大賞5位、ベストアクション賞8位、編集部特別賞を獲得した他、ゲーメストムック『ザ・ベストゲーム』では28位を獲得した。

title_jp: ギャラクシーフォースII
overview_en:
Galaxy Force (ギャラクシーフォース?) is a sprite-scaling rail shooter arcade game, released by Sega in 1988 and built upon the Sega Y Board. The game which is in the tradition of Sega's successful Space Harrier is set in space. The game was ported in 1989 to the Sega Master System and in 1990 to the Mega Drive/Genesis, Amiga, Atari ST, Commodore 64, Amstrad CPC, ZX Spectrum, FM Towns, Sega Saturn and PlayStation 2 platforms.

Two other versions of the arcade game were released as Galaxy Force II Deluxe Edition and Galaxy Force Super Deluxe Edition. Galaxy Force II was also released on the Virtual Console via Sega Genesis/Mega Drive in Japan on February 3, 2009, in Europe on May 1, 2009 and in North America on May 11, 2009.[6] Galaxy Force II was released on Nintendo 3DS as part of the 3D Classics series. It was released in July 2013 in Japan and in December 2013 in Australia, Europe and North America.[7
overview_zh: 《Galaxy Force》是 SEGA Enterprises（現 SEGA 世嘉）開發的射擊遊戲。日本於 1988 年 4 月作為大型電玩運行。同年 7 月推出修正遊戲平衡並升級多項要素的《Galaxy Force II》。大型電玩版兩版本均使用「Y-Board」基板。玩家駕駛戰機在 3D 太空中與敵軍戰鬥，後續移植到多種家用主機。
overview_jp:
『ギャラクシーフォース』（GALAXY FORCE）は、セガ・エンタープライゼス（現在のセガ）が開発したシューティングゲーム。日本では1988年4月にアーケードゲームとして稼働を開始した。キャッチコピーは「宇宙への招待状 全身・銀河へ!」 
その後、同年7月ゲームバランスを見直し(いわゆる永久パターン対策など)、様々な要素をバージョンアップした『ギャラクシーフォースII』（GALAXY FORCE II）が稼働を開始。キャッチコピーは「戦慄が銀河を走る」。
アーケード版のシステム基板は両バージョンとも同社製の「Yボード」を使用している。
後にさまざまな家庭用ゲーム機に移植されている。それらの詳細は#移植版の節を参照。

title_en: Gambler Jiko Chuushinha 2 - Gekitou! Tokyo Mahjongland Hen
title_jp: ぎゅわんぶらあ自己中心派２ 激闘！　東京マージャンランド編

title_en: Gambler Jiko Chuushinha: Katayama Masayuki no Mahjong Doujou
title_jp: ぎゅわんぶらあ自己中心派片山まさゆきの麻雀道場
no_intro_name: Gambler Jiko Chuushinha - Katayama Masayuki no Mahjong Doujou (Japan)
overview_en: Gambler Jiko Chuushinha: Katayama Masayuki no Mahjong Doujou (ぎゅわんぶらあ自己中心派 片山まさゆきの麻雀道場) is a 1990 mahjong game by Game Arts for the Sega Mega Drive made with the video game license to Kodansha's Gambler Jiko Chuushinha manga — one of many such games by Game Arts.
overview_zh: 賭徒 Jiko Chuushinha: Katayama Masayuki no Mahjong Doujou (ぎゅわんぶらあ自己中心派 片山まさゆきの麻雀道場) 是由 Gameban Arts 為 Sega Mega Drive 製作於 1990 年的音樂俱樂部所獲得的遊戲影片 Arts 為 Smbega Drive 於 1990 年的音樂系列賽- 其中之一Game Arts 有很多這樣的遊戲。

title_en: Gambler Jikocyushinha 2 - Struggle In The Tokyo Mahjongland
no_intro_name: Gambler Jikocyushinha 2 - Struggle In The Tokyo Mahjongland (Japan)

title_en: Game no Kanzume - Sega Games Can Vol. 1
no_intro_name: Game no Kanzume - Sega Games Can Vol. 1 (Japan)

title_en: Game no Kanzume - Sega Games Can Vol. 2
no_intro_name: Game no Kanzume - Sega Games Can Vol. 2 (Japan)

title_jp: ゲームのかんづめ ＶＯＬ.１
ゲームのかんづめ ＶＯＬ.２

overview_en: As lazy cartoon cat Garfield, you're somehow trapped in your TV, that's what happens with too much TV watching. Go and find all remote-control pieces to get out of that box, and check the fridge for a change. The player advances through levels and bonus rounds in his attempt to escape.
overview_zh: 身為懶惰的卡通貓加菲貓，你不知何故被困在電視裡，這就是看太多電視會發生的情況。去找到所有可以從盒子裡拿出來的遙控部件，然後檢查冰箱是否有變化。玩家在嘗試逃脫的過程中透過關卡和獎勵回合前進。

overview_en:
Rule the night! Blast through 1,000 years of gothic adventure with the stone-crushing strength of the legendary Goliath. Challenge armies of ancient Viking Warriors. Smash relentless hordes of 3 robots in modem-day Manhattan. Your goal - to find and destroy the evil Eye of Odin before it destroys the world.

• Come face-to-face with giant 3D Raptorbots, Spiderbots, and vicious Waspbots.
• Attack in mid-air, forcing your enemies into hand-to-hand aerial combat.
• Scale mammoth towers of stone. Maneuver upside down as violent winds and enemies try to whip you down.
• 24-megs of epic gameplay will push you to the wall across 18 stages of nonstop action.
overview_zh:
統治夜晚！藉助傳奇歌利亞的碎石力量，經歷 1000 年的哥德式冒險。挑戰古代維京戰士的軍隊。在現代曼哈頓粉碎由 3 個機器人組成的無情部落。你的目標 - 在邪惡的奧丁之眼毀滅世界之前找到並摧毀它。

• 與巨型 3D 猛禽機器人、蜘蛛機器人和兇惡的黃蜂機器人面對面。
• 空中攻擊，迫使敵人進行肉搏戰。
• 攀登巨大的石塔。當狂風和敵人試圖將你打倒時，進行顛倒的機動。
• 24 兆的史詩級遊戲將讓您在 18 個不間斷的關卡中瀕臨崩潰。

title_jp: 餓狼伝説２ 新たなる闘い
餓狼伝説 宿命の戦い
overview_en:
Southtown City plays host to the King of Fighters Tournament. Andy & Terry Bogard take part in the tournament cause winning the tournament is the only way they can defeat Geese Howard. Geese Howard controls Southtown City and killed their father several years ago. Also taking part is Joe Higashi, a Japanese kickboxer. Select either Joe, Andy or Terry, visit several locations in Southtown City and win that tournament!

Fatal Fury is a 2D fighter and is the first game in a series of one-on-one fighting games by SNK. It's a conversion of the original Fatal Fury arcade game. This first game does not yet feature the series' trademark pseudo 3D mode (which allows you to move between the foreground & background while fighting). Includes a two-player vs. mode.
overview_zh:
南鎮市舉辦拳皇錦標賽。安迪·博加德和特里·博加德參加比賽，因為贏得比賽是他們擊敗吉斯·霍華德的唯一途徑。吉斯·霍華德控制了南鎮市，並在幾年前殺死了他們的父親。參加比賽的還有日本跆拳道運動員東喬。選擇喬、安迪或特里，參觀南鎮市的多個地點並贏得錦標賽！

《餓狼傳說》是一款 2D 格鬥遊戲，也是 SNK 推出的一系列一對一格鬥遊戲中的第一款遊戲。它是原版《餓狼傳說》街機遊戲的轉換版。第一款遊戲尚未採用該系列標誌性的偽 3D 模式（讓您在戰鬥時在前景和背景之間移動）。包括兩人對戰模式。

overview_en:
Southtown City plays host to the King of Fighters Tournament. Andy & Terry Bogard take part in the tournament cause winning the tournament is the only way they can defeat Geese Howard. Geese Howard controls Southtown City and killed their father several years ago. Also taking part is Joe Higashi, a Japanese kickboxer. Select either Joe, Andy or Terry, visit several locations in Southtown City and win that tournament!

Fatal Fury is a 2D fighter and is the first game in a series of one-on-one fighting games by SNK. It's a conversion of the original Fatal Fury arcade game. This first game does not yet feature the series' trademark pseudo 3D mode (which allows you to move between the foreground & background while fighting). Includes a two-player vs. mode.
overview_zh:
南鎮市舉辦拳皇錦標賽。安迪·博加德和特里·博加德參加比賽，因為贏得比賽是他們擊敗吉斯·霍華德的唯一途徑。吉斯·霍華德控制了南鎮市，並在幾年前殺死了他們的父親。參加比賽的還有日本跆拳道運動員東喬。選擇喬、安迪或特里，參觀南鎮市的多個地點並贏得錦標賽！

《餓狼傳說》是一款 2D 格鬥遊戲，也是 SNK 推出的一系列一對一格鬥遊戲中的第一款遊戲。它是原版《餓狼傳說》街機遊戲的轉換版。第一款遊戲尚未採用該系列標誌性的偽 3D 模式（讓您在戰鬥時在前景和背景之間移動）。包括兩人對戰模式。

title_en: Garry Kitchen's Super Battletank - War in the Gulf
no_intro_name: Garry Kitchen's Super Battletank - War in the Gulf (USA)
overview_en: Garry Kitchen's Super Battletank: War in the Gulf, is a tank simulation game for the Sega Mega Drive and Sega Game Gear. The Game Gear version is simply known as Super Battletank. Both versions were only released in North America.
overview_zh: Garry Kitchen 的超級坦克：海灣戰爭是一款適用於 Sega Mega Drive 和 Sega Game Gear 的坦克模擬遊戲。 Game Gear 版本簡稱為 Super Battletank。兩個版本僅在北美發行。

overview_en:
Choose again from Thor the Warrior, Thyra the Valkyrie, Merlin the Wizard and Questor the Elf (each with their own advantages/disadvantages) and 1 to 4 players(supports Sega's four-player adapter).

Alongside the standard arcade mode, there are the Quest, Battle and Record modes. Quest Mode: Defeat the four towers and solve the mystery of the ancient castle; weapons can be bought with collected gold from merchants in the main hub area, where you can also choose which tower to take on next. Experience points are good for increasing your stats.
 Battle Mode: Fight your fellows to the death. Maps can include teleporters/monsters/items etc. Avoid exits(or you'll be out of the round).
 Record Mode: Arcade mode with some variations such as a password continue, also you can't die - although points will be lost for every 500 health lost.
overview_zh: 《Gauntlet》是 Atari 於 1985 年發表的奇幻 RPG 風動作第三人稱射擊遊戲，亦為其系列總稱。日本由 NAMCO（後 Bandai Namco Entertainment）代理販售。最大特色為「多名玩家可隨時加入或暫離，所有人有時合作、有時互相牽制」的設計，當時極為創新，Atari 並擁有相關專利。生命值（HP）會因受敵人傷害與時間經過而減少，玩家必須拾取食物與遊戲機投幣補充繼續前進。
overview_jp:
『ガントレット』（英: gauntlet）は、アタリが1985年に発表したファンタジーRPG風のアクション・サードパーソン・シューティングゲーム、ならびにそれを第1作とするサードパーソン・シューティングゲームのシリーズの総称である。
日本では初代をナムコ（後のバンダイナムコエンターテインメント）、『レジェンド』と『ダークレガシー』をSNKが輸入販売していた。
特徴としては「複数のプレイヤーが個別に参加・中断可能であり、その全員が時には協力しつつ、時には足を引っ張り合いつつ、プレイできる」点が挙げられる。このアイディアは当時画期的なものであり、アタリは特許を所有している。
ヘルス（ヒットポイント）は敵から受けるダメージと時間経過により減少する。それを食べ物と現実のコイン（クレジット）で補給しつつ先に進んでいく。
Xbox 360のXbox Live Arcadeにてダウンロード配信も行われたが、現在は配信終了している。

overview_en:
Choose again from Thor the Warrior, Thyra the Valkyrie, Merlin the Wizard and Questor the Elf (each with their own advantages/disadvantages) and 1 to 4 players(supports Sega's four-player adapter).

Alongside the standard arcade mode, there are the Quest, Battle and Record modes. Quest Mode: Defeat the four towers and solve the mystery of the ancient castle; weapons can be bought with collected gold from merchants in the main hub area, where you can also choose which tower to take on next. Experience points are good for increasing your stats.
 Battle Mode: Fight your fellows to the death. Maps can include teleporters/monsters/items etc. Avoid exits(or you'll be out of the round).
 Record Mode: Arcade mode with some variations such as a password continue, also you can't die - although points will be lost for every 500 health lost.
overview_zh:
再次選擇戰士託爾、女武神塞拉、巫師梅林和精靈奎斯特（各有優缺點）和 1 至 4 名玩家（支援世嘉的四人介面卡）。

除了標準街機模式外，還有任務、戰鬥和記錄模式。任務模式：擊敗四座塔樓，解開古城堡之謎；武器可以用從主樞紐區域的商人那裡收集的黃金購買，在那裡你也可以選擇接下來要攻克的塔樓。經驗值有利於增加你的統計資料。
 戰鬥模式：與你的同伴戰鬥至死。地圖可以包括傳送器/怪物/物品等。避免出口（否則你將出局）。
 記錄模式：街機模式有一些變化，例如密碼繼續，而且你也不會死 - 儘管每損失 500 點生命值就會失去分數。

overview_en: Six magicians, each trapped inside a magical gem, are liberated from the crown Gemfire by Princess Robyn, daughter of the tyrannical ruler of Ishmeria, King Eselred. Fleeing across the length and breadth of the island nation, they each choose a leader from the greatest noble houses as their champion to topple Eselred and bring peace to Ishmeria.
overview_zh: 六名魔法師被困在魔法寶石中，被伊什梅里亞暴虐統治者埃塞爾雷德國王的女兒羅賓公主從寶石之火王冠中解救出來。他們逃離了這個島國的四面八方，各自從最偉大的貴族家族中選出了一位領袖作為他們的冠軍，以推翻埃塞爾雷德並為伊什梅里亞帶來和平。

overview_en:
General Chaos is an arcade-style squad RTS where the player controls a team of five soldiers in a limited battleground, in a classic Red (General Havoc, headquarters in Viceria) vs Blue (General Chaos, in Moronica) all out war. The goal of the game is to push the frontline to the enemy headquarters, by winning individual battles and then beat them in their own capital.

There are five kinds of soldiers, each with their weapon of choice and range of attack: the Gunner (machine gun, medium range and wide arc), Launcher (rocket launcher, long range), Chucker (grenades that can be thrown over barricades), Scorcher (flame-thrower, close combat) and Blaster (dynamite sticks, close range). Before each battle, players can choose the composition of their team from one out of four choices: Assault team, Brute Force, Commandos (a team of just two soldiers which have different controls) and Demolition.

Gameplay is simple to learn, with the A button being used to fire at the nearest enemy, B to move to a the pointer location and C to cycle through soldiers. Using the commando team changes the controls, with the directional pad controlling a soldier directly, with B being used to call the other soldier nearby. While basic commands are simple, the player must deal with things such as distance from target and angle of attack to succeed. If two opposing soldiers face-off during battle, they engage in a brawl (indicated by a cloud of dust). When that happens, the battle stops and the players are in direct control of the soldiers: A punches, B kicks and C blocks. Every downed soldier can can be rescued if there are enough medics available, earned at the end of each battle depending on how well the player did. 

Up to four players can play, cooperatively or against each other.
overview_zh:
General Chaos 是一款街機風格的小隊即時戰略遊戲，玩家在有限的戰場上控制一支由五名士兵組成的小隊，進行經典的紅隊（General Havoc，總部位於維塞裡亞）與藍隊（General Chaos，位於莫羅尼卡）的全面戰爭。遊戲的目標是透過贏得個人戰鬥，將前線推進到敵人的總部，然後在自己的首都擊敗他們。

有五種士兵，每種都有自己選擇的武器和攻擊範圍：槍手（機槍，中程和寬弧），發射器（火箭發射器，遠距離），Chucker（可以投擲路障的手榴彈），Scorcher（火焰噴射器，近戰）和Blaster（炸藥棒，近距離）。在每次戰鬥之前，玩家可以從四個選項中選擇一種隊伍的組成：突擊隊、蠻力隊、突擊隊（只有兩名士兵的隊伍，具有不同的控制方式）和爆破隊。

遊戲玩法簡單易學，A 按鈕用於向最近的敵人開火，B 按鈕用於移動到指標位置，C 按鈕用於迴圈選擇士兵。使用突擊隊改變控制方式，方向鍵直接控制士兵，B 用於呼叫附近的其他士兵。雖然基本指令很簡單，但玩家必須處理諸如與目標的距離和攻擊角度等問題才能成功。如果兩名敵方士兵在戰鬥中對峙，他們就會發生爭吵（由一團灰塵表示）。當這種情況發生時，戰鬥就會停止，玩家可以直接控制士兵：A 拳，B 踢，C 格擋。如果有足夠的醫療人員，那麼每個倒下計程車兵都可以獲救，醫療人員在每場戰鬥結束時獲得，這取決於玩家的表現。 

最多四名玩家可以合作或相互對抗。

title_jp: ジェネラル・カオス 大混戦

overview_en:
Generations Lost is a platform action game in which the player takes the role of Monobe, an adventurer on the search for the past of his people. Thanks to his magic armour Monobe is able to execute many different moves. Besides running and jumping, Monobe can roll on the ground, deliver blows with hands and feet, and shoot energy balls. With the help of an energy rope Monobe can swing from platform to platform.

Most of the time, Monobe has to solve several puzzles, find secret switches and survive deadly traps. The game is split into six areas which can be accessed via the "Magic Box" teleporter.
overview_zh:
Generations Lost 是一款平臺動作遊戲，玩家扮演 Monobe 的角色，一位冒險家，正在尋找他的人民的過去。憑藉著他的魔法盔甲，物部能夠執行許多不同的動作。除了奔跑和跳躍之外，物部還可以在地面上滾動、用手腳進行打擊以及發射能量球。在能量繩的幫助下，Monobe 可以在平臺之間搖擺。

大多數時候，Monobe 必須解決幾個謎題、找到秘密開關並在致命的陷阱中生存。遊戲分為六個區域，可以透過「魔盒」傳送器進入。

overview_en:
Featuring heavyweight champion George Foreman, this is a boxing simulation where players, taking the role of Foreman, go through a series of twelve rounds against different boxers to win the championship title belt.

Played from an third-person perspective using a view from right over the shoulders over the boxer, players can move left and right to dodge incoming punches, block and throw left and right punches. The standard punch is a cross, but by holding the Up-key pressed, jabs can also be thrown.
overview_zh:
這是一款以重量級冠軍喬治·福爾曼為主角的拳擊模擬遊戲，玩家扮演福爾曼的角色，與不同的拳擊手進行一系列的十二輪比賽，以贏得冠軍腰帶。

從第三人稱視角進行遊戲，使用從拳擊手肩膀上方的視角進行遊戲，玩家可以左右移動以躲避來襲的拳頭、格擋和投擲左右拳頭。標準拳法是十字拳，但按住向上鍵也可以出刺拳。

overview_en:
Set after the events of the first movie, Sega's "Ghostbusters" follows the further adventures of Peter, Ray and Egon, as the make their way through six cases in an attempt to piece together a mysterious stone tablet.

Completely different than the Activision title of the same name, the Genesis "Ghostbusters" is a side-scrolling platformer that has the boys in gray running through houses, apartments, a burning house and a high-rise for starters as they battle a myriad of ghosts with their proton blasters. When the Ghostbusters face off against a boss ghost, they have the ability to trap them the traditional way.

Peter, Ray and Egon, each have different abilities, and can purchase weapon and life upgrades from shops throughout the levels. Other familiar faces make an appearance, as Slimer offers power-ups, and the Stay-Puft Marshmallow Man returns to settle the score from the movie. 

Solve the mystery of the tablet, and the Ghostbusters have to face off against Jenna, the Goddess of Death and Destruction. Can the boys save New York one more time?
overview_zh:
世嘉的《捉鬼敢死隊》以第一部電影的事件為背景，講述了彼得、雷和埃貢的進一步冒險，他們穿過六個案件，試圖拼湊出一塊神秘的石碑。

與動視公司的同名遊戲完全不同，《創世紀》《捉鬼敢死隊》是一款橫向捲軸平臺遊戲，首先，灰衣男孩跑過房屋、公寓、燃燒的房子和高層建築，用質子爆能槍與無數鬼魂戰鬥。當捉鬼敢死隊面對 Boss 幽靈時，他們有能力以傳統方式將其困住。

彼得、雷和埃貢各自擁有不同的能力，可以從各個關卡的商店購買武器和生命升級。其他熟悉的面孔也出現了，史萊默提供了能量，而呆呆的棉花糖人則回來了，以解決電影中的問題。 

解開石板之謎，捉鬼敢死隊必須對抗死亡與毀滅女神珍娜。男孩們能再次拯救紐約嗎？

overview_en:
Global Gladiators (also known as Mick and Mack: Global Gladiators) is a 1992 platform game by Virgin Interactive, originally programmed by David Perry (who at the time had already moved to the United States and was located on the recently formed Virgin Games USA development studio) for the Mega Drive/Genesis and eventually ported by other Virgin Interactive teams in Europe (with the help of Graftgold and Krisalis Software) to the Sega Master System, Sega Game Gear and the Commodore Amiga. A Super Nintendo port was also in development but was never completed for undisclosed reasons, though a prototype exists on the Internet. The game is loosely based on the McDonald's fast food chain and has a strong environmentalist message.

A Game Boy port of the title was also fully developed (by Damian Stones, of Climax) but was never released for the same legal reasons as the Super Nintendo port.

In the single-player game, the player controls Mick or Mack through four worlds; Slime World, Mystical Forest, Toxi-town and Arctic World. Each world has several sub-stages where the character must collect a certain number of Golden Arches to advance.

They are guided in their quest by Ronald McDonald, who appears at the beginning and the end of the game. The characters are armed with a Super Soaker-type gun that shoots gooey projectiles.

The game engine is the same used in other Virgin Interactive games such as Cool Spot and Disney's Aladdin, as all of them (Mega Drive/Genesis versions) were handled by David Perry's programming team, which eventually turned into Shiny Entertainment.
overview_zh:
《全球角鬥士》（也稱為《米克和麥克：全球角鬥士》）是 Virgin Interactive 於 1992 年推出的平臺遊戲，最初由 David Perry（當時已移居美國，在最近成立的 Virgin Games USA 開發工作室）為 Mega Drive/Genesis 編寫，最終由歐洲的其他 Virgin Interactive Gear 團隊（在 Software Gramodega 和k Software（在 Software GraKega）下移超級任天堂移植版也在開發中，但由於未公開的原因從未完成，儘管網路上存在原型。該遊戲大致以麥當勞快餐連鎖店為基礎，並具有強烈的環保主義訊息。

該遊戲的 Game Boy 移植版也已完全開發（由 Climax 的達米安·斯通斯開發），但由於與超級任天堂移植版相同的法律原因從未發布。

在單人遊戲中，玩家控制米克或麥克穿越四個世界；史萊姆世界、神秘森林、託西鎮和北極世界。每個世界都有幾個子階段，角色必須收集一定數量的金色拱門才能前進。
