他們在麥當勞叔叔的帶領下進行任務，他出現在遊戲的開頭和結尾。角色配備了超級浸泡型槍，可以發射黏稠的彈頭。

這款遊戲引擎與其他維珍互動遊戲（例如 Cool Spot 和迪士尼的阿拉丁）中使用的遊戲引擎相同，因為所有這些遊戲（Mega Drive/Genesis 版本）均由 David Perry 的程式設計團隊負責，該團隊最終變成了 Shiny Entertainment。

overview_en: Go Net is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Aisystem Tokyo and published by Sega, which was released in Japan in 1992.
overview_zh: Go Net是一款雜項遊戲，由Aisystem Tokyo開發，世嘉發行，於1992年在日本發行。

overview_en:
Hercules is aiming to achieve immortality by completing the task the Gods have set him. His task is presented as a  platform adventure set in ancient Greece, featuring a variety of enemies as you play it through.

Of more significance, however, is the game's Artificial Intelligence system, in which creatures monitor how you play, and try to find safer positions. Also, the game offers more bonuses and power-ups if you're struggling to progress. Even without those, there are lots of bonus sections to find and unlock.
overview_zh:
赫拉克勒斯的目標是透過完成眾神交給他的任務來實現永生。他的任務是一個以古希臘為背景的平臺冒險遊戲，在遊戲中會遇到各種各樣的敵人。

然而，更重要的是遊戲的人工智慧系統，其中生物會監視你的遊戲方式，並嘗試找到更安全的位置。此外，如果您努力進步，遊戲還提供更多獎勵和能力提升。即使沒有這些，也有很多獎勵部分可供尋找和解鎖。

overview_en:
Golden Axe is a 1989 Mega Drive video game developed by Sega R&D2 and released by Sega in Japan on December 23, 1989.

The game takes place in the fictional land of Yuria, a Conan the Barbarian-style high fantasy medieval world. An evil entity known as Death Adder has captured the King and his daughter, and holds them captive in their castle. He also finds the Golden Axe, the magical emblem of Yuria, and threatens to destroy both the axe and the royal family unless the people of Yuria accept him as their ruler. The character of Death Adder and the stolen Golden Axe could well be traced to the historical event of the Acquisition of the True Cross during the Sassanid-Byzantine wars, as the Norse mythology is heavily influenced by Greek and Middle Eastern mythologies.

The player controls one of three Warriors. The first is a battle axe-wielding dwarf, Gilius Thunderhead, from the mines of Wolud, whose twin brother was killed by the soldiers of Death Adder. Another is a male barbarian, Ax Battler, wielding a two handed broadsword looking for revenge for the murder of his mother. The last is a long-sword-wielding Tyris Flare, an amazon, whose parents were both killed by Death Adder.
overview_zh: 《Golden Axe》是 1989 年由 SEGA Enterprises（後 SEGA 世嘉）發售的大型電玩橫向捲軸動作（Belt-scroll）遊戲，標題畫面漢字標記為「戰斧」。三位戰士為向暗黑騎士 Death Adder 復仇而展開冒險。大型電玩發售後移植至多種家用主機與 PC，並推出多款續作與衍生作品。Mega Drive 版獲《Famitsu》交叉評論銀殿堂。
overview_jp:
『ゴールデンアックス』（Golden Axe）は、1989年にセガ・エンタープライゼス（後のセガ）が発売した日本のアーケード用ベルトスクロールアクションゲームである。タイトル画面でのタイトルの漢字表記は「戦斧」。
アーケード版のリリース以降、家庭用テレビゲーム機用およびパソコン用ゲームとして様々な機種に移植された（各機種版の詳細な情報は#移植版を参照）。
さらに家庭用ゲーム機では、続編や派生・リメイク作品が各機種にて発売された（詳細は#続編、#関連作品を参照）。
アーケード版はゲーム誌『ゲーメスト』の「第3回ゲーメスト大賞」（1989年度）においてベストアクション賞で9位を獲得、最初の移植作であるメガドライブ版はゲーム誌『ファミコン通信』の「クロスレビュー」においてシルバー殿堂入りを獲得した。

overview_en:
Golden Axe II is a 1991 Genesis video game developed by Sega CS1 and released by Sega of America in the USA on December 24, 1991.

Chop down the forces of evil in this intense sequel to Golden Axe. Battle the dreaded Dark Guld with the Barbarian, the Amazon, and the Dwarf. Use tough new warrior skills and dazzling magic. Kick, hack, and hurl away enemies in the struggle to recapture that legendary symbol of peace, the Golden Axe.

So let the battle begin! Lift your mighty blade high to crush the demon Dark Guld!
overview_zh: 《Golden Axe II》是 1991 年 12 月 27 日由 SEGA 世嘉發售的 Mega Drive 專用橫向捲軸動作（Belt-scroll）遊戲。後續於 Wii Virtual Console、Steam、iOS 等平台再販，亦收錄於《SEGA Genesis Collection》（2006）、《Sonic's Ultimate Genesis Collection》（2009）等合輯。
overview_jp:
『ゴールデンアックスII』 (GOLDEN AXE II) は、1991年12月27日にセガより発売されたメガドライブ専用のベルトスクロールアクションゲームである。
後にWiiのバーチャルコンソール対応ソフトやWindowsのSteam、iOSとして発売された他、北米や欧州ではPlayStation 2、PlayStation Portable用ソフト『セガジェネシスコレクション』（2006年）やPlayStation 3、Xbox 360用ソフト『Sonic's Ultimate Genesis Collection』（2009年）に収録されている。

overview_en:
Golden Axe III is a 1993 Mega Drive video game developed by Sega CS and released by Sega in Japan on June 25, 1993.

Damud Hellbringer, the Prince of Darkness, has taken away the Golden Axe and put an evil curse over all the warriors. However, one of the heroes has their curse relieved and is sent to set things straight - lift the curse off the others, defeat the villain, and return with the Golden Axe.
overview_zh: 《Golden Axe III》是 1993 年 6 月 25 日由 SEGA 世嘉發售的 Mega Drive 專用橫向捲軸動作（Belt-scroll）遊戲。系列第 3 作，新增可選角色與分歧路線等要素。
overview_jp: 『ゴールデンアックスIII』（ゴールデンアックス スリー、GOLDEN AXE III）は、1993年6月25日にセガより発売されたメガドライブ専用のベルトスクロールアクションゲームである。

title_en: Golf Magazine Presents 36 Great Holes Starring Fred Couples
title_jp:
ゴルフマガジン プレゼンツ

３６グレイトホールズ ステアリング フレッド・カプルス

overview_en:
In Goofy's Hysterical History Tour, the player takes command of Goofy himself who gets his dream job as janitor at The Ludwig von Drake History Museum. However, his rival Pete is determined to get him fired and sabotages the exhibits and scatters pieces throughout various time periods. Armed with a new gadget, the Extend-O-Hand, Goofy must travel to the past and recover the pieces before the morning.

The game is a platformer, where Goofy must travel through various stages ranging from Prehistoric times, Medieval times, Colonial America and the Wild West among many others, collecting items and power-ups and defeating Pete's henchmen using the Extend-O-Hand. After collecting all the pieces, Goofy then must face Pete himself.
overview_zh:
在高飛歇斯底里的歷史之旅中，玩家親自指揮高飛，他得到了路德維希·馮·德雷克歷史博物館的看門人的夢想工作。然而，他的競爭對手皮特決心解僱他，並破壞展覽並在不同時期散佈碎片。帶著新裝置“伸出手”，高飛必須回到過去並在早上之前取回碎片。

遊戲是一款平臺遊戲，高飛必須穿越史前時代、中世紀時代、美洲殖民地和狂野西部等各個階段，收集物品和能量道具，並使用「伸手」擊敗皮特的追隨者。收集完所有碎片後，高飛必須面對皮特本人。

overview_en:
Gouketsuji Ichizoku (豪血寺一族), called Power Instinct outside Japan, is a 1993 arcade fighting game by Atlus and the first in the long-running series of the same name. Atlus ported it to the Sega Mega Drive in 1994, releasing it exclusively in Japan. Plans were made to port the game to the US under the name Power Instinct, but were scrapped (however a US SNES version was released under this name).

The game is a conventional fighter. A, B, and C each perform a different variation of each character's base attack, with various combinations possible with the D-pad.
overview_zh:
Gouketsuji Ichizoku（豪血寺一族），在日本以外稱為 Power Instinct，是 Atlus 於 1993 年推出的一款街機格鬥遊戲，也是長期執行的同名系列中的第一款遊戲。 Atlus 於 1994 年將其移植到 Sega Mega Drive，並在日本獨家發售。原計劃以《Power Instinct》的名稱將遊戲移植到美國，但後來被取消了（不過美國 SNES 版本以這個名稱發布）。

本場比賽是一場傳統的格鬥比賽。 A、B 和 C 各自執行每個角色基本攻擊的不同變體，並可使用方向鍵進行各種組合。

overview_en: Granada is a free-roaming scrolling shooter. You control the titular maneuver cepter Granada as you make your way through each stage, destroying the enemy's weapons. You have a map that tells you where your targets are on the stage, and once all the targets have been destroyed a large boss enemy appears which must also be destroyed. You are equipped with a standard cannon, as well as a more powerful blaster that will actually push your machine backwards with the recoil. There are also assist pickups which will follow you and reflect any shots you fire at it toward the nearest enemies.
overview_zh: 《Granada》是 Wolf Team 開發、1990 年 4 月 20 日發售的全方向任意捲軸射擊遊戲。遊戲設計與主程式為豐田利夫。1990 年 4 月 20 日推出 X68000 版，同年 11 月 16 日推出 Mega Drive 版。玩家操作戰車型機體與敵軍戰鬥。後續於 Project EGG 平台 X68000 版（2004）、Mega Drive 版（2012）相繼配信。
overview_jp:
『グラナダ』（GRANADA)  は、ウルフ・チームが開発し1990年4月20日に発売された全方位任意スクロールのシューティングゲーム。ゲームデザイン及びメインプログラマーは豊田利夫。
1990年4月20日にX68000で発売され、同年11月16日にメガドライブへの移植版が発売された。また、Windows用のプロジェクトEGG対応ソフトとして、X68000版が2004年に、メガドライブ版が2012年にそれぞれ配信された。その後、2022年10月27日にセガが発売したメガドライブ復刻機「メガドライブ ミニ2」や2023年6月8日にエディアが発売したNintendo Switch用ソフト『テレネット シューティング コレクション』に本作が収録され、2023年12月7日には『テレネット シューティング コレクション』収録版が個別販売された。
X68000版はパソコン雑誌『Oh!X』の「GAME OF THE YEAR」にて第8位を獲得した。

overview_en:
The Tennis Tournament: Grandslam in Europe is a Sega Mega Drive video game developed by System Sacom and released in Japan by Telenet Japan on June 1, 1992. In 1994 it was released in the classic range by Sega as Grandslam (Classic).

A gamer can create their own player by choosing their race, gender, and tennis wear color. In addition to this, the game can be played by either one or two players. There can be doubles and singles matches, in addition to numerous amounts of tournaments. Tournaments take place in various locations around the world, including Florida, London, Paris and Sydney.
overview_zh:
《網球錦標賽：歐洲大滿貫》是一款由 System Sacom 開發的世嘉 Mega Drive 電玩遊戲，並於 1992 年 6 月 1 日由 Telenet Japan 在日本發行。 1994 年，它在世嘉的經典系列中發行，名為 Grandslam（經典）。

玩家可以透過選擇種族、性別和網球服顏色來建立自己的球員。除此之外，該遊戲可以由一名或兩名玩家玩。除了大量的錦標賽之外，還可以進行雙打和單打比賽。錦標賽在世界各地舉行，包括佛羅裡達、倫敦、巴黎和雪梨。

title_en: Great Circus Mystery - Mickey to Minnie Magical Adventure 2
no_intro_name: Great Circus Mystery - Mickey to Minnie Magical Adventure 2 (Japan)

title_en: Great Circus Mystery Starring Mickey _ Minnie, The
no_intro_name: Great Circus Mystery Starring Mickey _ Minnie, The (USA)

title_jp: グレイテストヘビーウェイツ
overview_en: The gameplay of the game is very similar to that featured in Evander Holyfield's Real Deal Boxing. Perhaps the most noticeable improvement is the speed of the game; it is significantly faster than the aforementioned title. The "taunting" feature is also improved; the phrases used are now more varied, because each of the boxers based on real-life fighters have their own set of taunts. Some of them reflect utterances actually spoken by them during their careers. Boxers will now also sometimes taunt their opponents before fights as well as during them.
overview_zh: 遊戲的遊戲玩法與伊萬德·霍利菲爾德的《真實拳擊》中的遊戲玩法非常相似。也許最顯著的改進是遊戲速度；它比上述標題快得多。 「嘲諷」功能也得到改進；現在使用的短語更加多樣化，因為每個基於現實拳擊手的拳擊手都有自己的一套嘲諷。其中一些反映了他們在職業生涯中實際說過的話。拳擊手現​​在有時也會在比賽前和比賽中嘲笑對手。

overview_en: Greendog is one unlucky surfer. He lost his board and got stuck with a cursed necklace. Greendog has to fight his way past a lot of crazed creatures and monsters to find the Aztec treasure or he'll never get rid of the curse!
overview_zh: Greendog 是一位不幸的衝浪者。他丟了棋盤，並被一條被詛咒的項鍊卡住了。綠狗必須戰勝許多瘋狂的生物和怪物才能找到阿茲特克寶藏，否則他將永遠無法擺脫詛咒！

overview_en: In this hectic, top-down, vertically-scrolling shooter where the screen is constantly filled with enemies and bullets, players have a constant, unlimited firing rate, enhanced by power-ups that include missiles, target-seeking bullets, shields, additional speed, extra power and bonus points. In Grind Stormer the ship always moves at a fast speed and the player can collect bombs that damage the entire screen and fend off bullets. The other variant V Five takes a Gradius-approach to power-ups, having the player advance through a selection of power-ups shown on the right by collecting tokens. In the first mode power-ups are immediately applied. In the second mode the ship is much slower and the player needs to decide to spend tokens on speed power-ups right away or save them to advance to seeking bullets or additional power.
overview_zh: 在這款忙碌、自上而下、垂直滾動的射擊遊戲中，螢幕上不斷充滿敵人和子彈，玩家擁有恆定、無限的射擊速度，並透過包括導彈、目標搜尋子彈、護盾、額外速度、額外力量和獎勵積分在內的能量提升來增強。在 Grind Stormer 中，飛船總是以很快的速度移動，玩家可以收集炸彈來破壞整個螢幕並抵抗子彈。另一種變體「V Five」採用了 Gradius 方法來增強道具，讓玩家透過收集代幣來選擇右側顯示的道具。在第一種模式下，立即施加加電。在第二種模式中，船要慢得多，玩家需要決定立即將代幣用於速度提升，還是將它們儲存起來以繼續尋找子彈或額外的力量。

overview_en: Growl, known in Japan as Runark, is a belt-scrolling beat-'em-up originally released for the arcades by Taito in 1990. Set in the early 20th century, the player controls a forest ranger who must protect the local wildlife from a group of evil poachers who are driving the animals to extinction. A home version was released for the Sega Genesis (Mega Drive) on November 1991. It was also included in the arcade game compilation Taito Legends 2 for the PlayStation 2, Xbox and Microsoft Windows.
overview_zh: 《Growl》在日本被稱為 Runark，是一款捲軸清版遊戲，最初由 Taito 於 1990 年在街機平臺上推出。背景設定在 20 世紀初，玩家控制一名護林員，必須保護當地野生動物免受一群邪惡偷獵者的侵害，這些偷獵者正在將動物逼至滅絕。 1991 年 11 月，Sega Genesis (Mega Drive) 發布了家庭版。它還包含在適用於 PlayStation 2、Xbox 和 Microsoft Windows 的街機遊戲集合 Taito Legends 2 中。

overview_en: Gunship is a helicopter action game developed by Probe and published by U.S. Gold for the Sega Mega Drive, based on MicroProse's game series of the same name.. It was only released in PAL regions.
overview_zh: 《Gunship》是Probe開發、U.S. Gold為Sega Mega Drive發行的直升機動作遊戲，以MicroProse為基礎的同名遊戲系列。僅在PAL地區發行。

title_jp: ガンスターヒーローズ
overview_en:
Gunstar Heroes is a 1993 Mega Drive video game developed by Treasure and released by Sega in Japan on September 10, 1993.

The player has four weapons to choose from, and they can be combined in various pairs to create a total of 14 unique weapons. In addition to the weapons, the player can engage enemies in close quarters combat. It is possible to grab and toss enemies, perform sliding and jumping attacks and a long-range skid.

Unlike most games in the genre, the player has a life total calculated in numbers. Death to a player requires multiple hits but just one death will issue the option to continue from the start of the level or to end the game. Players have unlimited continues.

The main highlight of the game are its boss encounters, which often feature large enemies made up of multiple sprites allowing for fluid movement.
overview_zh: 《Gunstar Heroes》是 1993 年由 Treasure 開發、SEGA 世嘉作為 Mega Drive 軟體發售的遊戲。為原 Konami 科樂美動作遊戲開發團隊獨立成立 Treasure 後的處女作。雙人合作射擊遊戲，玩家可組合武器創造多樣攻擊方式，以華麗演出與高速戰鬥備受好評。
overview_jp: 『ガンスターヒーローズ』は、1993年にトレジャーが開発し、セガがメガドライブ用ソフトとして発売したゲームソフト。かつてコナミ（後のコナミデジタルエンタテインメント）でアクションゲームなどを開発していたスタッフが独立して、新会社のトレジャーを立ち上げて製作した一作目のソフトでもある。

overview_en: The heavens are being attacked by the demons of Iccus, led by a being known only as the Destroyer. The angel Wor must bring the fight to Iccus itself and put an end to the Destroyer's dark plans.
overview_zh: 《Gynoug》是 1991 年 1 月 25 日由日本 Computer System 公司的 Messiah 品牌發售的 Mega Drive 橫向捲軸射擊遊戲，海外版名為《Wings of Wor》。玩家操作天使戰士在充滿生物機械的世界中迎擊邪惡勢力。
overview_jp: 『ジノーグ』 (GYNOUG) は、1991年1月25日に日本コンピュータシステムのブランド、メサイヤから発売されたメガドライブ用横スクロールシューティングゲーム。日本国外におけるタイトルは『Wings of Wor』。

title_en: Gyuwambler Jiko Chuushinha 2 - Gekitou! Tokyo Mahjongland-hen
no_intro_name: Gyuwambler Jiko Chuushinha 2 - Gekitou! Tokyo Mahjongland-hen (Japan)

overview_en:
Hard Drivin '​ is a driving arcade game that invites players to test drive a high-powered sports car on stunt and speed courses. The game featured one of the first 3D polygon driving environments[3] via a simulator cabinet, rendered with a custom architecture.[4] The force feedback, car physics simulator, game design and most game programming were done by Max Behensky.[citation needed] According to the in-game credit screen, Hard Drivin' was designed by two teams working concurrently in the United States and Ireland.

Development began in 1988. Atari also originally intended to release the game in 1988. However, according to one of Atari's Engineer and designer, it was delayed due to the dispute from its Vice President claiming that no one would buy an arcade cabinet for $10,000 after The Last Starfighter arcade game was canceled for the same reason a few years ago earlier. After weeks of research, it was decided that $10,000 was an acceptable price point.[5] [6] [7]

Hard Drivin '​ was released in February 1989,[1][3][8] when arcade driving games were largely implemented with scaled 2D sprites, such as Pole Position and OutRun, and when filled-polygon 3D graphics of any kind were rare in games. Hard Drivin '​ is the second commercially released arcade racing game to use 3D polygons, after Winning Run.

In total, there are fifteen variations of the arcade unit. The eleven cockpit and four compact machines included various British, German and Japanese versions.

Hard Drivin' sold 3,318 video game arcade cabinets.[1] The PC games Stunt Driver and Stunts were released after Hard Drivin '​ and shared many elements with it.
overview_zh: 《Hard Drivin'》是 1989 年由 Atari 推出的美國大型電玩賽車遊戲，目前由 Midway 持有版權。標榜「Super Real Driving Simulator」，以擬真駕駛感為特色。1989 年於歐洲移植到各種家用電腦，1990 年移植 Mega Drive，1991 年移植 Atari Lynx。
overview_jp:
『ハードドライビン』 ( HARD DRIVIN' ) は、1989年にアタリから稼働されたアメリカのアーケード用ドライブゲーム（レースゲーム）である。現在はミッドウェイが権利を所有している。
「スーパーリアル・ドライビングシミュレーター」と銘打っている通り、リアルな感覚が特徴である。
1989年に欧州にて各種ホビーパソコンに移植された他、1990年にメガドライブ、1991年にAtari Lynxに移植されている。また、PlayStation 2用ソフト『ゲーセンUSA ミッドウェイアーケードトレジャーズ』（2006年）にアーケード版が収録されている。
北米および欧州においては、PlayStation 2、Xbox、ゲームキューブ用ソフト『Midway Arcade Treasures 2』（2004年）やWindows用ソフト『Midway Arcade Treasures Deluxe Edition』（2006年）にアーケード版が収録された。
メガドライブ版はゲーム誌『ファミコン通信』の「クロスレビュー」にてシルバー殿堂入りを獲得している。

overview_en: Over one million fans can't be wrong. HardBall! is the most fun, the most action-packed and the most realistic baseball simulation ever to step up to the plate. And now with 8-megabits of power, it's in a league by itself. Uncompromising arcade action: Home runs and line drives. Double plays and double steals. Baseball so real, you can almost smell the hotdogs. World Series Championship: Play the best-of-seven fall classic. Save your won-loss record after each contest. Hear the voice of a real National League umpire: 17 year veteran Eddie Montague calls 'em as he sees 'em. Fully-digitized diamond sounds: From the crack of the bat to the roar of the crowd, hear dozens of in-your-ear sounds!
overview_zh: 超過一百萬的粉絲不會出錯。硬球！是有史以來最有趣、最動態、最真實的棒球模擬遊戲。現在，它擁有 8 兆位元的運算能力，在業界獨樹一格。毫不妥協的街機動作：全壘打和直線驅動。雙打和雙搶斷。棒球如此真實，你幾乎可以聞到熱狗的味道。世界系列錦標賽：參加秋季經典賽的七局四勝制比賽。每次比賽後儲存您的勝負記錄。聆聽真正的國家聯盟裁判的聲音：17 年老將 Eddie Montague 隨心所欲地裁判。全數位化的鑽石聲音：從蝙蝠的劈啪聲到人群的吼叫聲，數十種入耳聲音！

overview_en: New features in this edition of the baseball simulation include the Home Run Derby and Pitching Practice. Multiple viewpoints and instant replays are included. 28 pitches are included, each with distinct effects. You can use real or fictitious teams, and even create your own right down to the logo and kit. Statistics such as batting average and RBIs are stored and can be printed out. Also, as in the previous game, announcer Al Michaels says things during the game.
overview_zh: 此版棒球模擬的新功能包括本壘打大賽和投球練習。包括多個視角和即時重播。包含 28 個音高，每個音高都有不同的效果。您可以使用真實或虛構的團隊，甚至可以建立自己的徽標和套件。擊球率和打點等統計資料都會被儲存並可以列印出來。此外，和上一場比賽一樣，播音員阿爾·邁克爾斯在比賽中說了一些話。

overview_en: Action-oriented baseball sim. Hardball 5 is mainly an update to Hardball 4, with the additions coming in the form of adjustable difficulty settings, sharper graphics, more comments by Al Michaels and improved league play which comes with a full set of 1994 major leaguers plus a bonus "legends" league. Includes multiplayer support for up to 2 players.
overview_zh: 動作導向棒球模擬遊戲。 Hardball 5 主要是 Hardball 4 的更新，新增內容包括可調整的難度設定、更清晰的圖形、Al Michaels 的更多評論以及改進的聯賽玩法，其中包括全套 1994 年大聯盟球員以及額外的「傳奇」聯賽。包含最多 2 名玩家的多人遊戲支援。

overview_en: The third game in the Hardball baseball series.  This revision features 256 colour VGA graphics, and announcer Al Michaels provides running commentary while you play.
overview_zh: 硬球棒球系列的第三場比賽。  此版本具有 256 色 VGA 圖形，播音員 Al Michaels 在您玩遊戲時提供即時評論。

overview_en: The ghost of a teenager seeks revenge against a snobbish family. Your job is to scare them out of their house(s). They can't see you so your only means of scaring them is by possessing various objects throughout the household. For example, possessing a piece of furniture would cause something to fly out from it and possessing an object would make it come alive in some way or another. You need to act quickly because you have something called "ecto" which acts as the fuel that allows you to roam the real world. You're awarded more ecto each time a family member exists the room. The more scares you did, the more ecto you gain. Losing all ecto sends you to the underworld where you have to regain your ecto to full capacity in order to go back into the real world.
overview_zh: 一名青少年的鬼魂尋求向勢利的家庭復仇。你的工作就是把他們嚇出家門。他們看不見你，所以你嚇唬他們的唯一方法就是在家裡擁有各種物品。例如，擁有一件傢俱會導致某些東西從其中飛出，擁有一個物體會使其以某種方式活起來。你需要迅速採取行動，因為你有一種叫做「ecto」的東西，它可以作為讓你在現實世界中漫遊的燃料。每次有家庭成員進入房間時，您都會獲得更多的 ecto 獎勵。你製造的恐懼越多，你獲得的外在就越多。失去所有的 ecto 會將你帶到地獄，在那裡你必須完全恢復你的 ecto 才能回到現實世界。

overview_en: The story is about an anthropomorphic pirate seal named Havoc (Lang in the Japanese version), his young sidekick Tide (Land in the Japanese version), a girl named Bridget, and an evil pirate named Bernardo.  Bernardo is looking for Emeralda, a gem with powers that can cause whole armies to be toppled. A map shows where Emeralda is located, and Bernardo is looking for the map. Havoc and Tide discover Bridget unconscious at a beach. When she wakes up in a dwelling, she instructs Havoc to keep her and the map safe. Havoc hides the map in a cliff. After Bernardo's henchmen kidnaps Bridget and Tide; Havoc, the playable character, sets off to rescue them.
overview_zh: 故事講述了擬人化的海盜海豹哈沃克（日版中的朗）、他的年輕夥伴泰德（日版中的蘭德）、一個名叫布里奇特的女孩和一個名叫貝爾納多的邪惡海盜的故事。  貝納多正在尋找翡翠，這是一顆具有可以摧毀整個軍隊的力量的寶石。地圖顯示了翡翠城的位置，伯納多正在尋找地圖。浩劫和泰德在海灘上發現布莉琪失去知覺。當她在住宅中醒來時，她指示浩劫確保她和地圖的安全。浩劫將地圖藏在懸崖中。貝納多的追隨者綁架了布莉琪和泰德之後；可玩角色浩劫出發去救他們。

overview_en: In this isometric football game, 51 national teams are represented to play in two game modes: Exhibition and Tournament (a series of seven games on four continents, with a final against the World All-Stars), with the ability to set time, difficulty level, see cutscenes after goals and if players are free to kick each other around without (many) fouls.
overview_zh: 在這款等距足球遊戲中，有 51 支國家隊以兩種遊戲模式進行比賽：表演賽和錦標賽（在四大洲舉行的七場比賽，決賽對陣世界全明星），可以設定時間、難度級別、檢視進球後的過場動畫以及球員是否可以在沒有（多次）犯規的情況下自由踢對方。

title_en: Heart of the Alien - Out of This World Parts I and II
no_intro_name: Heart of the Alien - Out of This World Parts I and II (USA) (RE)

title_en: Heavenly Symphony: Formula One World Championship 1993
title_jp: ヘブンリー シンフォニー フォーミュラーワン ワールド チャンピオンシップ 1993
overview_en:
F1 is an Official Formula One Racing Game. There are two modes of play available: "Arcade", "Grand Prix". In both of these modes you complete a certain number of laps (4, 8, or 12) and select which circuit that you want to race on. The circuits include San Marino, France, Britain, Germany, Italy, Portugal, Japan, and Australia. Some circuits are easy, while some are difficult. 

There are slight differences between the two modes. For instance, "Arcade" allows you to select the circuit in any order that you like, whereas "Grand Prix" only allows you to fine-tune your car before starting a race. You also need to race a circuit in the order that they appear on the circuit selection screen, but you can skip a track if you want.
overview_zh:
F1 是官方一級方程式賽車遊戲。有兩種遊戲模式可供選擇：「街機」、「大獎賽」。在這兩種模式下，您都完成一定圈數（4、8 或 12），然後選擇您想要比賽的賽道。賽道包括聖馬利諾、法國、英國、德國、義大利、葡萄牙、日本和澳洲。有些電路很簡單，有些則很困難。 

兩種模式之間存在細微差別。例如，“街機”允許您按照自己喜歡的任何順序選擇賽道，而“大獎賽”只允許您在比賽開始前微調您的賽車。您還需要按照賽道選擇畫面上顯示的順序參加賽道比賽，但如果您願意，您可以跳過賽道。

title_en: Heavenly Symphony - Formula One World Championship 1993
no_intro_name: Heavenly Symphony - Formula One World Championship 1993 (Japan)

overview_en:
You are taking on the simulated proving grounds, which are split into two styles of alternating action. In the first you must progress (initially purely horizontally, though later with vertical flick-scrolling as well) through a hostile environment of enemies, bombs and traps, gaining points for doing it quickly and with lots of energy left. Initially you can fly and kick as needed.

Once this section is complete, you move on to one-on-one combat of the Street Fighter 2 style. The early foes have far less energy than you begin with. As you progress through the game, you are awarded extra attacking moves, in a manner similar to Brutal: Paws of Fury
overview_zh:
您將進入模擬試驗場，該試驗場分為兩種風格的交替動作。在第一個遊戲中，你必須在充滿敵人、炸彈和陷阱的敵對環境中前進（最初是純粹水平的，但後來也有垂直輕彈滾動），透過快速完成任務並留下大量能量來獲得積分。最初，您可以根據需要飛行和踢。

完成此部分後，您將繼續進行《街頭霸王 2》風格的一對一戰鬥。早期敵人的能量比你開始時少得多。 As you progress through the game, you are awarded extra attacking moves, in a manner similar to Brutal: Paws of Fury

overview_en:
You are taking on the simulated proving grounds, which are split into two styles of alternating action. In the first you must progress (initially purely horizontally, though later with vertical flick-scrolling as well) through a hostile environment of enemies, bombs and traps, gaining points for doing it quickly and with lots of energy left. Initially you can fly and kick as needed.

Once this section is complete, you move on to one-on-one combat of the Street Fighter 2 style. The early foes have far less energy than you begin with. As you progress through the game, you are awarded extra attacking moves, in a manner similar to Brutal: Paws of Fury
overview_zh:
您將進入模擬試驗場，該試驗場分為兩種風格的交替動作。在第一個遊戲中，你必須在充滿敵人、炸彈和陷阱的敵對環境中前進（最初是純粹水平的，但後來也有垂直輕彈滾動），透過快速完成任務並留下大量能量來獲得積分。最初，您可以根據需要飛行和踢。

完成此部分後，您將繼續進行《街頭霸王 2》風格的一對一戰鬥。早期敵人的能量比你開始時少得多。當你在遊戲中取得進展時，你會獲得額外的攻擊動作，類似《殘酷：憤怒之爪》

title_jp: ヘビーユニットメガドライブスペシャル
overview_en: Heavy Unit: Mega Drive Special (ヘビーユニット メガドライブスペシャル) is a 1990 Sega Mega Drive shoot-'em-up developed by Kaneko and published by Toho exclusively in Japan. It is a port of Kaneko's 1988 arcade shoot-'em-up Heavy Unit. Humans have developed an artificial planet, "Le Tau," which is being attacked by aliens, and only the Heavy Unit transforming ship can stop them. A and C shoot; rapidfire is an option. B drops a bomb, which you have an unlimited supply of but must collect as a powerup. Among the various powerups is one, labeled T, that transforms your ship into a mecha and back, which plays identically, except its bombs will home in on enemies.
overview_zh: 《重型單位：Mega Drive Special》（ヘビーユnitto メガドライブスペシャル）是一款 1990 年世嘉 Mega Drive 射擊遊戲，由 Kaneko 開發，由 Toho 在日本獨家發行。它是 Kaneko 1988 年推出的街機射擊重型單位的移植版。人類開發了一顆人造星球“Le Tau”，它正在遭受外星人的攻擊，只有重型單位改造船才能阻止他們。 A和C拍攝；快速射擊是一種選擇。 B 掉落了一顆炸彈，您可以無限供應該炸彈，但必須將其收集起來作為道具。在各種能力提升中，有一個標記為“T”，可以將你的飛船變成機甲並變回來，其玩法相同，只是它的炸彈會瞄準敵人。

overview_en: Hei Tao 2: Super Big 2 (黑桃2) is an unlicensed game for the Sega Mega Drive made by Chuanpu in some unknown year and (most likely) published in Taiwan by King Tec Information Co., Ltd.. The game is an implementation of the card game Big 2. You can play as one of eight characters.
overview_zh: 黑桃2：超級大2（黑桃2）是一款未經授權的Sega Mega Drive遊戲，由Chuanpu在某個未知的年份製作，（很可能）由King Tec Information Co., Ltd.在臺灣發行。該遊戲是卡片遊戲Big 2的實現。您可以扮演八個角色之一。

overview_en:
Our galaxy is being devoured by a dark force - the Super Mech!

A thousand-year peace is shattered by the Black Nebula’s forces as they begin to attack the Sister Star System under control by the Galactic Federation. Led by the Super Mech, the Black Nebula seized the opportunity to take out the Federation’s weapons power unit, rendering their
defenses helpless.

With all hope lost, a long Federation ship dives headlong into the enemy. Captain Lancer piloting the CNCS1 Sylphide utilizing it’s hidden weapon - the Hellfire! A full frontal attack will be pointless, but a lone ship might be the surprise attack the Galactic Federation needs to win.

Shoot your way through 6 massive stages using the unique weapons aboard the Sylphide. Fire your weapons using 4 different modes as you fight your way into the Super Mech’s fleet using plasma shots, missiles, and lasers.

Features:
-Hellfire Translucent Zircon Cartridge
-Vivid & Detailed Instruction Booklet filled with tips, tricks, original artwork and everything you need to beat the bosses - the skills are up to you!
-Reversible cartridge cover with both PAL/NTSC embellished artwork so you choose the way you display
-Collector’s Embossed Slipcover with colorful and custom design to truly stand out in your collection
-Special interview with developer Masahiro Yuge - with insights on the making of Hellfire, influences behind the music and challenges faced in the creation of this side-scrolling classic - exclusively for Retro-Bit fans!
-Commemorative Art card specially designed for the release
-Full-Color, Individually Numbered Certificate of Authenticity - because each collector’s cart is one-of-a-kind
-Exclusive Vintage 80’s Puffy Sticker Set to proudly proclaim your retro gaming love on any surface
overview_zh: 《Hellfire》是東亞 Plan 公司首部橫向捲軸射擊遊戲，1989 年作為大型電玩推出。玩家駕駛可切換 4 方向射擊的戰機與外星敵軍戰鬥。
overview_jp:
立沢直也による日本の漫画作品。
落ち物パズルゲーム『ぷよぷよ』での積み方の名前。へるふぁいやー（魔法）。 2連鎖目をマルチにして、相手に発火する時間を与えないようにする。
東亜プランが制作したシューティングゲーム。本稿で解説する。

『ヘルファイアー』 (HELLFIRE) は、東亜プラン初の横スクロールシューティングゲーム。1989年にアーケードゲームとして稼働された。

title_jp: ヘルツォーク・ツヴァイ
overview_en: Herzog Zwei is a 1989 real-time strategy game is that puts two commanders against each other on a wide variety of maps and environments. Each player controls a Mech that can transform from a fighter jet to a walking bi-pedal robot.
overview_zh: 《Herzog Zwei》是 Technosoft 開發、1989 年底發售的即時模擬遊戲（即時戰略），Mega Drive 專用作品。玩家駕駛可變形戰機指揮部隊攻佔敵方基地，被視為即時戰略遊戲（RTS）的開創性作品之一。後於 2020 年 8 月 27 日由 SEGA 世嘉以 SEGA AGES 系列在 Nintendo Switch 上重新配信。
overview_jp:
『ヘルツォーク・ツヴァイ』（Herzog Zwei）は、テクノソフトが開発し1989年末に発売したリアルタイム・シミュレーションゲーム（リアルタイムストラテジー）。メガドライブ専用。
後にセガからNintendo Switchに展開されているSEGA AGESシリーズのひとつとして2020年8月27日に配信開始された。本項はこの移植版（以下：Switch版）についても解説する。

overview_en:
SET SAIL INTO A SWASHBUCKLING ADVENTURE ACROSS THE SEVEN SEAS

Ahoy, lads and ladies! Plunge ye'selves into action on a high seas adventure to rescue yer maties and uncover the treasure every buccaneer is after!

As young Capt'n Havoc, ye must conquer Bernard the Brutal and his plundering pirates. These scoundrels are after the secret map leading to Emeralda, the legendary magic emerald - if they find it first, no ship shall sail the ocean safely! The wind carries tales that Bernard has yer maties and plans to make them walk the plank into shark infested waters.
Ye better be swift as the stingray and slippery as an eel if you dare try to save them!

Comical capers and death-defying perils await you on a whale of an adventure that spans 'cross land, ship and the ocean blue!

-Discover Thirteen Challenging Levels
-A Treasure Trove of Rollicking Surprise
-Classic Cartoon Animation and Sidesplitting Humor
overview_zh:
揚帆起航，踏上橫跨七大洋的虛張聲勢的冒險之旅

嘿，小夥子們、女士們！投身於公海冒險中，拯救你的夥伴，並發現每個海盜都在尋找的寶藏！

作為年輕的浩劫船長，你必須征服野蠻的伯納德和他的掠奪海盜。這些惡棍正在尋找通往翡翠（傳說中的魔法翡翠）的秘密地圖 - 如果他們先找到它，任何船隻都無法安全航行在海洋上！風中傳來伯納德和你的夥伴們的故事，並計畫讓他們走上木板進入鯊魚出沒的水域。
如果你敢嘗試拯救他們，最好像黃貂魚一樣敏捷，像鰻魚一樣滑溜！

滑稽的跳躍和生死攸關的危險等待著您，踏上鯨魚的冒險之旅，跨越陸地、船舶和藍色海洋！

- 探索十三個具有挑戰性的關卡
- 歡樂驚喜的寶庫
-經典的卡通動畫和分裂的幽默

title_en: Hit the Ice - VHL - The Official Video Hockey League
no_intro_name: Hit the Ice - VHL - The Official Video Hockey League (USA)

title_en: Hokuto no Ken: Shin Seikimatsu Kyuuseishu Densetsu
title_jp: 北斗の拳 新世紀末救世主伝説
no_intro_name: Hokuto no Ken - Shin Seikimatsu Kyuuseishu Densetsu (Japan)
overview_en: Last Battle, known as Hokuto no Ken: Shin Seikimatsu Kyuuseishu Densetsu (北斗の拳 新世紀末救世主伝説) in Japan, is an action game developed by Sega for the Sega Mega Drive. As the Japanese name suggests, it was originally intended to be paired with the Japanese manga series, Hokuto no Ken, but the graphics were altered for a western release. In fact, it is a sequel to Hokuto no Ken, which was given the same treatment and sold as Black Belt overseas. It was a launch title for the console in North America.
overview_zh: Last Battle，在日本被稱為北斗の拳：新世紀末救世主伝説，是一款由世嘉為世嘉Mega Drive開發的動作遊戲。正如日本名字所暗示的那樣，它最初是為了與日本漫畫系列《北斗神拳》搭配使用，但為了在西方發行，圖形發生了變化。事實上，它是《北斗神拳》的續作，在海外也得到了同樣的待遇，並以黑帶的身份出售。這是該遊戲機在北美的首發遊戲。

overview_en: As young Kevin McCallister, you have mistakenly been left home alone this Christmas by your family. The big problem here is that a couple of bumbling burglars have set their sights on the McCallister belongings as their ultimate heist. You're the only thing that stands in their way and they're not about to negotiate. Scramble through the house, basement and tree fort while setting incredible traps for the unwanted intruders! Bounce chandeliers and irons off their noggins in an attempt to gain valuable time for yourself as the police race to your rescue. Can you keep out of Marv and Harry's clutches and protect your family's treasures? Find out in this hilarious adaptation of the classic comedy hit of the year!
overview_zh: 作為年輕的凱文麥卡利斯特，今年聖誕節你被家人錯誤地獨自留在家裡。這裡的大問題是，幾個笨手笨腳的竊賊將麥卡利斯特的財物作為他們的終極搶劫目標。你是唯一阻礙他們的事情，他們不打算談判。爬過房子、地下室和樹堡，同時為不受歡迎的入侵者設定令人難以置信的陷阱！當警察競相營救時，彈起吊燈並熨燙腦袋，為自己贏得寶貴的時間。你能擺脫馬夫和哈利的魔掌並保護你家族的寶藏嗎？在這部根據年度熱門經典喜劇改編的搞笑電影中尋找答案！

title_en: Home Alone 2 - Lost in New York
no_intro_name: Home Alone 2 - Lost in New York (USA) (1993-09-29) (Sega Channel)
overview_en:
The McCallister family is off to Miami for a Christmas vacation in the sun. The son, Kevin, ends up on the wrong plane and winds up in New York City all by himself. The two-man bandit team he helped catch in the first film also just so happen to be there, and are out for revenge.

Home Alone 2 is an action platform game based loosely on the 1992 film of the same title. Starting in the airport, the player controls Kevin as he runs around New York, visiting locations similar to those in the film, and outwitting the bandits Harry and Marv, who turn up to harass him at almost every turn. Kevin has a variety of kid-friendly weaponry handy to take on his enemies, including baseballs, footballs, and slingshots.
overview_zh:
The McCallister family is off to Miami for a Christmas vacation in the sun. The son, Kevin, ends up on the wrong plane and winds up in New York City all by himself. The two-man bandit team he helped catch in the first filmatch in the f.

Home Alone 2 is an action platform game based loosely on the 1992 film of the same title.從機場開始，玩家控制凱文在紐約各地奔跑，訪問與電影中類似的地點，並智取強盜哈利和馬夫，他們幾乎每次都會出現騷擾他。 Kevin has a variety of kid-friendly weaponry handy to take on his enemies, including baseballs, footballs, and slingshots.

title_jp: 炎の闘球児ドッジ弾平

overview_en: Your blood is pumping and a chill races down your spine! You've finally come face-to-face with the most infamous pirate of them all, Captain Hook, the fiend who's kidnapped your children and sworn never to let them go. As Peter Pan, this is the fight of your life. Everything that came before - your duel with Rufio, your battles against the pirates, even your soaring flights high above Neverland - are nothing compared to this moment. Eleven levels of incredible excitement. Multiple destinations: forests, caves, caverns, towns, lagoons, icy regions, and the Nevertree. Magical items that will give you strength and special powers: apples, leaves, and pixie dust.
overview_zh: 你的血液在跳動，一股寒意順著你的脊椎爬上來！你終於與最臭名昭著的海盜虎克船長面對面了，他是綁架了你的孩子並發誓永遠不會放走他們的惡魔。身為彼得潘，這是你一生的戰鬥。之前發生的一切——你與魯菲奧的決鬥，你與海盜的戰鬥，甚至你在夢幻島上空的翱翔——與這一刻相比都算不了什麼。十一個令人難以置信的興奮等級。多個目的地：森林、洞穴、洞穴、城鎮、潟湖、冰冷地區和永不樹。可以給你力量和特殊能力的神奇物品：蘋果、樹葉和仙塵。

overview_en: Your blood is pumping and a chill races down your spine! You've finally come face-to-face with the most infamous pirate of them all, Captain Hook, the fiend who's kidnapped your children and sworn never to let them go. As Peter Pan, this is the fight of your life. Everything that came before - your duel with Rufio, your battles against the pirates, even your soaring flights high above Neverland - are nothing compared to this moment. Eleven levels of incredible excitement. Multiple destinations: forests, caves, caverns, towns, lagoons, icy regions, and the Nevertree. Magical items that will give you strength and special powers: apples, leaves, and pixie dust.
overview_zh: 你的血液在跳動，一股寒意順著你的脊椎爬上來！你終於與最臭名昭著的海盜虎克船長面對面了，他是綁架了你的孩子並發誓永遠不會放走他們的惡魔。身為彼得潘，這是你一生的戰鬥。之前發生的一切——你與魯菲奧的決鬥，你與海盜的戰鬥，甚至你在夢幻島上空的翱翔——與這一刻相比都算不了什麼。十一個令人難以置信的興奮等級。多個目的地：森林、洞穴、洞穴、城鎮、潟湖、冰冷地區和永不樹。可以給你力量和特殊能力的神奇物品：蘋果、樹葉和仙塵。

overview_en:
Hua Mu Lan: Mulan is an unlicensed action game by some unknown developer for the Sega Mega Drive made some unknown year. It is based on either the Chinese legend of Hua Mulan or the 1998 Disney film of the same name — which it steals art from, giving us a potential earliest release date. Some of its music is stolen from another unlicensed game, Chuanpu's 1996 Ya Se Chuan Shuo; whether or not the rest is also stolen has yet to be determined.

Interestingly enough, the game has a story screen... in Chinese, English, Spanish, Portugese, and Arabic. The stories appear to be identical: during the Tang Dynasty, the Hun warlord Tan-Yu led his soldiers to seize the dynasty, and Tang conscripts all men to fight the oncoming forces. Hua Mulan, not wanting to see her old father fight, goes in to fight for him.

The game is a typical platformer. B attacks and C jumps.
overview_zh:
《花木蘭》：《花木蘭》是一款未經許可的動作遊戲，由某位不知名的開發商為 Sega Mega Drive 製作，製作年份不詳。它改編自中國的花木蘭傳說或 1998 年的迪士尼同名電影——它藉鑒了該電影的藝術風格，給了我們一個可能的最早上映日期。它的一些音樂是從另一款未經授權的遊戲《川譜》1996 年的《亞色傳說》中盜用的；其餘部分是否也被盜還有待確定。

有趣的是，遊戲有一個故事畫面…有中文、英文、西班牙文、葡萄牙語和阿拉伯語。故事看似相同：唐朝時，匈奴軍閥譚玉率兵奪取政權，唐徵召全民迎戰。花木蘭不想看到老父親打架，就進去替他打架。

該遊戲是一款典型的平臺遊戲。 B攻擊，C跳躍。

title_en: Huan Le Tao Qi Shu - Smart Mouse
no_intro_name: Huan Le Tao Qi Shu - Smart Mouse (China) (Unl)
overview_en:
Huan Le Tao Qi Shu: Smart Mouse (歡樂淘氣鼠) is a Sega Mega Drive game developed by several Taiwanese developers in some unknown year. While the name of the dev team is never given, there is a staff list — much of the staff come from Chuanpu, but there's no confirmation this was one of their products. Some of the music is also stolen from Wonder Boy III: Monster Lair, whose sound driver the game uses.

The game itself is a basic Pengo clone — the goal is to destroy all the enemies in the stage without getting hit. A pushes a block.
overview_zh:
歡樂淘氣鼠是幾位臺灣開發商於某年開發的Sega Mega Drive遊戲。雖然開發團隊的名字從未被透露，但有一份員工名單——大部分員工來自川普，但沒有確認這是他們的產品之一。部分音樂也來自《Wonder Boy III：Monster Lair》，遊戲使用的是其聲音驅動程式。

遊戲本身是一個基本的 Pengo 克隆——目標是消滅舞臺上的所有敵人而不被擊中。 A推動一個方塊。

overview_en:
Hurricanes is a 1994 platformer for various systems, including the Sega Mega Drive and Sega Game Gear, by U.S. Gold based on DiC's Hurricanes cartoon. The MD and GG versions were only released in Europe (a SNES port developed by Probe was released in the US). Each version has different levels.

Instead of being a soccer simulator, the game is a platformer similar to Marko's Magic Football: you play as one of the players on the fictional Hurricanes football team as they use their football to destroy enemies through various platforming levels.
overview_zh:
《颶風》是一款 1994 年推出的平臺遊戲，適用於多種系統，包括 Sega Mega Drive 和 Sega Game Gear，由 U.S. Gold 製作，基於 DiC 的《颶風》卡通片。 MD和GG版本僅在歐洲發布（Probe開發的SNES移植版在美國發布）。每個版本都有不同的等級。

遊戲不是足球模擬器，而是一款類似馬科魔法足球的平臺遊戲：您扮演虛構的颶風橄欖球隊的球員之一，他們用足球透過各種平臺關卡消滅敵人。

title_jp: ハイブリッド・フロント
overview_zh: 《The Hybrid Front》是 1994 年 7 月 22 日由日本 SEGA 世嘉發售的 Mega Drive 戰略模擬遊戲。以現代世界延伸的 26 世紀中葉為舞台，全 26 關構成，關卡之間插入小說風格文字推展劇情。SF 小說家野田昌宏監修舞台設定，角色設計由插畫家末彌純擔任。2007 年於 Wii Virtual Console 配信，後於 2019 年收錄於 Mega Drive Mini 日本版。
overview_jp:
『ハイブリッド・フロント』 (THE HYBRID FRONT) は、1994年7月22日に日本のセガから発売されたメガドライブ用戦略シミュレーションゲーム。
現代世界の延長線上にある、26世紀中盤の世界を舞台とした戦術シミュレーションゲーム。全26ステージ構成。ステージ間に挿入される小説調のテキストによってストーリーは展開される。
開発はセガおよびオニロ、HICが行い、舞台設定の監修はSF小説家の野田昌宏監修が務めた。
キャラクター・デザインはイラストレーターの末弥純、企画原案はメガドライブ用ソフト『リドルワイアード』（1991年）を手掛けた角田純悦。音楽はメガドライブ用ソフト『ゴールデンアックスIII』（1993年）を手掛けた幡谷尚史、およびメガドライブ用ソフト『アウトランナーズ』（1994年）を手掛けた白津順子が担当している。
2007年にWii用ソフトとしてバーチャルコンソール (VC) にて配信されたが、汎用的な他ゲーム機種への移植事例が無く、VC版も2019年1月31日をもってサービス自体が終了したが、同年9月19日にセガが世界同時発売した復刻系ゲーム機・メガドライブ ミニの日本版に収録された。

title_jp: ひょっこりひょうたん島
ハイパーダンク ザ・プレイオフエディション

overview_en:
Hyper Marbles is an action game for the Sega Mega Drive, released exclusively in Japan via the Sega Game Toshokan service.

The object of Hyper Marbles is to knock all of your opponents into the electrical fences at the sides of the stage, while making sure you aren't knocked in yourself. A, B and C boosts.
overview_zh:
《Hyper Marbles》是一款適用於 Sega Mega Drive 的動作遊戲，透過 Sega Game Toshokan 服務在日本獨家發行。

超級彈珠的目標是將所有對手撞到舞臺兩側的電子圍欄中，同時確保自己不會被撞到。 A、B、C 增強。

title_en: I Love Mickey and Donald: Fushigi na Magic Box
title_jp: アイラブミッキー＆ドナルドふしぎなマジックボックス
no_intro_name: I Love Mickey and Donald - Fushigi na Magic Box (Japan) (Rev 1)

title_en: I Love Mickey Mouse: Fushigi no Oshiro Daibouken
title_jp: アイラブミッキーマウス ふしぎのお城大冒険
no_intro_name: I Love Mickey Mouse - Fushigi no Oshiro Daibouken (Japan)
overview_zh: 《I Love Mickey Mouse 不思議的城堡大冒險》（英文名：Castle of Illusion Starring Mickey Mouse）是 SEGA 世嘉開發、1990 年發售的 Mega Drive 橫向捲軸動作遊戲。米奇為救出被女巫 Mizrabel 綁架的米妮而踏上夢幻城堡冒險。
overview_jp: 『アイラブミッキーマウス ふしぎのお城大冒険』（アイラブミッキーマウス ふしぎのおしろだいぼうけん、英題：Castle of Illusion Starring Mickey Mouse）は、セガが開発し1990年に発売されたメガドライブ用横スクロールアクションゲームである。

title_en: Ikasuze! Koi no Doki Doki Penguin Land MD
no_intro_name: Ikasuze! Koi no Doki Doki Penguin Land MD (Japan) (Game no Kanzume Otokuyou)
overview_en:
Ikazuse! Koi no Doki Doki Penguin Land MD (イカスぜ！恋のどきどきペンギンランドＭＤ) — called just Doki Doki Penguin Land (どきどきペンギンランド) on Sega's archive — is a Sega Mega Drive game released only in Japan as part of the Sega Game Toshokan service. It is an update to the previous games in the series, Doki Doki Penguin Land and Penguin Land, and features the same basic gameplay of having to guide an egg to the bottom of the screen.

The game is very loud and screechy compared to other Mega Drive titles when run through many emulators as it was initially assumed some of this sound would be filtered by the time it left the television speakers. In Kega Fusion, it can be partially fixed by checking the "Filter" option (Ctrl + F11).
overview_zh:
伊一瀨！ 《Koi no Doki Doki Penguin Land MD》（イカsuぜ！戀のどきどきペンギンランドＭＤ）－世嘉存檔中的名稱為「Dokio Penguinin Land」（どきどきペンギンランド）－是一款僅在日本發行的 Sega Mega Drive 遊戲，作為 Sega Game 的一部分東照館服務。它是該系列前作《Doki Doki Penguin Land》和《Penguin Land》的更新，具有相同的基本遊戲玩法，即必須將雞蛋引導到螢幕底部。

當透過許多模擬器執行時，與其他 Mega Drive 遊戲相比，該遊戲的聲音非常響亮且刺耳，因為最初假設其中一些聲音在離開電視揚聲器時會被過濾掉。在 Kega Fusion 中，可以透過勾選「過濾器」選項（Ctrl + F11）來部分修復問題。

overview_en:
Licensed by the International Management Group (IMG), this rare Electronic Arts venture into Tennis features 32 professional players (all male and licensed by the IMG) including Bjorn Borg, Marcelo Rios, Patrick Rafter and Yevgeni Kafelnikov in 15 tournaments with different surfaces. Game modes include exhibition, tour and tournament for both singles and doubles.
Along the usual offering of lobs, volleys, passing shots, top spins and slashes, the player can leave player movement to the console, and just focus on hitting the ball with the right shot with the correct timing (the player can also set the playing style, from all-court, baseline, or rush net). For those needing a boost of confidence before entering competitive play, Vic Braden, one of the most well known tennis coaches, has a court with special lines, a ball machine and some hints to help them improve their play.

UPC / Barcode: 014633072181
overview_zh:
經國際管理集團 (IMG) 授權，Electronic Arts 進軍網球領域的罕見專案吸引了 32 名職業選手（全部為男性，並獲得 IMG 授權），其中包括 Bjorn Borg、Marcelo Rios、Patrick Rafter 和 Yevgeni Kafelnikov，參加 15 場不同場地的比賽。比賽模式包括單打和雙打的表演賽、巡迴賽和錦標賽。
除了通常提供的高球、截擊、傳球、上旋和斜線之外，玩家還可以將自己的動作交給控制檯，只需要專注於在正確的時機用正確的擊球擊球（玩家還可以設定比賽風格，從全場、底線或衝網）。對於那些在參加比賽之前需要增強信心的人，最著名的網球教練之一維克·佈雷登 (Vic Braden) 提供了一個帶有特殊線路的球場、一臺發球機以及一些幫助他們提高比賽水平的提示。

UPC/條碼：014633072181

title_en: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
no_intro_name: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade (Europe)
overview_en: Germany, 1983. Hitler craves his first conquest: Stealing the sacred Holy Grail. It's up to you to get it first--if you can find it. Explore five treacherous levels in a fierce race against time, numerous enemies, rats and ancient puzzles. Even worse: Jones, Sr. is in evil hands. Be fast, smart and steady, and you might have a chance. Blow it...mankind is doomed!
overview_zh: 德國，1983 年。希特勒渴望他的第一個征服：竊取神聖的聖杯。如果你能找到的話，你就可以先得到它。在與時間、無數敵人、老鼠和古老謎題的激烈賽跑中探索五個危險的關卡。更糟的是：老瓊斯落入邪惡手中。快、聰明、穩，你就有機會。搞砸了……人類就完蛋了！

overview_en: They're gonna bug ya... to DEATH! Compared to these guys, killer bees are about as scary as a butterfly. In this awesome insect Empire you've got to be a fast gun! No can of bug spray will help you here. These giant mechanized insects mean business. Become too enthralled with the beautiful landscape and your daydreams could become a nightmare! Become... Insector X! A moment's delay could be your last!!
overview_zh: 他們會煩死你的！與這些傢伙相比，殺人蜂就和蝴蝶一樣可怕。在這個令人敬畏的昆蟲帝國中，你必須成為一名快槍手！任何一罐殺蟲劑都幫不了你。這些巨型機械化昆蟲意義重大。如果過於沉迷於美麗的風景，您的白日夢可能會變成噩夢！成為...昆蟲X！片刻的耽擱可能是你的最後一刻！

title_en: Instruments of Chaos Starring Young Indiana Jones
no_intro_name: Instruments of Chaos Starring Young Indiana Jones (USA)
overview_en:
Germany is growing its war machine to overtake the world. To reach this goal quickly, their evil leaders sent spies around the world with instructions to buy the finest military weapon technologies. The player is young Indiana Jones and he is informed by agent Rolf that friendly French agents know about such tasks and the countries the spies will visit. The spies need to be stopped in each country before the technology sale takes place.

The mission takes young Indy to India, Tibet, Egypt, and England before come finally arriving in Germany. In 2d side-scrolling levels Indy uses his whip, revolver, grenades, and ability to walk/jumpto progress through the levels with small puzzle elements. Enemies can be attacked or avoided and actions can be performed in eight directions. There are different mini-goals such as whipping key stones to open the door to the temple from Indian marketplace, or bombing a bridge gearbox.
overview_zh:
德國正在發展其戰爭機器以超越世界。為了迅速實現這一目標，他們的邪惡領導人向世界各地派遣了間諜，並指示他們購買最好的軍事武器技術。這名球員是年輕的印第安納瓊斯，特工羅爾夫告訴他，友好的法國特工知道此類任務以及間諜將訪問的國家。在進行技術銷售之前，需要在每個國家阻止間諜活動。

這次任務將年輕的印地帶到了印度、西藏、埃及和英國，然後最終抵達德國。在二維橫向捲軸關卡中，印地使用他的鞭子、左輪手槍、手榴彈以及行走/跳躍的能力來透過帶有小謎題元素的關卡。可以攻擊或躲避敵人，並且可以在八個方向上執行行動。有不同的小目標，例如從印度市場鞭打鑰匙石以開啟寺廟的大門，或轟炸橋樑變速箱。

overview_en: International Rugby is a 1993 rugby game for the Sega Mega Drive by Tiertex and Domark released exclusively in Europe.
overview_zh: International Rugby 是 Tiertex 和 Domark 於 1993 年在歐洲獨家發行的 Sega Mega Drive 橄欖球遊戲。

title_en: 國際足盟大賽 International Soccer
title_jp: ＦＩＦＡ インターナショナルサッカー
title_zh: 國際足盟大賽 世界盃足球
overview_en:
Based on international teams (with fictional player names), their abilities in each skill area rated out of 10 to give the player an overall impression of how good they are. The options available follow the standard set: fouls and offsides can be toggled on and off, the match length can be set, and if the timer operates continuously, or only while the ball is in play. Gameplay privileges quick runs, short passes and blistering shots outside the penalty box, and set pieces are controlled by moving a box into the target area for the ball, and then passed, lobbed or kicked directly. On the tactical side, formations can be selected, with 5 different strategies also available (although not all of these combinations make sense) as can the team Coverage - the areas which defenders, midfielders and strikers cover.

UPC / Barcode: 014633072556
overview_zh:
基於國際球隊（具有虛構的球員名字），他們在每個技能領域的能力評分為 10 分，以便讓球員對他們的整體印像有多麼好。可用選項遵循標準設定：可以開啟和關閉犯規和越位，可以設定比賽長度，以及計時器是否連續執行，或僅在比賽進行時執行。遊戲玩法以快速跑動、短傳和禁區外的猛烈射門為特色，定位球是透過將一個盒子移動到目標區域來控制球，然後直接傳球、吊球或踢球。在戰術方面，可以選擇陣型，還可以選擇 5 種不同的策略（儘管並非所有這些組合都有意義），也可以選擇球隊覆蓋範圍 - 後衛、中場和前鋒覆蓋的區域。

UPC/條碼：014633072556

overview_en: International Superstar Soccer Deluxe is a football game for the Sega Mega Drive.
overview_zh: 《International Superstar Soccer Deluxe》是世嘉 Mega Drive 的足球遊戲。

overview_en: Ishido is a solitaire board game played with tiles, similar to Shanghai. The objective is to place all of the tiles onto the board and obtain the highest possible score by following specific rules of play. There are ways to play that can dramatically increase the score, which makes the game very strategic in nature. Additionally, when desired, the player can get an oracle reading by asking a question, which is answered when the player makes a very elegant play (four-way match).
overview_zh: 石戶是一種用麻將牌玩的紙牌棋盤遊戲，類似上海。目標是將所有棋子放到棋盤上，並按照特定的遊戲規則獲得盡可能高的分數。有多種玩法可以顯著提高分數，這使得遊戲本質上非常具有策略性。此外，當需要時，玩家可以透過提出問題來獲得神諭解讀，當玩家進行非常優雅的比賽（四路比賽）時，就會得到答案。

title_jp: いしいひさいちの大政界
overview_zh: 《石井壽一的大政界》是 1990 年發表、由石井壽一以政治經濟為題材的四格漫畫。1991 年改編 OVA 動畫，1994 年於 Mega CD 推出電子遊戲版。創作當時日本主要政治家以肖像畫登場，描寫昭和末期至平成初期，從 Recruit 事件、引進消費稅後第 15 屆參議院普選自民黨慘敗、海部內閣到宮澤內閣的時期。
overview_jp:
『いしいひさいちの大政界』（いしいひさいちのだいせいかい）は、1990年に発表された政治、経済をテーマにしたいしいひさいちの4コマ漫画である。1991年にはOVAでアニメ化、1994年にはメガCDでコンピュータゲーム化された。
執筆当時の日本の主な政治家が似顔絵で登場する。舞台は昭和末期から平成初期、リクルート事件や消費税導入の影響で第15回参議院議員通常選挙で自由民主党が惨敗し、参議院で野党が過半数を占め、海部内閣が発足してから宮澤内閣に至る時期が主に描かれている。

title_en: Izzy's Quest for the Olympic Rings
no_intro_name: Izzy's Quest for the Olympic Rings (USA)
overview_en:
Izzy's Quest for the Olympic Rings is the official game of the mascot of the 1996 Olympic Games in Atlanta. As the name suggests, Izzy must find the five Olympic rings, hidden by the guardians so that Izzy does not take them to his world.

The game plays a lot like Mario games; to eliminate an opponent Izzy must jump over his head. There are two jumps available, the ball jump suitable for height and the hurdle jump, suitable for distance. Both allow Izzy to clear an enemy, but the second harms him.If Izzy is hit, then he must find three medals, or at the next hit he loses a life. There are some extra objects, like Olympic torches, and eggs that hatch either objects for bonus points, trampolines or morph points to reach otherwise inaccessible areas or traps. Izzy can also morph into a glider, a baseball player, an archer or a rocket, among others, to overcome some sections of the levels.
overview_zh:
《Izzy's Quest for the Olympic 五環》是 1996 年亞特蘭大奧運吉祥物的官方遊戲。顧名思義，伊茲必須找到守護者隱藏的五環奧運五環，這樣伊茲就不會把它們帶到他的世界。

該遊戲的玩法很像馬裡奧遊戲；為了消滅對手，伊茲必須跳過他的頭。有兩種跳躍可供選擇，適合高度的球跳和適合距離的跨欄跳。兩者都允許伊茲清除敵人，但第二個會傷害他。如果伊茲被擊中，那麼他必須找到三枚獎牌，否則在下一次擊中時他會失去生命。還有一些額外的物體，例如奧運火炬，以及孵化物體以獲得獎勵積分、彈跳床或變形點的雞蛋，以到達其他無法到達的區域或陷阱。 Izzy 還可以變身為滑翔機、棒球運動員、弓箭手或火箭等，以克服關卡的某些部分。

title_jp: Ｊリーグチャンピオンサッカー
maker_jp: 小學館プロ／ ゲームアーツ
overview_en: J. League Champion Soccer (Ｊリーグチャンピオンサッカー) is a football game developed by Krisalis Software and published by Shogakukan Production/Game Arts for the Sega Mega Drive in 1993. It is a re-worked and stripped-down version of European Club Soccer intended for Japanese audiences.
overview_zh: J. League Champion Soccer（JR グチャンピオンサッカー）是一款由 Krisalis Software 開發並由 Shogakukan Production/Game Arts 於 1993 年為 Sega Mega Drive 發行的足球遊戲。它是日本受眾的歐洲俱樂部足球的重新設計和精簡版本。

title_jp: Ｊリーグプロストライカー
overview_en: J. League Pro Striker (Ｊリーグプロストライカー) is a 1993 football game for the Sega Mega Drive by Sega. It was the first in a long line of J. League games developed by Sega after acquiring the license to the franchise for their consoles (but it was not the first J. League game on a Sega system — Game Arts's J. League Champion Soccer, released a few months earlier on the MD, was).
overview_zh: J. League Pro Striker（JR グプロストライカー）是一款 1993 年由 Sega 為 Sega Mega Drive 打造的足球遊戲。這是世嘉在獲得其遊戲機特許經營權後開發的一系列 J. League 遊戲中的第一款（但這不是世嘉系統上的第一款 J. League 遊戲 - Game Arts 的 J. League Champion Soccer，幾個月前在 MD 上發布）。

title_jp: Ｊリーグプロストライカー２
overview_en: J. League Pro Striker 2 (Ｊリーグプロストライカー2) is the sequel to the football game J. League Pro Striker, created by Sega in 1994 for the Sega Mega Drive.
overview_zh: 《J. League Pro Striker 2》（Juriーグプロストライカー2）是 Sega 於 1994 年為 Sega Mega Drive 開發的足球遊戲 J. League Pro Striker 的續作。

title_jp: Ｊリーグプロストライカー 完全版
title_zh: J 聯盟超級射手完全版
overview_en: J. League Pro Striker (Ｊリーグプロストライカー) is a 1993 football game for the Sega Mega Drive by Sega. It was the first in a long line of J. League games developed by Sega after acquiring the license to the franchise for their consoles (but it was not the first J. League game on a Sega system — Game Arts's J. League Champion Soccer, released a few months earlier on the MD, was).
overview_zh: J. League Pro Striker（JR グプロストライカー）是一款 1993 年由 Sega 為 Sega Mega Drive 打造的足球遊戲。這是世嘉在獲得其遊戲機特許經營權後開發的一系列 J. League 遊戲中的第一款（但這不是世嘉系統上的第一款 J. League 遊戲 - Game Arts 的 J. League Champion Soccer，幾個月前在 MD 上發布）。

overview_en: Power Challenge Golf is a golf simulation game, based on Accolade's own Golf & Course Design from the year prior, and featuring both of the courses from that title (Sherwood and English Turn) as well as one additional new course (Baltusrol). The game offers stroke and skins play for up to four players, as well as a driving range and a practice mode. The course editor from the PC version, however, has been removed.
overview_zh: Power Challenge Golf 是一款高爾夫模擬遊戲，基於 Accolade 自己前一年的高爾夫和球場設計，並包含該遊戲中的兩個球場（Sherwood 和 English Turn）以及一個額外的新球場（Baltusrol）。遊戲提供最多四名玩家的比桿和逐洞比賽，以及練習場和練習模式。然而，PC 版本的課程編輯器已被刪除。

overview_en: James Bond 007: The Duel is a platform side-scroller which requires precision in jumping (Bond will easily die if he falls from high places) and shooting (the player will have to learn to preserve ammo and reload the pistol without being shot at). The player will have to find all women hostages and disarm bombs in each level to proceed. Hostages will give the player extra lives and ammo.
overview_zh: 《詹姆士龐德 007：決鬥》是一款平臺橫向捲軸遊戲，需要精確的跳躍（龐德從高處墜落很容易死亡）和射擊（玩家必須學會儲存彈藥並重新裝填手槍而不被射擊）。玩家必須找到每個關卡中的所有女性人質並解除炸彈才能繼續前進。人質將為玩家提供額外的生命和彈藥。

overview_en: Final Blow is an action game based around the sport of boxing. You can play the fighters in a sequence of knock-out competitions, (the computer versions also include a round-robin league). Rounds last one minute, with a short break in between them. As in the real sport, your aim is to knock your opponent down for 10 seconds, by gradually weakening him with a series of punches. You can block punches, to avoid them inflicting damage onto you. The ring is of a limited size, so players can be cornered, although the referee will intervene to break the boxers up if they become entangled in a stalemate position.
overview_zh: Final Blow 是一款以拳擊運動為基礎的動作遊戲。您可以與拳擊手進行一系列淘汰賽（電腦版本還包括迴圈賽聯賽）。每輪比賽持續一分鐘，每輪比賽之間有短暫的休息時間。與真正的運動一樣，您的目標是透過一系列拳擊逐漸削弱對手，將其擊倒 10 秒鐘。您可以格擋拳頭，以避免它們對您造成傷害。拳擊場的尺寸有限，因此球員可能會被逼入絕境，但如果拳擊手陷入僵局，裁判會介入將他們分開。

overview_en: The sinister Dr. Maybe is back and only our slickest Special Agent, James Pond, can stop him. Special Agent Finnius Frog can help you get to those hard to reach places with his powerful jumping abilities. Explore more than 100 levels of outrageous fun! Win using an ocean of FI5H gadgets: suction boots, the fruit gun, X-ray specs, a thruster unit, spring boots and a clever fruit suit disguise. Use a special FI5H rocket pack to defeat Dr. Maybe! Fry over 40 different enemies under Dr. Maybe's control and avoid Maybe's mounted guns and missile launchers!
overview_zh: 險惡的也許博士回來了，只有我們最狡猾的特務詹姆斯龐德才能阻止他。特務 Finnius Frog 可以利用他強大的跳躍能力幫助你到達那些難以到達的地方。探索 100 多個充滿樂趣的關卡！使用大量 FI5H 小玩意贏得勝利：吸力靴、水果槍、X 射線眼鏡、推進器裝置、彈簧靴和巧妙的水果套裝偽裝。使用特殊的 FI5H 火箭包擊敗 Maybe 博士！在 Maybe 博士的控制下炸毀 40 多種不同的敵人，並避開 Maybe 的安裝槍和導彈發射器！

no_intro_name: James Pond II - Codename - Robocod (USA, Europe)
overview_en: The game takes place immediately after its predecessor, James Pond. Although Acme Oil Co. has been destroyed by James Pond, Pond's arch enemy Dr Maybe survived and has retreated to the North Pole where he has taken over Santa's workshop. Dr Maybe is holding Santa's workers hostage (in most versions of the game they are penguins, in some they are elves), and has turned many of Santa's helpers into his own twisted and dangerous assistants. James Pond is recruited to infiltrate Santa's grotto, free the captive penguins, retrieve the stolen toys for the children of the world, and defeat Dr Maybe once and for all. This time, however, due to the greater risks involved in this mission, Pond is given a robotic suit and the code name "RoboCod" (a pun on RoboCop). This suit gives Pond superhuman strength and agility as well as enabling him to stretch his midsection almost indefinitely and reach otherwise impossibly high areas.
overview_zh: 這場比賽緊隨其前身詹姆斯龐德之後進行。儘管阿克米石油公司已被詹姆斯龐德摧毀，但龐德的宿敵梅博士卻倖存下來，並撤退到北極，接管了聖誕老人的工作室。也許博士將聖誕老人的工人扣為人質（在遊戲的大多數版本中，他們是企鵝，在某些版本中他們是精靈），並將許多聖誕老人的助手變成了他自己扭曲而危險的助手。詹姆斯龐德被招募潛入聖誕老人的洞穴，釋放被圈養的企鵝，為世界各地的孩子們找回被盜的玩具，並一勞永逸地擊敗梅博士。然而，這一次，由於這次任務涉及更大的風險，龐德被賦予了一套機器人套裝和代號「RoboCod」（機械戰警的雙關語）。這套服裝賦予龐德超人的力量和敏捷性，並使他能夠幾乎無限地伸展他的腹部並到達其他不可能的高區域。

overview_en: James Pond has to solve puzzles to defeat the enemy and the gameplay revolves around finding objects to perform specific tasks, such as keys to rescue captured lobsters, or sponges to bung up the holes in leaking oil tankers. James must also fire bubbles at his enemies to trap them, before popping them to finish them off.
overview_zh: 詹姆斯龐德必須解決謎題才能擊敗敵人，遊戲玩法圍繞著尋找物體來執行特定任務，例如營救捕獲的龍蝦的鑰匙，或堵住洩漏油輪漏洞的海綿。詹姆斯還必須向他的敵人發射泡泡來困住他們，然後再爆破它們來消滅他們。

overview_en: As the name implies, this is strictly a basketball game. It has a black-basketball theme (as seen in a lot of odd American movies) and has a myriad of game options (one on one, group etc.). Also, it has a betting option, but other than that it's your typical run-of-the-mill basketball game.
overview_zh: 顧名思義，這只是一場籃球比賽。它有一個黑色籃球主題（就像在許多奇怪的美國電影中看到的那樣），並且有無數的遊戲選項（一對一、團體等）。此外，它還有一個投注選項，但除此之外，這是典型的普通籃球比賽。

overview_en: Jantei Monogatari (雀偵物語) is a 1990 mahjong game for the PC Engine CD by Atlus and Telenet Japan. The two companies brought the game to the Sega Mega Drive in 1991. Neither version was released outside Japan.
overview_zh: Jantei Monogatari（雀物偵語）是 Atlus 和 Telenet Japan 於 1990 年為 PC Engine CD 製作的麻將遊戲。 1991 年，兩家公司將遊戲帶到了 Sega Mega Drive。這兩個版本均未在日本以外地區發行。

overview_en: This is a tennis game featuring the game modes Exhibition, Circuits, and Training. Exhibition allows for either singles or doubles play. Circuits mode involves the player competing to win four major tournaments: the Sydney Open, Paris Open, London Open and the Florida Open. The player can also customize their own tennis player by choosing their race,sex, and tennis wear color. Players can also choose whether their tennis player is right or left handed, their type of spin, forehand, and backhand. They can also distribute a set amount of points between skills such as the power forehand, backhand, their footwork, and their net game. The game also offers the option of either playing on lawn, hard or clay surfaces.
overview_zh: 這是一款具有表演賽、巡迴賽和訓練賽模式的網球比賽。展覽允許單打或雙打比賽。巡迴賽模式要求玩家競爭贏得四項主要賽事：雪梨公開賽、巴黎公開賽、倫敦公開賽和佛羅裡達公開賽。玩家還可以透過選擇自己的種族、性別和網球服顏色來客製化自己的網球運動員。玩家還可以選擇網球運動員是右手還是左手、旋轉型別、正手和反手。他們還可以在正手力量、反手力量、步法和網前技術之間分配一定數量的分數。遊戲還提供在草坪、硬質或黏土表面上玩的選項。

overview_en: Jeopardy! is an American quiz show featuring trivia in history, literature, the arts, pop culture, science, sports, geography, wordplay, and more. The show has a unique answer-and-question format in which contestants are presented with clues in the form of answers, and must phrase their responses in question form.
overview_zh: 危險！是美國問答節目，內容涉及歷史、文學、藝術、流行文化、科學、體育、地理、雙關語等的知識問答。該節目採用獨特的問答形式，參賽者以答案的形式獲得線索，並且必須以問題的形式表達他們的答案。

overview_en: Jeopardy! is an American quiz show featuring trivia in history, literature, the arts, pop culture, science, sports, geography, wordplay, and more. The show has a unique answer-and-question format in which contestants are presented with clues in the form of answers, and must phrase their responses in question form.
overview_zh: 危險！是美國問答節目，內容涉及歷史、文學、藝術、流行文化、科學、體育、地理、雙關語等的知識問答。該節目採用獨特的問答形式，參賽者以答案的形式獲得線索，並且必須以問題的形式表達他們的答案。

overview_en:
Jeopardy! Deluxe Edition is an updated version of it's Jeopardy! predecessor which features over 3,500 different new questions along with the standard features of Jeopardy such as Daily Doubles, a digitized likeness of the host, Alex Trebek and even the theme music.

Like it's previous version, the player uses the buttons to buzz in and using the d-pad to highlight letters and spelling out their answers. The player can also play against two friends or play against the computer A.I. instead.
overview_zh:
危險！豪華版是 Jeopardy! 的更新版本！其前身包含超過 3,500 個不同的新問題以及 Jeopardy 的標準功能，例如每日雙打、主持人 Alex Trebek 的數位化肖像，甚至還有主題音樂。

與先前的版本一樣，玩家使用按鈕進行蜂鳴，並使用方向鍵突出顯示字母並拼寫出答案。玩家還可以與兩個朋友對戰，或是與電腦人工智慧對戰。反而。

overview_en:
This version of Jeopardy! focuses more on sports related themes with 700 different categories and 3,500 questions to answer related to sports such as baseball, football, hockey, etc., along with many other sub-categories such as players, sports equipment and the like.

The rules are still the same as the others, there are three rounds where the player buzzes in to answer and spells out the answers using the D-pad. It features digitized photography of sports-themed clad contestants such as baseball, football, volleyball and the like along with authentic digitized studio surroundings and the likeness and voice of long time Jeopardy! host, Alex Trebek.
overview_zh:
這個版本的危險！更著重於與運動相關的主題，有 700 個不同的類別和 3,500 個需要回答的與運動相關的問題，如棒球、足球、曲棍球等，以及許多其他子類別，如運動員、運動器材等。

規則仍然與其他規則相同，共有三輪，玩家需要蜂鳴器來回答並使用方向鍵拼出答案。它以棒球、足球、排球等運動主題服裝參賽者的數位化攝影為特色，還有真實的數位化工作室環境以及長期危險邊緣的肖像和聲音！主持人，亞歷克斯·特雷貝克。

overview_en: Jerry Glanville's Pigskin Footbrawl is an American football game for the Sega Mega Drive. It was only released in North America. Though the game has a 1990 copyright, this was due to an oversight on the programmer's part; it was actually completed in 1991-1992.
overview_zh: 傑瑞·格蘭維爾的豬皮足球大戰是世嘉 Mega Drive 的美式足球遊戲。它僅在北美發行。雖然該遊戲擁有 1990 年的版權，但這是由於程式設計師的疏忽造成的；它實際上是在1991-1992年完成的。

overview_en: An army of demons terrorizes the land. Bone-hurling skeletons wait to torture your mere flesh and blood. Mythgard's only salvation rests in the hands of the JEWEL MASTER. Capture the rings of Earth, Wind, Fire and Water. Each ring holds an elemental magic. Combine the rings to attain many mystical weapons. But choose carefully - only certain combinations can protect you. Battle an onrush of Sandworms, Moth-Bats, and Subterranean Ogres. Face the fiery heat of the Red Phoenix. Fight Ghouls, Dragons, and giant Scorpions. Force them to taste the fire of the Jewels!
overview_zh: 惡魔大軍肆虐這片土地。丟骨頭的骷髏等待著折磨你的血肉。神話花園唯一的救贖掌握在珠寶大師手中。捕捉土、風、火、水的光環。每枚戒指都蘊藏著元素魔法。組合戒指以獲得許多神秘武器。但請謹慎選擇 - 只有某些組合才能保護您。與蜂擁而至的沙蟲、蛾蝠和地下食人魔戰鬥。面對紅鳳凰的熾熱。與食屍鬼、龍和巨型蠍子戰鬥。強迫他們嚐嚐寶石之火！

overview_en: Jimmy White's Whirlwind Snooker is a snooker game developed for the Sega Mega Drive exclusively for Europe and Australia. The game is rendred in 3D.
overview_zh: Jimmy White's Whirlwind Snooker 是專為歐洲和澳洲 Sega Mega Drive 開發的一款斯諾克遊戲。遊戲以 3D 方式呈現。

overview_en:
The game stars the green-haired Joe and the blue-haired Mac, cavemen who battle though numerous prehistoric levels using, weapons such as boomerangs, bones, fire, flints, electricity, stone wheels, and clubs. The objective of the game is simply rescuing a group of girls who were kidnapped by a rival tribe of cavemen. The gameplay is somewhat similar to Contra and has a Gauntlet-style health system, where the player loses health over a period of time apart from in boss battles. This health system is also not unlike that of Sega's Wonder Boy. The game could be played in either single player or two player mode. In the two player mode, both characters could hurt each other. The game was also notable for its cartoony graphics, humor, and sound effects.

The original arcade version had the distinction of allowing the player to select between different routes (much like Taito's Darius) at the end of a boss battle. Also, after defeating the final boss, the players can choose between three exits, each one leading to a slightly different ending sequence.
overview_zh:
遊戲主角是綠髮喬和藍髮麥克，他們是穴居人，他們使用迴旋鏢、骨頭、火、燧石、電、石輪和棍棒等武器，在眾多史前關卡中進行戰鬥。遊戲的目標只是拯救一群被敵對穴居人部落綁架的女孩。遊戲玩法有點類似《魂鬥羅》，並有一個手套式的生命系統，玩家在除了 Boss 戰之外的一段時間內會失去生命值。這個健康系統也與世嘉的神奇男孩沒有什麼不同。該遊戲可以單人模式或兩人模式進行。在兩人模式下，兩個角色都可能互相傷害。該遊戲也以其卡通圖形、幽默和聲音效果而聞名。

最初的街機版本的特點是允許玩家在 Boss 戰結束時選擇不同的路線（很像 Taito 的大流士）。此外，在擊敗最終首領後，玩家可以在三個出口之間進行選擇，每個出口都會導致略有不同的結局順序。

title_jp: ジョー・モンタナ フットボール
overview_en: Joe Montana Football is an American football video game featuring Joe Montana, released in 1991. Since Sega did not secure the rights from the NFL, teams are generically named for US cities and the only non-fictional player in the game is Montana himself.
overview_zh: 《Joe Montana Football》是一款以 Joe Montana 為主角的美式足球電玩遊戲，於 1991 年發布。由於世嘉並未獲得 NFL 的版權，球隊通常以美國城市命名，遊戲中唯一的非虛構球員就是 Montana 本人。

title_en: Joe Montana II Sports Talk Football
title_jp: ジョー・モンタナII スポーツトークフットボール
no_intro_name: Joe Montana II Sports Talk Football (Japan)
overview_en:
Despite its name, Joe Montana II is an almost entirely different game to the original John Madden Football, the most promient difference being that games are played "horizontally" rather than "vertically". There are also two levels of "zoom", with the camera closing in on the action when appropriate.

Also new is the concept of an in-game announcer, whose comments occur continuously in real time in accordance with the action (as opposed to the previous method of only having voice samples after plays (or in the case of other sports, hits, goals, etc.)), similar to how American football is broadcast on television. This was considered a selling point for the game, and was advertised as part of the Sports Talk series, which includes Sports Talk Baseball and this game's sequels, NFL Sports Talk Football '93 Starring Joe Montana and NFL Football '94 Starring Joe Montana (as well as College Football's National Championship).

While the concept of in-game commentary would become a standard across most forms of video game American football (and sports gamsein general), Joe Montana II stands as one of the first to bring this feature to home consoles. Here, however, the voiceover is very primitive, with sentences constructed from monotone words, lacking any sense of tone or flow.

Sega would actually move away form in-game commentary for a few years - it does not exist in NFL '95 or its sequels, nor does it appear in the Sega Mega-CD game Joe Montana's NFL Football.
overview_zh:
儘管名字如此，《Joe Montana II》與原版《John Madden Football》幾乎是完全不同的遊戲，最顯著的區別是遊戲是「水平」而不是「垂直」進行的。還有兩個等級的“變焦”，相機會在適當的時候拉近動作。

另一個新的概念是遊戲內播音員的概念，其評論根據動作連續實時發生（而不是以前僅在比賽結束後提供語音樣本的方法（或在其他體育專案中，安打、進球等）），類似於美式橄欖球在電視上的轉播方式。這被認為是遊戲的一個賣點，並作為 Sports Talk 系列的一部分進行了廣告宣傳，該系列包括 Sports Talk Baseball 和該遊戲的續集，NFL Sports Talk Football '93 Starring Joe Montana 和 NFL Football '94 Starring Joe Montana（以及大學橄欖球的全國錦標賽）。

雖然遊戲內評論的概念將成為大多數形式的美式足球電玩遊戲（以及一般體育比賽）的標準，但 Joe Montana II 是最早將該功能引入家用遊戲機的遊戲之一。然而，這裡的畫外音非常原始，都是由單調的單字構成的句子，缺乏任何語氣或流暢感。

事實上，世嘉將在幾年內不再使用遊戲中的評論——它不會出現在 NFL '95 或其續集中，也不會出現在世嘉 Mega-CD 遊戲《喬·蒙大拿的 NFL 橄欖球》中。

overview_en:
Unlike the first computer versions, this game originated on consoles and focuses on the action on the field instead of detailed strategy. There is still a detailed range of moves available, all grouped for quick selection.

Game play modes include regular season, playoffs and sudden death. The game features 16 regular teams plus one All-Madden team, each with their own strengths and weaknesses. Play actions include selecting a pass recipient as a play unfolds, block tackles, dives and sackings. Different weather conditions come into play when it's wet, snowy or muddy.
overview_zh:
與最初的電腦版本不同，這款遊戲起源於遊戲機，專注於戰場上的行動而不是詳細的策略。仍然有一系列詳細的可用動作，全部分組以便快速選擇。

遊戲模式包括常規賽、季後賽和突然死亡。該遊戲有 16 支常規球隊和一支 All-Madden 球隊，每支球隊都有自己的優勢和劣勢。比賽動作包括在比賽展開時選擇傳球接球手、攔截鏟球、衝球和擒殺。當潮濕、下雪或泥濘時，不同的天氣條件就會發揮作用。

overview_en:
THE GREATEST PLAY IN FOOTBALL HISTORY!

The tradition continues. The intensity. The passion. All the things that made John Madden Football the best-selling football video game: On-screen playcalling, IsoVision passing camera, audibles, player ratings. Spin. Dive. Jump. Hurdle. Cut back. Break tackles. You control the action! And now Madden '92 brings you even tougher opponents. Get away with your big play once, but go back to it too soon and you'll get stuffed - Big Time!

Updated for '92! Over 100 plays from Coach Madden's playbook!

More challenges in '92!
* 28 pro teams plus All-Madden Team
* New plays: Run & Shoot, 3-4 Defense, and more
* Unique coaching profiles and game plans
* Smarter opponents adjust to your play calling
* Quicker, more aggressive defense

Madden recaps each scoring drive --- just like TV!

Over 20 new features!
* Score a TD and use Instant Replay to rub it in. (Again.)
* Choose weather --- fair, rain, snow, and wind
* Play head-to-head or with a team mate
* Crush the quarterback --- knock him out of the game 
* Review pass interference calls --- even overturn them!
* Substitute quarterbacks
* Bigger variety of audibles

Biggest play of the year --- quarterback sneak to the hospital.
overview_zh:
足球史上最偉大的比賽！

這項傳統仍在延續。強度。激情。讓 John Madden Football 成為最暢銷足球電玩遊戲的所有因素：螢幕上的比賽呼叫、IsoVision 傳球攝影機、聲音、球員評分。旋轉。潛水。跳。欄。減少。突破鏟球。行動由你掌控！現在《Madden '92》為您帶來了更強大的對手。玩一次大戲就可以僥倖逃脫，但過早回去的話你就會吃飽——大戲！

更新為 92 年！超過 100 場麥登教練戰術手冊的比賽！

92 年更多挑戰！
* 28 支職業隊伍加上 All-Madden 球隊
* 新玩法：跑動投籃、3-4 防守等等
* 獨特的教練簡介和比賽計劃
* 更聰明的對手會適應你的打法
* 更快、更具侵略性的防守

《麥登》回顧了每次得分的表現——就像電視一樣！

超過 20 個新功能！
* 得分達陣並使用即時重播來磨練它。 （再次。）
* 選擇天氣－晴、雨、雪、風
* 面對面或與隊友一起玩
* 粉碎四分衛 --- 將他淘汰出局
* 審查透過幹擾呼叫 --- 甚至推翻它們！
* 替補四分衛
* 更多種類的聲音

今年最大的戲劇——四分衛潛入醫院。

overview_en:
John Madden Football '93 is a 1992 sports video game developed by Blue Sky Productions (later Looking Glass Studios) and Electronic Arts and published by EA Sports Network. Based on the sport of American football, the game puts the player in control of a football team in modes such as tournament play and sudden death. It was officially endorsed by John Madden.

The game's Sega Genesis version was developed by Blue Sky Productions, which was simultaneously creating Ultima Underworld: The Stygian Abyss. John Madden Football '93 adds new animations and features, and it allows players to play as and against famous teams such as the Oakland Raiders of 1976. Aside from Madden Football 64, the game was the last in the Madden franchise to lack the NFL license, which was featured in Madden NFL '94 onward.

With over one million units in sales, John Madden Football '93 was a commercial success. Critics awarded the game high scores and praised its updated graphics; but several reviewers complained that little had changed since John Madden Football '92. Royalties from the game funded the expansion of Blue Sky Productions, and the company's director, Paul Neurath, later commented that the size of these royalties led Electronic Arts to develop future Madden titles in-house.
overview_zh:
John Madden Football '93 是一款 1992 年的體育電玩遊戲，由 Blue Sky Productions（後來的 Looking Glass Studios）和 Electronic Arts 開發，並由 EA Sports Network 發行。遊戲以美式橄欖球運動為基礎，讓玩家以錦標賽和突然死亡等模式控制一支橄欖球隊。它得到了約翰·馬登的正式認可。

該遊戲的世嘉創世紀版本由 Blue Sky Productions 開發，該公司同時製作了《Ultima Underworld: The Stygian Abyss》。 《John Madden Football '93》新增了新的動畫和功能，並且允許玩家與著名球隊（例如 1976 年的奧克蘭突襲者隊）進行比賽。除了《Madden Football 64》之外，該遊戲是《Madden Football '94》系列中最後一款沒有 NFL 許可的遊戲，該遊戲在《Madden NFL '94》中出現。

John Madden Football '93 的銷量超過 100 萬份，並取得了商業上的成功。評論家給予遊戲高分，並稱讚其更新的圖形；但一些評論家抱怨說，自 92 年《約翰馬登橄欖球》以來，幾乎沒有什麼變化。遊戲的版稅為 Blue Sky Productions 的擴張提供了資金，該公司董事 Paul Neurath 後來評論說，這些版稅的規模促使藝電公司內部開發了未來的《Madden》遊戲。

overview_en:
Two of the greatest icons of the Golden Age of the NBA match up in this game. On one side, the spectacular dunks of Michael Jordan of the Chicago Bulls; on the other, Larry Bird's incredible accuracy from the outside. 

While Bird feels right home at the three-point contest, where five racks with five balls each are placed around the three-point arc and the player must pick each ball and throw in the the best timing possible to get as many points as possible during the 60 second window, only Jordan has the air-time to perform on the slam dunk contest, where the player has a number of dunks at his disposal, each requiring different timing to get the best score from all three attempts from the judges, and win the competition.

While they are two completely different players, they can still go one-on-one on a half-court match, played to points or with a time duration. Can Bird's stealing and outside shooting ability be a match to Jordan's speed and jumping abilities?
overview_zh:
NBA 黃金時代最偉大的兩位偶像將在這場比賽中對決。一方面是芝加哥公牛隊邁克爾喬丹的精彩扣籃；另一方面，拉里·伯德在外線的精準度令人難以置信。 

伯德在三分球大賽中感覺很舒服，在三分弧周圍放置了五個籃子，每個籃子有五個球，球員必須在 60 秒的視窗中挑選每個球並在最佳時機投擲，以便在 60 秒的視窗中獲得盡可能多的分數，而只有喬丹有時間在扣籃比賽中表演，在扣籃比賽中，球員可以使用多次的評審

雖然他們是兩個完全不同的球員，但他們仍然可以在半場比賽中進行一對一的比賽，以得分或持續時間進行比賽。柏德的抄截和外線投籃能力能與喬丹的速度和彈跳能力相提並論嗎？

title_en: Jordan vs Bird: One on One
title_jp: ジョーダン VS バード
no_intro_name: Jordan vs Bird - One on One (Japan)

overview_en:
Crystal Mines is a 1989 unlicensed puzzle game for the NES by Color Dreams. When they established Wisdom Tree, they repackaged the game twice: in 1991 as Exodus: Journey to the Promised Land and in 1992 as Joshua & The Battle of Jericho, with Joshua labeled a sequel to Exodus. These two versions would be remade for the Sega Mega Drive in 1993 and 1994, respectively.
Though the games do have a TMSS check, they will only do the $A14000 write if they detect the region of the console they are running on as US — therefore, the games will only boot on either any US Mega Drive or on any other Model 1 Mega Drive without TMSS (making that a partly useless form of region lockout).

Gameplay of both versions is identical: you are the main character (Moses or Joshua, respectively) and you must collect all the bags with M on them (Joshua: coins with $ on them) scattered throughout each maze. A and C shoot; you can hold them down for rapidfire. Shooting destroys blockades and enemies. Once all the M bags are gathered, find the exit to move on to the next level. In between each level, you must answer a bunch of questions related to the story of the Bible of the game's theme; getting them wrong appears to be inconsequential to the outcome of the game (this needs investigation).
overview_zh:
Crystal Mines 是 Color Dreams 於 1989 年在 NES 上推出的一款未經授權的益智遊戲。當他們建立智慧樹時，他們對遊戲進行了兩次重新包裝：1991年命名為《出埃及記：應許之地之旅》，1992年命名為《約書亞與耶利哥之戰》，其中《約書亞》被稱為《出埃及記》的續集。這兩個版本分別於 1993 年和 1994 年為 Sega Mega Drive 進行了重製。
雖然遊戲確實有 TMSS 檢查，但只有當它們檢測到執行的控制檯區域為美國時，它們才會執行 $A14000 寫入 — 因此，遊戲只能在任何美國 Mega Drive 或任何其他沒有 TMSS 的 Model 1 Mega Drive 上啟動（這使得區域鎖定成為部分無用的形式）。

兩個版本的遊戲玩法是相同的：你是主角（分別是摩西或約書亞），你必須收集散佈在每個迷宮中的所有帶有 M 的袋子（約書亞：帶有 $ 的硬幣）。 A和C拍攝；你可以按住它們進行快速射擊。射擊摧毀障礙物和敵人。收集完所有 M 袋後，找到出口進入下一關。在每個關卡之間，你必須回答一堆與遊戲主題的聖經故事相關的問題；犯錯似乎對遊戲結果無關緊要（這需要調查）。

overview_en: Judge Dredd is a platform action game based on the British comic book character of the same name and the 1995 movie that tarnished that name. The game was a multi system release so it fits the standard console jump/shoot/duck formula although it does add some unique twists such as wounding enemies so that they surrender and can be arrested.
overview_zh: 《特警判官》是一款平臺動作遊戲，改編自同名英國漫畫人物和 1995 年玷汙該名字的電影。該遊戲是一個多系統版本，因此它符合標準控制檯跳躍/射擊/鴨子公式，儘管它確實新增了一些獨特的曲折，例如傷害敵人，以便他們投降並可以被逮捕。

overview_en: Junction is a puzzle game somewhat similar to Pipe Dream where the object of the game is to slide square track pieces into the correct place, in order to allow the ball to reach the exit. The game consists of 50 levels which can be attempted in any order, but a certain number of points must be accumulated in order to beat the game.
overview_zh: Junction 是一款有點類似 Pipe Dream 的益智遊戲，遊戲的目標是將方形軌道塊滑到正確的位置，以便讓球到達出口。遊戲共有 50 個關卡，可以任意順序嘗試，但必須累積一定數量的分數才能通關。

overview_en:
Some time after Operation Desert Strike, Ibn Kilbaba, son of Kilbaba Sr., threatens to annihilate America. After his father was killed, the people who were under his control sent his son running off, along with his father's money and nuclear weapons program. Kilbaba, more ruthless than his father, longs for revenge of his father's death and decides to shed the blood of those who killed him, the Americans. Already armed, Kilbaba hires Carlos Ortega to help him set up his nuclear weapons program, deep in South America. Carlos Ortega, the world's most notorious drug lord, also yearns to seek revenge. With his own private army, armed with the most hi-tech weapons, he's ready to fight America at all costs. 

Because of this threat, the player is hired again to battle these two characters, following their trail in the jungles of South America. Armed with the Comanche, numerous other vehicles, and destructive weapons, they will have to take out their private army, blowing up the enemy with Hellfire missiles, Hydra rockets, or chain guns, using a watercraft to launch mines at enemy ships, or pulling off a drive-by on the enemy with guns on the side.
overview_zh:
沙漠攻擊行動後不久，老基爾巴巴的兒子伊本·基爾巴巴威脅要消滅美國。他的父親被殺後，他控制下的人把他的兒子連同他父親的金錢和核武計劃一起送走了。基爾巴巴比他的父親更殘忍，他渴望為父親報仇，並決定讓殺害他的美國人流盡鮮血。基爾巴巴已經武裝起來，聘請卡洛斯·奧爾特加幫助他在南美洲深處建立核武計畫。世界上最臭名昭著的毒梟卡洛斯·奧爾特加也渴望復仇。他擁有自己的私人軍隊，配備了最高科技的武器，準備不惜一切代價與美國作戰。 

由於這種威脅，玩家再次受僱與這兩個角色戰鬥，追蹤他們在南美洲叢林中的蹤跡。裝備有科曼奇、眾多其他車輛和破壞性武器，他們將不得不消滅他們的私人軍隊，用地獄火飛彈、九頭蛇火箭或鏈砲炸毀敵人，使用船隻向敵艦發射水雷，或用側面的槍對敵人進行突襲。

title_jp: ジャングルストライク受け継がれた狂気

overview_en: This game can be played in two modes, either as Dr. Alan Grant or as a Velociraptor. Playing as each provides the user with an alternative story and level design. The climax of the game mirrored the unused climax of the film, in which Grant must defeat a pair of Velociraptors by causing the Tyrannosaurus rex skeleton in the Visitors Center to collapse on top of them. Grant himself is the final boss in the same location for the raptor storyline: your dinosaur character must cause the bone structure to collapse via specifically placed kicks to cause Grant to flee. A sequel was released using a new game engine and new artwork (with some of the original art as well), entitled Jurassic Park: Rampage Edition. In it, Grant's helicopter (that he just escaped on in the first game) crashes. Now he must deal not only with dinosaurs, but InGen as well. A new raptor must also make it off the island.
overview_zh: 這個遊戲可以有兩種模式玩，要嘛扮演艾倫葛蘭特博士，要嘛扮演迅猛龍。每種玩法都為使用者提供了另一個故事和關卡設計。遊戲的高潮反映了電影中未使用的高潮，格蘭特必須透過將遊客中心的霸王龍骨架倒在一對迅猛龍身上來擊敗它們。格蘭特本人是猛禽故事情節同一地點的最終老闆：你的恐龍角色必須透過專門放置的踢腿導致骨骼結構崩潰，從而導致格蘭特逃跑。使用新遊戲引擎和新藝術作品（以及一些原創藝術作品）發布了續集，名為《侏羅紀公園：橫衝直撞版》。其中，格蘭特的直升機（他在第一場比賽中剛剛逃脫）墜毀。現在他不只要對付恐龍，還要對付國際基因技術公司。一隻新的猛禽也必須離開這個島。

overview_en: This game can be played in two modes, either as Dr. Alan Grant or as a Velociraptor. Playing as each provides the user with an alternative story and level design. The climax of the game mirrored the unused climax of the film, in which Grant must defeat a pair of Velociraptors by causing the Tyrannosaurus rex skeleton in the Visitors Center to collapse on top of them. Grant himself is the final boss in the same location for the raptor storyline: your dinosaur character must cause the bone structure to collapse via specifically placed kicks to cause Grant to flee. A sequel was released using a new game engine and new artwork (with some of the original art as well), entitled Jurassic Park: Rampage Edition. In it, Grant's helicopter (that he just escaped on in the first game) crashes. Now he must deal not only with dinosaurs, but InGen as well. A new raptor must also make it off the island.
overview_zh: 這個遊戲可以有兩種模式玩，要嘛扮演艾倫葛蘭特博士，要嘛扮演迅猛龍。每種玩法都為使用者提供了另一個故事和關卡設計。遊戲的高潮反映了電影中未使用的高潮，格蘭特必須透過將遊客中心的霸王龍骨架倒在一對迅猛龍身上來擊敗它們。格蘭特本人是猛禽故事情節同一地點的最終老闆：你的恐龍角色必須透過專門放置的踢腿導致骨骼結構崩潰，從而導致格蘭特逃跑。使用新遊戲引擎和新藝術作品（以及一些原創藝術作品）發布了續集，名為《侏羅紀公園：橫衝直撞版》。其中，格蘭特的直升機（他在第一場比賽中剛剛逃脫）墜毀。現在他不只要對付恐龍，還要對付國際基因技術公司。一隻新的猛禽也必須離開這個島。

title_jp: ジュラシック・パーク
overview_en:
Jurassic Park: Rampage Edition is the sequel to the first Jurassic Park game on Genesis and mostly looks and plays like the predecessor. It is also a side-scroller.

In this game you play as Dr. Grant. The big difference with the first game is that there are more enemies to defeat. In addition to the dinosaurs you have to defeat many InGen agents. The reason is that they are trying to recapture dinosaur DNA and eggs to build a new park or an army of dinosaurs.
overview_zh:
《侏羅紀公園：狂暴版》是《創世記》上第一款《侏羅紀公園》遊戲的續集，外觀和遊戲風格與前作大致相同。 它也是一個側捲軸。

在這個遊戲中，你扮演格蘭特博士。 與第一個遊戲最大的不同是，有更多的敵人要打敗。 除了恐龍之外，你還必須擊敗許多InGen特工。 原因是他們試圖奪回恐龍的DNA和蛋來建造一個新的公園或一支恐龍軍隊。

overview_en: The comic-book superhero team of the Justice League consists of Superman, Batman, Wonder Woman, The Flash, Aquaman, and Green Arrow. They must defeat the evil Darkseid and his henchmen, Despero and Cheetah. But before they can reach Darkseid, the members of the Justice League must battle each other. You can follow this storyline in Story Mode, or if you prefer to just hold exhibition fights you can choose Battle Mode which allows you to use the villian characters as well.
overview_zh: 正義聯盟的漫畫超級英雄團隊由超人、蝙蝠俠、神力女超人、閃電俠、水行俠和綠箭俠組成。他們必須擊敗邪惡的達克賽德及其追隨者德斯佩羅和獵豹。但在他們到達達克賽德之前，正義聯盟的成員必須互相戰鬥。你可以在故事模式中跟隨這個故事情節，或者如果你更喜歡只進行表演戰，你可以選擇戰鬥模式，它也允許你使用惡棍角色。

《獸王記》（Altered Beast）是 SEGA 世嘉的橫向捲軸動作遊戲，日本於 1988 年 6 月起作為大型電玩運行。玩家扮演復活的戰士，吸收能量獸後可變身為狼人、龍人等強悍生物對抗敵軍。大型電玩運行後移植至多種家用主機，2019 年收錄於 SEGA Mega Drive Mini（北美與歐版）。2005 年另推出全面重製作品《獸王記 -PROJECT ALTERED BEAST-》PS2 版。
overview_jp:
『獣王記』（じゅうおうき、Altered Beast）は、セガの横スクロールアクションゲームであり、日本では1988年6月よりアーケードゲームとして稼働を開始した。
アーケード版稼働以降、本作は多数の家庭用ゲーム機に移植されたほか、2019年にはセガが世界同時発売する復刻系ゲーム機・メガドライブ ミニにプリインストールされる42作品の一つとして収録された（北米・ユーロ版のみ。日本・アジア版には未収録）。
また、2005年にはフルリメイク作品『獣王記 -PROJECT ALTERED BEAST-』がPlayStation 2用ソフトとして発売された。
