title_en: Masked Rider, The - Kamen Rider ZO
no_intro_name: Masked Rider, The - Kamen Rider ZO (USA)

title_jp: マスター・オブ・モンスターズ
overview_en: Master of Monsters is a turn-based strategy game in which you choose one of five different wizards and fight the other wizards for domination of the land that stands without a ruler after the master wizard's death. You can play in two campaigns against the computer which requires you to defeat the enemy wizards on all maps and allows you to take all units that have survived a battle into the next one. You can also play all maps individually with up two four human players. In battles, you can summon different monsters and cast spells. Which monsters you can summon and which spells you can use depends on which wizard you have chosen.
overview_zh: 《Master of Monsters》是一款回合製策略遊戲，您可以從五個不同的巫師中選擇一個，並與其他巫師戰鬥，爭奪在巫師大師死後，這片沒有統治者的土地的統治權。你可以在電腦上進行兩場戰役，這需要你擊敗所有地圖上的敵方巫師，並允許你將一場戰鬥中倖存下來的所有單位帶入下一場戰鬥。您還可以與最多兩名四名人類玩家單獨玩所有地圖。在戰鬥中，你可以召喚不同的怪物並施展法術。你可以召喚哪些怪物以及你可以使用哪些法術取決於你選擇的巫師。

title_jp: マスターオブウエポン
overview_en:
Master of Weapon (マスターオブウエポン) is a 1989 arcade shoot-'em-up by Taito ported to the Sega Mega Drive exclusively in Japan in 1991.

A shoots a gun and B drops bombs. These can be rapidfired, however enemies will only be killed by one or the other. C drops a bomb with a special weapon attached to it. Special weapons and upgrades are collected as powerups found in green capsules throughout each level; they last until you are killed.

In Japan, Sega released a version of Tetris as a conversion kit for Master of Weapon cabinets for unknown reasons.
overview_zh:
《武器大師》（マスターオブウエポン）是一款由 Taito 於 1989 年推出的街機射擊遊戲，於 1991 年在日本獨家移植到 Sega Mega Drive。

A開槍，B投擲炸彈。它們可以快速射擊，但敵人只能被其中一個殺死。 C投下一枚附有特殊武器的炸彈。特殊武器和升級品會在每個關卡的綠色膠囊中收集起來，作為強化道具；它們會持續到你被殺為止。

在日本，世嘉出於未知原因發布了俄羅斯方塊版本作為武器大師櫃的轉換套件。

overview_en: Maten no Soumetsu (魔天の創滅) is a 1993 RPG for the Sega Mega Drive by Kodansha Research Institute released exclusively in Japan.
overview_zh: Maten no Soumetsu（魔天の創滅）是講談社研究所於 1993 年在日本獨家發行的 Sega Mega Drive 角色扮演遊戲。

overview_en: Oh no! The dreaded Trash Alien has captured Spot and littered the universe with garbage! Join our hero Blasternaut on a daring mission to rescue his robot pal. Blast your way through space junk, chase through dark and dangerous caverns, and fend off nasty alien creatures. Spot's fate is in your hands - good luck!
overview_zh: 哦不！可怕的垃圾外星人佔領了斑點，並在宇宙中散佈垃圾！與我們的英雄 Blasternaut 一起執行拯救他的機器人朋友的大膽任務。在太空垃圾中炸開一條路，在黑暗而危險的洞穴中追逐，並擊退令人討厭的外星生物。 Spot 的命運掌握在你的手中 - 祝你好運！

overview_en: The story takes place in 1999 where a Bio-Beast by the name of Godkaiser Hell has reigned supreme over Earth, after a nuclear and biological holocaust has disfigured most of the population and formed an army called the Steelmask Force. The survivors have fled underground and are constantly attacked by the Bio-Beast horde until one day a scientist by the name of Dr. Kabuto creates a mech, the Mazinger-Z, that can be used against the monsters. This is where the player takes control of the games protagonist and pilots the suit in an attempt to reclaim the Earth.
overview_zh: 故事發生在 1999 年，一場核生化大屠殺毀掉了大部分人口，並組建了一支名為「鋼面具部隊」的軍隊，一隻名為「Godkaiser Hell」的生物野獸統治了地球。倖存者逃到了地下，並不斷受到生物獸部落的攻擊，直到有一天，一位名叫 Kabuto 博士的科學家創造了一種可以用來對抗怪物的機甲，Mazinger-Z。在這裡，玩家控制遊戲主角並駕駛戰衣試圖奪回地球。

overview_en: The story takes place in 1999 where a Bio-Beast by the name of Godkaiser Hell has reigned supreme over Earth, after a nuclear and biological holocaust has disfigured most of the population and formed an army called the Steelmask Force. The survivors have fled underground and are constantly attacked by the Bio-Beast horde until one day a scientist by the name of Dr. Kabuto creates a mech, the Mazinger-Z, that can be used against the monsters. This is where the player takes control of the games protagonist and pilots the suit in an attempt to reclaim the Earth.
overview_zh: 《魔神 Saga》是永井豪的漫畫作品，以《無敵鐵金剛》及其續作《大魔神》、《幽浮機械人》為發想，將原本巨大機器人的主角兜甲兒設定為穿著超能力鎧甲的人類戰士。1990 至 1992 年於《週刊 Young Jump》連載。1993 年由 SEGA 世嘉推出 Mega Drive 遊戲版，劇情經過改編，主角穿著父親兜博士開發的「神之鎧」化身為「魔神 Z」對抗 Hell 軍團。
overview_jp:
『マジン・サーガ』は、永井豪作の漫画作品。
漫画『マジンガーZ』およびその続編『グレートマジンガー』、『UFOロボ グレンダイザー』をモチーフとし、本来巨大ロボットだった主人公・兜甲児の操縦する「Z」を、主人公が超能力を有した甲冑を纏う形に装着変身する姿に設定変更し、ロボット物から、超能力・SF物にシフトを試みている。
1990年から1992年にかけて『週刊ヤングジャンプ』（集英社）に連載、その後『月刊ベアーズクラブ』（集英社）の読み切りを経て中断。現在未完である。
1993年にセガよりメガドライブにてゲーム化されているが、原作からやや改変されたストーリーとなっている。こちらではゴッドカイザー・ヘルのバイオ・マシン・ビースト軍により地球が壊滅する中、父・兜教授が開発した神の鎧を装着した兜甲児が「マジンガーZ」としてヘルの軍勢に立ち向かい、ヘルによって破壊された地球各地を転戦、最後にはヘルの本拠地に攻め入り、ヘル・マジンガーと化したゴッドカイザー・ヘルを打ち破るまでが描かれている。そして荒廃した地球から人類が火星に移民するも、その火星にまたしてもヘルが侵略を開始、再びマジンガーZが立ち上がるところでゲームはEDを迎える。

title_jp: マクドナルドトレジャーランド・アドベンチャー
overview_en:
McDonald's Treasure Land Adventure is a side-scrolling adventure starring Ronald McDonald.

After finding a piece of a treasure map, the yellow clown travels through four different levels (Forest, Town, Sea and Moon). He's off to find and defeat the baddies who have the other pieces of the map.

Ronald can jump, shoot and use his scarf to grab onto hooks to jump to higher levels.

Jewels and flowers collected in each level can be used to purchase extra lives and power-ups in shops between levels.
overview_zh:
麥當勞寶藏大冒險是一款由麥當勞叔叔主演的橫向捲軸冒險遊戲。

找到一塊藏寶圖後，黃色小丑穿越四個不同的關卡（森林、城鎮、海洋和月亮）。他要去尋找並擊敗那些擁有地圖其他部分的壞人。

羅納德可以跳躍、射擊並使用圍巾抓住鉤子跳到更高的水平。

每個關卡中收集的珠寶和鮮花可用於在關卡之間的商店中購買額外的生命和能量。

overview_en: Medal City is a card game for the Sega Mega Drive, released exclusively in Japan in 1991 via the Sega Game Toshokan service. You choose between three gambling games; Poker, Blackjack, and Slots. The goal of each game (besides poker) is to earn over 100,000 medals. You will then see the game's ending (except poker, as the game never ends).
overview_zh: Medal City 是一款適用於 Sega Mega Drive 的紙牌遊戲，於 1991 年透過 Sega Game Toshokan 服務在日本獨家發行。您可以在三種賭博遊戲中進行選擇；撲克、二十一點和老虎機。每場比賽（撲克除外）的目標是贏得超過 100,000 枚獎牌。然後您將看到遊戲的結局（撲克除外，因為遊戲永遠不會結束）。

overview_en: Mega Bomberman is a top-down action game. Control your Bomberman through various levels defeating multiple enemies and plenty of bosses. Each level consist of blocks for exploding and some blocks that don't explode. At times you will need the non-exploding blocks as shelter. The blocks that do explode reveal power-ups and eggs.
overview_zh: 超級炸彈人是一款自上而下的動作遊戲。控制你的炸彈人透過不同的關卡，擊敗多個敵人和大量的頭目。每個關卡都包含可爆炸的塊和一些不爆炸的塊。有時你需要非爆炸方塊作為庇護所。爆炸的方塊會顯示能量和雞蛋。

overview_en: Mega Games 2 is a compilation released for the Sega Mega Drive only in Europe in 1993. It was the second of three similar compilations, and was only distributed with Sega Mega Drive II consoles.
overview_zh: Mega Games 2 是 1993 年僅在歐洲發布的 Sega Mega Drive 合輯。它是三個類似合輯中的第二個，並且僅隨 Sega Mega Drive II 遊戲機發行。

overview_en: Mega Games 6 is a compilation of six Sega Mega Drive games, distributed with some European Mega Drive II consoles in 1995. It is actually a combination of two previous pack-in games, Mega Games 1 and Mega Games 2. It would be followed by Mega Games 6 Vol. 2 and Mega Games 6 Vol. 3.
overview_zh: Mega Games 6 是六款 Sega Mega Drive 遊戲的集合，於 1995 年隨部分歐洲 Mega Drive II 遊戲機發行。它實際上是之前兩款打包遊戲 Mega Games 1 和 Mega Games 2 的組合。隨後是 Mega Games 6 Vol. 1。 2 和 Mega Games 6 卷。 3.

overview_en: Mega Games 6 Vol. 2 is a compilation of six Sega Mega Drive games, distributed with some Mega Drive II consoles in 1995. It was also released under the name Six Pack.
overview_zh: 超級遊戲 6 卷。 2 是 6 個 Sega Mega Drive 遊戲的合集，於 1995 年隨一些 Mega Drive II 遊戲機發行。它也以 Six Pack 的名稱發布。

overview_en: Three times the action! SUPER HANG-ON: Countdown to excitement. Hang-On's back with two awesome races that are guaranteed to rev your engine. Whether you're racing against time as you beat a path across four continents, or battling guts with an opponent on a specially-designed circuit, there's no better thrill than the roar of your pipes as they beat a steady rhythm in sync with your fast-paced driving! WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP SOCCER: World Championship Soccer kicks off against an international set of stars for the prized World Championship. To win, you'll move swiftly through the qualifying rounds onto the final tournament where only the best are lined up for intense competition! COLUMNS: Drift back to ancient Phoenicia and challenge yourself with Columns, a game favored by middle eastern merchants. In this mesmerizing pastime, tinker with your riches to align glittering jewels across, down or diagonally.
overview_zh: 三倍行動！超級掛機：興奮倒數計時。 Hang-On 帶著兩場精彩的比賽回來了，保證讓你的引擎加速運轉。無論您是在穿越四大洲的道路上與時間賽跑，還是在專門設計的賽道上與對手搏鬥，沒有比管子的轟鳴聲更刺激的了，因為管子隨著您快節奏的駕駛而節奏穩定！足球世界冠軍賽：足球世界冠軍賽將與一群國際明星爭奪珍貴的世界冠軍賽。為了獲勝，您將迅速透過資格賽進入決賽，只有最優秀的選手才能參加激烈的比賽！柱子：回到古代腓尼基並透過中東商人喜愛的柱子遊戲挑戰自己。在這個令人著迷的消遣中，修補你的財富，將閃閃發光的珠寶橫向、向下或對角排列。

overview_en:
First you choose one out of four different characters to represent you, Scarlet (red army), Oberon (yellow army), Caesar (green army), or Madcap (blue army). The game is split into 10 levels - the first 9 are groups of 3 territories which can be completed in any order, while the final 'Mother of All Battles' has its own surprises.

Land is mostly of sand, grass or ice. You start with 100 men and you can use whatever quantity you find necessary on each island. The rest men left will go to another level with another new 100. In the second half of the game you can freeze men to save them for the Mother of All Battles.

Once you select your island and place for your HQ, you must do some research for better weapons and defences. On the roof of your buildings you can put protectors like archers, gunmen, boiling oil men, and later on even laser turrets. If you send a team of unarmed men into an unoccupied square, they will build an additional base there, with larger armies completing this more quickly.

Later on higher levels, you'll also build mines and factories, as you'll need to dig a certain material for higher level weapons, depending on whether the area you're on is rich with a certain material or not. With each next level, you'll start from a higher technology level and be able to progress to one higher level up than at the previous level.

If there is more than just one enemy, you can make an alliance until you crush the other one - three of you can form an alliance against fourth enemy. For what its worth, a certain numeric level of defence is always stronger from the same level of attacker, and men that are not armed (conscripts) can only kill enemy soldiers, not destroy or attack enemy fort.

The main thing as always in strategy games is to be the sole survivor and lead your men to victory, experimenting on vicious technologies, equipping your men, making perfect soldiers out of them, produce shields, weapons, planes... to dominate the world and crush your opponents.

You can do the battling only in a certain quadrant, but don't be long as your men will automatically start building the fort, and it will be at the bottom of age level and you'll need to invent everything for that one again.
overview_zh:
首先，你從四個不同的角色中選擇一個來代表你，斯嘉麗（紅軍）、奧布朗（黃軍）、凱撒（綠軍）或瘋子（藍軍）。遊戲分為 10 個關卡 - 前 9 個關卡由 3 個領土組成，可以按任意順序完成，而最後的「所有戰鬥之母」則有其獨特的驚喜。

土地主要由沙、草或冰組成。一開始你有 100 名士兵，你可以根據每個島上的需要使用任意數量計程車兵。剩下的剩餘人員將進入另一個新的 100 級。在遊戲的後半段，您可以凍結人員以將他們儲存到「所有戰鬥之母」中。

一旦你選擇了島嶼和總部地點，你就必須進行一些研究以獲得更好的武器和防禦。在建築物的屋頂上，您可以放置​​弓箭手、槍手、沸油兵等保護者，甚至放置雷射砲塔。如果你派出一隊手無寸鐵的人進入一個無人佔領的廣場，他們會在那裡建立一個額外的基地，更大的軍隊可以更快完成這個任務。

稍後在更高的等級上，您還將建造礦場和工廠，因為您需要挖掘某種材料來獲得更高等級的武器，這取決於您所在的區域是否富含某種材料。對於每個下一個級別，您將從更高的技術級別開始，並且能夠進步到比上一個級別更高的級別。

如果敵人不只一個，你可以結盟，直到消滅另一個 - 你們三個可以結盟來對抗第四個敵人。就其價值而言，一定數值等級的防禦總是比同一等級的攻擊者更強，而沒有武裝的人（義務兵）只能殺死敵方士兵，而不能摧毀或攻擊敵方堡壘。

在策略遊戲中，最重要的事情始終是成為唯一的倖存者並帶領你計程車兵取得勝利，嘗試邪惡的技術，裝備你計程車兵，用他們製造完美計程車兵，生產盾牌，武器，飛機......統治世界並粉碎你的對手。

你只能在某個象限內進行戰鬥，但不要太久，因為你的人會自動開始建造堡壘，而且它將處於年齡水平的底部，你需要再次為那個象限發明一切。

overview_en:
Mega Man: The Wily Wars is a 1994 Genesis video game developed by Minakuchi Engineering and released by Capcom USA in the USA on December 31, 1994.

THIS TIME IT'S WAR!

In the last few years, a titanic struggle for control of the planet has raged. Each time it has pitted Mega Man, a cybernetic champion of justice against the villainous Dr. Wily and his renegade robots. And each time, Mega Man has emerged victorious!

Now, in a desperate attempt to change the past, Dr. Wily has used a time machine to slip back to the time of his first battles with Mega Man. There he plans to make sure that this time, Mega Man will be history!

• 3 Games in One! Play Mega Man, Mega Man 2, and Mega Man 3.
• Battle Dr. Wily from the future and his all new robotic creations!
• 16 Megabits featuring 26 awesome stages and battery-backed saving!
overview_zh:
《Mega Man: The Wily Wars》是一款 1994 年 Genesis 電子遊戲，由 Minakuchi Engineering 開發，並由 Capcom USA 於 1994 年 12 月 31 日在美國發行。

這次是戰爭！

在過去的幾年裡，一場爭奪地球控制權的激烈鬥爭愈演愈烈。每次，正義的控制論冠軍洛克人都會與邪惡的威利博士和他的叛逆機器人展開對決。每一次，洛克人都取得了勝利！

現在，為了改變過去，威利博士絕望地嘗試使用時光機回到他第一次與洛克人戰鬥的時間。他計劃確保這次《洛克人》將成為歷史！

• 三合一遊戲！玩《洛克人》、《洛克人 2》和《洛克人 3》。
• 與來自未來的威利博士和他全新的機器人作品戰鬥！
• 16 兆位，具有 26 個出色的階段和電池支援的儲存功能！
《Mega Panel》是 1990 年 11 月由 NAMCO 發售的落下式解謎遊戲，是 NAMCO 首款 Mega Drive 原創軟體。玩家對掉落的方塊進行操作以消除同色組合。
overview_jp: 『メガパネル』 (MEGAPANEL) は、1990年11月にナムコより発売された落ち物パズルゲームであり、ナムコ初のメガドライブオリジナルソフトとして販売された。

title_jp: メガシュヴァルツシルト

overview_en: Mega SWIV is an Action game, developed by Sales Curve Interactive and published by Time Warner Interactive, which was released in Europe in 1994.
overview_zh: Mega SWIV是一款動作遊戲，由Sales Curve Interactive開發，時代華納互動發行，於1994年在歐洲發行。

overview_en: Saddled on a high-performance all-terrain vehicle, you hear the roar of racing engines and scan the brutal dirt track ahead. The unforgiving clock counts down; THREE... strap helmet, TWO... rev it up, ONE... explode from the gate! Slam into high, and torque up to brain-warping speed! During tight cornering, cut hard, shift low, and fan the brakes. You'll feel huge racing tires claw for traction. Control four-wheel drift or you'll spin out. On straightways, you'll hit rises and go airborne. Throttle down to soften your landing. Challenge a computer-controlled rival, or compete head-to-head against your buddy. Choose from 9 twisting race tracks on practice mode. Choose from 4 vehicles, each with unique horsepower, handling, and acceleration features. Play the Circuit Championship, a 16 track password race to glory!
overview_zh: 騎上高效能全地形車，您會聽到賽車引擎的轟鳴聲，並掃視前方殘酷的土路。無情的時鐘正在倒數計時；三...帶頭盔，兩...加速，一...從大門爆炸！猛衝至高速，並以令人難以置信的速度扭轉！在急轉彎時，猛踩油門、低檔並扇動煞車。您會感覺到巨大的賽車輪胎在抓地力。控制四輪漂移，否則你會打轉。在直道上，您會上升併升空。降低油門以軟化著陸。挑戰電腦控制的對手，或與你的好友正面交鋒。在練習模式下，從 9 個曲折的賽道中進行選擇。從 4 輛汽車中進行選擇，每輛汽車都具有獨特的馬力、操控性和加速功能。參加巡迴錦標賽，一場 16 條賽道的密碼競賽，邁向榮耀！

overview_en: After many generations of peace, the Dark Forces have assembled again, and as a member of the USS Freedom Forces, it is your job to defeat them once again. This means you will have to complete numerous large levels always searching for secrets to pick up and enemies to shoot. To do this, you can pick up three different, upgradeable shots: a multiple, a laser and a rebound. You can also go into wheel-mode (as long as you have enough special energy) or use a rope. In wheel-mode, you are invincible and can lay mines or explore previously unreachable areas.
overview_zh: 經過幾個世代的和平之後，黑暗勢力再次集結，身為美國自由軍的一員，你的任務就是再次擊敗他們。這意味著你將必須完成許多大型關卡，並不斷尋找可拾取的秘密和可射擊的敵人。為此，您可以選擇三種不同的、可升級的射擊：多重射擊、雷射射擊和反彈射擊。你也可以進入輪子模式（只要你有足夠的特殊能量）或使用繩子。在車輪模式下，你是無敵的，可以埋設地雷或探索以前無法到達的區域。

overview_en: MegaMind (メガマインド) is a game for the Sega Mega Drive, released exclusively in Japan via the Sega Game Toshokan service. The game consists to guess what is the right following.
overview_zh: MegaMind（メガマインド）是一款適用於 Sega Mega Drive 的遊戲，透過 Sega Game Toshokan 服務在日本獨家發行。遊戲包括猜測以下正確的內容。

overview_en:
Megapanel (メガパネル) is a 1990 puzzle game developed and published by Namco (under their Namcot branding) for the Sega Mega Drive. Though initially released only in Japan, the game has made its way to the west through various compilations and consoles with built-in games.

Megapanel is a sliding puzzle game similar to fifteen-tile puzzle games. The aim is to clear as many panels as possible before the pile reaches the top of the screen. In order to clear panels, three or more panels of the same color must be lined up together either vertically or horizontally. Use the D-pad to slide panels (each button indicates what direction to slide to, so the appropriate panel is automatically chosen) and A to bring the next row up immediately. A new life is awarded every 10000 points.
overview_zh:
Megapanel（メガパネル）是一款 1990 年由 Namco（以其 Namcot 品牌）為 Sega Mega Drive 開發和發行的益智遊戲。雖然最初僅在日本發行，但該遊戲已透過各種彙編和內建遊戲的遊戲機進入西方。

Megapanel 是一款類似十五塊拼圖遊戲的滑動益智遊戲。目的是在堆到達螢幕頂部之前清除盡可能多的面板。為了清除面板，三個或更多相同顏色的面板必須垂直或水平排列在一起。使用方向鍵滑動面板（每個按鈕指示滑動方向，因此會自動選擇適當的面板）並使用 A 立即顯示下一行。每10000點就會獎勵一個新生命。

overview_en:
The Menacer 6-Game Cartridge is a cartridge containing six light gun games for use with the Sega Menacer. The Menacer came bundled with this cartridge, and predictably it is not compatible with any other Mega Drive peripheral.
Included games:

Pest Control
Space Station Defender
Ready, Aim, Tomatoes!
Whack Ball
Front Line
Rockman's Zone
overview_zh:
Menacer 6-Game Cartridge 是一款包含 6 個光槍遊戲的卡帶，可與 Sega Menacer 一起使用。 Menacer 與該卡帶捆綁在一起，並且可以預見它與任何其他 Mega Drive 週邊裝置都不相容。
包含的遊戲：

害蟲防治
太空站保衛者
準備好，瞄準，西紅柿！
擊球
前線
洛克人區

title_en: Meng Huan Shui Guo Pan - 777 Casino
no_intro_name: Meng Huan Shui Guo Pan - 777 Casino (Taiwan) (Unl)

overview_en:
As a member of an elite Special Forces group, you're constantly traveling around the world to various hotspots of terrorist activity. So far, you've always come home relatively unscathed, but this mission is the most dangerous and potentially deadly you've ever faced, so stay sharp and get ready for a fight of epic proportions. 

A former President has been kidnapped, and it's your job to bring him home safely! With the help of your machine guns, bazookas, and other heavy artillery, the terrorists will be no match for your superior skills and sharpshooting ability. So stay frosty, and remember your mantra: shoot first, ask questions later.
overview_zh:
身為精英特種部隊的一員，你需要不斷地前往世界各地的恐怖活動熱點。到目前為止，你總是相對毫髮無傷地回家，但這次任務是你所面對過的最危險、最可能致命的任務，所以保持敏銳，為一場史詩般的戰鬥做好準備。 

一位前總統被綁架了，你的任務就是把他安全帶回家！在你的機關槍、火箭筒和其他重型火砲的幫助下，恐怖分子將無法與你卓越的技能和神槍手能力抗衡。所以保持冷漠，記住你的口頭禪：先拍攝，再提問。

overview_en: Metal Fangs (メタルファング) is a game for the Sega Mega Drive by Victor. It was not released outside of Japan. it's an Arcade racing game with top-down perspective in which two teams of four circle a track with the goal of eliminating each other.
overview_zh: Metal Fangs（メタルufァngu）是 Victor 為 Sega Mega Drive 設計的遊戲。它沒有在日本以外的地區發行。這是一款自上而下視角的街機賽車遊戲，兩支四人隊伍繞著一條賽道行駛，目標是消滅對方。

title_jp: マイケルジャクソンズ ムーンウォーカー
overview_en:
"Michael!" Katy's voice rings out - you've found her! But more children are still lost! Can you stop the psycho mastermind Mr. Big and his goon squad before they kidnap all the kids?

You can, if you're Michael Jackson! Moonwalk on muggers, lean on meanies, and pop the punks! Outfight, outjump, outdance! Move like only Michael can, to the beat of Smooth Criminal, Beat it, Billie Jean, and Bad!

No bad guy can last through Michael's Star Magic! Punch down gangsters in Club 30. Rumble in the streets. Swing, spin, and kick past graveyard ghouls. Chill in the caverns, then sizzle 'em with ultra-tech weapons in Mr. Big's hideout.

Experience the baddest video game ever. Defy physics with Michael's dancing! You never lose your cool. See it and be it - Michael Jackson's Moonwalker!
overview_zh:
「麥可！」凱蒂的聲音響起——你找到她了！但仍有更多兒童失蹤！你能在變態主謀大塊頭先生和他的暴徒小隊綁架所有孩子之前阻止他們嗎？

如果你是麥可傑克遜，你就可以！太空漫步對付搶劫犯，對付卑鄙小人，消滅小混混！超越，超越，超越！像只有麥可一樣，隨著《犯罪高手》、《打敗它》、《比利簡》和《壞！ 》的節奏移動。

沒有一個壞人能堅持透過邁克爾的星際魔法！在 30 號俱樂部打倒歹徒。在街上咆哮。揮舞、旋轉、踢過墓地食屍鬼。在洞穴中放鬆一下，然後在大人物先生的藏身處用超科技武器攻擊他們。

體驗有史以來最糟糕的影片遊戲。用麥可的舞蹈來挑戰物理學！你永遠不會失去冷靜。親眼目睹並成為它 - 麥可傑克森的《月球漫步者》！

title_en: Mick _ Mack as the Global Gladiators
no_intro_name: Mick _ Mack as the Global Gladiators (USA)
overview_en:
Global Gladiators is a platform game licensed from fast food chain McDonalds. While playing through the game's 12 levels you'll notice McDonalds logos, burgers and all sorts of family restaurant type stuff as you take Mick and Mack (the game's protagonists) on a journey to clean up "Monsters of Slime World", "Toxi-Town" and more.

UPC / Barcode: 052145820043
overview_zh:
《全球角鬥士》是一款由速食連鎖店麥當勞授權的平臺遊戲。在玩遊戲的 12 個關卡時，當您帶著 Mick 和 Mack（遊戲主角）踏上清理“史萊姆世界怪物”、“Toxi-Town”等的旅程時，您會注意到麥當勞的標誌、漢堡和各種家庭餐廳型別的東西。

UPC/條碼：052145820043

title_en: Mickey Mania: The Timeless Adventures of Mickey Mouse
no_intro_name: Mickey Mania - The Timeless Adventures of Mickey Mouse (Japan)
overview_en: The player must take on the role of Mickey and progress through each level, defeating enemies along the way and solving the occasional puzzle. Most enemies can be defeated either by stomping on them or tossing marbles at them. Frequently, the player must jump from platform to platform in order to advance, even occasionally within the constrains of a time limit (such as when escaping from a collapsing tower).
overview_zh: 《Mickey Mania: The Timeless Adventures of Mickey Mouse》是 Mega Drive 與 SFC 上推出的 16 位元電玩遊戲軟體。玩家操作米奇，於以米奇從 1928 年到 1990 年所演出短篇電影為靈感設計的關卡中橫向前進。歐洲與澳洲另在 PlayStation 上以《Mickey's Wild Adventure》之名發售。本作為遊戲設計師 David Jaffe 首度參與製作的作品。
overview_jp:
『ミッキーマニア』（Mickey Mania: The Timeless Adventures of Mickey Mouse）はメガドライブとスーパーファミコンで展開された16ビットコンピュータゲームソフトである。ミッキーマウスを操作し、ミッキーマウスが1928年から1990年に出演した短編映画を基にデザインされたレベルを横スクロールで進行する。ヨーロッパとオーストラリアではさらにプレイステーションで『Mickey's Wild Adventure』のタイトルでも発売された。
ゲームデザイナーのデイビッド・ジャッフェが初めて製作に携わったゲームとして知られている。

title_en: Mickey Mania - The Timeless Adventures of Mickey Mouse
no_intro_name: Mickey Mania - The Timeless Adventures of Mickey Mouse (USA)
overview_en: The player must take on the role of Mickey and progress through each level, defeating enemies along the way and solving the occasional puzzle. Most enemies can be defeated either by stomping on them or tossing marbles at them. Frequently, the player must jump from platform to platform in order to advance, even occasionally within the constrains of a time limit (such as when escaping from a collapsing tower).
overview_zh: 玩家必須扮演米奇的角色，透過每個關卡，擊敗沿途的敵人並解決偶爾出現的謎題。大多數敵人都可以透過踩踏或向他們投擲彈珠來擊敗。通常，玩家必須從一個平臺跳到另一個平臺才能前進，即使有時在時間限制的範圍內（例如從倒塌的塔中逃脫時）。

title_en: Mickey & Minnie 2: The Great Circus Mystery
title_jp: ミッキーとミニーマジカルアドベンチャー２
title_zh: 米老鼠 2：神秘馬戲團大冒險

overview_en:
Five Magical Puzzles
Full Of Family Fun!

"The sky is rumbling!
The sky is rumbling! What ever can it be?" cry the citizens of Beanwick.

"Is it a storm? Is it a monster? Is it the end of the Kingdom?" I don't know, but I'll find out, says Mickey, "if I have to search every room in the Castle of Beanwick to solve the mystery!"

In Mickey's Ultimate Challenge, volunteer as Mickey or Minnie to help the Kingdom of Beanwick solve the mystery of the rumblings in the sky. But, first you must prove worthy of the challenge--by thinking your way through a series of fiendishly clever puzzles, players from 4 to 104 can take full advantage of the game's interactive capabilities to put their critical thinking skills to the ultimate test. Five incredible locations!

Five brain-teasing challenges starring many of your favorite Disney characters. Solve them all for a chance to see what's really up, up there!

Is this all a dream? Play Mickey's Ultimate Challenge and decide for yourself!
overview_zh:
五個神奇的謎題
充滿家庭樂趣！

「天空正在轟鳴！
天空正在轟鳴！到底會是什麼？ 「賓威克的居民們哭了。

“是風暴嗎？是怪物嗎？是王國的末日嗎？”我不知道，但我會找到答案，米奇說，“如果我必須搜查比威克城堡的每個房間來解開這個謎團的話！”

在米奇的終極挑戰中，自願扮演米奇或米妮，幫助賓威克王國解開天空中隆隆聲的謎團。但是，首先您必須證明自己值得接受挑戰——透過思考解決一系列極其巧妙的謎題，4 歲到 104 歲的玩家可以充分利用遊戲的互動功能，將他們的批判性思維能力接受終極考驗。五個令人難以置信的地點！

由許多您最喜愛的迪士尼角色主演的五項腦筋急轉彎挑戰。解決所有問題，就有機會瞭解上面到底發生了什麼事！

難道這一切都是夢嗎？玩米奇的終極挑戰並自己決定！

overview_en: If you're bored of racing Formula 1 cars, rally cars or MotoGP bikes in their natural habitats, the Micro Machines series could be for you. It involves racing miniatures representing particular vehicle types across a particular terrain found around the house. The Sports Cars race on the desktop, 4x4s in the sandpit, Formula 1 cars on a snooker table, and so on.
overview_zh: 如果您厭倦了在自然棲息地駕駛一級方程式賽車、拉力賽車或 MotoGP 腳踏車，微型機器系列可能適合您。它涉及代表房屋周圍特定地形上特定車輛型別的賽車微縮模型。跑車在桌面上比賽，四輪驅動在沙坑中比賽，一級方程式賽車在斯諾克臺上比賽，等等。

overview_en: 16 crazy characters to choose from! Bigger, Better, Faster, Meaner, More! They're back! Codemasters brings you Micro Machines 2 - Turbo Tournament, packing more micro power than ever before. Hovering, tracking, biking, the game has exploded in every aspect. Interactive courses, rain, wild jumps and much much more. - Head to Head, Challenge, Knockouts, Super League. - Over 37 interactive courses with animated hazards. - Up to 8 people can play in a tournament. - Wild music and FX. - 12 all-new incredible vehicles to drive!
overview_zh: 16 個瘋狂的角色可供選擇！更大、更好、更快、更小、更多！他們回來了！ Codemasters 為您帶來 Micro Machines 2 - Turbo Tournament，具有比以往更多的微動力。懸停、追蹤、騎行，遊戲在各方面都爆發了。互動課程、下雨、狂野跳躍等等。 - 面對面、挑戰、淘汰賽、超級聯賽。 - 超過 37 個有動畫危險的互動課程。 - 錦標賽最多可有 8 人參加。 - 狂野的音樂和FX。 - 12 種全新的令人難以置信的車輛可供駕駛！

overview_en: Micro Machines: Turbo Tournament 96 is a sequel to Micro Machines 2: Turbo Tournament, released exclusively on the Sega Mega Drive in Europe.
overview_zh: 《微型機器：渦輪錦標賽 96》是《微型機器 2：渦輪錦標賽》的續作，在歐洲的 Sega Mega Drive 上獨家發行。

title_jp: ミッドナイトレジスタンス
overview_en: You're the toughest soldier in the Resistance. That's why the Evil Head snatched your family. You're outnumbered, but not outsmarted. You and a three-barrel machine gun are gonna even the score! Bash into Evil Head's compound, battling tanks, missiles and flying robots in skull-to-skull combat. Crawl through bullet-filled corridors, stomp through flak-laden forests, swing down ladders and dive off ledges to ambush the evil army. The enemy hammers you with heavy artillery, rapid-fire lasers and slashing sawblades. You pound them with flamethrowers, nitro bombs and machine guns - your explosive-tipped bullets tear into their armor. The Head's forces are vicious and armed to the eye sockets. So what! Climb, leap and snarl through 7 levels of explosive action. Nothing can stop your rage!
overview_zh: 《Midnight Resistance》是 1990 年運行的 Data East 大型電玩動作射擊遊戲。玩家操作主角圓大地，目標擊敗天才科學家「King Crimson」並救出父母與妹妹。1990 年於歐洲移植 Amiga、Atari ST、C64、ZX Spectrum，1991 年移植 Mega Drive。
overview_jp:
『ミッドナイトレジスタンス』は、1990年に稼働したデータイーストのアーケード用アクションシューティングゲーム。
主人公の円大地を操作し、天才科学者「キングクリムゾン」を倒し両親と妹を救出することを目的としている。
1990年に欧州ではAmiga、Amstrad CPC、Atari ST、コモドール64、ZX Spectrumに移植され、1991年にはメガドライブに移植された。メガドライブ版は2010年にWindows用ソフトとしてプロジェクトEGGにて配信された。

overview_en:
A collection of five classic arcade games released by Williams. The games included are:
Defender
Defender II (Stargate)
Joust
Robotron 2084
Sinistar
overview_zh:
威廉斯發布的五款經典街機遊戲合輯。包含的遊戲有：
後衛
Defender II (Stargate)
比武
Robotron 2084
Sinistar

overview_en: MiG-29: Fighter Pilot takes place in the Middle East. The joined forces of NATO and the Commonwealth of Soviet States are to stop General Hasouz who is seeking to gain control over the world's oil resources. You are the pilot of the Russian-built MiG-29 and you need to accomplish several strategic missions to ensure the success of the operation.
overview_zh: MiG-29：戰鬥機飛行員的故事發生在中東。北約和蘇維埃國家聯合體將阻止哈蘇茲將軍企圖控制世界石油資源。你是俄羅斯製造的 MiG-29 的飛行員，你需要完成多項戰略任務以確保行動的成功。

overview_en: MiG-29: Fighter Pilot takes place in the Middle East. The joined forces of NATO and the Commonwealth of Soviet States are to stop General Hasouz who is seeking to gain control over the world's oil resources. You are the pilot of the Russian-built MiG-29 and you need to accomplish several strategic missions to ensure the success of the operation.
overview_zh: MiG-29：戰鬥機飛行員的故事發生在中東。北約和蘇維埃國家聯合體將阻止哈蘇茲將軍企圖控制世界石油資源。你是俄羅斯製造的 MiG-29 的飛行員，你需要完成多項戰略任務以確保行動的成功。

title_en: Might and Magic - Gates to Another World
no_intro_name: Might and Magic - Gates to Another World (USA)
overview_en: Gates to Another World is the second installment in the Might and Magic series, and a sequel to Secret of the Inner Sanctum. Core gameplay is similar to it's predecessor, with the player creating a party of six characters and exploring vast first-person 3D environments, while fighting enemies in turn-based combat and leveling up. Unlike the first game, enemy encounters occur at set points rather than spawning randomly, though enemy type selection is still random.
overview_zh: 《通往異世界之門》是《魔法門》系列的第二部，也是《內殿的秘密》的續集。 Core gameplay is similar to it's predecessor, with the player creating a party of six characters and exploring vast first-person 3D environments, while fighting enemies in turn-based combat and leveling up.與第一款遊戲不同的是，敵人的遭遇是在設定點發生的，而不是隨機產生的，儘管敵人型別的選擇仍然是隨機的。

title_en: Might and Magic III: Isles of Terra
title_jp: マイト アンド マジックIII
overview_en: Might and Magic 3 brought a lot of changes to the series formula. First off, it 3 is distinctly more narrative focused than the earlier games; it opens with a fully voiced sequence where your party is taunted by a mysterious figure, Sheltem, the barely-fleshed-out villain of the first two games, who is still knocking around. Although it's still possible to create new characters, the game is also the first in the series to start the player off with a pre-generated party, lead by the noble Paladin Sir Caneghem (named after the head designer of the game). This is also the first game in the series outside of the Macintosh versions of the games to support playing using a mouse.
overview_zh: 《魔法門3》為系列公式帶來了許多變化。首先，《It 3》明顯比之前的遊戲更注重敘事；它以全語音序列開始，你的隊伍被一個神秘人物謝爾特姆（Sheltem）嘲笑，他是前兩場遊戲中幾乎沒有血肉之軀的惡棍，他仍然在附近閒逛。儘管仍然可以建立新角色，但該遊戲也是該系列中第一個讓玩家以預先生成的派對開始的遊戲，由高貴的聖騎士 Caneghem 爵士（以遊戲首席設計師的名字命名）領導。這也是該系列中第一款除 Macintosh 版本之外支援使用滑鼠進行遊戲的遊戲。

title_en: Might and Magic III - Isles of Terra
no_intro_name: Might and Magic III - Isles of Terra (Japan)
overview_en: Might and Magic 3 brought a lot of changes to the series formula. First off, it 3 is distinctly more narrative focused than the earlier games; it opens with a fully voiced sequence where your party is taunted by a mysterious figure, Sheltem, the barely-fleshed-out villain of the first two games, who is still knocking around. Although it's still possible to create new characters, the game is also the first in the series to start the player off with a pre-generated party, lead by the noble Paladin Sir Caneghem (named after the head designer of the game). This is also the first game in the series outside of the Macintosh versions of the games to support playing using a mouse.
overview_zh: 《魔法門3》為系列公式帶來了許多變化。首先，《It 3》明顯比之前的遊戲更注重敘事；它以全語音序列開始，你的隊伍被一個神秘人物謝爾特姆（Sheltem）嘲笑，他是前兩場遊戲中幾乎沒有血肉之軀的惡棍，他仍然在附近閒逛。儘管仍然可以建立新角色，但該遊戲也是該系列中第一個讓玩家以預先生成的派對開始的遊戲，由高貴的聖騎士 Caneghem 爵士（以遊戲首席設計師的名字命名）領導。這也是該系列中第一款除 Macintosh 版本之外支援使用滑鼠進行遊戲的遊戲。

title_en: Might _ Magic III - Isles of Terra
no_intro_name: Might _ Magic III - Isles of Terra (Japan)

overview_en: It's Morphin Time! Five ordinary teens morph into the Power Rangers to foil the plans of the Evil Empress Rita Repulsa and save planet Earth. Choose your favorite Power Ranger color - Red, Yellow, Blue, Pink or Black! Battle huge, fierce and spectacular enemies! Even the Green Ranger and the fearsome Dragonzord! Sharpen your "Zord Play" in eight awesome difficulty levels!
overview_zh: 現在是嗎啡時間！五名普通青少年變身為恐龍戰隊，以挫敗邪惡女皇麗塔·雷普爾薩的計劃並拯救地球。選擇您最喜歡的《電力別動隊》顏色 - 紅色、黃色、藍色、粉紅色或黑色！與巨大、兇猛、壯觀的敵人戰鬥！甚至還有綠色遊俠和可怕的龍佐德！在八個令人驚嘆的難度級別中磨練你的“Zord Play”！

overview_en: It's Morphin Time! Five ordinary teens morph into the Power Rangers to foil the plans of the Evil Empress Rita Repulsa and save planet Earth. Choose your favorite Power Ranger color - Red, Yellow, Blue, Pink or Black! Battle huge, fierce and spectacular enemies! Even the Green Ranger and the fearsome Dragonzord! Sharpen your "Zord Play" in eight awesome difficulty levels!
overview_zh: 現在是嗎啡時間！五名普通青少年變身為恐龍戰隊，以挫敗邪惡女皇麗塔·雷普爾薩的計劃並拯救地球。選擇您最喜歡的《電力別動隊》顏色 - 紅色、黃色、藍色、粉紅色或黑色！與巨大、兇猛、壯觀的敵人戰鬥！甚至還有綠色遊俠和可怕的龍佐德！在八個令人驚嘆的難度級別中磨練你的“Zord Play”！

title_en: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers - The Movie
no_intro_name: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers - The Movie (Europe)
overview_en:
After six thousand years in exile, Ivan Ooze returns to Earth to launch a new reign of terror. Can the Power Rangers save the universe from the evil Ivan Ooze before he brainwashes everyone? See the movie and play the game!

• Choose from all six Power Rangers: Tommy (White), Kimberly (Pink), Billy (Blue), Aisha (Yellow), Adam (Black), and Rocky (Red).
• Each Power Ranger has his or her own unique moves and power plays - plus extraordinary new powers!
• All the new enemies straight from the movie and the TV series!
• One or two-player games for hours of fighting action-packed combat!
overview_zh:
流亡六千年後，伊凡·軟泥回到地球，開始了新的恐怖統治。電力別動隊能否在邪惡的伊凡軟泥洗腦所有人之前拯救宇宙？看電影、玩遊戲！

• 從全部六名恐龍戰隊中進行選擇：湯米（白色）、金伯利（粉紅色）、比利（藍色）、艾莎（黃色）、亞當（黑色）和洛基（紅色）。
• 每個恐龍戰隊都有自己獨特的動作和力量玩法 - 以及非凡的新力量！
• 所有新敵人均直接來自電影和電視劇！
• 一名或兩名玩家可以進行數小時的充滿動感的戰鬥！

overview_en: Mike Ditka Power Football is an American football game for the Sega Mega Drive. It was released without a license from Sega.
overview_zh: Mike Ditka Power Football 是世嘉 Mega Drive 的美式足球遊戲。它是在沒有世嘉許可的情況下發布的。

overview_en: Minnesota Fats: Pool Legend is a pool game where the player can participate in a story mode and play against a set of pros in six different pool halls in an attempt to face off against Minnesota Fats himself. There are seven different variations of pool to play: Eight-Ball, Nine-Ball, Rotation, 14-1 rack, Three ball, Cut Throat & One Pocket. There is also a Versus Mode to let players take on any opponent of their choice including a two-player option to take on a friend and a Tournament Mode. Players can also try out the Trick Mode that has the player try to compete 16 different trick shots.
overview_zh: 《Minnesota Fats: Pool Legend》是一款撞球遊戲，玩家可以參與故事模式，並在六個不同的撞球廳與一組職業選手對戰，試圖與 Minnesota Fats 本人對決。有七種不同的撞球可供選擇：八球、九球、輪換、14-1 球檯、三球、割喉和一袋。還有一種對戰模式，可以讓玩家與自己選擇的任何對手較量，包括與朋友較量的兩人選項和錦標賽模式。玩家還可以嘗試特技模式，讓玩家嘗試比拼 16 種不同的特技擊球。

overview_en: The strategy of baseball is merged with a fast-paced arcade game in MLBPA Baseball from Electronic Arts. Details designed to appeal to the die-hard fan include: real players with statistics based on the 1993 season; a full 162 game season mode; stadium music; animated scoreboards; defensive alignments; cut-off plays; run-downs; and even the double switch. Features meant to appeal to the casual fan include: large colorful arcade graphics; one stadium with animated crowds; a simplified pitching interface allowing players to steer the ball; and a batting interface that relies on timing instead of aiming cursors. Secret power-up play modes await so step up to the plate and take some hacks! Season play can be continued using passwords provided at the end of each game.
overview_zh: Electronic Arts 的《MLBPA 棒球》將棒球策略與快節奏街機遊戲融為一體。為吸引鐵桿球迷而設計的細節包括： 真實球員的統計資料基於 1993 賽季；完整的 162 場比賽賽季模式；體育場音樂；動畫記分牌；防守陣型；中斷比賽；破敗；甚至雙開關。旨在吸引休閒粉絲的功能包括：大型彩色街機圖形；一座人群熙熙攘攘的體育場；簡化的投球介面，允許玩家控制球；以及依賴計時而不是瞄準遊標的擊球介面。秘密的強化遊戲模式正等著您，趕快行動起來，採取一些技巧吧！可以使用每場比賽結束時提供的密碼繼續賽季比賽。

title_jp: モンキー・アイランドユーレイ海賊大騒動！

overview_en: Monopoly is fantastic fun for the entire family. You can play against the computer - with skill levels you select - or get up to 10 players in on the action. It has special features such as a built-in battery so you can save games and play them later. Roll the dice with a push of a button. Your token comes to life and moves around the board! Buy companies and properties. Increase the value of your properties by building houses and hotels. Land on "Chance" or "Community Chest" and pick a card. With strategy and luck, you can become a winner. But you never know how the dice will roll!
overview_zh: 大富翁對整個家庭來說都是非常有趣的。您可以與電腦對戰 - 您可以選擇技能等級 - 也可以與最多 10 名玩家一起比賽。它具有特殊功能，例如內建電池，因此您可以儲存遊戲並稍後玩。按下按鈕即可擲骰子。您的代幣將變得栩栩如生並在棋盤上移動！購買公司和房產。透過建造房屋和酒店來增加財產的價值。登陸“機會”或“公益金”並選擇一張卡。憑藉策略和運氣，您可以成為勝利者。但你永遠不知道骰子會如何滾動！

overview_en:
Monster World IV is a 1994 Mega Drive video game developed by Westone and released by Sega in Japan on April 1, 1994.

The story involves a young girl named Asha, who, upon hearing spirits whisper on the wind pleading for help, embarks on a journey to find and help them. Along the way she becomes the master of a genie and adopts a small flying creature known as Pepelogoo.

Expanding upon previous games in the series, Asha has the ability to swing her sword upward, downward, and forward while in midair, depending on which direction is pressed. She can also use her shield while standing by holding down.

Asha can summon her pet Pepelogoo to reach areas that she cannot on her own. By holding onto him, she can slow the descent of her jump (via his flying ability) or even perform a double-jump. Pepelogoo can also protect Asha from falling rocks, be used as a platform over lava geysers, and blow out fires that obstruct Asha's progress.

Equipment upgrades are purchased in the hub town. Armor increases Asha's pink life heart meter. Shields increase her defense and give her stat resistances to certain elements, such as fire or ice. Swords increase Asha's attack stats with critical effects depending on the sword.

Some items cannot be purchased and must be found in the temples and caverns that Asha must explore. Healing medicine will restore Asha's health or bring her back to life if she has Pepelogoo. Gold bars can be traded with the rich lady in town for in-game currency. And finally, there are 150 life drops hidden throughout the game. Collecting ten will add a blue life heart to the life meter.

Items can be permanently missed. Once an area's boss is defeated, that area is inaccessible for the rest of the game.
overview_zh: 《Monster World IV》是 1994 年 4 月 1 日由日本 SEGA 世嘉發售的 Mega Drive 動作角色扮演遊戲。為「Wonder Boy／Monster World」系列作品，少女主角 Asha 與夥伴妖精 Pepelogoo 一同冒險。
overview_jp: 『モンスターワールドIV』 (Monster World IV) は、1994年4月1日に日本のセガから発売されたメガドライブ用アクションロールプレイングゲーム。

overview_en: The series takes place in a fictional universe that consists of six surviving realms which, according to in-game backstories, were created by the Elder Gods. The Mortal Kombat: Deception manual described the six realms as: "Earthrealm, home to such legendary heroes as Johnny Cage, Sonya Blade, Liu Kang, and Jax, and also under the protection of the Thunder God Raiden; Netherrealm, which fiery depths are inhospitable to but the most vile, a realm of demons and shadowy warriors; Outworld, a realm of constant strife and where Emperor Shao Kahn claims this realm as his own; Seido, The Realm of Order, whose inhabitants prize structure and order above all else; The Realm of Chaos, whose inhabitants do not abide by any rules whatsoever, where constant turmoil and change are worshipped here; and Edenia, which is known for its beauty, artistic expression, and longevity of its inhabitants."
overview_zh: 該系列故事發生在一個虛構的宇宙中，該宇宙由六個倖存的領域組成，根據遊戲中的背景故事，這些領域是由古代之神創造的。 《真人快打：欺騙》手冊將這六個領域描述為：「地球領域，約翰尼凱奇、索尼婭布萊德、劉康和賈克斯等傳奇英雄的家園，並受到雷神雷電的保護；虛空領域，熾熱的深淵不適合居住，但最邪惡，是惡魔和陰暗戰士的領域；外星世界，一個不斷衝突的領域，紹康皇帝聲稱這個領域是他自己的領域；而天界，一個充滿了惡魔和陰暗武士的領域，一個充滿火熱的深淵，但最邪惡的領域。 Seido，秩序之國，其居民視結構和秩序高於一切；混沌之國，其居民不遵守任何規則，這裡崇拜持續的動盪和變化；伊甸園，以其美麗、藝術表現力和居民的長壽而聞名。

overview_en:
Fed up with continuous losses in tournament battle, Shao Kahn, who had lost to Liu Kang in the Outworld tournament, enacts a 10,000 year-old plan. He would have his Shadow Priests, led by Shang Tsung, revive his former Queen Sindel, who unexpectedly died at a young age. However, she wouldn't be revived in the Outworld. She would be resurrected in the Earthrealm. This would allow Shao Kahn to cross the boundary lines and reclaim his queen.
When Sindel is reincarnated in Earthrealm, Shao Kahn reaches across the dimensions to reclaim her. As a consequence of his action, the Earthrealm becomes a part of the Outworld, instantly stripping billions of their souls. Only a few are spared, as Raiden protects their souls. He tells them that Shao Kahn must be stopped, but he cannot interfere; due to his status, he has no power in Outworld, and Earthrealm is partially merged with Outworld.
Shao Kahn has unleashed extermination squads to roam throughout the Earthrealm and kill any survivors. Also, Raiden's protection only extends to the soul, not to the body, so his chosen warriors have to fight the extermination squads and repel Shao Kahn. Eventually with his final defeat, every human on Earthrealm comes back.
Mortal Kombat 3 follows Mortal Kombat II and shares continuity with both Ultimate Mortal Kombat 3 and Mortal Kombat Trilogy which were both updates of this game. The next new game in the series was Mortal Kombat 4.
overview_zh:
在Outworld錦標賽中輸給劉康的紹卡因厭倦了錦標賽的連敗，制定了一個萬年前的計劃。他會讓尚宗領導的暗影牧師復活他年輕時意外去世的前女王辛德爾。然而，她不會在異世界復活。她將在地球領域復活。這將使紹康能夠跨越邊界並奪回他的女王。
當辛德爾在地球領域轉世時，紹康跨越維度去奪回她。由於他的行動，地球領域成為了外在世界的一部分，立即剝奪了數十億人的靈魂。只有少數人倖免於難，因為雷電保護著他們的靈魂。他告訴他們必須阻止紹康，但他不能干涉；由於他的身份，他在外星世界沒有任何權力，而地球領域也與外星世界部分合併。
紹康派遣了消滅小隊在整個地球領域遊蕩並殺死所有倖存者。此外，雷電的保護只延伸到靈魂，而不是身體，所以他選擇的戰士必須與消滅小隊作戰並擊退紹康。最終，隨著他的最終失敗，Earthrealm 上的每個人類都回來了。
《真人快打 3》繼承了《真人快打 II》，並與《終極真人快打 3》和《真人快打三部曲》保持了連續性，這兩個遊戲都是該遊戲的更新。系列的下一款新遊戲是《真人快打 4》。

overview_en: The series takes place in a fictional universe that consists of six surviving realms which, according to in-game backstories, were created by the Elder Gods. The Mortal Kombat: Deception manual described the six realms as: "Earthrealm, home to such legendary heroes as Johnny Cage, Sonya Blade, Liu Kang, and Jax, and also under the protection of the Thunder God Raiden; Netherrealm, which fiery depths are inhospitable to but the most vile, a realm of demons and shadowy warriors; Outworld, a realm of constant strife and where Emperor Shao Kahn claims this realm as his own; Seido, The Realm of Order, whose inhabitants prize structure and order above all else; The Realm of Chaos, whose inhabitants do not abide by any rules whatsoever, where constant turmoil and change are worshipped here; and Edenia, which is known for its beauty, artistic expression, and longevity of its inhabitants."
overview_zh: 該系列故事發生在一個虛構的宇宙中，該宇宙由六個倖存的領域組成，根據遊戲中的背景故事，這些領域是由古代之神創造的。 《真人快打：欺騙》手冊將這六個領域描述為：「地球領域，約翰尼凱奇、索尼婭布萊德、劉康和賈克斯等傳奇英雄的家園，並受到雷神雷電的保護；虛空領域，熾熱的深淵不適合居住，但最邪惡，是惡魔和陰暗戰士的領域；外星世界，一個不斷衝突的領域，紹康皇帝聲稱這個領域是他自己的領域；而天界，一個充滿了惡魔和陰暗武士的領域，一個充滿火熱的深淵，但最邪惡的領域。 Seido，秩序之國，其居民視結構和秩序高於一切；混沌之國，其居民不遵守任何規則，這裡崇拜持續的動盪和變化；伊甸園，以其美麗、藝術表現力和居民的長壽而聞名。

overview_en: Following his failure to defeat Liu Kang in the first Mortal Kombat game, the evil sorcerer Shang Tsung begs his master, Shao Kahn, to spare his life. He tells Shao Kahn that the invitation for Mortal Kombat cannot be turned down, and if they hold it in Outworld, the Earthrealm warriors must attend. Kahn agrees to this plan, and even restores Tsung's youth. He then extends the invitation to Raiden, who gathers his warriors and takes them into Outworld. The new tournament is much more dangerous, as Shao Kahn has the home field advantage, and an Outworld victory will allow him to subdue Earthrealm.
overview_zh: 在第一款真人快打遊戲中未能擊敗劉康後，邪惡巫師尚宗懇求他的主人紹康饒他一命。他告訴紹康，真人快打的邀請是不能拒絕的，如果他們在外星舉辦，地球領域的戰士必須參加。卡恩同意了這個計劃，甚至讓Tsung恢復了青春。然後他向雷電發出邀請，雷電召集了他的戰士並帶他們進入了外星世界。新的錦標賽更加危險，因為紹康擁有主場優勢，而異星的勝利將使他能夠征服地球領域。

title_jp: モータルコンバット完全版
overview_en: The series takes place in a fictional universe that consists of six surviving realms which, according to in-game backstories, were created by the Elder Gods. The Mortal Kombat: Deception manual described the six realms as: "Earthrealm, home to such legendary heroes as Johnny Cage, Sonya Blade, Liu Kang, and Jax, and also under the protection of the Thunder God Raiden; Netherrealm, which fiery depths are inhospitable to but the most vile, a realm of demons and shadowy warriors; Outworld, a realm of constant strife and where Emperor Shao Kahn claims this realm as his own; Seido, The Realm of Order, whose inhabitants prize structure and order above all else; The Realm of Chaos, whose inhabitants do not abide by any rules whatsoever, where constant turmoil and change are worshipped here; and Edenia, which is known for its beauty, artistic expression, and longevity of its inhabitants."

overview_en: MR. NUTZ - Only he can prevent a new and permanent ice age. To help him on his way he's got a lotta Nutz, a lotta gutz, and one enormous tail!
overview_zh: 先生。 NUTZ - 只有他才能阻止新的永久冰河時期。為了幫助他前進，他有一個非常瘋狂的人，一個非常勇敢的人，還有一條巨大的尾巴！

overview_en:
Ms. Pac-Man has 36 ways to drive you totally wild and crazy with more fun than you've ever imagined. She gets to run around in 36 unique, mind-boggling mazes! Some small ones. Some so big you'll have to scroll around. Some that are mighty strange. And some that are straight out of the arcades! Whether you choose Easy, Normal, Hard, or Crazy speeds, Ms. Pac-Man will have you running ragged! There's even a Pac Booster button to really let her shake those pesky ghosts. Play Ms. Pac-Man by yourself or take turns with a friend. Better yet, two can play at the same time—one as the divine Ms. Pac-Man; the other, as the original Pac-Man!

UPC / Barcode: 031763030508
overview_zh:
吃豆人女士有 36 種方式讓你徹底瘋狂，樂趣超乎你的想像。她可以在 36 個獨特、令人難以置信的迷宮中奔跑！一些小的。有些太大了，你必須滾動才能看到。有些非常奇怪。還有一些是直接從街機出來的！無論您選擇簡單、正常、困難或瘋狂速度，吃豆人女士都會讓您疲憊不堪！甚至還有一個 Pac Booster 按鈕，可以真正讓她擺脫那些討厭的幽靈。自己玩吃豆人小姐或與朋友輪流玩。更好的是，兩個人可以同時玩——一個扮演神聖的吃豆人女士，另一個扮演吃豆人。另一個是原版吃豆人！

UPC/條碼：031763030508

overview_en:
What would you think if your best friend went on a date with the King of the Dark World - because she thought he was cute?! You'd think she'd been duped - and you'd be right. The fiendish King Rogles stands poised to conquer the other worlds of the universe: the Dream World of Queen Valia, and the Human World. Rogles and his five Dark Lords have taken the force of Yang from Queen Valia and sealed it into a Fantasm Jewel. Only a warrior with a heart perfectly balanced between Yin and Yang can wield the Sword of Valis against the encroaching darkness! 

Yuko, a young student from the Human World, is the chosen one - and you will control her. She is to become the greatest warrior in the universe, never suspecting that her most fearsome battle will not be against a Dark Lord, but against her closest friend from the Human World - the one she warned, "Don't go out with him, he's the Dark..." But before she could finish, her friend ran off into The Darkness.
overview_zh: 《夢幻戰士 Valis》（英文名 The Fantasm Soldier Valis）是 Wolf Team 開發、1986 年由日本 Telnet 發售的 PC-8801mkIISR 後及 X1、MSX 用橫向捲軸動作遊戲。少女戰士優子使用神劍 Valis 在夢幻世界與夢魔界對抗惡魔王 Rogles。
overview_jp: 『夢幻戦士ヴァリス』（むげんせんしヴァリス、英題：The Fantasm Soldier Valis）は、ウルフ・チームが開発し1986年に日本テレネットから発売されたPC-8801mkIISR以降およびX1、MSX用横スクロールアクションゲーム。

overview_en:
In career mode, the player can choose to fight as any of the game's 10 boxers. They start at rank 10 in the heavyweight division, and fight their way through all the others in order.

UPC / Barcode: 052145820067
overview_zh:
在生涯模式中，玩家可以選擇扮演遊戲中 10 名拳擊手中的任何一位進行戰鬥。他們從重量級的第十名開始，並按順序從所有其他選手中脫穎而出。

UPC/條碼：052145820067

title_en: Musha Aleste: Full Metal Fighter Ellinor
no_intro_name: Musha Aleste - Full Metal Fighter Ellinor (Japan) (Switch Online)
overview_zh: 《武者 Aleste》是 1990 年 12 月 21 日由日本東亞 Plan 發售的 Mega Drive 縱向捲軸射擊遊戲，海外版名為《M.U.S.H.A.》。為《Aleste 系列》（1988-1993）第 3 作。以天曆 91 年為舞台，玩家操作「MUSHA 部隊」搭乘的自機，目標擊敗失控環境控制系統中樞「大亞 51」拯救地球。雖以未來為背景，卻具有鎧武者、瓦屋頂等純和風世界觀為特色。由 Compile 開發，2008 年於 Wii Virtual Console 配信。
overview_jp:
『武者アレスタ』は、1990年12月21日に日本の東亜プランから発売されたメガドライブ用縦スクロールシューティングゲーム。日本国外では『M.U.S.H.A.』のタイトルで発売された。
同社の『アレスタシリーズ』（1988年 - 1993年）の第3作目。天暦91年を舞台に主人公の「MUSHA部隊」が搭乗する自機を操作し、暴走した環境制御システムの中枢である「大亜51」を倒して地球を救出する事を目的としている。未来を舞台としながらも、鎧武者や瓦屋根などの純和風の世界観を持つ事を特徴としている。
開発はコンパイルが行い、プロデューサーはアレスタシリーズを手掛けた仁井谷正充、プログラムはテクノソフトから発売されたパソコン用ソフト『ヘルツォーク』（1988年）を手掛けた外山雄一とケイ・アミューズメントリースから発売されたファミリーコンピュータ用ソフト『タッチダウンフィーバー』（1988年）を手掛けた弓恭羅、音楽はナグザットから発売されたPCエンジン用ソフト『エイリアンクラッシュ』（1988年）を手掛けた迫田敏明が担当している。
2008年にはWii用ソフトとしてバーチャルコンソールにて配信された。
当初は『重殻装甲アレスタ』のタイトルで、エーワンという会社から発売予定だったが、その後発売元が東亜プランになり、タイトルも変更された。
後年、他のゲーム機用ソフトとして移植した事例については、#移植版を参照。

title_en: MUSHA - Metallic Uniframe Super Hybrid Armor
no_intro_name: MUSHA - Metallic Uniframe Super Hybrid Armor (USA)

title_jp: ミュータントリーグ・フットボール
overview_en:
Futuristic, intergalactic war disguised as American Football, Mutant League Football was one of the most unique football games ever to hit the gaming market. It's a unique blend of sports and sci-fi, and the actual football is the good ol' smash-mouth kind, literally.

Dynamite throwing running backs, blitzing trolls, robots that bleed oil, it's all here. Opposing quarterback connecting on too many passes? Blitz him 'til he's dead. Suspect the ref's been bribed by the other side? Call a Kill Ref audible; it's a 5 yard penalty though. 

Take your pick from nineteen teams, including three All-Star teams. There are five difficulty levels and a slow/fast game speed toggle. A tournament mode awaits those who want something more than a quick game versus the computer or a friend.

There are nineteen different fields to play on, all with there own special quirks. The Hellfield is littered with mines and fire pits to put an end to a careless runner, while The Pen is a slippery sheet of ice.
overview_zh:
偽裝成美式足球的未來星際戰爭，《變種人聯盟足球》是遊戲市場上最獨特的足球遊戲之一。這是運動和科幻的獨特結合，而真正的足球是真正的精彩足球。

投擲炸藥的跑衛、閃電般的巨魔、會流油的機器人，一切都在這裡。對方四分衛傳球太多？閃電戰他直到他死。懷疑裁判被對方賄賂？打電話給 Kill Ref 聲音；但這是5碼的處罰。 

從十九支球隊中挑選，包括三支全明星球隊。有五個難度等級和慢/快遊戲速度切換。錦標賽模式等待著那些想要與電腦或朋友進行快速遊戲之外的東西的人。

有十九個不同的場地可供比賽，每個場地都有自己的特殊之處。地獄原野佈滿了地雷和火坑，可以終結粗心的跑步者，而圍欄則是一片光滑的冰面。

overview_en: Mutant League Hockey is a violent hockey game in the same series as Mutant League Football. There are 23 bizarre hockey teams to choose from, with players consisting of zombies, skeletons, trolls, and robots. The arenas are equally strange, with hidden bottomless pits, mines placed under the ice, spikes, and a "Demon Net" that functions as a goalie by chomping up and down and devouring the puck. The game plays similar to normal hockey, except in this game your players can pick up chainsaws, maces, axes, etc. to use against the competition. It's a bloody game, with opponents exploding into piles of goo (or circuits if they are a robot) when they become too injured. The player can call special plays, like an exploding puck or jail break and attack the goalie. The game also has fighting sequences if two players decide to get into a brawl. The game comes with multiplayer and a playoff series, full stats for your players and instant replays.
overview_zh: 《變種人聯盟曲棍球》是一款與《變種人聯盟足球》同系列的暴力曲棍球遊戲。有 23 支奇異的曲棍球隊可供選擇，球員包括殭屍、骷髏、巨魔和機器人。競技場也同樣奇怪，有隱藏的無底洞、埋在冰下的地雷、尖刺，還有一張“惡魔網”，它可以上下咀嚼併吞噬冰球，充當守門員。遊戲的玩法與普通曲棍球類似，不同之處在於您的玩家可以拿起電鋸、狼牙棒、斧頭等來對抗比賽。這是一場血腥的遊戲，當對手受傷太重時，他們會爆炸成一堆黏液（如果他們是機器人，就會爆炸成電路）。玩家可以呼叫特殊的比賽，例如爆炸冰球或越獄並攻擊守門員。如果兩個玩家決定打架，遊戲也會有戰鬥序列。遊戲提供多人遊戲和季後賽系列賽、球員的完整統計資料和即時重播。

title_en: My Paint - The Animated Paint Program
no_intro_name: My Paint - The Animated Paint Program (USA)

overview_en: Azuchi Castle - huge, terrifying, and out of reach! It's the den of the Devil's Disciple and the Emperor of Evil! It's also where the beautiful Alexandra is held prisoner, facing a deadly ordeal. Can you save her? You are Yamato, incredible warrior and possessor of Magic. Your journey writhes with danger. Monstrous centipedes and grotesque spiders, frogs, and larvae wait to clutch your body and chew on your head. Can you take it? Can you stay alive while battling Flying Goblins, Ghostly Bones, and the Six-Faced Phantom? Can you reach the maniac genius Zareth before he steals Alexandra's soul? Blast your enemies with Magic! Hurl Psycho and Sonic to boggle them. Scorch them with flame! Pound them to dust with Thunder Dragon! The Castle awaits.
overview_zh: 安土城－巨大、可怕、遙不可及！這裡是魔徒與邪帝的老巢！這裡也是美麗的亞歷山德拉被囚禁的地方，她面臨致命的考驗。你能救她嗎？你是大和，不可思議的戰士和魔法擁有者。你的旅程充滿危險。巨大的蜈蚣、奇形怪狀的蜘蛛、青蛙和幼蟲等待著抓住你的身體並啃咬你的頭。你能接受嗎？在與飛哥布林、鬼骨和六面幻影戰鬥時，你能活下來嗎？你能在瘋狂天才澤雷偷走亞歷珊卓的靈魂之前找到他嗎？用魔法轟炸你的敵人！丟出賽克和索尼克，讓他們感到困惑。用火焰燒焦他們！用雷龍將他們打成粉碎！城堡等著您。

overview_en:
Like in most games of the genre, the player (who controls a kabuki) can use combos, flips and swings to fight against tough opponents, fighting them in groups from three to five. Surprinsingly, boss fights are often easier than regular enemies. There is also a time limit, usually about forty seconds, for the player to finish the stage. If the time reaches zero before the player passes the stage, the player will automatically lose the game as it will be declared a defeat. Similar to Golden Axe, the player can use a special magic power, but instead of bottles the player must manually pick up scrolls. The more scrolls the player has, the stronger the magic attack will be; if the player chooses to use this attack, all the scrolls will be consumed.

There are also hidden bonus stages that can be accessed if the player approaches certain doors or rooms. These bonus stages contain magic scrolls, items to refill the character's health bar, or weapons. There are also traps and holes that both the player or the enemies can fall into. The traps and pits do not always hinder the player, and in fact can be beneficial if the player throws an enemy directly into the pit.
overview_zh:
與大多數此類遊戲一樣，玩家（控制歌舞伎）可以使用連擊、翻轉和搖擺來對抗強硬的對手，以三到五人為一組進行戰鬥。令人驚訝的是，boss 戰鬥通常​​比普通敵人更容易。玩家完成關卡還有一個時間限制，通常約四十秒。如果玩家過關前時間為零，則玩家將自動輸掉比賽，並被宣告失敗。與金斧類似，玩家可以使用特殊的魔法力量，但玩家必須手動拾取捲軸而不是瓶子。玩家擁有的捲軸越多，魔法攻擊力就越強；如果玩家選擇使用此攻擊，所有捲軸將被消耗。

如果玩家接近某些門或房間，還可以進入隱藏的獎勵階段。這些獎勵階段包含魔法捲軸、補充角色生命值的物品或武器。還有玩家或敵人都可能掉入的陷阱和洞。陷阱和坑並不總是阻礙玩家，事實上，如果玩家將敵人直接扔進坑中，這可能是有益的。

title_en: Nakajima Satoru Kanshuu - F-1 Grand Prix
no_intro_name: Nakajima Satoru Kanshuu - F-1 Grand Prix (Japan)
overview_en:
Nakajima Satoru Kanshuu F1 Grand Prix (中島悟監修 Ｆ-１ ＧＲＡＮＤ ＰＲＩＸ) is a 1991 game by Varie for the Sega Mega Drive in their Nakajima Satoru Kanshuu series of Formula One racing games released exclusively in Japan.

The game is a typical overhead 2D racing game. A accelerates, B brakes, Left and Right seers, and Up and Down change gears.
overview_zh:
Nakajima Satoru Kanshuu F1 Grand Prix（中島悟監修 Ｆ-１ ＧＲＡＮＤ ＰＲＩＸ）是 1991 年由 Varie 為 Sega Mega Drive 開發的一款在日本獨家遊戲遊戲中的獨家遊戲模型。

該遊戲是一款典型的架空2D賽車遊戲。 A 加速，B 煞車，左右變速，上下變速。

title_en: Nakajima Satoru Kanshuu: F-1 Hero MD
title_jp: 中島悟監修 F-1 ヒーローMD
no_intro_name: Nakajima Satoru Kanshuu - F-1 Hero MD (Japan)

title_en: Nakajima Satoru Kanshuu - F-1 Super License
no_intro_name: Nakajima Satoru Kanshuu - F-1 Super License (Japan)

title_en: Nakajima Satoru Kanshuu F1 Grand Prix
Nakajima Satoru Kanshuu F1 Super License
title_jp: 中嶋悟監修 Ｆ１ スーパーライセンス
overview_en:
Nakajima Satoru Kanshuu F1 Super License (中島悟監修 F-1 スーパーライセンス) is a 1992 racing game by Varie for the Sega Mega Drive and the third Mega Drive game in their Nakajima Satoru Kanshuu games, following F1 Hero MD.

This game is a 2D racer, like F1 Grand Prix and unlike F1 Hero MD. B accelerates. This game adds a save system, allowing you to save your progress over the course of the prix.
overview_zh:
中島悟監修 F1 Super License（中島悟監修 F-1 suーパーライセnssu）是 Varie 於 1992 年為 Sega Mega Drive 製作的賽車遊戲，也是中島悟監修遊戲中繼 F1 Mega Hero Drive 之後的第三款遊戲。

遊戲是 2D 賽車遊戲，類似於 F1 Grand Prix，但與 F1 Hero MD 不同。 B 加速。遊戲新增了儲存系統，可讓您儲存比賽過程中的進度。

overview_en:
NBA Action '94 allowed gamers to play as one of the 27 NBA teams using the 93-94 rosters.  
It's game modes included Exhibition, Season ( adjustable to 20, 40, or a complete 82 game schedule), and Playoffs.  
The playoffs could be divided into Single Elimination or Best of Series (5 or 7 games).
The commentary was provided by Marv Albert while the game was played on an isometric view, which would rotate whenever the ball crossed the halfcourt line.
Included with the game was also 3 Hall of Fame teams with 30 all-time greats.
overview_zh:
《NBA Action '94》允許玩家扮演使用 93-94 名單的 27 支 NBA 球隊之一進行比賽。  
它的比賽模式包括表演賽、賽季（可調整為 20 場、40 場或完整的 82 場比賽）和季後賽。  
季後賽可分為單淘汰賽或系列賽最佳賽（5 場或 7 場比賽）。
解說由馬夫·阿爾伯特（Marv Albert）提供，比賽是在等距檢視下進行的，只要球越過半場線，該檢視就會旋轉。
這場比賽還包括 3 支名人堂球隊，其中有 30 名歷史上最偉大的球員。

overview_en: Fast-breaking NBA action! Spectacular all-new "Fast-Breaking View" allows you to lead the break up and down the court. Monster jams, raining 3-pointers, and wizard-like assists make NBA Actiion '95 the play maker of the hardwood! Check out the highlights: All 27 NBA teams and real players! Create up to 40 players. Play a Full Season, Playoffs or the NBA Finals! 30 Hall of Fame greats! Trade players to create a dynasty! Extensive play calling features.
overview_zh: 快節奏的NBA動作！壯觀的全新「快速突破視野」讓您在球場上帶領突破。怪獸般的進攻、如雨般的三分球和巫師般的助攻讓 NBA Action '95 成為硬木中的進攻創造者！檢視亮點：所有 27 支 NBA 球隊和真實球員！建立最多 40 名玩家。玩完整個賽季、季後賽或 NBA 總決賽！ 30位名人堂巨星！交易球員，建立王朝！廣泛的遊戲呼叫功能。

overview_en: NBA All-Star Challenge offers one-on-one basketball featuring NBA players from the 1991-1992 season. Five different playing modes are available: a single one-on-one match, a free throw competition, a 3 point shootout, a H.O.R.S.E. competition and a one-on-one tournament. You can choose from 27 players (one from every NBA team), including Michael Jordan, Larry Bird, Patrick Ewing, Karl Malone and David Robinson. Each mode can also be played by two players.
overview_zh: NBA 全明星挑戰賽提供 1991-1992 賽季 NBA 球員的一對一籃球比賽。有五種不同的比賽模式可供選擇：一對一比賽、罰球比賽、三分球比賽、H.O.R.S.E.比賽和一對一的錦標賽。您可以從 27 名球員（每支 NBA 球隊一名）中進行選擇，包括邁克爾喬丹、拉里伯德、帕特里克尤因、卡爾馬龍和大衛羅賓遜。每個模式也可以由兩名玩家玩。

overview_en:
NBA HangTime is a two-on-two hoops contest in the tradition of NBA Jam and NBA Jam T.E. Choose from 29 NBA teams and 145 professional stars with ratings based on the 1996-97 season, or create your own players and save them to battery. Customize your athlete's head, uniform, attributes, or name, and then build his ratings by winning games or correctly answering trivia questions. Sixteen different heads allow you to create offbeat characters such as aliens or clowns.

 Moves include alley oops, spin moves, double dunks, and team "fire" (players get hot after making three shots in a row). Up to four players can compete simultaneously in venues ranging from a rooftop and jungle arena to a harbor and city court. Enter in codes to unlock hidden characters, power-ups, and other bonuses. The game will also keep track of statistics such as points-per-game average, longest winning streak, most games played, and overall winning percentage. 
~ Scott Alan Marriott, All Game Guide
overview_zh:
NBA HangTime 是一場二對二的籃球比賽，繼承了 NBA Jam 和 NBA Jam T.E. 的傳統。從 29 支 NBA 球隊和 145 名職業球星中進行選擇，並根據 1996-97 賽季的評分進行選擇，或者建立您自己的球員並將其儲存到電池中。自訂運動員的頭部、制服、屬性或姓名，然後透過贏得比賽或正確回答瑣事問題來建立他的評分。十六種不同的頭像可讓您創造出另類角色，例如外星人或小丑。

 動作包括空中接力、旋轉動作、雙扣籃和團隊「火力」（球員連續投三球後變得熱血沸騰）。最多四名玩家可以在屋頂和叢林競技場到港口和城市球場等場地同時比賽。輸入程式碼來解鎖隱藏的角色、能力提升和其他獎勵。遊戲還將記錄場均得分、最長連勝、出場次數和總勝率等統計資料。 
~ 史考特艾倫馬裡奧特 (Scott Alan Marriott)，《所有遊戲指南》

overview_en: NBA Jam, which featured 2-on-2 basketball, was one of the first real playable basketball arcade games, and was also one of the first sports games to feature NBA-licensed teams and players, and their real digitized likenesses. A key feature of NBA Jam was the exaggerated nature of the play - players jumped many times above their own height, making slam dunks that defied both human capabilities and the laws of physics. There were no fouls, free throws, or violations except goaltending and 24 second violations. This meant the player was able to freely shove or elbow his opponent out of the way. Additionally, the game had an "on fire" feature, where if one player made three baskets in a row, he would become "on fire" and have unlimited turbo, no goaltending, and increased shooting ability, until the other team scored (or the player had scored four consecutive baskets while "on fire").
overview_zh: NBA Jam 以 2 對 2 籃球為特色，是最早的真正可玩的籃球街機遊戲之一，也是最早以 NBA 授權的球隊和球員及其真​​實數位化肖像為特色的體育遊戲之一。 《NBA Jam》的一個主要特點是比賽的誇張性——球員們多次跳出自己的高度，進行扣籃，這既違反了人類的能力，也違反了物理定律。除了守門員和 24 秒違例外，沒有犯規、罰球或違例。這意味著玩家可以自由地將對手推開或肘擊。此外，遊戲還有一個“著火”功能，如果一名球員連續投進三個籃子，他就會變得“著火”，並且無限渦輪，不守門，投籃能力增加，直到另一隊得分（或者該球員在“著火”時連續投進四個籃子）。

A key feature of NBA Jam was the exaggerated nature of the play - players jumped many times above their own height, making slam dunks that defied both human capabilities and the laws of physics. title_jp: ＮＢＡ ＪＡＭ トーナメントエディション
overview_en:
Up to four human players can take part, each always controlling a single player for their team, and AI for missing players. This allows for four players to face each other in teams of two, or for two players to team up against a third player with a CPU team-mate.

The Tournament Edition ups each team's roster to three players, and allows for substitutions between quarters. Shoving players now results in injuries, which lower a player's stats; encouraging you to sub them out and let them recover. Aside from the usual secret characters and cheat modes, the T.E. also includes four new additions you can individually enable from the special options menu.
overview_zh:
最多可以有四名人類玩家參加，每個玩家總是控制自己團隊的一名玩家，並為失蹤的玩家控制人工智慧。這允許四名玩家以兩人一組的形式相互對抗，或允許兩名玩家與具有 CPU 隊友的第三名玩家組隊對抗。

錦標賽版將每支球隊的名單增加到三名球員，並允許在季度之間進行換人。推擠球員現在會導致受傷，從而降低球員的統計資料；鼓勵你將他們替換掉並讓他們恢復。除了常見的秘密角色和作弊模式之外，T.E.還包括四個新增功能，您可以從特殊選項選單中單獨啟用。

title_jp: ＮＢＡジャム・トーナメントエディション
overview_en:
Up to four human players can take part, each always controlling a single player for their team, and AI for missing players. This allows for four players to face each other in teams of two, or for two players to team up against a third player with a CPU team-mate.

The Tournament Edition ups each team's roster to three players, and allows for substitutions between quarters. Shoving players now results in injuries, which lower a player's stats; encouraging you to sub them out and let them recover. Aside from the usual secret characters and cheat modes, the T.E. also includes four new additions you can individually enable from the special options menu.
overview_zh:
最多可以有四名人類玩家參加，每個玩家總是控制自己團隊的一名玩家，並為失蹤的玩家控制人工智慧。這允許四名玩家以兩人一組的形式相互對抗，或允許兩名玩家與具有 CPU 隊友的第三名玩家組隊對抗。

錦標賽版將每支球隊的名單增加到三名球員，並允許在季度之間進行換人。推擠球員現在會導致受傷，從而降低球員的統計資料；鼓勵你將他們替換掉並讓他們恢復。除了常見的秘密角色和作弊模式之外，T.E.還包括四個新增功能，您可以從特殊選項選單中單獨啟用。

overview_en:
NBA Live 95 includes all of the basketball players from the '94 - '95 season as well as the All-Star teams from the East and West.

Manage over 300 players using the General Manager feature, new in this edition. Statistics for each player and team are saved. View players and teams side-by-side to compare stats and other information. You can trade any player in the league.

Multiple in-game settings let you choose the mode of play, the style, and even the length of a quarter or session. Full motion videos bring your plays to life onscreen. Listen to the crowd roar, the noises of the court and hoop, and voices of the players. There is also a soundtrack of modern music.

Open up the court and see what basketball's really like! With NBA Live '95's unique perspective on the action you get faster play, more opportunity for real tactics and a sense of realism that won't cost you the price of a season ticket. Real NBA teams and players! Full season and Playoff mode. NEW passing on the run increases game speed. NEW animations: behind-back passes, 2-player alley-oops, tip-in slams, collisions and intentional fouls.
overview_zh:
NBA Live 95 包括 94 - 95 賽季的所有籃球運動員以及東西部門的全明星球隊。

使用本版本新增的總經理功能管理 300 多名玩家。每個球員和球隊的統計資料都會被儲存。並排檢視球員和球隊以比較統計資料和其他資訊。您可以交易聯盟中的任何球員。

多個遊戲內設定讓您可以選擇遊戲模式、風格，甚至每節或每節比賽的長度。全動態影片讓您的戲劇在螢幕上栩栩如生。聆聽人群的歡呼聲、球場和籃框的噪音以及球員的聲音。還有現代音樂配樂。

開啟球場，看看籃球到底是什麼樣的！憑藉《NBA Live '95》對動作的獨特視角，您可以獲得更快的遊戲速度、更多的真實戰術機會和現實感，而無需花費季票的價格。真實的NBA球隊和球員！全賽季和季後賽模式。新的跑動傳球提高了遊戲速度。新動畫：背後傳球、兩人空中接力、補籃、碰撞和故意犯規。

overview_en: New for NBA Live '96: New player animations - big blocks, tip-ins, tip-in slams, spin moves, crossover moves, two foot takeoff. New moves - one-on-one, spin dribble and crossover. Two new teams - the Vancouver Grizzlies and Toronto Raptors. Multi-Team Seasons for up to four players. Trade any player, any time. On-the-fly Playcalling, Animating Playbook and Shot Diagram screens for side-line strategies. All-Star game and the Draft for the ultimate NBA season realism.
overview_zh: NBA Live '96 的新增功能：新的球員動畫 - 大蓋帽、補籃、補籃扣籃、旋轉動作、交叉動作、兩腳起跳。新動作——一對一、旋轉運球和交叉。兩支新球隊－溫哥華灰熊隊和多倫多暴龍隊。最多可容納四名玩家的多隊賽季。隨時交易任何球員。用於邊線策略的即時戰術呼叫、動畫戰術手冊和投籃圖螢幕。全明星賽和選秀，打造終極 NBA 賽季真實感。

overview_en: NBA Live 97 is the third installment of the NBA Live video games series. The cover features Mitch Richmond of the Sacramento Kings. The game was developed by EA Sports and released on November 1, 1996. The MS-DOS, Saturn and PlayStation versions featured 3D models for the on-court players thus marking it as the first 3D EA Sports Basketball sequel for the series. It was also the first NBA Live released for the Sega Saturn. NBA Live 97 is followed by NBA Live 98.
overview_zh: NBA Live 97 是 NBA Live 電玩遊戲系列的第三部分。封面人物是薩克拉門託國王隊的米奇·裡士滿。該遊戲由 EA Sports 開發，於 1996 年 11 月 1 日發行。 MS-DOS、Saturn 和 PlayStation 版本均以場上球員的 3D 模型為特色，因此成為該系列的首個 3D EA Sports 籃球續作。這也是世嘉土星首次推出《NBA Live》。 《NBA Live 97》之後是《NBA Live 98》。

overview_en:
NBA Live 98 is a basketball video game based on the National Basketball Association and the fourth installment of the NBA Live series. The cover features Tim Hardaway of the Miami Heat. The game was developed by EA Sports and released on November 30, 1997 for the PlayStation, October 31, 1997 for the PC and December 31, 1997 for the Sega Saturn. It was the final version of NBA Live released for the Super Nintendo, Sega Genesis and Sega Saturn.

The game introduced various innovations to the series, including the now standard feature of passing to any teammate with a single button press. The game also made various graphical improvements, with new player models and faces modeled after actual player photographs. The PC version introduced support for 3D acceleration, utilizing 3dfx's Glide API. The PlayStation, PC and Saturn versions have Ernie Johnson as studio announcer and TNT/TBS color analyst Verne Lundquist doing play-by-play commentary, (the Saturn version does not include play-by-play commentary). NBA Live 98 is followed by NBA Live 99.
overview_zh:
NBA Live 98 是一款基於美國國家籃球協會的籃球電玩遊戲，也是 NBA Live 系列的第四部分。封面人物是邁阿密熱火隊的提姆哈達威。遊戲由 EA Sports 開發，PlayStation 版於 1997 年 11 月 30 日發行，PC 版於 1997 年 10 月 31 日發行，Sega Saturn 版於 1997 年 12 月 31 日發行。這是為 Super Nintendo、Sega Genesis 和 Sega Saturn 發布的《NBA Live》的最終版本。

該遊戲為該系列引入了各種創新，包括現在的標準功能，即只需按一下按鈕即可將球傳給任何隊友。遊戲還進行了各種圖形改進，採用了根據實際玩家照片建模的新玩家模型和臉孔。 PC 版本利用 3dfx 的 Glide API 引入了對 3D 加速的支援。 PlayStation、PC 和 Saturn 版本由 Ernie Johnson 擔任演播室播音員，TNT/TBS 色彩分析師 Verne Lundquist 進行逐場解說（Saturn 版本不包括逐場解說）。 《NBA Live 98》之後是《NBA Live 99》。

title_jp: NBAプロバスケットボール'94

title_en: NBA Pro Basketball: Bulls vs Lakers
title_jp: NBAプロバスケットボールブルズ ＶＳ レイカーズ
title_zh: NBA 公牛 VS 湖人
no_intro_name: NBA Pro Basketball - Bulls vs Lakers and the NBA Playoffs (Japan)

overview_en:
The final entry in Electronic Arts' basketball series based on the old NBA playoffs engine before the NBA Live series took over.
For the first time, the game features all 27 NBA teams from the 1993-1994 season. You can now play a full season with 82 games in addition to playoffs and exhibition games.
overview_zh:
在 NBA Live 系列接管之前，基於舊 NBA 季後賽引擎的藝電籃球系列賽的最後一個作品。
該遊戲首次涵蓋了 1993-1994 賽季的全部 27 支 NBA 球隊。現在，除了季後賽和表演賽之外，您還可以參加 82 場完整賽季的比賽。

overview_en: The first college basketball game for the Sega Genesis, NCAA Final Four Basketball features 64 NCAA Division I teams, five player support with the use of a multiplayer adapter, and three different play modes: Practice, Tournament and Exhibition. Exhibition is one game against any two teams of your choice, Practice Mode allows you to hone your skills without worrying about a pesky defense (it's just two players and the ball), and Tournament lets you pick one team with the goal of moving past the Regionals and into the Final Four. There's also a mode that involves practicing your three-point shooting skills, with a perspective just behind the player's head looking toward the basket.
overview_zh: NCAA 籃球四強賽是 Sega Genesis 的第一場大學籃球比賽，擁有 64 支 NCAA I 級球隊，使用多人介面卡支援五名玩家，以及三種不同的比賽模式：練習、錦標賽和表演賽。表演賽是一場針對您選擇的任意兩支球隊的比賽，練習模式可以讓您磨練自己的技能，而不必擔心煩人的防守（只有兩名球員和一個球），而錦標賽則可以讓您選擇一支球隊，目標是超越地區賽並進入四強。還有一種模式涉及練習三分投籃技巧，視角就在球員的頭後面看向籃框。

overview_en: NCAA Football is an American football game for the Sega Mega Drive. It was only released in North America.
overview_zh: NCAA Football 是 Sega Mega Drive 的美式足球比賽。它僅在北美發行。

title_en: Nekketsu Kouko Dodgeball Bu: Soccer Hen MD
title_jp: 熱血高校ドッジボール部サッカー編ＭＤ

title_en: Nekketsu Koukou Dodgeball-bu - Soccer Hen MD
no_intro_name: Nekketsu Koukou Dodgeball-bu - Soccer Hen MD (Japan)
overview_en:
Nekketsu FC is referred to as a weak team, but now we were finally supposed to play the national tournament. To celebrate the national competition, the team went to eat sushi. However, a series of unfortunate incidents began to happen. Wow, who would have thought the whole team would come down with food poisoning from eating sushi!?

At this rate it looked like we would have to give up our dream of entering the nationals, but just then our coach Misako had a bright idea!

Of all our sport clubs, dodge ball seems to be the strongest, so why don't we ask them to help us out? The dodge ball team is led by Kunio, and let's hope he lives up to the expectations of Misako!
overview_zh:
熱結FC被認為是一支弱隊，但現在我們終於可以參加全國錦標賽了。為了慶祝全國比賽，全隊去吃壽司。然而，一連串不幸的事件開始發生。哇，誰能想到整個團隊都因為吃壽司而食物中毒了！ ？

照這樣下去，看來我們要放棄進全國賽的夢想了，但就在這時，我們的教練美佐子想到了一個好主意！

在我們所有的運動俱樂部中，躲避球似乎是最強的，所以我們為什麼不請他們來幫助我們呢？躲避球隊由國男率領，希望他不要辜負美沙的期望！

overview_en:
New 3D Golf Simulation: Harukanaru Augusta (遥かなるオーガスタ) is a 1989 golf game by T&E Soft for the NEC PC-98 and the first in their New 3D Golf Simulation series of golf games. They ported it to the Sega Mega Drive in 1993. This version was not released outside Japan.

The game takes place at the Augusta National Golf Club and plays identically to Pebble Beach Golf Links.
overview_zh: 《遙遠的奧古斯塔》是 1989 年由日本 T&E SOFT 開發、發售的 PC-9801 3D 高爾夫模擬遊戲。製作人由後來成立 Digital Golf 的橫山俊朗擔任，遊戲內容以奧古斯塔國家高爾夫俱樂部為發想。本系列另有以夏威夷 Waialae Country Club 為原型的《Waialae 之奇蹟》（1991）、以加州 Pebble Beach Golf Links 為原型的《Pebble Beach 之波濤》（1992）等姐妹作。1993 年移植至 Mega Drive。三作均選自美國名門球場，使用高速 3D 處理器「POLYSYS」忠實重現球的彈跳與滾動。
overview_jp:
『遙かなるオーガスタ』（はるかなるオーガスタ）は、1989年に日本のT&E SOFTが開発・発売したPC-9801用3Dゴルフシミュレーションゲーム。
プロデューサーはのちにデジタルゴルフを設立する横山俊朗が担当しており、ゲーム内容はオーガスタ・ナショナル・ゴルフクラブをモチーフとしている。
拡張コース・派生作品のうち、『ワイアラエの奇蹟』（1991年）はワイアラエ・カントリークラブ（ハワイ州オアフ島ホノルル、ハワイアン・オープン開催地）を、『ペブルビーチの波濤』（1992年）はペブルビーチ・ゴルフリンクス（カリフォルニア州カーメル、AT&Tペブルビーチナショナルプロアマ開催地のひとつ）を、『ジュンクラシックC.C&ロペ倶楽部』（1997年）はジーン・サラゼン・ジュンクラシックの開催地であった2つのコースをモチーフとしている。
1990年にFM-TOWNSに移植された他、1991年にはX68000およびスーパーファミコンに、1993年にメガドライブに移植された。
スーパーファミコン版はゲーム誌『ファミコン通信』の「クロスレビュー」にてシルバー殿堂入りを獲得した。遙かなるオーガスタ、ペブルビーチの波濤、ワイアラエの奇蹟、はアメリカの数ある名門コースの中から3つのコースが選ばれた。コースの中を360度見渡すことができ、ボールの跳ね方や転がり方なども忠実に再現させるようにするため高速3Dプロセッサー「POLYSYS(ポリシス)」が使われている。
後に続編となるPC-9801用ソフト『NEW 3D GOLF SIMULATION2 エイト レイクス G.C』（1990年）が発売され、以後シリーズ化された。
最新版は1998年発売の『遥かなるオーガスタ for Windows』である。最低動作環境はIntel Pentium 133MHz以上である。グラフィックが全面的に高解像度化され水面には環境マッピングが導入されたことや、実況解説を導入し、CD-ROMから直接実行するイージープレイを採用したことが新しい要素である。

title_en: New 3D Golf Simulation: Pebble Beach no Hatou
no_intro_name: New 3D Golf Simulation - Pebble Beach no Hatou (Japan)
overview_en: New 3D Golf Simulation: Pebble Beach no Hatou (also known as Pebble Beach Golf Links) is a 1993 Mega Drive golf sports video game developed by T&E Soft and released by Sega in Japan on October 29, 1993.
overview_zh: 《Pebble Beach 之波濤》是日本 T&E SOFT《NEW 3D GOLF SIMULATION》系列作品，於 1992 年推出，以加州 Pebble Beach Golf Links（AT&T Pebble Beach National Pro-Am 開賽地之一）為發想。系列首作《遙遠的奧古斯塔》（1989）以奧古斯塔國家高爾夫俱樂部為原型。1993 年移植至 Mega Drive。三作均使用高速 3D 處理器「POLYSYS」忠實重現球的彈跳與滾動，並可於球場 360 度環視。
overview_jp:
『遙かなるオーガスタ』（はるかなるオーガスタ）は、1989年に日本のT&E SOFTが開発・発売したPC-9801用3Dゴルフシミュレーションゲーム。

title_en: New 3D Golf Simulation: Waialae no Kiseki
no_intro_name: New 3D Golf Simulation - Waialae no Kiseki (Japan)
overview_en: New 3D Golf Simulation: Waialae no Kiseki (ワイアラエの奇蹟) is a 1991 golf game by T&E Soft for the PC-98 in their New 3D Golf Simulation series that takes place at the Waialae Country Club golf course. T&E ported it to the Sega Mega Drive in 1994 exclusively in Japan (however they released a SNES port overseas as True Golf Classics: Waialae Country Club). Gameplay is identical to that of Pebble Beach Golf Links.
overview_zh: 《Waialae 之奇蹟》是日本 T&E SOFT《NEW 3D GOLF SIMULATION》系列作品，於 1991 年推出，以夏威夷歐胡島檀香山的 Waialae Country Club（Hawaiian Open 開賽地）為發想。系列首作《遙遠的奧古斯塔》（1989）以奧古斯塔國家高爾夫俱樂部為原型。1993 年移植至 Mega Drive。三作均使用高速 3D 處理器「POLYSYS」忠實重現球的彈跳與滾動，並可於球場 360 度環視。
overview_jp:
『遙かなるオーガスタ』（はるかなるオーガスタ）は、1989年に日本のT&E SOFTが開発・発売したPC-9801用3Dゴルフシミュレーションゲーム。

最新版は1998年発売の『遥かなるオーガスタ for Windows』である。最低動作環境はIntel Pentium 133MHz以上である。グラフィックが全面的に高解像度化され水面には環境マッピングが導入されたことや、実況解説を導入し、CD-ROMから直接実行するイージープレイを採用したことが新しい要素である。

overview_en: In New Horizons, it is the early 16th century and the age of exploration and sea trade is underway. Players choose from any one of six adventurers (scenarios), each with their own distinctive but intertwining plot, to embark on a quest of sailing, seamanship and exploration.
overview_zh: 在《新視野》中，時間是 16 世紀初，探險和海上貿易的時代正在進行。玩家可以從六名冒險家（場景）中選擇任意一位，每個冒險家都有自己獨特但相互交織的情節，開始航海、航海和探索的旅程。

title_en: Newman Haas IndyCar Featuring Nigel Mansell
no_intro_name: Newman Haas IndyCar Featuring Nigel Mansell (Europe)
overview_en:
Newman Haas Indy Car is, as the name shows, a racing game endorsed by the CART racing team of the same name and their top driver at the time, Englishman Nigel Mansell. 

The player has the option to drive a single race (where the option to practice is hidden) or go for the crown against 12 other drivers in 15 tracks (with some variety, not only ovals) across North America, with the season opener in Queensland, Australia. It is possible play solo, with a friend in split screen or with split screen against the computer, and if music or engine sounds are played in the race. A key choice in the game is selecting between Arcade and Simulation mode - in the later, the car can take a lot less damage before giving up, fine-tuning must be done by the driver and rules are enforced, under the risk of a disqualification.
overview_zh:
紐曼哈斯印地賽車，顧名思義，是一款由同名 CART 賽車隊及其當時的頂級車手英國人奈傑爾曼塞爾 (Nigel Mansell) 代言的賽車遊戲。 

玩家可以選擇參加一場單場比賽（其中隱藏了練習選項），也可以在北美 15 條賽道（有一些賽道，不僅僅是橢圓形賽道）中與其他 12 名車手爭奪冠軍，賽季揭幕戰將在澳大利亞昆士蘭州舉行。如果在比賽中播放音樂或引擎聲音，則可以單獨玩，也可以在分割畫面模式下與朋友一起玩，也可以在分割畫面模式下與電腦對戰。遊戲中的一個關鍵選擇是在街機模式和模擬模式之間進行選擇 - 在後者中，汽車在放棄之前可以承受更少的損壞，駕駛員必須進行微調並執行規則，但有被取消資格的風險。

overview_en: NFL 98 is a sports game released for the Sega Mega Drive in 1997. It is not to be confused with Madden NFL 98 which came out the same year. This one was developed by FarSight Technologies and published by Sega exclusively for North America.
overview_zh: NFL 98 是 1997 年為 Sega Mega Drive 發布的一款運動遊戲。不要與同年發布的 Madden NFL 98 混淆。該產品由 FarSight Technologies 開發，並由 Sega 專門針對北美發行。

overview_en: NFL Football '94 Starring Joe Montana is a 1993 Sega Mega Drive/Genesis game which has a realistic running commentary that runs while the player engages himself in exhibition, regular season, or playoff action.
overview_zh: 《NFL Football '94 Starring Joe Montana》是一款 1993 年的 Sega Mega Drive/Genesis 遊戲，其中有現實的執行解說，當玩家參與表演賽、常規賽或季後賽時會執行解說。

title_jp: NFL プロフットボール'94

overview_en:
There are a variety of game modes to choose from including NFL Play which includes preseason, season and playoff modes along with the Simulation mode that allows players to relive past moments of NFL history and lets the player recreate these moments or change history all together.

Also included is the Quarterback Challenge which would become a staple in the series. In the QB Challenge, the player chooses from one of nineteen different NFL quarterbacks to compete in a series of challenges that will test their accuracy, speed, power and knowledge. Players can also create their own custom quarterback and throw them into the competition.
overview_zh:
有多種遊戲模式可供選擇，包括 NFL Play（包括季前賽、賽季和季後賽模式）以及模擬模式（允許玩家重溫 NFL 歷史的過去時刻，並讓玩家重現這些時刻或一起改變歷史）。

還包括四分衛挑戰賽，這將成為該系列賽的主要內容。在 QB 挑戰賽中，球員從 19 名不同的 NFL 四分衛中選擇一名參加一系列挑戰賽，測試他們的準確性、速度、力量和知識。玩家還可以建立自己的自訂四分衛並將其投入比賽。

title_jp: NFLクォーターバッククラブ'95
overview_en:
For the first time ever in a Genesis football game, the field view will change dynamically during the play. As the QB drops back to pass, the camera angle will rise, allowing the user to see up to 65 yards down field.
• All 28 NFL Teams and Over 1,500 Real Players - Irvin, Elway, White, Sanders, Seau, Young, Faulk, and the list goes on... Real '94 rosters.
• You Can Be the Receiver - Be the WR, run your own route and call for the ball.
• Complete Roster Management - Trade players or sign free agents to build a dynasty!
• Full Season Play - Multiple schedules, instant replays, 2 point conversions, standings, injuries, playoffs, and Super Bowl action.
• Player Ratings - Individual skill ratings in 13 categories.
• Single Game & Season Stats - Track league leaders through an entire season.
overview_zh:
在 Genesis 足球比賽中，球場檢視將在比賽過程中動態變化，這在 Genesis 足球比賽中尚屬首次。當四分衛回撤傳球時，攝影機角度將會上升，使使用者能夠看到最遠 65 碼的場地。
• 所有 28 支 NFL 球隊和超過 1,500 名真實球員 - Irvin、Elway、White、Sanders、Seau、Young、Faulk 等等……真實的 94 年名單。
• 您可以擔任接球手 - 擔任外接手，走自己的路線並叫球。
• 完整的名單管理- 交易球​​員或簽下自由球員來建立王朝！
• 全賽季比賽- 多個賽程、即時重播、2 分轉換、排名、傷病、季後賽和超級盃比賽。
• 球員評級- 13 個類別的個人技能評級。
• 單場比賽和賽季統計資料- 追蹤整個賽季的聯賽領先者。

title_jp: ＮＦＬクォーターバッククラブ'95
overview_en:
There are a variety of game modes to choose from including NFL Play which includes preseason, season and playoff modes along with the Simulation mode that allows players to relive past moments of NFL history and lets the player recreate these moments or change history all together.

Also included is the Quarterback Challenge which would become a staple in the series. In the QB Challenge, the player chooses from one of nineteen different NFL quarterbacks to compete in a series of challenges that will test their accuracy, speed, power and knowledge. Players can also create their own custom quarterback and throw them into the competition.
overview_zh:
有多種遊戲模式可供選擇，包括 NFL Play（包括季前賽、賽季和季後賽模式）以及模擬模式（允許玩家重溫 NFL 歷史的過去時刻，並讓玩家重現這些時刻或一起改變歷史）。

還包括四分衛挑戰賽，這將成為該系列賽的主要內容。在 QB 挑戰賽中，球員從 19 名不同的 NFL 四分衛中選擇一名參加一系列挑戰賽，測試他們的準確性、速度、力量和知識。玩家還可以建立自己的自訂四分衛並將其投入比賽。

overview_en: Popular NFL quarterbacks such as Troy Aikman, John Elway, Steve Young, Brett Favre and other NFL stars are featured in this officially licensed football simulation. You can play practice games or a full NFL season. You can skip the season and go straight to the Playoffs or match up the best of the best in Pro Bowl action. A Simulation Mode lets you participate in historical NFL situations, or you can customize your own unique game situations. In all there are more than 800 plays you can call, including authentic quarterback signature plays. All NFL teams are represented, and you can customize them any way you like, including switching players between teams. Other options and features include player substitutions, a no huddle offense, three different camera angles, penalties, three different clock speeds, weather conditions, player progress reports, replays and a pre-game show.
overview_zh: 特洛伊·艾克曼、約翰·埃爾威、史蒂夫·楊、佈雷特·法夫爾等著名 NFL 四分衛和其他 NFL 明星都出現在這款官方授權的橄欖球模擬遊戲中。您可以參加練習賽或完整的 NFL 賽季。您可以跳過賽季直接進入季後賽，或者在職業碗比賽中與強者中的強者對決。模擬模式可讓您參與 NFL 歷史場景，也可以自訂您自己獨特的比賽場景。總共有超過 800 場比賽可供您呼叫，其中包括真正的四分衛簽名比賽。所有 NFL 球隊都有代表，您可以按照自己喜歡的方式自訂它們，包括在球隊之間切換球員。其他選項和功能包括球員替換、無擁擠進攻、三種不同的攝影機角度、處罰、三種不同的時鐘速度、天氣狀況、球員進度報告、重播和賽前表演。

title_en: NFL's Greatest - San Francisco vs. Dallas 1978-1993
no_intro_name: NFL's Greatest - San Francisco vs. Dallas 1978-1993 (USA)

title_en: NFL Sports Talk Football '93 Starring Joe Montana
no_intro_name: NFL Sports Talk Football '93 Starring Joe Montana (USA, Europe) (Rev A)
overview_en: NFL Sports Talk Football '93 Starring Joe Montana is the sequel to Joe Montana II Sports Talk Football, released by Sega for the Sega Mega Drive in 1992. It was followed by NFL Football '94 Starring Joe Montana.
overview_zh: 《NFL Sports Talk Football '93 Starring Joe Montana》是《Joe Montana II Sports Talk Football》的續集，由世嘉於 1992 年為 Sega Mega Drive 發行。隨後是《NFL Football '94 Starring Joe Montana》。

overview_en: NHK Taiga Drama: Taiheiki (太平記) is a 1991 strategy game for the Sega Mega Drive by Sega tying into NHK's Taiga Drama adaptation of the Japanese epic Taiheiki which aired that year.
overview_zh: NHK 大河劇：太平記是世嘉於 1991 年為 Sega Mega Drive 推出的一款策略遊戲，與同年播出的日本史詩《太平記》改編的 NHK 大河劇相結合。

overview_en:
NHL '94 is a 1993 Genesis video game developed by High Score Productions and released by EA Sports in the USA on September 24, 1993.

THE SIREN IS GOING TO WAIL TONIGHT!

Over 25 new features in NHL '94!
• 4-Way Play Support - Use the EA Sports 4-Way Play and NHL '94 becomes a 1, 2, 3, or 4 player game!
