Sonic has an attitude that just won't quit. He's flip and funny, yet tough as nails as he fights to free his friends from evil. So just wait. Sonic may be the world's next SUPER hero...
overview_zh: 音速小子（Sonic the Hedgehog）是 SEGA 世嘉電子遊戲中登場的角色、遊戲標題本身，亦為其代表性吉祥物之一，通稱 Sonic。在衍生作品的漫畫與動畫中亦有登場。Mega Drive 版第 1 作於 1991 年 6 月推出，是 SEGA 世嘉的招牌系列。
overview_jp: ソニック・ザ・ヘッジホッグ（英: Sonic the Hedgehog）は、セガのビデオゲームに登場するキャラクター、ゲームタイトルそのもの、およびマスコットキャラクターの一人。通称ソニック。また、スピンオフ作品である漫画やアニメーションにも登場している。

title_jp: ソニック・ザ・ヘッジホッグ２
overview_en:
Mit seinem neuen Doppeldecker-Flugzeug namens Tornado verlässt Sonic South Island und landet auf einer ihm noch unerforschten Insel namens West Side Island. Dort wird er von einem Fuchs namens Miles Prower beobachtet und verfolgt. Verwundert, dass jemand mit seiner Schnelligkeit mithalten kann, gibt Sonic Miles den Spitznamen Tails wegen seiner zwei propellerartigen Fuchsschwänze, die er zur zusätzlichen Beschleunigung nutzt. Auch an Sonics Flugzeug Tornado findet Tails großen Gefallen und so freunden sich die beiden an. Tails beschließt, Sonic trotz seiner Geschwindigkeit fortan so gut zu folgen, wie er kann. Währenddessen versucht Dr. Robotnik erneut die Weltherrschaft an sich zu reißen, indem er die Tiere von West Side Island einfängt und zudem eine im Weltall gelegene, geheime Festung, das Death Egg, erbaut. Des Weiteren ist er auf der Suche nach den sieben Chaos Emeralds, die ihn nahezu unbesiegbar machen könnten. Sonic und sein neuer Freund Tails machen sich auf den Weg, um ihm erneut das Handwerk zu legen.

Nach einer langen Reise durch verschiedene Zonen gelangt Sonic mit dem von Tails geflogenen und modifizierten Doppeldecker Tornado auf Dr. Robotniks fliegende Festung und schafft es, sich an der Rakete, mit der Robotnik zurück zum Death Egg flüchtet, festzuhalten und dringt ebenfalls in das Death Egg ein. Dort muss er sich zunächst seinem Roboter-Ebenbild Mecha Sonic stellen, bevor er den finalen Kampf gegen den riesigen Death Egg Robot bestreitet. In einem langwierigen Kampf kann Sonic Dr. Robotnik schließlich besiegen, worauf hiernach das ganze Death Egg zusammenbricht. Sonic fällt auf den Planeten hinab und wird von Tails auf seinem Tornado gerettet. Sammelt Sonic während des Abenteuers alle sieben Chaos Emerald, fliegt Sonic als Super Sonic stattdessen neben Tails und dem Tornado her.
overview_zh:
《南島龍捲風》以《龍捲風》為名，並在西邊島登陸。福克斯將邁爾斯·普羅爾 (Miles Prower) 命名為“Beobachtet und verfolgt”。在此過程中，請注意將 Sonic Miles 與 Spitznamen Tails 一起捕獲，然後將 Sonic Miles 與 Spitznamen Tails 一起捕獲。 Auch an Sonics Flugzeug Tornado findet Tails großen Gefallen und so freunden sich die beiden and. Tails beschließt, Sonic trotz seiner Geschwindigkeit fortan so gut zu folgen, wie erer seiner Geschwindigkeit fortan so gut zu folgen, wie erer erann. Des Weiteren isister auf der Suche nach den den sieben Chaos Emeralds, die in nahezu unbesiegbar machen könnten. Sonic und Sein Neuer Freund Tails machen sich auf den Weg，um ihm erneut das Handund Tails machen sich auf den Weg，um ihm erneut das Handwerk zu legend。

在這個區域中，索尼克將尾翼和修改後的雙龍捲風從 Dr. Robotniks 飛行和沙夫特 es、 sich 和 der Rakete、 mit der Robotnik zurück zum Death Egg flüchtet、 festzuhalten 和 dringt ebenfalls in das Death Egg ein.遊戲中的機器人-埃本比爾德機甲索尼克將在最終的戰鬥中與死蛋機器人進行較量。在《索尼克機器人博士》的戰鬥中，你將看到死亡蛋的蹤影。索尼克在行星上墜落，並在龍捲風大衣上的尾巴上發出聲音。薩梅爾特·索尼克 (Sonic) 在《混沌翡翠》(Chaos Emerald) 中冒險，將《索尼克》(Sonic) 變成《超音速》(Super Sonic)，並在《尾巴》(Tails) 和《龍捲風》(Tornado) 中對她進行飛行。

title_jp: ソニック・ザ・ヘッジホッグ３
overview_en:
Selbst einige Tage nach den letzten Ereignissen in Sonic the Hedgehog 2 (1992), bei denen Sonic Dr. Robotnik auf dem Death Egg besiegte und dieses damit zum Absturz brachte, wurde das abgestürzte Death Egg weit und breit nicht gefunden oder auch nur gesehen. Sonic und seine Freunde überlegen daher, ob die uralte Legende der fliegenden Insel Angel Island wahr sein könnte und das Death Egg ausgerechnet darauf abgestürzt ist. Laut der Legende sollen die Chaos Emeralds von dort stammen und nachdem Tails ein Radargerät zur Erfassung von Chaos Emerald-Energie gebaut hat, nimmt dieses tatsächlich noch andere Energie neben den in Sonics Besitz befindlichen sieben Chaos Emeralds wahr.

Mit dem Doppeldecker-Flugzeug namens Tornado folgen Sonic und Tails dem Signal und entdecken tatsächlich die Insel Angel Island aus der Legende, über dem Meer in Wolken verhüllt schwebend. Sonic verwandelt sich mit den sieben Chaos Emeralds in Super Sonic und gerade als er die Insel betritt, schafft es ein roter Ameisenigel namens Knuckles the Echidna, Sonic die sieben Chaos Emeralds abzunehmen. Sonic und Tails erkunden die Insel, erkennen jedoch schnell, dass Dr. Robotnik auch hier die heimischen Tiere in Roboter und Kapseln eingesperrt hat. Es stellt sich heraus, dass Angel Island den Absturz des Death Egg in der Tat abfederte und Dr. Robotnik seit dem Absturz damit beschäftigt ist, das Death Egg hier wieder zu reparieren. Er traf dabei auf Knuckles, dem Wächter der Insel und letzten lebenden Echidna, und erzählte ihm, dass ein Igel namens Sonic und ein Fuchs namens Tails kommen werden, um die Schätze, die Knuckles bewacht, zu stehlen. Leichtgläubig glaubt Knuckles Dr. Robotnik, hilft ihm bei der Reparatur des Death Egg und hält Sonic und Tails auf ihrer Reise immer wieder auf.

Nach einigen Abenteuern erreichen Sonic und Tails die Launch Base Zone, wo sie das Death Egg im Reparaturzustand vorfinden. Sie besiegen Dr. Robotnik, der daraufhin das Death Egg hektisch abheben lässt, ohne Rücksicht auf Knuckles, der beim Startvorgang in die Tiefe fällt. Nach einem erneuten Kampf gegen Dr. Robotnik und seinem Big Arm stürzt das noch unfertige Death Egg nur kurze Zeit nach dem Start genau in den Vulkanschlot auf Angel Island ab. Die Handlung wird nahtlos in Sonic & Knuckles (1994) fortgesetzt.
overview_zh:
在《刺蝟索尼克 2》（1992 年）中，《刺蝟索尼克》中的機器人博士被死亡蛋圍困，並在黑暗中消失，死亡蛋被圍困，並被徹底摧毀。索尼克和他的朋友們的故事，是天使島飛行傳奇的故事，也是死亡蛋的故事。傳說中的混沌翡翠將在多特斯塔曼和納赫德姆尾部發射混沌翡翠能量大帽子，你將在超音速遊戲中找到混沌翡翠的能量。

Mit dem Doppeldecker-Flugzeug namens Tornado folgen Sonic und Tails dem Signal and entdecken tatsächlich die Insel Angel Island aus der Legende, über dem Meer in Wolken verhüllt schwebend. 《超音速》中的《超音速》中的《混沌翡翠》和《超音速》中的《混沌翡翠》是一樣的，在《超音速》中，《索尼克》中的《混沌翡翠》是一款以《超音速》為主題的遊戲。 Sonic und Tails 是一款非常有趣的遊戲，它是由機器人博士 Dr. Robotnik 佩戴的，他戴著 Roboter 和 Kapseln eingesperrt 帽子。就這樣，天使島的死亡蛋出現在了機器人博士的手中，而機器人博士也發現了死亡蛋的存在，並修復了死亡蛋。在《Knuckles》中，我們將在島上航行，並讓她聽聽針鼴的故事，並以我的名字命名，其中包括索尼克和福克斯的名字，Tails kommen werden，嗯，Schätze，Knuckles bewacht，zu stehlen。值得一提的是，Knuckles Dr. Robotnik 已成功修復死亡蛋，並在《索尼克與尾巴》中重生。

當索尼克和尾巴出現在發射基地區時，我們將在修復站修復死亡蛋。請注意，機器人博士，死亡蛋的死亡之蛋，在指關節上的 Rücksicht，在 Tiefe 失敗時啟動。機器人博士和大手臂將在天使島的 Vulkanschlot 中開始戰鬥。 《索尼克與指關節》(Sonic & Knuckles) (1994) 中的操作方法。

title_jp: ソニック・ザ・ヘッジホッグＣＤ
overview_en:
Sonic the Hedgehog is a 1991 Genesis video game developed by Sonic Team and released by Sega of America in the USA on June 11, 1991.

Super Speed!

Bust the video game speed barrier wide open with Sonic the Hedgehog. Blaze by in a blur using the super sonic spin attack. Loop the loop by defying gravity. Plummet down tunnels. Then dash to safety with Sonic's power sneakers. All at a frenzied pace.

Super Graphics!

Help Sonic escape bubbling molten lava. Swim through turbulent waterfalls. Scale glistening green mountains. And soar past shimmering city lights. There's even a 360 degree rotating maze. You've never seen anything like it!

Super Attitude!

Sonic has an attitude that just won't quit. He's flip and funny, yet tough as nails as he fights to free his friends from evil. So just wait. Sonic may be the world's next SUPER hero...
overview_zh:
《刺蝟索尼克》是由索尼克團隊開發的 1991 年 Genesis 電子遊戲，並於 1991 年 6 月 11 日由美國世嘉在美國發行。

超高速！

與刺蝟索尼克一起打破電子遊戲速度障礙。使用超音速旋轉攻擊在模糊中燃燒。透過對抗重力來迴圈。從隧道中垂直墜落。然後穿著索尼克的動力運動鞋衝向安全地帶。一切都以瘋狂的速度進行。

超級圖形！

幫助索尼克逃離冒泡的熔岩。游泳穿過湍急的瀑布。鱗次櫛比的綠山巒。飛過閃爍的城市燈光。甚至還有 360 度旋轉迷宮。你從未見過這樣的東西！

態度超好！

索尼克有一種永不放棄的態度。他脾氣暴躁、風趣幽默，但在為朋友們擺脫邪惡而奮鬥的過程中卻堅如磐石。所以就等等吧。索尼克可能是世界下一個超級英雄...

title_jp: ソニックスピンボール
overview_en:
Sonic the Hedgehog is a 1991 Genesis video game developed by Sonic Team and released by Sega of America in the USA on June 11, 1991.

Super Speed!

Bust the video game speed barrier wide open with Sonic the Hedgehog. Blaze by in a blur using the super sonic spin attack. Loop the loop by defying gravity. Plummet down tunnels. Then dash to safety with Sonic's power sneakers. All at a frenzied pace.

Super Graphics!

Help Sonic escape bubbling molten lava. Swim through turbulent waterfalls. Scale glistening green mountains. And soar past shimmering city lights. There's even a 360 degree rotating maze. You've never seen anything like it!

Super Attitude!

Sonic has an attitude that just won't quit. He's flip and funny, yet tough as nails as he fights to free his friends from evil. So just wait. Sonic may be the world's next SUPER hero...
overview_zh: 《音速小子 Spinball》是 1993 年 12 月 10 日由日本 SEGA Enterprises 發售的 Mega Drive 電腦彈珠台遊戲。海外版名為《Sonic the Hedgehog Spinball》。玩家操作《音速小子系列》（1991-）登場角色「音速小子 Sonic」化身為彈珠台球，攻略 Eggman 博士的要塞。蒐集關卡中隱藏的混沌翡翠後即可挑戰 Boss，擊敗 Boss 後進入 Bonus 關。由美國「Sega Technical Institute」開發。
overview_jp:
『ソニック・スピンボール』は、1993年12月10日に日本のセガ・エンタープライゼスから発売されたメガドライブ用コンピュータピンボール。日本国外では『Sonic the Hedgehog Spinball』のタイトルで発売された。
同社の『ソニックシリーズ』（1991年 - ）に登場するキャラクター「ソニック・ザ・ヘッジホッグ」がピンボールのボールになって、ドクター・エッグマンの要塞を攻略していく。ステージのどこかに隠されているカオスエメラルドを全て獲得するとボスへ行けるようになる。ボスを倒すと、ボーナスステージが始まり、それが終わると次のステージに進む。尚、カオスエメラルドは1～2ステージは3つ、3～4ステージは5つある。メッセージは上部に表示され、英語で知らせてくれる。
開発はアメリカ合衆国の「セガテクニカルインスティチュート」が行い、プロデューサーはアーケードゲーム『忍 -SHINOBI-』（1987年）を手掛けた菅野豊、ディレクターは後にメガドライブ用ソフト『ソニック・ザ・ヘッジホッグ3』（1994年）を手掛けたロジャー・ヘクター、ゲーム・デザインは後にメガドライブ用ソフト『コミックスゾーン』（1995年）を手掛けたピーター・モラウィエクおよびメガドライブ用ソフト『カメレオンキッド』（1992年）を手掛けたホイト・ウン、音楽は後にメガCD用ソフト『ジュラシックパーク』（1994年）を手掛けたバリー・ブルムおよびブライアン・コバーンが担当している。
欧米では1994年にゲームギア、1995年にセガ・マスターシステムに移植された。2007年にWii用ソフトとしてバーチャルコンソールにて配信された他、2010年にiOS用ソフトとして配信された。オムニバスソフトへの収録は、欧米においてのみゲームボーイアドバンス用ソフト『Sega Smash Pack』（2002年）に収録された他、日本も含めてゲームキューブ用ソフト『ソニック メガコレクション』（2002年）、PlayStation 2およびXbox用ソフト『ソニック メガコレクション プラス』（2004年）、PlayStation 2およびゲームキューブ用ソフト『ソニック ジェムズ コレクション』（2005年）などに収録された。

overview_en: The ear-splitting cry of a Griffin wracks your brain and echoes down the long dark corridors of Sorcerer's Kingdom. Only your sense of duty to your King gives you the courage to venture forth. As you defeat foe after foe in this precarious land, you feel your muscles growing stronger and your reflexes getting swifter. Up ahead you finally glimpse the daylight and run for fear of what is closing in behind you. You find yourself at the edge of a towering cliff where your only hope for escape is to don your magical wings and fly...
overview_zh: 獅鷲的震耳欲聾的叫聲會擾亂你的大腦，並在魔法王國黑暗的長廊中迴響。只有對國王的責任感才能給你冒險的勇氣。當你在這片不穩定的土地上擊敗一個又一個的敵人時，你會感覺到你的肌肉變得越來越強壯，你的反應也變得越來越敏捷。前方，你終於看到了日光，然後因為害怕身後的事物而逃跑。你發現自己身處高聳的懸崖邊緣，唯一的逃生希望就是戴上神奇的翅膀飛翔…

overview_en:
Sorcerian (ソーサリアン) is the fifth main game in Falcom's Dragon Slayer series of RPGs, first released for the NEC PC-88 in 1987 before being ported to a variety of other systems. Sega ported it to the Sega Mega Drive in 1990 — this port was not released outside Japan (the IBM PC port was the only port of the time to be released outside Japan, published by Sierra) and unlike the other Mega Drive Dragon Slayer games, is not a product of the later Sega Falcom partnership.

In the main series, Sorcerian was followed by Dragon Slayer: Eiyuu Densetsu. However, as with other main series entries, Sorcerian received a number of its own sequels on Japanese home computers, including the Dreamcast game Sorcerian: Shichisei Mahou no Shito.
overview_zh: 《Sorcerian》是 1987 年 12 月 20 日由日本 Falcom 發售的 PC-8801mkIISR 動作角色扮演遊戲。為《屠龍英雄系列》第 5 作。玩家操作被稱為「Sorcerian」的角色，於僅有魔法與武力支配的世界中為了考驗自身能力而展開危險冒險。最大特色為遊戲本體與獨立可追加的劇本及具擴充性的系統，發行了多款追加劇本。1990 年移植至 Mega Drive，1992 年移植 PC Engine SUPER CD-ROM²。
overview_jp:
『ソーサリアン』 (SORCERIAN) は、1987年12月20日に日本ファルコムから発売されたPC-8801mkIISR用アクションロールプレイングゲーム。
同社の『ドラゴンスレイヤーシリーズ』第5作目。主人公の「ソーサリアン」と呼ばれるキャラクター達を操作し、魔法と武力のみが支配する世界で自らの力を試すために危険な冒険を行うことを目的としている。最大の特徴であるゲーム本体と独立し追加可能なシナリオと拡張性のあるシステムにより、多数の追加シナリオが発売された。
開発も日本ファルコムが行っている。プロデューサーは『ザナドゥ』（1985年）や『イースI』（1987年）を手掛けた加藤正幸、ゲーム・デザインおよびプログラムは『ドラゴンスレイヤー』（1984年）を手掛けた木屋善夫。シナリオは五十嵐哲也、富一成、山根ともお、都築和彦。音楽は古代祐三、石川三恵子、竹林令子、永田英哉。イラストは小林誠が担当している。
1988年にPC-9801やX1turboなどの日本国産パソコン各機種に移植された他、1990年にはメガドライブおよびPC/AT互換機、1991年にMSX2、1992年にPCエンジンSUPER CD-ROM2など家庭用ゲーム機や日本国外のパソコン機種にも移植された。その他、2003年から2006年にかけて携帯電話ゲームとしても配信された。リメイク版としてはWindows用ソフト『ソーサリアンフォーエバー』（1997年）やドリームキャスト用ソフト『ソーサリアン〜七星魔法の使徒〜』（2000年）、携帯電話ゲーム『アドバンスド ソーサリアン』（2007年）など、派生作も含めて多くの機種に移植された。

title_en: Space Adventure, The - Cobra - The Legendary Bandit
no_intro_name: Space Adventure, The - Cobra - The Legendary Bandit (Europe)

overview_en:
HELP! Deep in the 214th sector of the universe, a distress signal is sent from a land in turmoil. Under attack and besieged by countless monstrous beings, Fantasyland is fighting a losing battle.

But wait, help is on the way! The heroic Space Harrier has jettisoned into their time warp via intergalactic teleportation.

Armed with the same laser blaster that made Space Harrier victorious in the Land of the Dragons, you've got a host of vicious enemies to destroy.

Space phantoms, multi-headed reptiles, and wicked wizards are just a few of the targets to set your sights on.

And they're everywhere. So keep your eyes on 'em, shoot straight, and keep moving. One false move and it's the end for you and Fantasyland.
overview_zh: 《Space Harrier》是 1985 年 12 月 SEGA Enterprises 發售的大型電玩。類型為擬 3D 射擊遊戲。官方略稱「Spehari」，標語為「來吧，前往 Fantasy Zone」。玩家在奇幻空間中揹著噴射背包高速飛行，與大量敵人戰鬥。
overview_jp: 『スペースハリアー』（Space Harrier）は1985年12月にセガ・エンタープライゼスが発売したアーケードゲームである。ジャンルは擬似3Dシューティングゲーム。公式略称は『スペハリ』。キャッチコピーは「さあ、ファンタジーゾーンへ。」。

overview_en:
HELP! Deep in the 214th sector of the universe, a distress signal is sent from a land in turmoil. Under attack and besieged by countless monstrous beings, Fantasyland is fighting a losing battle.

But wait, help is on the way! The heroic Space Harrier has jettisoned into their time warp via intergalactic teleportation.

Armed with the same laser blaster that made Space Harrier victorious in the Land of the Dragons, you've got a host of vicious enemies to destroy.

Space phantoms, multi-headed reptiles, and wicked wizards are just a few of the targets to set your sights on.

And they're everywhere. So keep your eyes on 'em, shoot straight, and keep moving. One false move and it's the end for you and Fantasyland.
overview_zh:
幫助！在宇宙第 214 區的深處，一片混亂的土地發出求救訊號。在無數怪物的攻擊和圍攻下，幻想世界正在打一場失敗的戰鬥。

但是等等，幫助即將到來！英勇的太空鷂透過星際傳送進入了時間扭曲。

裝備了與太空鷂在龍之國取得勝利的相同雷射爆能器，你有許多邪惡的敵人需要消滅。

太空幻影、多頭爬行動物和邪惡巫師只是您瞄準的幾個目標。

它們無所不在。因此，請密切注意他們，筆直射擊，然後繼續前進。一個錯誤的舉動就會導致你和幻想世界的終結。

title_jp: スペースインベーダー９０

overview_en: Space Invaders '91 is a port of the the coin-op Space Invaders '91, just like Super Space Invaders for other platforms, but still different from those. This version differs from Super Space Invaders in that there are no cutscenes, there is only one mode of play as opposed to SSI's two, and there is no stage select.
overview_zh: Space Invaders '91 是投幣式 Space Invaders '91 的移植版，就像其他平臺的 Super Space Invaders 一樣，但仍然有所不同。此版本與《Super Space Invaders》的不同之處在於，沒有過場動畫，只有一種遊戲模式（而 SSI 有兩種），也沒有關卡選擇。

overview_en: He's back, and he's one oppumped-up opposum! SPARKSTER is jet-packin' into action as the toughest Rocket Knight to ever swing a sword. Grab the controls and blast through 8 wild stages in your quest to rid the world of the evil King Gedol and his allies - a pack of lizards that are tougher than a suitcase! Oh yeah, and before you get too comfortable - Axel Gear is here. This Rocket-Knight-gone-bad has a score to settle with Sparkster. Our hero will need his revved-up new rocket pack and powerful new attack moves to kick Axel's tail back to the dark side of the planet.
overview_zh: 他回來了，而且他是一隻被壓抑的反對者！ SPARKSTER 正以噴射機投入行動，成為史上最強悍的火箭騎士。抓住控制裝置，衝破 8 個狂野關卡，消滅世界上邪惡的格多國王和他的盟友——一群比手提箱還硬的蜥蜴！哦，是的，在您感到太舒服之前 - Axel Gear 就在這裡。這位變壞的火箭騎士要向斯帕克斯特算帳。我們的英雄需要他加速的新火箭包和強大的新攻擊動作才能將阿克塞爾的尾巴踢回地球的黑暗面。

title_jp: スパークスターロケットナイトアドベンチャーズ2

overview_en:
Brutal Deluxe doesn't live up to their name - in fact they're the worst team Speedball has ever seen. As their manager, it is your job to transform their fortunes. As well as the league system, which consists of 2 8-team divisions and challenges you to advance to the top, there are also 2 cup tournaments, one of which is played out over 2 'legs' with the aggregate score deciding who progresses.

You can play the matches as well, which is the real meat of the game. They consist of 2 90-second periods, and the gameplay is futuristic, fast and frantic, with heavy tackling encouraged to retrieve the ball. Power-ups and tokens appear on the pitch, including ones to make your players extra-tough or freeze the opponents.
overview_zh:
Brutal Deluxe 名副其實——事實上，他們是 Speedball 見過的最差的球隊。身為他們的經理，你的工作就是改變他們的命運。 As well as the league system, which consists of 2 8-team divisions and challenges you to advance to the top, there are also 2 cup tournaments, one of which is played out over 2 'legs' with the aggregate wressm.

你也可以參加比賽，這才是遊戲的真正內容。它們由 2 個 90 秒的時段組成，遊戲玩法充滿未來感、快速而瘋狂，鼓勵大力搶斷以奪回球。球場上會出現能量提升和令牌，包括讓你的球員變得更強硬或凍結對手的東西。

overview_en:
Speedball 2: Brutal Deluxe is no ordinary sports sim.  It's a unique blend of extreme violence and stunning gameplay. There's stylish TV-style presentation and slick metal graphics, but when the play starts - the action begins.  

Train your team, work through the league, beat the other players to a pulp and win through to the championship. With a team management option, one and two player facilities and league, knock out and cup competitions to complete, Speedball 2 is the ideal game for lovers of serious ultra-violence.
overview_zh:
Speedball 2: Brutal Deluxe is no ordinary sports sim. It's a unique blend of extreme violence and stunning gameplay. There's stylish TV-style presentation and slick metal graphics, but when the play starts - the action begins.

Train your team, work through the league, beat the other players to a pulp and win through to the championship. Speedball 2 具有團隊管理選項、一名和兩名球員設施以及聯賽、淘汰賽和杯賽等功能，是嚴重極端暴力愛好者的理想遊戲。

overview_en:
One of the city's biggest criminal masterminds, Wilson Fisk, aka The Kingpin, has pulled off the ultimate plot. He announces to New York that a bomb has been planted somewhere in the city and that it will detonate in 24 hours. To make matters worse, he blames Spider-Man, and now the web-slinger is alone and on the run from the police. Spidey smells a rat and knows what to do.

Spider-Man has 24 hours to find and disarm the bomb. He must also clear his name, so he grabs his camera to take convincing photos for his Spider-Man-hating boss, J. Jonah Jameson, and the police, to prove his innocence. Along the way, he may also meet some of his old enemies, including Dr. Octopus, Electro, The Lizard, The Sandman, The Hobgoblin, Venom, and ultimately the Kingpin himself.
overview_zh:
該市最大的犯罪策劃者之一威爾遜·菲斯克（又名“頭目”）已經完成了最終的陰謀。他向紐約宣佈，該市某處已安置了一枚炸彈，並將在 24 小時內引爆。更糟的是，他指責蜘蛛俠，而現在蜘蛛人卻孤單一人，正在躲避警察的追捕。 Spidey smells a rat and knows what to do.

蜘蛛人有 24 小時的時間尋找並拆除炸彈。他還必須洗清自己的罪名，因此他拿起相機為討厭蜘蛛人的老闆 J.喬納森·詹姆森和警察拍攝了令人信服的照片，以證明自己的清白。一路上，他還可能遇到一些宿敵，包括章魚博士、電光人、蜥蜴人、沙人、妖精、毒液，以及最終的金並本人。

title_jp: マキシマムカーネイジ
overview_en:
One of the city's biggest criminal masterminds, Wilson Fisk, aka The Kingpin, has pulled off the ultimate plot. He announces to New York that a bomb has been planted somewhere in the city and that it will detonate in 24 hours. To make matters worse, he blames Spider-Man, and now the web-slinger is alone and on the run from the police. Spidey smells a rat and knows what to do.

Spider-Man has 24 hours to find and disarm the bomb. He must also clear his name, so he grabs his camera to take convincing photos for his Spider-Man-hating boss, J. Jonah Jameson, and the police, to prove his innocence. Along the way, he may also meet some of his old enemies, including Dr. Octopus, Electro, The Lizard, The Sandman, The Hobgoblin, Venom, and ultimately the Kingpin himself.
overview_zh:
該市最大的犯罪策劃者之一威爾遜·菲斯克（又名“頭目”）已經完成了最終的陰謀。他向紐約宣佈，該市某處已安置了一枚炸彈，並將在 24 小時內引爆。更糟的是，他指責蜘蛛俠，而現在蜘蛛人卻孤單一人，正在躲避警察的追捕。蜘蛛人聞到了老鼠的味道，知道該怎麼做。

蜘蛛人有 24 小時的時間尋找並拆除炸彈。他還必須洗清自己的罪名，因此他拿起相機為討厭蜘蛛人的老闆 J.喬納森·詹姆森和警察拍攝了令人信服的照片，以證明自己的清白。一路上，他還可能遇到一些宿敵，包括章魚博士、電光人、蜥蜴人、沙人、妖精、毒液，以及最終的金並本人。

overview_en:
Only one maniacal madman can force Spider-Man to unite with his sinister, arch-nemesis Venom: CARNAGE!  His deadly rampage is tearing New York City apart!  Only wild web-slinging maneuvers, crushing combat moves and Super Hero allies can save the city from total obliteration.

It's maximum mayhem!  It's Maximum Carnage!  Paint the town red!
overview_zh:
只有一個瘋狂的瘋子可以迫使蜘蛛人與他險惡的宿敵猛毒聯合起來：屠殺！  他的致命暴行正在撕裂紐約市！  只有狂野的網投策略、毀滅性的戰鬥動作和超級英雄盟友才能拯救這座城市免於徹底毀滅。

這是最大的混亂！  這是最大的屠殺！  大事狂歡！

overview_en: Spider-Man and members of the X-Men have teamed up in this side-scrolling action game to fight against Arcade, who has built a giant amusement park for the sole purpose of trapping and destroying the super-heroes. You first play as Spider-Man, who sees the X-Men get kidnapped by Arcade and follows them. Once you make it inside Arcade's park you can choose to play as Spider-Man, Cyclops, Storm, Gambit, or Wolverine, each of whom are trapped in a different part of Arcade's maze of deadly traps. You must navigate all five of them safely out, using their different skills and abilities while defeating baddies and bosses along the way.
overview_zh: 蜘蛛人和 X 戰警成員在這款橫向捲軸動作遊戲中聯手對抗 Arcade，Arcade 建造了一個巨大的遊樂園，其唯一目的就是捕捉和消滅超級英雄。你首先扮演蜘蛛俠，看到 X 戰警被 Arcade 綁架並跟蹤他們。一旦你進入 Arcade 的公園，你可以選擇扮演蜘蛛人、獨眼巨人、暴風女、智謀或金鋼狼，他們每個人都被困在 Arcade 的致命陷阱迷宮的不同部分。你必須安全地引導他們五個人出去，利用他們不同的技能和能力，同時擊敗壞人和老闆。

overview_en: Spiritual Warfare is a Zelda-like overhead action game where you play as a soldier of God, fighting the forces of darkness in various parts of a modern city to find the armor of God, each one guarded by increasingly difficult demon bosses. When you are dire need, an angel may come down and help you, if you answer Bible questions correctly. The game will take through increasingly difficult levels of play, where in the end you will face off with Satan himself.
overview_zh: 《Spiritual Warfare》是一款類似薩爾達傳說的架空動作遊戲，你扮演一名上帝計程車兵，在現代城市的各個地方與黑暗勢力​​作戰，尋找上帝的盔甲，每件盔甲都由越來越難對付的惡魔頭目守護。當你急需時，如果你正確回答聖經問題，天使可能會下來幫助你。遊戲將經歷越來越困難的關卡，最終你將與撒旦面對面。

overview_en: Just as he is about to present his inventions to a scientific research symposium in New York, Count Champignac is kidnapped by Cyanida. The evil robot has but one aim, to rule the world. There's not a moment to lose. Spirou will have to scour the streets, subways and skyscrapers of New York and fly to Palombia, a marshy jungle full of surprise... good and bad...
overview_zh: 正當Champignac伯爵準備在紐約的科學研究研討會上展示他的發明時，Cyanida綁架了他。邪惡的機器人只有一個目標，那就是統治世界。一刻也不能浪費。斯皮魯必須走遍紐約的街道、地鐵和摩天大樓，然後飛往巴隆比亞，這是一片充滿驚喜的沼澤叢林……有好有壞……

overview_en: Three months have gone by since the events of the first game. The Terror Mask, which has reformed after breaking at the climax of the first game, appears to Rick and repeatedly tempts him to "go back to the house", telling him that Jennifer "doesn't have to die". It closes by telling Rick "You need me.". Rick succeeds in rescuing Jennifer, and the House sinks into the bottom of the river.
overview_zh: 距離第一場比賽的事件已經過了三個月。恐怖面具在第一場比賽的高潮中崩潰後重新出現，出現在瑞克面前，並反覆誘惑他“回家”，告訴他詹妮弗“不必死”。它以告訴瑞克“你需要我”結束。瑞克成功救了珍妮佛，房子沉入河底。

overview_en: Splatterhouse 3 is a video game released by Namco for the Mega Drive/Genesis in 1993. It is the sequel to Splatterhouse 2 and was one of the first games to be given a rating by Sega's own Videogame Rating Council.
overview_zh: 《Splatterhouse 3》是 Namco 於 1993 年為 Mega Drive/Genesis 發行的電玩遊戲。它是《Splatterhouse 2》的續作，也是第一批獲得世嘉自己的電玩評級委員會評級的遊戲之一。

title_jp: スプラッターハウス PART2
overview_zh: 《Splatterhouse PART2》是 1992 年由日本 NAMCO 發售的 Mega Drive 橫向捲軸動作遊戲。北美版於同年 7 月、日本國內 8 月 4 日、歐洲 10 月 8 日發售。為大型電玩《Splatterhouse》（1988）的家用機原創續作。玩家操作主角 Rick，再度潛入「Splatterhouse」目標復活已逝戀人 Jennifer。基本系統承襲前作，敵角色與機關全部更新。由 Now Production 開發。
overview_jp:
『スプラッターハウス PART2』 (Splatterhouse 2) は、1992年に日本のナムコから発売されたメガドライブ用横スクロールアクションゲーム。同年7月に北米にて発売され、日本国内では8月4日、欧州では10月8日に発売された。
同社のアーケードゲーム『スプラッターハウス』（1988年）の家庭用オリジナル続編。主人公のリックを操作し、前作の舞台となった「スプラッターハウス」に再び潜入して亡き恋人ジェニファーを復活させる事を目的としている。基本的なゲームシステムは前作を踏襲しているが、敵キャラクターやギミックはすべて一新されている。
開発はナウプロダクションが行い、プログラムはゲームボーイ用ソフト『ミッキーズ・チェイス』（1991年）を手掛けたおおほりはるお、音楽はゲームボーイ用ソフト『ディグダグ』（1992年）を手掛けた金田栄子が担当している。
2008年にWii用ソフトとしてバーチャルコンソールにて配信された。

title_jp: スプラッターハウス PART3
overview_zh: 《Splatterhouse PART3》是 1993 年由 NAMCO（後 Bandai Namco Entertainment）以大型電玩《Splatterhouse》（1988）的家用機原創續作（系列第 3 作）為定位於 Mega Drive 推出的動作遊戲。在日本也有發售，但遊戲中的訊息（包含關卡間劇情演出）皆只有英文，未做任何中文化或日文在地化。日版部分演出被刪減，海外版操作與招式也與日版有差異，各演出畫面採用真人實拍。
overview_jp:
『スプラッターハウス PART3』（SPLATTERHOUSE PART3）は、1993年にナムコ（後のバンダイナムコエンターテインメント）から、アーケードゲーム『スプラッターハウス』（1988年）の家庭用オリジナル続編（シリーズ3作目）としてメガドライブで発売されたアクションゲームである。
日本でも発売されたが、ゲーム中のメッセージはステージの合間のストーリーデモも含めて英語のみで、日本語へのローカライズは一切されていない。また日本版では一部のデモがカットされており、海外版では操作や技等が異なっている。各デモ画面では実写が使われている。

maker: Tec Toy Indústria de Brinquedos S.A.
publisher: Tec Toy Indústria de Brinquedos S.A.
overview_en: Sport Games is a compilation of Sega Mega Drive sports games released by TecToy in Brazil in 1998. Included games are Super Volley Ball, World Championship Soccer II and Super Real Basketball.
overview_zh: 《Sport Games》是 TecToy 於 1998 年在巴西發行的 Sega Mega Drive 運動遊戲合輯。其中包括《超級排球》、《世界錦標賽足球 II》和《超級真實籃球》等遊戲。

overview_en: Players can play either exhibition, regular season, all-star, or playoff games. The game also features authentic Major League Baseball rosters for the 1991 season. Gameplay commonly features double and triple plays, and only the fastest runners in the game are capable of stealing bases. It was one of the first video games to feature individual hitting abilities for each pitcher. Classic match-ups include Texas' Nolan Ryan versus Oakland's lineup with such all-stars as Jose Canseco, Rickey Henderson, Dave Henderson, and Mark McGwire.
overview_zh: 球員可以參加表演賽、例行賽、全明星賽或季後賽。遊戲還包含 1991 年賽季真實的美國職棒大聯盟球員名單。遊戲玩法通常以雙人和三人為特色，只有遊戲中跑得最快的人才有能力偷壘。這是最早為每個投手提供個人擊球能力的影片遊戲之一。經典對決包括德克薩斯州的諾蘭·瑞恩 (Nolan Ryan) 對陣奧克蘭隊的全明星陣容，其中包括何塞·坎塞科 (Jose Canseco)、裡基·亨德森 (Rickey Henderson)、戴夫·亨德森 (Dave Henderson) 和馬克·麥奎爾 (Mark McGwire)。

overview_en: The central character in the game is, of course, Spot. Spot has somehow become trapped in a movie projector. As he jumps from film to film, he encounters many classic film genres; these make up the various levels of the game. The main levels are a pirate movie, an adventure movie, and a horror movie, but there are many other bonus films to unlock.
overview_zh: 遊戲的主角當然是 Spot。斑點不知何故被困在電影放映機中。當他從一部電影跳到另一部電影時，他遇到了許多經典的電影型別；這些構成了遊戲的各個層面。主要關卡有海盜電影、冒險電影和恐怖電影，但還有許多其他獎勵電影可供解鎖。

overview_en:
Squirrel King is an unlicensed platform game developed for the Sega Mega Drive. It was published and developed by Gamtec, and therefore its origin is Taiwan.

Squirrel King is extremely similar to Capcom's Chip 'N Dale: Rescue Rangers and it sequel, Chip 'N Dale: Rescue Rangers 2 for the NES, to the point where the player actually plays as two characters named "Chip" and "Dale" (though they look slightly different to their Disney counterparts). C jumps, B picks up and throws crates, and A allows Chip or Dale to throw fireballs, assuming they have some in their inventory.

Squirrel King is the basis for another unlicensed title, Super Mario World, also for the Mega Drive,but developed by Chuanpu and possibly published by Ming Super Chip Electronic.
overview_zh:
Squirrel King 是一款為 Sega Mega Drive 開發的未經許可的平臺遊戲。它是由 Gamtec 出版和開發的，因此它的起源是臺灣。

《松鼠王》與 Capcom 的《Chip 'N Dale: Rescue Rangers》及其續作《Chip 'N Dale: Rescue Rangers 2》（NES 版）極為相似，玩家實際上扮演兩個名為“Chip”和“Dale”的角色（儘管他們看起來與迪士尼的角色略有不同）。 C 跳躍，B 撿起並扔出板條箱，A 允許 Chip 或 Dale 扔火球，假設他們的庫存中有火球。

《松鼠王》是另一款未授權遊戲《超級瑪利歐世界》的基礎，遊戲同樣適用於 Mega Drive，但由 Chuanpu 開發，可能由 Ming Super Chip Electronic 發行。

overview_en: Star Control is a science-fiction wargame which pits the forces of the Alliance of Free Stars against those of the predatory Ur-Quan Hierarchy. The games are designed so that you can ease into play, familiarizing yourself with menus, options and player controls. The Alliance and Hierarchy each possess different types of warships. Each vessel has its own maneuvering and firing characteristics, plus a unique special power that you can employ when circumstances dictate.
overview_zh: 《星際控制》是一款科幻戰爭遊戲，自由星際聯盟的力量與掠奪性的烏爾-泉等級制度的力量進行對抗。這些遊戲的設計旨在讓您可以輕鬆上手，熟悉選單、選項和玩家控制。聯盟和等級制度各自擁有不同型別的戰艦。每艘船都有自己的機動和射擊特性，以及獨特的特殊力量，您可以在情況需要時使用。

overview_en: Star Cruiser (スタークルーザー) is a 1990 adventure game for the Sega Mega Drive by Arsys Software, published by NCS. It combines two prior games by Arsys, Star Cruiser and Star Cruiser II, both released on various Japanese home computers. No version has been released outside Japan.
overview_zh: 《Star Cruiser》是 Arsys Software 開發、1988 年 5 月發售的 PC-8801mkIISR 後機型用 3D 動作冒險遊戲。1988 年移植 X1turbo、PC-9801VM/UV，1989 年移植 X68000，1990 年由 Messiah 推出 Mega Drive 移植版。後續於 Project EGG 平台陸續配信 PC-8801 版（2008）、X68000 版（2011）、Mega Drive 版（2021）。
overview_jp:
『スタークルーザー』 (Star Cruiser) は、アルシスソフトウェアが開発し1988年5月に発売されたPC-8801mkIISR以降用3Dアクションアドベンチャーゲーム。
1988年にはX1turbo、PC-9801VM/UV向けに、1989年にはX68000向けに移植された他、1990年にはメガドライブ移植版がメサイヤから発売された。後にWindows用のプロジェクトEGG対応ソフトとして、2008年にPC-8801版、2011年にX68000版、2021年にメガドライブ版が配信された。

overview_en: An English release of the Japanese Sega Mega Drive game Blue Almanac.
overview_zh: 日本世嘉 Mega Drive 遊戲《藍色年鑑》的英文版本。

title_en: Star Trek - Deep Space Nine - Crossroads of Time
no_intro_name: Star Trek - Deep Space Nine - Crossroads of Time (Europe)
overview_en: In the game, the player controls a member of the Deep Space Nine's crew, mostly captain Benjamin Sisko, also doctor Julian Bashir, major Kira Nerys and Odo. Most of the game's levels are cinematic platformers, one is a horizontal-scrolling shooter. Platformer levels are of two types: 'adventure' levels and 'action' levels. In 'adventure' levels, the player character moves around the Deep Space Nine, talking with NPCs and ultimately reaching a certain point in the plot. In 'action' levels, the player wanders the level in the cinematic platformer style, climbing ledges, fighting enemies with a phaser, finding and using items, with an ultimate goal to fulfill a certain mission, sometimes within a given time limit.
overview_zh: 在遊戲中，玩家控制深空九號的一名船員，主要是船長班傑明·西斯科，還有朱利安·巴希爾醫生、基拉·內里斯少校和奧多。遊戲的大部分關卡都是電影級平臺遊戲，其中之一是水平捲軸射擊遊戲。平臺遊戲關卡有兩種型別：「冒險」關卡和「動作」關卡。在「冒險」關卡中，玩家角色在深空九號中移動，與 NPC 交談並最終到達劇情中的某個點。在「動作」關卡中，玩家以電影平臺遊戲風格在關卡中徘徊，攀爬壁架，用移相器與敵人戰鬥，尋找和使用物品，最終目標是完成特定任務，有時是在給定的時間限制內。

title_en: Star Trek - The Next Generation - Echoes from the Past
no_intro_name: Star Trek - The Next Generation - Echoes from the Past (USA) (Rev A)
overview_en: The U.S.S. Enterprise races an evil Romulan force for control of the ultimate law and order device. The future of the Federation... and the universe... rests in your hands! Command the Starship Enterprise! Probe hundreds of strange new worlds and alien vessels with the ship's sensors. Space battle rages when you encounter Romulans in the Neutral Zone and disable their ships with well-placed phaser and photon torpedo attacks. Join forces with Jean Luc Picard and the crew of the Enterprise to solve the mysterious "Trinity Test." Solve it and the Federation is safe. Fail... and the universe will never be the same.
overview_zh: 美國企業號與邪惡的羅慕倫勢力展開競賽，爭奪終極法律與秩序裝置的控制權。聯邦……甚至宇宙的未來……都掌握在你的手中！指揮企業號星艦！使用船上的感測器探測數百個奇怪的新世界和外星飛船。當你在中立區遇到羅慕倫人並用精心佈置的移相器和光子魚雷攻擊摧毀他們的飛船時，太空戰鬥就會爆發。與讓·呂克·皮卡德和企業號船員聯手解決神秘的「三位一體測試」。解決了這個問題，聯邦就安全了。失敗……宇宙將永遠不一樣。

title_jp: スターウォーズ・アーケード
スターウォーズ・レベル・アサルト

overview_zh: 《Starblade》是 NAMCO 推出、運行於專用大型機台的大型電玩，1991 年起運行。為承襲先行作品《Galaxian³》（1990）世界觀的單人 3DCG 槍戰射擊遊戲。屬於 UGSF 系列之一。1994 年移植至 Mega CD、3DO，1995 年以《Starblade α》之名移植 PlayStation。1991 年度《Gamest》大獎獲得綜合大獎第 4 名等多項殊榮。
overview_jp:
『スターブレード』 (STARBLADE) は、ナムコがリリースした専用大型筐体にて稼働するアーケードゲーム。1991年稼働開始。先行作品『ギャラクシアン3』（1990年）の世界観を踏襲した、一人用の3DCGガンシューティングゲームとなっている。UGSFシリーズの1つである。
1994年にメガCD、3DOに移植された他、1995年には『スターブレードα』のタイトルでPlayStationに移植された。PlayStation版は2014年にPlayStation 3およびPlayStation Portable用ソフトとしてゲームアーカイブスにて配信された。
携帯電話アプリゲームとしては2003年にVアプリにて『スターブレード 突入編』、2004年に『スターブレード 激闘編』のタイトルでそれぞれ配信され、2008年には完全版がiアプリにて配信された。
アーケード版は2009年にWii用ソフトとしてバーチャルコンソールアーケードにて配信された。（現在は配信終了）
アーケード版はゲーム誌『ゲーメスト』の企画「第5回ゲーメスト大賞」（1991年度）にて、大賞4位、ベストシューティング賞6位、ベスト演出賞3位、ベストグラフィック賞1位、ベストVGM賞7位を獲得した。

overview_en:
Starflight is a space exploration, trading, and combat video game developed by Binary Systems and published by Electronic Arts in 1986. Originally developed for IBM compatible and Tandy systems, it was later released for the Amiga, Atari ST, Macintosh and Commodore 64. A fully revamped version of the game was developed for the Sega Mega Drive/Genesis in 1991.

Set in the year 4620, the game puts players in the role of a starship captain sent to explore the galaxy. There is no set path, allowing players to switch freely between mining, ship-to-ship combat, and alien diplomacy. The broader plot of the game emerges slowly, as the player discovers that an ancient race of beings is causing stars to flare and destroy all living creatures.

The game has been widely praised by both contemporary and modern critics, and is one of the earliest instances of a sandbox game. It led to the development of a sequel, Starflight 2: Trade Routes of the Cloud Nebula, and influenced the design of numerous other games for decades after its release.
overview_zh:
Starflight 是一款由 Binary Systems 開發並由 Electronic Arts 於 1986 年發行的太空探索、交易和戰鬥電玩遊戲。最初是為 IBM 相容和 Tandy 系統開發的，後來為 Amiga、Atari ST、Macintosh 和 Commodore 64 發布。遊戲的完整改良版本於 1991 年為 Sega Mega Drive/Genesis 開發。

遊戲以 4620 年為背景，玩家扮演一位被派去探索銀河系的星艦艦長。沒有設定的路徑，讓玩家可以在採礦、艦對艦戰鬥和外星人外交之間自由切換。遊戲的更廣闊的情節慢慢浮現，玩家發現一個古老的生物種族正在導致星星閃耀並摧毀所有生物。

該遊戲受到當代和現代評論家的廣泛好評，是最早的沙盒遊戲之一。它促成了續作《星際飛行 2：雲星雲貿易路線》的開發，並在發行後的幾十年裡影響了許多其他遊戲的設計。

overview_en:
As Colonel O'Neil, a variety of objectives must be met starting with the recovery of supplies and the finding of other teammates, including civilian archaeologist Daniel Jackson. Once regrouped, O'Neil must lead the attack on the god, Ra and escape back to Earth before the power of the nuclear bomb can be unleashed on this new world.

The game is a side-scroller platform adventure. The player controls O'Neil on a variety of objectives and is armed with a rifle weapon and grenades. Embarking through desert, caverns and nomad towns... eventually to the palace of Ra.
overview_zh:
作為奧尼爾上校，必須實現各種目標，首先是恢復補給品和尋找其他隊友，包括平民考古學家丹尼爾傑克森。重新集結後，歐尼爾必須領導對神拉的攻擊，並在核彈的威力釋放到這個新世界之前逃回地球。

遊戲是一款橫向捲軸平臺冒險遊戲。玩家控制奧尼爾完成各種目標，並配備步槍武器和手榴彈。穿越沙漠、洞穴和遊牧城鎮……最終到達拉的宮殿。

overview_en:
Steel Empire (originally released as Koutetsu Teikoku in Japan, and otherwise known in various English materials as The Steel Empire or Empire of Steel), is a side-scrolling shoot 'em up video game released on the Sega Genesis / Mega Drive home consoles in 1992, and was later ported to the Nintendo Game Boy Advance in 2004.

Steel Empire is notable amongst shoot 'em up games for its unique aesthetic designs. Mostly low-tech in nature, with it being set in the late-19th century of an alternate world, the game's aircraft, weaponry, powerups, environments, enemies and bosses are heavily stylized adding strong steampunk elements to the style, themes and visuals of the game. Steam power, propeller-based aircraft, biplanes, dirigibles and heavily-armored steam trains with giant cannons play large roles in the game's protagonists and opponents.
overview_zh:
《鋼鐵帝國》（最初在日本發行為 Koutetsu Teikoku，在各種英文資料中也稱為 The Steel Empire 或 Empire of Steel）是一款橫向捲軸射擊遊戲，於 1992 年在 Sega Genesis / Mega Drive 家用遊戲機上發行，後來於 2004 年移植到 Nintendo Game Boy Advance。

《鋼鐵帝國》因其獨特的美學設計而在射擊遊戲中引人注目。本質上科技含量較低，遊戲背景設定在 19 世紀末的另一個世界，遊戲的飛機、武器、能量提升、環境、敵人和 Boss 都高度程式化，為遊戲的風格、主題和視覺效果新增了強烈的蒸氣龐克元素。蒸汽動力、螺旋槳飛機、雙翼飛機、飛船和帶有巨型大砲的重灌甲蒸汽火車在遊戲的主角和對手中扮演著重要角色。

overview_en:
Steel Talons is a 3D arcade game by released by Atari Games in 1991. The player takes on the role of a pilot for an "AT1196 Steel Talons combat helicopter". The helicopter is equipped with a machine gun, rockets, and a limited number of air-to-surface guided missiles. The game came as a two-player cockpit cabinet and featured both cooperative and competitive game play modes.

In the single-player mode, there are 19 computer simulated missions. In the two player mode, two players may work together in the simulation world, or they may choose to go at combat with each other where the mission objective is to destroy the other player.[1]

Steel Talons was ported to the Sega Mega Drive/Genesis, Atari Lynx handheld, Atari ST, Atari Falcon and SNES.
overview_zh:
《Steel Talons》是Atari Games於1991年推出的3D街機遊戲。玩家扮演「AT1196 Steel Talons戰鬥直升機」的飛行員。直升機配備機槍、火箭彈和數量有限的空對地飛彈。遊戲為兩人駕駛艙櫃，具有合作和競爭遊戲模式。

在單人模式中，有19個電腦模擬任務。在兩人模式中，兩名玩家可以在模擬世界中一起工作，或者他們可以選擇互相戰鬥，任務目標是消滅另一名玩家。 [1]

Steel Talons 被移植到 Sega Mega Drive/Genesis、Atari Lynx 手持裝置、Atari ST、Atari Falcon 和 SNES 上。

overview_en:
Stone Protectors is an unreleased Sega Mega Drive beat-'em-up game developed by Eurocom based on the cartoon series with the same name. It saw a release for the Super Nintendo Entertainment System in 1994, and a port to the Mega Drive was due to be published by VIC Tokai, but was cancelled for unknown reasons. The game was very close to completion before being axed, so much so that it had even obtained an ESRB rating.

A fully working prototype of the Mega Drive version was unearthed in 2010.

This game did receive an official release by the current rights holders in March 2022. A re-release of the SNES version and a release of the Sega Genesis/Mega Drive version. https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/planetoon/stone-protectors-special-edition-series-box-set/
overview_zh:
Stone Protectors is an unreleased Sega Mega Drive beat-'em-up game developed by Eurocom based on the cartoon series with the same name. 1994 年，超級任天堂娛樂系統釋出了該遊戲，而 Mega Drive 的移植版原定由 VIC Tokai 釋出，但由於未知原因被取消。 The game was very close to completion before being axed, so much so that it had even obtained an ESRB rating.

A fully working prototype of the Mega Drive version was unearthed in 2010.

該遊戲確實於 2022 年 3 月由當前權利持有者正式發布。 SNES 版本的重新發行和 Sega Genesis/Mega Drive 版本的發布。 https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/planetoon/stone-protectors-special-edition-series-box-set/

overview_en: Free the imprisoned fairy folk before they are obliterated by an evil Queen. She stoops to conquer the land Stormlord inhabits, destroying the peaceful euphoria with each annihilation. Stormlord's mission - free the captured and defend the peace and tranquility of his realm. Unfortunately, he must repel the wicked monarch, but should he fail, the evil Queen and her dark sovereignty will reign forever...
overview_zh: 在被邪惡女王消滅之前解救被囚禁的仙女。她屈尊征服了風暴領主居住的土地，每一次的毀滅都摧毀了和平的欣快感。風暴領主的使命－釋放被俘者並保衛他領地的和平與安寧。不幸的是，他必須擊退邪惡的君主，但如果他失敗了，邪惡的女王和她的黑暗主權將永遠統治…

no_intro_name: Story of Thor, The (Europe) (Mega Drive Mini)

title_en: Story of Thor, The - Hikari o Tsugumono
no_intro_name: Story of Thor, The - Hikari o Tsugumono (Japan)

title_en: Street Fighter II' - Hyper Champion Edition
no_intro_name: Street Fighter II' - Hyper Champion Edition

title_en: Street Fighter II' Plus: Champion Edition
title_jp: ストリートファイターII ダッシュプラス
title_zh: 快打旋風 II 四天王版
no_intro_name: Street Fighter II' Plus - Champion Edition (Japan, Korea) (Ja)

title_en: Street Fighter II' - Special Champion Edition
no_intro_name: Street Fighter II' - Special Champion Edition (Europe) (Virtual Console)
overview_en:
Street Fighter II: Special Champion Edition is a 1993 Genesis video game developed by Capcom and released by Capcom USA in the USA on September 18, 1993.

Smash Into The Next Level!

From the corners of the globe come twelve of the toughest fighters to ever prowl the streets. Choose your champion and step into the arena as one of the eight original challengers or as one of the four Grand Masters! Pound your opponent as Balrog and knock them out for the count. Tower over your prey as Sagat and daze them with your awesome Tiger Shot. Slash your opponent with Vega's claw and send them running for cover. Or strike fear into your enemies as M. Bison, the greatest Grand Master of them all!

• Two games in one! Play Champion Edition or the new Hyper mode!
• 24 Megs of heart-stopping martial arts action!
• Choose from any of 12 unique fighters. Each with their own unique fighting style and special attacks!
• Features a new Group Battle Mode. Only for the Sega Genesis!
overview_zh:
《街頭霸王 II：特別冠軍版》是一款由 Capcom 開發的 1993 年 Genesis 電玩遊戲，並於 1993 年 9 月 18 日由 Capcom USA 在美國發行。

闖入新的關卡！

來自世界各個角落的十二名最強悍的戰士在街頭徘徊。選擇你的冠軍，作為八位原始挑戰者之一或四位大師之一踏入競技場！化身為炎魔，猛烈攻擊你的對手，然後將他們擊倒。扮演薩加特，站在你的獵物上方，用你令人敬畏的老虎射擊讓他們暈眩。用維加的爪子砍倒你的對手，然後讓他們逃跑尋找掩護。或扮演M. Bison，最偉大的大師，讓你的敵人感到恐懼！

• 兩個遊戲合而為一！玩冠軍版或新的超級模式！
• 24 兆令人心跳加速的武術動作！
• 從 12 位獨特的戰士中任意選擇。每個人都有自己獨特的戰鬥風格和特殊攻擊！
• 具有新的團戰模式。限世嘉創世紀！

overview_en:
Street Racer is a racing game developed by Vivid Image and published by Ubisoft for numerous consoles and computers including the Sega Mega Drive and Sega Saturn. Similar to Super Mario Kart, the game allows the user to select one of many cartoon-like characters, racing around a circuit, avoiding obstacles and using special items.

Due to various hardware restrictions, gameplay differs among platforms - the Mega Drive version of the game has the player travel along a road in a similar manner to Hang On or OutRun, whereas the Saturn version renders its levels through 3D geometry, allowing the user to see more of the stage. The Japanese Saturn version of the game is called Street Racer Extra (ストリート　レーサー　エクストラ) due to these additions.

The Mega Drive version of the game was not released in Japan or North America, though did make it to Brazil and Europe. Plans for a North American version were put in place (even getting to the stage of having its own box art with ESRB rating), but were cancelled. Likewise the Saturn version of the game was not released in North America. Game Gear and 32X versions were also in development, but were never released in any region.
overview_zh:
Street Racer 是一款由 Vivid Image 開發並由 Ubisoft 發行的賽車遊戲，適用於多種遊戲機和計算機，包括 Sega Mega Drive 和 Sega Saturn。與《超級瑪利歐賽車》類似，該遊戲允許使用者選擇眾多卡通人物之一，在賽道上賽車，避開障礙物並使用特殊物品。

由於各種硬體限制，不同平臺的遊戲玩法有所不同——Mega Drive 版本的遊戲讓玩家以類似於 Hang On 或 OutRun 的方式沿著道路行駛，而 Saturn 版本則透過 3D 幾何體渲染關卡，讓使用者能夠看到更多的舞臺。由於這些新增內容，該遊戲的日本土星版被稱為 Street Racer Extra（sutoritoresesaekusutora）。

該遊戲的 Mega Drive 版本並未在日本或北美發行，但在巴西和歐洲發行。北美版本的計劃已經到位（甚至達到了擁有自己的 ESRB 評級的盒子藝術的階段），但被取消了。同樣，該遊戲的土星版本也沒有在北美發行。 Game Gear 和 32X 版本也在開發中，但從未在任何地區發布。

overview_en:
An arcade beat 'em up, Street Smart puts you in the shoes of the ass-kicking "Karate Man" who travels across the country to participate in the Tag Championship.

The game is played from a side-scrolling third person perspective in which you can move in any direction in a closed arena (limited by the cheering crowds and other street elements). You have to face eight unique fighters in succession by using punches, kicks, and jumping against the progressively more difficult adversaries.
overview_zh:
《Street Smart》是一款街機清版格鬥遊戲，讓您扮演令人驚嘆的“空手道人”，他穿越全國參加雙打錦標賽。

遊戲是從橫向捲軸的第三人稱視角進行的，您可以在封閉的競技場中向任何方向移動（受到歡呼的人群和其他街頭元素的限制）。你必須連續面對八位獨特的戰士，並使用拳擊、踢和跳躍來對付越來越難對付的對手。

overview_en:
"What was once a happy, peaceful, productive city, full of life and activity, has fallen into the hands of a secret criminal syndicate. The leader of the syndicate has somehow managed to keep his identity a secret. The organization soon absorbed the city government (anyone can be had if the price is right). They even had the metropolitan police force in their back pocket. Looting, random violence and destruction are rampant. No one is safe walking the streets, day or night...
"As the chaos continued at full strength, three young police officers tried to establish a special attack unit. They were repeatedly turned down by their superiors, most of whom had been bought by the organization or were too afraid to make a stand. One day, when they could no longer stand by and watch their city being demolished, they quit the force!'
"Adam Hunter, Axel Stone and Blaze Fielding decided to forgo their careers in legal law enforcement and put their lives on the line. They are without weapons, but each possesses great hand-to-hand combat abilities. Take them into the heart of the city and battle the most dangerous wave of bad dudes and chicks ever assembled. Make the city a place where people no longer have to walk the Streets of Rage!"
overview_zh:
「曾經是一座幸福、和平、富有成效、充滿生機和活力的城市，現在落入了一個秘密犯罪集團的手中。該集團的頭目設法將自己的身份保密。該組織很快就吞併了市政府（只要價格合適，就可以擁有任何人）。他們甚至還擁有倫敦警察局。搶劫、隨機暴力和破壞猖獗。無論白天，走在沒有人是安全的…街上沒有人是安全的…街上沒有人是安全的…街上沒有人是安全的…街上沒有人是安全的…街上沒有人。
「隨著混亂繼續全面展開，三名年輕警察試圖建立一支特別攻擊小組。他們一再遭到上級的拒絕，其中大多數人是被組織收買的，或者是太害怕而不敢表態。有一天，當他們再也無法袖手旁觀自己的城市被拆毀時，他們退出了部隊！
「亞當·亨特、阿克塞爾·斯通和布萊茲·菲爾丁決定放棄他們在執法部門的職業生涯，冒著生命危險。他們沒有武器，但每個人都擁有出色的肉搏戰能力。帶他們進入城市中心，與有史以來最危險的壞人和小雞們戰鬥。讓這座城市成為人們不再需要走上憤怒街道的地方！」

overview_en:
Streets of Rage 2 is a 1992 Genesis video game developed by Sega CS2, Ancient, MNM Software, Shout! Design Works, and H.I.C. and released by Sega of America in the USA on December 15, 1992.

Original rumblers, Axel and Blaze, slam the asphalt with bigger, better, totally devastating attacks! Skull-crushing ex-wrestler, Max Thunder, joins up with earth-shattering body slams and spinning fast attacks. New thrasher, Skate, slices punks with high-speed in-line skate attacks and spinning jump kicks.

Go maniac with jaw-shattering, bone-busting punches, head-cracking jump kicks, and secret weapons. Gangs of dirt bikers dive into you from every side. Smash 'em with a pipe as they speed by.

• 16 gigantic megs of compound fractures! All-new moves and more of 'em!
• Bust knuckles with a friend in all-new 2-player head-to-head mode!
overview_zh:
《怒之鐵拳 2》是一款 1992 年 Genesis 電玩遊戲，由 Sega CS2、Ancient、MNM Software、Shout! 開發。設計作品和 H.I.C.並於1992年12月15日由美國世嘉在美國發行。

最初的轟鳴者阿克塞爾和佈雷茲，用更大、更好、完全毀滅性的攻擊猛擊瀝青！令人頭骨粉碎的前摔跤手馬克斯雷霆 (Max Thunder) 加入了驚天動地的身體猛擊和旋轉快速攻擊。新的 thrasher，Skate，透過高速直排輪滑攻擊和旋轉跳躍踢來斬斷朋克。

瘋狂地使用令人驚掉下巴、骨頭碎裂的拳頭、令人頭痛的跳踢和秘密武器。成群結隊的越野摩托車從四面八方衝向你。當它們飛馳而過時，用管子將它們砸碎。

• 16兆兆複合裂縫！全新動作和更多動作！
• 在全新的兩人對戰模式中與好友一決勝負！

overview_en:
After being defeated twice, Syndicate crime boss Mr. X has started a research company called RoboCy Corporation to act as a cover for his illegal activities. The world's best roboticist, Dr. Dahm, has been brought in to help him create an army of realistic robots to replace important officials from the city. With the replacements in place, Mr. X plans to run the city using a remote control device. His criminal organization, The Syndicate, has strategically placed bombs around the city to distract the police while the city officials are dealt with.

Dr. Zan discovers what the research is really for and knows the Syndicate must be stopped. He contacts Blaze Fielding with the details of The Syndicate's plan. Blaze quickly contacts her old comrades Axel Stone and Adam Hunter for a task force to bring down The Syndicate once and for all. Axel quickly joins the task force, but Adam can't make it (due to his own assignments from within the police) and sends his young brother, Eddie "Skate" Hunter instead. The game has four endings depending on the difficulty level and if the player defeats certain levels in an alloted amount of time.
overview_zh:
在兩次被擊敗後，集團犯罪頭目 X 先生成立了一家名為 RoboCy Corporation 的研究公司，作為其非法活動的掩護。世界上最好的機器人專家達姆博士被聘請來幫助他建立一支現實的機器人軍隊，以取代該市的重要官員。更換完畢後，X 先生計劃使用遠端控制裝置來管理這座城市。他的犯罪組織「辛迪加」策略性地在城市周圍放置炸彈，以分散警察的注意力，同時處理市政府官員。

贊博士發現了這項研究的真正目的，並知道必須阻止辛迪加。他聯絡了布萊茲·菲爾丁並告知了辛迪加計劃的細節。布萊茲很快就聯絡了她的老戰友阿克塞爾·斯通和亞當·亨特，組建了一支特遣部隊，以一勞永逸地打倒辛迪加。阿克塞爾很快就加入了專案小組，但亞當無法成行（由於他自己在警察內部的任務），並派了他的弟弟艾迪「滑板」亨特代替。遊戲有四種結局，取決於難度級別以及玩家是否在規定的時間內擊敗了某些級別。

overview_en: A year has passed since the events of Streets of Rage. To celebrate the defeat of the mysterious "Mr. X" and his syndicate the previous year, Adam Hunter, Axel Stone, and Blaze Fielding met at their favorite nightspot in the city and spent their time reminiscing about their vigilante crusade against "Mr. X" and his organization. Axel and Blaze had moved out of the city after the adventure from last year. Axel has begun working as a part-time bodyguard and Blaze teaches dance classes. Adam has since rejoined the police force and lives in a small house with his younger brother. The next morning, Axel received a phone call from Eddie 'Skate' Hunter, Adam's younger brother. Skate had arrived at home from school and was shocked to find his house in ruin and his older brother missing. Attached to the front door was a picture of Adam chained to a wall at the feet of Mr. X. The criminals began to retake the streets once more. Beatings and lootings took place regularly and in broad daylight. Chaos reigned in the city, far worse than before. Realizing that "Mr. X" and his syndicate has returned for revenge against him, Blaze, and Adam, Axel wastes no time in telling Blaze about the unexpected situation and Blaze herself is determined to help Axel out in defeating "Mr. X" and rescuing Adam. Accompanied by Adam's young brother Skate and Axel's friend, a professional wrestler named Max Thunder, Axel and Blaze set forth on a rescue mission, which will take them from the city all the way to "Mr. X"'s hideout on a desolate island.
overview_zh: 《憤怒之街》事件已經過了一年。為了慶祝前一年擊敗神秘的“X 先生”及其組織，亞當·亨特、阿克塞爾·斯通和布萊茲·菲爾丁在城裡他們最喜歡的夜總會見面，並花時間回憶他們針對“X 先生”及其組織的治安運動。去年的冒險結束後，阿克塞爾和布萊茲搬離了這座城市。阿克塞爾開始擔任兼任保鏢，布萊茲教授舞蹈課。此後，亞當重新加入了警察隊伍，並與弟弟住在一間小房子裡。第二天早上，阿克塞爾接到亞當的弟弟艾迪「史凱特」亨特的電話。史凱特放學回到家，震驚地發現他的房子已成為廢墟，而他的哥哥也失蹤了。前門上貼著一張亞當的照片，亞當被鎖在 X 先生腳下的牆上。犯罪者開始再次佔領街道。毆打和搶劫事件經常在光天化日之下發生。城內一片混亂，比之前還要混亂。意識到「X先生」和他的集團已經回來報復他、布萊茲和亞當，阿克塞爾立刻告訴布萊茲這個意外情況，布萊茲本人也決心幫助阿克塞爾打敗「X先生」並拯救亞當。在亞當的弟弟斯凱特和阿克塞爾的朋友、職業摔角手麥克斯·雷霆的陪伴下，阿克塞爾和布萊茲踏上了救援任務，他們將從城市一路前往荒島上“X先生”的藏身之處。

overview_en:
Set in the future, the game centers around a secret organization of ninja-like operatives known as "Striders", who specializes in various kinds of wetworks such as smuggling, kidnapping, demolitions, and disruption. The player takes control Strider Hiryu, the youngest elite-class Strider in the organization. Hiryu is summoned by the organization's second-in-command, Vice Director Matic, to assassinate his friend Kain, who has been captured by hostile forces and has become a liability to the Striders. Instead of killing him, Hiryu decides to rescue Kain from his captors. With the help of his fellow Strider Sheena, Hiryu uncovers a conspiracy between a certain faction of the Strider organization led by Matic himself and an unknown organization known simply as the "Enterprise" (headed by a man named Faceas Clay) which involves the development of a mind-control weapon codenamed "Zain". In the course of finding and destroying these Zain units, Hiryu learns that the faction of conspirators is headed by Vice Director Matic himself. Hiryu eventually tracks Matic to an orbiting space station where the two Striders face off; after a brief battle Hiryu bests Matic and kills him. Afterwards Hiryu locates and destroys the last of the Zain units.

In the epilogue, it is revealed that though Hiryu was asked to return to the Strider organization he instead opted to retire. The final credits show him sheathing his weapon and walking away.
overview_zh:
遊戲以未來為背景，圍繞著一個名為「Striders」的類似忍者的秘密組織展開，該組織專門從事各種活動，例如走私、綁架、破壞和破壞。玩家控制組織中最年輕的精英級Strider Hiryu。飛龍被該組織的二號人物、副局長馬蒂奇召喚，去刺殺他的朋友凱恩，凱恩已被敵對勢力俘虜，並成為了跨行者的負擔。飛龍沒有殺死他，而是決定從綁架者手中救出凱恩。在他的同胞Strider Sheena的幫助下，Hiryu揭露了由Matic本人領導的Strider組織的某個派系與一個簡稱為「企業」（由一個名叫Faceas Clay的人領導）的未知組織之間的陰謀，該陰謀涉及開發一種代號為「Zain」的精神控制武器。在尋找並摧毀這些札因部隊的過程中，飛龍得知陰謀者派系的領導者是副局長馬蒂奇本人。 Hiryu 最終跟隨 Matic 到一個軌道空間站，兩個 Strider 在那裡對峙；經過短暫的戰鬥後，飛龍擊敗了馬蒂奇並殺死了他。隨後飛龍找到並摧毀了最後的紮因部隊。

在尾聲中，據透露，雖然 Hiryu 被要求返回 Strider 組織，但他選擇了退休。最後的片尾字幕顯示他收起武器走開。

overview_en:
Set in the future, the game centers around a secret organization of ninja-like operatives known as "Striders", who specializes in various kinds of wetworks such as smuggling, kidnapping, demolitions, and disruption. The player takes control Strider Hiryu, the youngest elite-class Strider in the organization. Hiryu is summoned by the organization's second-in-command, Vice Director Matic, to assassinate his friend Kain, who has been captured by hostile forces and has become a liability to the Striders. Instead of killing him, Hiryu decides to rescue Kain from his captors. With the help of his fellow Strider Sheena, Hiryu uncovers a conspiracy between a certain faction of the Strider organization led by Matic himself and an unknown organization known simply as the "Enterprise" (headed by a man named Faceas Clay) which involves the development of a mind-control weapon codenamed "Zain". In the course of finding and destroying these Zain units, Hiryu learns that the faction of conspirators is headed by Vice Director Matic himself. Hiryu eventually tracks Matic to an orbiting space station where the two Striders face off; after a brief battle Hiryu bests Matic and kills him. Afterwards Hiryu locates and destroys the last of the Zain units.

In the epilogue, it is revealed that though Hiryu was asked to return to the Strider organization he instead opted to retire. The final credits show him sheathing his weapon and walking away.
overview_zh: 《Strider 飛龍》（英文名：Strider）是 1989 年 3 月 7 日起運行的 Capcom 卡普空大型電玩橫向 2D 動作遊戲。以西元 2048 年為舞台，主角是一位獨自挑戰以軍事力量支配世界邪惡帝王的暗殺者。1989 年度《Gamest》大獎獲得綜合大獎第 4 名、最佳動作獎第 1 名、最佳演出第 1 名等多項殊榮。後續移植至家用電腦與多種家用主機。
overview_jp:
『ストライダー飛竜』（ストライダーひりゅう、英題：Strider）は、1989年3月7日に稼動開始した、カプコンのアーケード用のサイドビューの2Dアクションゲーム。
西暦2048年を舞台に、軍事力で世界を支配する悪の帝王に一人で挑む暗殺者を主人公とする。
ゲーム誌『ゲーメスト』の企画「第3回ゲーメスト大賞」（1989年度）において大賞4位を獲得、その他にベストアクション賞で1位、ベスト演出賞で1位、ベストグラフィック賞で5位、ベストVGM賞で3位、年間ヒットゲームで22位を獲得した。その他、ゲーメストムック『ザ・ベストゲーム2』での「読者が選ぶベストゲーム」で44位を獲得した。
後にホビーパソコンや家庭用ゲーム機に移植され（#評価、#移植版）、続編も制作された（#続編）。

overview_en:
Strider Hiryuu is a 1990 Mega Drive video game developed by Sega R&D2 and released by Sega in Japan on September 29, 1990.

Set in the future, the game centers around a secret organization of ninja-like operatives known as "Striders", who specializes in various kinds of wetworks such as smuggling, kidnapping, demolitions, and disruption. The player takes control Strider Hiryu, the youngest elite-class Strider in the organization. Hiryu is summoned by the organization's second-in-command, Vice Director Matic, to assassinate his friend Kain, who has been captured by hostile forces and has become a liability to the Striders. Instead of killing him, Hiryu decides to rescue Kain from his captors. With the help of his fellow Strider Sheena, Hiryu uncovers a conspiracy between a certain faction of the Strider organization led by Matic himself and an unknown organization known simply as the "Enterprise" (headed by a man named Faceas Clay) which involves the development of a mind-control weapon codenamed "Zain". In the course of finding and destroying these Zain units, Hiryu learns that the faction of conspirators is headed by Vice Director Matic himself. Hiryu eventually tracks Matic to an orbiting space station where the two Striders face off; after a brief battle Hiryu bests Matic and kills him. Afterwards Hiryu locates and destroys the last of the Zain units.

In the epilogue, it is revealed that though Hiryu was asked to return to the Strider organization he instead opted to retire. The final credits show him sheathing his weapon and walking away.

" Sega produced their home version of Strider for the Mega Drive/Genesis, which was released in Japan on September 29, 1990, with subsequent releases in North America and the PAL region. It was advertised as one of the first 8-Megabit cartridges for the system, and went on to be a bestseller. This version was also re-released for the Wii Virtual Console in Japan on November 15, 2011 and later in North America on February 16, 2012. The Genesis/Mega Drive version contains a different ending from the arcade game. This ending shows the destruction of the final stage as the game's protagonist makes good his escape. This is then followed by the main credit sequence that sees Hiryu flying his glider in space and reminiscing about the various encounters he had during his mission as he heads back to earth. The ending theme was an edited combination of two separate pieces of music planned for the arcade game, but replaced with a repeat of the first level music. Computer magazine ACE considered the previous Amiga conversion to be "as good as this one". " -Wikipedia
overview_zh:
《Strider Hiryuu》是一款 1990 年的 Mega Drive 電玩遊戲，由 Sega R&D2 開發，並於 1990 年 9 月 29 日由 Sega 在日本發行。

遊戲以未來為背景，圍繞著一個名為「Striders」的類似忍者的秘密組織展開，該組織專門從事各種活動，例如走私、綁架、破壞和破壞。玩家控制組織中最年輕的精英級Strider Hiryu。飛龍被該組織的二號人物、副局長馬蒂奇召喚，去刺殺他的朋友凱恩，凱恩已被敵對勢力俘虜，並成為了跨行者的負擔。飛龍沒有殺死他，而是決定從綁架者手中救出凱恩。在他的同胞Strider Sheena的幫助下，Hiryu揭露了由Matic本人領導的Strider組織的某個派系與一個簡稱為「企業」（由一個名叫Faceas Clay的人領導）的未知組織之間的陰謀，該陰謀涉及開發一種代號為「Zain」的精神控制武器。在尋找並摧毀這些札因部隊的過程中，飛龍得知陰謀者派系的領導者是副局長馬蒂奇本人。 Hiryu 最終跟隨 Matic 到一個軌道空間站，兩個 Strider 在那裡對峙；經過短暫的戰鬥後，飛龍擊敗了馬蒂奇並殺死了他。隨後飛龍找到並摧毀了最後的紮因部隊。

在尾聲中，據透露，雖然 Hiryu 被要求返回 Strider 組織，但他選擇了退休。最後的片尾字幕顯示他收起武器走開。

世嘉為 Mega Drive/Genesis 製作了他們的家庭版 Strider，於 1990 年 9 月 29 日在日本發行，隨後在北美和 PAL 地區發行。它被宣傳為該系統的首批 8 兆卡帶之一，並成為暢銷書。該版本還於 2011 年 11 月 15 日在日本重新發行用於 Wii 虛擬控制檯，隨後於 2 月 16 日在北美重新發行。 2012年。 Genesis/Mega Drive 版本包含了與街機遊戲不同的結局。這個結局顯示了遊戲主角成功逃脫後的最後階段的破壞，接下來是飛龍在太空中駕駛滑翔機並回憶他返回地球時在任務中遇到的各種遭遇的主要片尾曲。電腦雜誌 ACE 認為之前的 Amiga 轉換「與這個一樣好」-維基百科。

overview_en: Strider II, known as Strider Returns: Journey from Darkness in North America, is a sequel to Strider, released for the Sega Mega Drive and Sega Master System in 1992 and the Sega Game Gear in 1994. It should not be confused with the later release of Strider 2 which was developed in-house by Capcom - Strider II was developed by U.S. Gold, who, at the time, had the rights to the Strider license outside of Japan.
overview_zh: Strider II，在北美被稱為 Strider Returns：來自黑暗的旅程，是 Strider 的續作，於 1992 年為 Sega Mega Drive 和 Sega Master System 發布，並於 1994 年為 Sega Game Gear 發布。它不應與後來由 Capcom 內部開發的 Strider 2 版本混淆 - Strider II 是由 U.S. Gold 開發的，當時 U.S. Gold 擁有日本以外的 Strider 許可權。

overview_en:
The warrior returns with a vengeance in his ultimate fight for freedom! A flash of steel, a blast from his devastating laser Gyro gun - Strider's back in action, pulverizing the enemy and striving for justice. This time, there will be NO LIMITS... NO MERCY... NO SURRENDER!

" Two years after the release of the computer versions, U.S. Gold and Tiertex ported Strider II to the Mega Drive. In addition to its European release, Strider II was also released for the American Sega Genesis under the title of Journey from Darkness: Strider Returns. The Mega Drive version of Strider Returns differs from the previous computer version in several ways. " -Wikipedia
overview_zh:
戰士帶著復仇歸來，為自由而戰！鋼鐵閃光，毀滅性雷射陀螺槍發出的爆炸聲——Strider 重新投入行動，粉碎敵人並爭取正義。這一次，將沒有限制...沒有憐憫...沒有投降！

「電腦版本發布兩年後，U.S. Gold 和 Tiertex 將 Strider II 移植到了 Mega Drive。除了在歐洲發行外，Strider II 還為美國 Sega Genesis 發布，標題為《黑暗之旅：Strider Returns》。Strider Returns 的 Mega Drive 版本在幾個方面與之前的電腦版本不同。」維基百科 - 維基百科版本。

overview_en:
Striker is a Sega Mega Drive and Sega Game Gear football game. It was only released in Europe.

Confusingly it is the fourth game by Rage Software to use the Striker moniker - the original Striker was released for the Amiga in 1992 (later ported to the Amiga CD32 in 1994) and formed the basis for all Striker games to come. A second Striker was released for the Super Nintendo in 1993, being known as World Soccer '94: Road to Glory in North America, World Soccer in Japan and Eric Cantona Football Challenge in France, which was followed by World Cup Striker (released as Elite Soccer in North America) the next year. This fourth Striker was made exclusive to Sega systems as a spiritual sequel to Ultimate Soccer.
overview_zh:
Striker 是 Sega Mega Drive 和 Sega Game Gear 推出的足球遊戲。它僅在歐洲發行。

令人困惑的是，這是 Rage Software 使用 Striker 名稱的第四款遊戲 - 最初的 Striker 於 1992 年針對 Amiga 發布（後來於 1994 年移植到 Amiga CD32），並構成了後來所有 Striker 遊戲的基礎。 1993 年，超級任天堂發布了第二款《前鋒》，在北美被稱為“World Soccer '94：Road to Glory”，在日本被稱為“World Soccer”，在法國被稱為“Eric Cantona Football Challenge”，隨後的第二年又推出了“World Cup Striker”（在北美被稱為“Elite Soccer”）。第四個前鋒是世嘉系統獨有的，作為《終極足球》的精神續作。

overview_en: Some rather aggressive aliens have invaded the underground depths of the Earth, and you're just the subterranean fighter pilot to get rid of them. Fly through the darkest caverns in search of the terrifying enemies in this detailed trip below the surface. You'll need quick reflexes and nerves of steel to get these critters out of the Earth's hair, and the gravitational pull towards the surface won't exactly help matters. If you can pick up some cleverly placed gear, you might just be able to transform your fighter into a submarine to get out to the ocean. Incredible graphics and a massive gaming experience make SUB-TERRANIA the perfect sci-fi addition to your Mega Drive collection.
overview_zh: 一些相當侵略性的外星人入侵了地球的地下深處，而你只是消滅他們的地下戰鬥機飛行員。在這次詳細的地表以下之旅中，飛過最黑暗的洞穴，尋找可怕的敵人。你需要快速反應和鋼鐵般的神經才能將這些生物從地球的毛髮中清除出來，而朝向地表的引力並不會完全幫助解決問題。如果你能拿起一些巧妙放置的裝備，你也許就能將你的戰鬥機變成一艘潛水艇，出海。令人難以置信的圖形和豐富的遊戲體驗使 SUB-TERRANIA 成為您的 Mega Drive 系列的完美科幻補充。

overview_en:
THE GREATEST ATHLETES ON EARTH. THE MOST AUTHENTIC SIMULATION OF ITS KIND.

A lifetime of training boils down to one moment.

The fastest, strongest and most skilled champions from around the globe gather in one great city to determine who is the best of the best. To the victors go the precious medals that symbolize the ultimate in athletic achievement.

SUMMER CHALLENGE pits you against these international athletes in eight remarkably realistic events. Represent your country in the 400 meter hurdles, pole vault, high jump, cycling, kayaking, javelin, archery and equestrian events. Time and time again, you will extend the boundaries of speed, strength and accuracy--for yourself and for your flag.

The world is watching. The glory is yours for the taking.

Challenge world class athletes in eight formidable events including Equestrian, Archery and the High Jump.
overview_zh:
地球上最偉大的運動員。同類中最真實的模擬。

一生的訓練歸結為一瞬間。

來自世界各地最快、最強、技術最高的冠軍齊聚一座偉大的城市，決出誰是最強者中的最強者。勝利者將獲得像徵最高運動成就的珍貴獎牌。

夏季挑戰賽讓您在八項非常逼真的賽事中與這些國際運動員對抗。代表您的國家參加 400 公尺跨欄、撐竿跳高、跳高、腳踏車、劃橡皮艇、標槍、射箭和馬術專案。你將一次又一次地拓展速度、力量和準確性的界限——為了你自己，也為了你的旗幟。

全世界都在關注。榮耀是禰的。

在馬術、射箭和跳高等八項艱鉅的賽事中挑戰世界級運動員。

overview_en: The game, which is set in a fanciful version of the American Old West, revolves around four bounty hunters who are out to claim rewards given for eliminating the most wanted outlaws in the West. There is no true "storyline" aside from collecting progressively larger rewards. At the beginning of each level the player is shown a wanted poster, showing the criminal, the reward for stopping them, and the cliché line "Wanted dead or alive".
overview_zh: 這款遊戲以美國老西部的奇特版本為背景，圍繞著四名賞金獵人展開，他們因消滅西部頭號通緝犯而獲得獎勵。除了收集越來越大的獎勵之外，沒有真正的「故事情節」。在每個關卡開始時，玩家都會看到一張通緝海報，上面顯示了罪犯、阻止他們的獎勵以及陳詞濫調「通緝生或死」。

title_jp: スーパーエアーウルフ
overview_en: Super Airwolf (スーパーエアーウルフ) is a 1991 shoot-'em-up for the Sega Mega Drive by A.I and Kyugo to tie into Universal Pictures's Airwolf television series and as a sequel to their 1987 arcade game Airwolf. However in the United States, they dropped the license and published the game as Cross Fire for reasons unknown.
overview_zh: 《超級飛狼》（suーパーエアーウルfu）是 A.I 和 Kyugo 於 1991 年為世嘉 Mega Drive 推出的一款射擊遊戲，與環球影業的《飛狼》電視連續劇結合在一起，也是 1987 年街機續集的遊戲。然而在美國，他們出於未知原因放棄了許可證並將遊戲釋出為《穿越火線》。

overview_en: Different from real baseball and other baseball video games, this game consists of both male and female characters, as well as robots. All three types of players have the same basic abilities and vary only on their personal strengths. In many cases, human players are better than their robot counterparts. One major difference between the human and robot characters is that the robot characters can blow up (or lose all their power) if they are worked too hard during a game. That can happen if you constantly make them dive for a ball, run extra bases, or even if they get hit by a pitch. Under no stress whatsoever, some robots, especially pitchers, will naturally run out of power as the game progresses. When this happens, they will lose all their abilities and be useless, both offensively and defensively. When that occurs, you can either power them up or replace them with another person on the roster. Human players do not blow up, but human pitchers can tire out. When they are tired, they will pant heavily and throw the ball very slowly. This can be remedied by either an upgrade or, as in real baseball, switching to a relief pitcher.
overview_zh: 與真實棒球和其他棒球電玩遊戲不同，該遊戲由男性和女性角色以及機器人組成。所有這三種型別的玩家都具有相同的基本能力，僅在個人優勢上有所不同。在許多情況下，人類玩家比機器人玩家更好。人類和機器人角色之間的一個主要區別是，如果機器人角色在遊戲中過度勞累，他們可能會爆炸（或失去所有力量）。如果你不斷地讓他們衝球、跑額外的壘，或者即使他們被投球擊中，這種情況就會發生。在沒有任何壓力的情況下，一些機器人，尤其是投手，隨著比賽的進行，自然會耗盡電力。當這種情況發生時，他們就會失去所有能力，無論進攻還是防守都毫無用處。發生這種情況時，您可以為他們提供支援，也可以用名冊上的其他人替換他們。人類球員不會爆發，但人類投手可能會疲倦。當他們累了的時候，他們會氣喘籲籲，把球扔得很慢。這可以透過升級或像真正的棒球那樣改用後援投手來解決。

overview_en: Super Battleship is a Board game, developed by Synergistic Software and published by Mindscape Inc., which was released in 1993.
overview_zh: 超級戰艦是一款棋盤遊戲，由Synergistic Software開發，由Mindscape Inc.發行，於1993年發行。

title_en: Super Battleship - The Classic Naval Combat Game
no_intro_name: Super Battleship - The Classic Naval Combat Game (USA)

overview_en: Super Daisenryaku (スーパー大戦略) is a 1988 World War II simulation game for NEC's PC-88 and PC-98 computers by SystemSoft in their Daisenryaku series of WWII sims. Sega ported it to the Sega Mega Drive in 1989, putting in a new soundtrack supposedly composed by Tokuhiko Uwabo. Not only was it never released outside Japan, but it does not fully implement TMSS, meaning it will only work on early Model 1 Mega Drives. The Mega Drive would receive a sequel, Advanced Daisenryaku, which not only does work on all Mega Drives, but also contained Mega Modem support.
overview_zh: Super Daisenryaku (suーパー大戦略) 是一款 1988 年二戰模擬遊戲，由 SystemSoft 在其二戰模擬遊戲的 Daisenryaku 系列中為 NEC 的 PC-88 和 PC-98 電腦設計。世嘉於 1989 年將其移植到世嘉 Mega Drive 上，並放入了據稱由德彥 Uwabo 創作的新配樂。它不僅從未在日本以外地區發布，而且沒有完全實現 TMSS，這意味著它只能在早期的 Model 1 Mega Drive 上執行。 Mega Drive 將獲得續集 Advanced Daisenryaku，它不僅適用於所有 Mega Drive，而且還包含 Mega Modem 支援。

title_jp: スーパーファンタジーゾーン
overview_en:
Super Fantasy Zone puts the player in control of Opa-Opa, a winged, sentient spaceship who can either fly or walk on the ground. His father, Opapa, was killed by members of the planet Menon as he progresses through levels that scroll to the left or right depending on Opa-Opa's direction, similar to the video game Defender. It is a single-player game, and the player's goal is to destroy every enemy generator, leading to them fighting a boss battle at the end of that level.

The player can upgrade Opa-Opa's weapon loadout by collecting gold coins dropped by destroyed enemies, with varying amount of gold dropped depending on the enemy. These upgrades can be used to change various aspects of Opa-Opa, including his speed, offensive capabilities, and ability to light the area. Different weapons can be used, including one with a wide spread shot, one that shoots behind Opa-Opa, one that shoots a laser, and more. These upgrades eventually run out, regardless of whether they are used or not. The game allows players to use a rapid fire option to fight enemies. The game features a reference to the shooter Space Harrier, including a code that replaces the music with Space Harrier music.
overview_zh: 《Super Fantasy Zone》是 1992 年 1 月 14 日由 Sun 電子（Sunsoft）發售的 Mega Drive 橫向捲軸射擊遊戲，歐洲於同年 9 月 11 日發售。為承襲 SEGA 世嘉大型電玩《Fantasy Zone》（1986）系統的原創作品。以宇宙曆 623X 年為舞台，玩家操作自機「Opa-Opa」，目標擊敗自稱「Dark Menon」的軍團，讓 Fantasy Zone 重歸和平。SEGA 並未參與開發，全由 Sunsoft 自家完成。
overview_jp:
『スーパーファンタジーゾーン』 (SUPER FANTASY ZONE) は、1992年1月14日にサン電子（サンソフト）から発売されたメガドライブ用横スクロールシューティングゲーム。ヨーロッパでは同年9月11日に発売。
セガから稼動されたアーケードゲーム『ファンタジーゾーン』（1986年）のゲームシステムを引き継いだオリジナル作品である。宇宙暦623X年を舞台に自機である「オパオパ」を操作し、「ダークメノン」と名乗る軍団を倒してファンタジーゾーンに平和を取り戻す事を目的としている。
開発にセガは関与しておらず、全てサンソフト自身が手掛けた。音楽はファミリーコンピュータ用ソフト『バトルフォーミュラ』（1991年）を手掛けた小高直樹、瀬谷辰宇、原伸幸が担当している。
2008年にWii用ソフトとしてバーチャルコンソールにて配信された他、PlayStation 2用ソフト『セガエイジス2500シリーズ Vol.33 ファンタジーゾーン コンプリートコレクション』（2008年）に収録された。

overview_en:
Countdown to excitement, Hang-On's back with two awesome races that are guaranteed to rev your engine. Whether you're racing against time as you beat a path across four continents... Battling guts with an opponent on a specially designed circuit... There's no better thrill than the roar of your pipes as they beat a steady rhythm in sync with your fast-paced driving.

Your driving's got to red-line to beat the pack. And there's more at stake than a checkered flag. There's money, the kind of money that can transform your bike from an ordinary machine into a unbeatable, screaming machine. But that's not all. The glory of victory isn't lost here; during a grueling time trial, it's you against the clock, racing for the sheer pleasure of it.

So grab your helmet, don your leathers, and get up your courage, it's time to burn some rubber, and become king of the asphalt. When you do, even more daring opportunities await, but first you've gotta prove yourself. Start your engines!
overview_zh: 《Super Hang-On》是 1987 年 4 月由日本 SEGA 世嘉推出的大型電玩賽車遊戲。玩家騎乘機車，須在限時內通過檢查點並抵達終點。每關長度約為前作《Hang-On》（1985）的一半，因此關卡數量大幅增加。同年於歐洲移植到各種家用電腦，1989 年移植至 Amiga、PC/AT 相容機、Macintosh、Mega Drive、X68000。
overview_jp:
『スーパーハングオン』 (SUPER HANG-ON) は、1987年4月に日本のセガから稼働されたアーケード用レースゲーム。
バイクを駆って制限時間内にチェックポイントを通過しつつ、ゴールを目指す内容となっている。1ステージの長さは前作の『ハングオン』（1985年）と比べると時間にして半分程度で、その分ステージ数は大幅に増加している。
開発はセガ第2AM研究開発部が行い、音楽は後にアーケードゲーム『ゲイングランド』（1988年）を手掛けた林克洋と、アーケードゲーム『サンダーブレード』（1987年）を手掛けた並木晃一が担当している。
同年に欧州にて各種ホビーパソコンに移植された他、1989年にはAmiga、PC/AT互換機、Macintosh、メガドライブ、X68000に移植された。アーケード版は2010年にWii用ソフトとしてバーチャルコンソールアーケードにて配信された他、2012年にはPlayStation 3用ソフトとしてセガエイジスオンラインにて配信された。また、2013年にはセガ3D復刻プロジェクトの一環としてニンテンドー3DS用ソフト『3Dスーパーハングオン』が配信された。

overview_en: Super High Impact was one of the most hard hitting football games before the NFL Blitz series was created, with 18 teams and over 30 plays per team. The console versions are based on the Midway arcade series of the same name. The game has a Hit-O-Meter which often leads to massive brawls. Based on the arcade smash hit back in the days, featuring the three famous words: EAT THIS!!!, FIGHT!!!
overview_zh: Super High Impact 是 NFL Blitz 系列建立之前最激烈的橄欖球比賽之一，共有 18 支球隊，每隊超過 30 場比賽。主機版本基於同名的 Midway 街機系列。遊戲中有一個 Hit-O-Meter，經常會導致大規模的爭吵。改編自當年的街機熱門遊戲，以三個著名的詞為特色：吃這個！ ！ ！ ，戰鬥！ ！ ！

title_jp: スーパーハイドライド
overview_en: Super Hydlide (originally entitled Hydlide 3: The Space Memories) is the third entry in the Hydlide series, continuing its action RPG legacy. Character creation allows the player to choose one of the four character classes: Warrior, Thief, Priest, and Monk. In combat, the protagonist uses melee or long-ranged weapons or casts magic spells. Unlike the previous games in the series, the player is required to press the attack button during melee combat, instead of simply "bumping" into the enemies. There is an internal clock in the game, which makes it necessary for the protagonist to sleep periodically and regain his strength. The main character also has to eat from time to time, otherwise his hit points will gradually decrease. The morality system from the previous game returns: killing friendly creatures will reduce the player's morality level, which will eventually have an effect on one of the game's most decisive battles.
overview_zh: Super Hydlide（原名 Hydlide 3：太空記憶）是 Hydlide 系列的第三款作品，延續了其動作角色扮演遊戲的傳統。角色建立允許玩家選擇四種角色類別之一：戰士、盜賊、牧師和僧侶。在戰鬥中，主角使用近戰或遠端武器或施展魔法。與該系列之前的遊戲不同，玩家在近戰戰鬥中需要按下攻擊按鈕，而不是簡單地「撞」到敵人。遊戲中有一個內在時鐘，這使得主角需要定期睡覺並恢復體力。主角也要時不時的吃飯，不然生命值會逐漸減少。前作的道德系統回歸：殺死友方生物會降低玩家的道德水平，這最終會對遊戲中最具決定性的戰鬥之一產生影響。

overview_en:
Super Kick Off is a football game for the Sega Mega Drive, Sega Master System and Sega Game Gear, released exclusively in Europe and Brazil. It is considered by many to be the watered-down version of Kick Off 2, previously released for the Commodore Amiga (and ported to the Amstrad CPC, Atari ST and Commodore 64). Kick Off 2 was originally programmed by Dino Dini for Anco Games, with the console adaptions being handled by Tiertex.

From a franchise perspective, Super Kick Off would be followed by the controversial Kick Off 3: European Challenge. However, Dino Dini, who had no involvement in Kick Off 3 would go on to form his own company and produce the Amiga/IBM PC game Goal!, which shares similar gameplay. Goal! also arrived on the Mega Drive, in the updated form of Dino Dini's Soccer.
overview_zh:
Super Kick Off 是一款適用於 Sega Mega Drive、Sega Master System 和 Sega Game Gear 的足球遊戲，僅在歐洲和巴西發行。許多人認為它是 Kick Off 2 的淡化版本，之前為 Commodore Amiga 發布（並移植到 Amstrad CPC、Atari ST 和 Commodore 64）。 Kick Off 2 最初由 Dino Dini 為 Anco Games 編寫，控制檯改編則由 Tiertex 負責。

從特許經營的角度來看，超級開球之後將是備受爭議的開球 3：歐洲挑戰賽。然而，沒有參與《Kick Off 3》的迪諾·迪尼 (Dino Dini) 隨後成立了自己的公司，並製作了 Amiga/IBM PC 遊戲《Goal!》，該遊戲具有類似的遊戲玩法。目標！也以《迪諾迪尼足球》的更新版登陸 Mega Drive。

title_jp: プロ野球スーパーリーグ'９１

overview_en: Fry up the track on long straightaways, or downshift into neck-wrenching hairpin curves. Super Monaco GP sends you screaming around the most demanding tracks on earth in the hottest racecar ever built, the Formula 1. Choose your car's transmission. Slide through a practice run with an automatic, battle rival drivers with a 4-speed, or grind gears to victory piloting a 7-speed machine. Super Monaco GP's World Championship sends you and your pit crew on a 16-race international circuit. Burn rubber with the best drivers around in a piston-pounding test of speed, road savvy, and endurance!
overview_zh: 在長直道上加速賽道，或降檔進入令人扭頸的髮夾彎。超級摩納哥大獎賽讓您駕駛有史以來最熱門的一級方程式賽車在地球上最苛刻的賽道上尖叫。選擇您的汽車的變速箱。駕駛自排變速箱進行練習，駕駛 4 速變速箱與競爭對手進行較量，或駕駛 7 速變速箱磨礪齒輪以取得勝利。超級摩納哥大獎賽世界錦標賽將讓您和您的維修站工作人員參加 16 場比賽的國際賽道。與周圍最好的車手一起進行速度、道路悟性和耐力的活塞衝擊測試！

overview_en: Grab the wheel and hit the gas! For the first time ever, race up to 4 players simultaneously with Ivan "Ironman" Stewart's Super Off-Road. Based on the #1 arcade game, this all-out dirt-grinding race is now available for the NES. Watch out for the mud holes, jumps and other obstacles on the 8 different Stadium tracks. From match-offs to spin-outs, Super Off-Road is as close to genuine short-course racing as you can get!
overview_zh: 抓住方向盤並踩油門！有史以來第一次，最多 4 名玩家可與“鋼鐵人”伊萬·斯圖爾特的超級越野車同時比賽。基於排名第一的街機遊戲，這款全力以赴的泥土碾壓比賽現已在 NES 上推出。小心 8 條不同體育場賽道上的泥坑、跳躍和其他障礙物。從比賽到衍生賽，《超級越野》盡可能接近真正的短道賽車！

title_jp: スーパーリアルバスケットボール
overview_en: Fast break for big-time hoop play with SuperReal Basketball! This is backboard-slamming action at its hottest! You coach the team or be any player the situation demands. Gunshot passes, sneaky steals, dazzling tactics - this game's got it all! Shop for your favorite club from a league of 8 teams, each with its own strengths. Scout your challengers in exhibition play. Then hit the court to the screams of a packed house! Eyeball your team's performance and switch player positions as needed. Closeups capture the on-court intensity - jump balls, free throws, 3-point jumpers, and airborne slams! Face off at center court with the computer or duke it out with a friend. Throw some bombs in tournament play, then slam dunk your way to the championship!
overview_zh: 與《超級真實籃球》一起進行精彩籃球比賽的快攻！這是最激烈的撞擊籃板動作！您可以執教球隊，也可以根據情況擔任任何球員。槍聲傳球、偷偷摸摸的搶斷、令人眼花繚亂的戰術——這款遊戲應有盡有！從 8 支球隊組成的聯盟中購買您最喜歡的俱樂部，每支球隊都有自己的優勢。在表演賽中尋找你的挑戰者。然後衝向球場，全場響起尖叫聲！密切注意球隊的表現並根據需要更換球員位置。特寫捕捉球場上的激烈場面 - 跳球、罰球、三分跳投和空中扣籃！在中心球場與電腦對峙或與朋友一決勝負。在錦標賽比賽中投擲一些炸彈，然後灌籃，奪得冠軍！

overview_en: Super Skidmarks is a racing video game developed by Acid Software and released in 1995. The game is the sequel to Skidmarks and as such was also termed Skidmarks 2 and Super Skidmarks 2 by commentators. The game features “minimally realistic” action viewed from an isometric perspective as well as novelty vehicles such as wheeled cows and caravans. Various methods such as joypad adapters and link systems are employed to allow multiple players to compete, up to a maximum of 8. The game was critically acclaimed and a best-seller in the UK. Several upgrades to the Amiga original were released as well as conversions for the Amiga CD32 and Sega Mega Drive, the latter published by Codemasters.
overview_zh: Super Skidmarks 是由 Acid Software 開發並於 1995 年發布的賽車電玩遊戲。該遊戲是 Skidmarks 的續作，因此也被評論員稱為 Skidmarks 2 和 Super Skidmarks 2。遊戲的特點是從等距視角觀看「最低限度真實」的動作，以及輪式乳牛和商隊等新穎的車輛。採用遊戲手把轉接器和連結系統等多種方式，讓多名玩家參與競爭，最多可達 8 人。該遊戲廣受好評，並在英國成為暢銷書。發布了 Amiga 原版的多項升級，以及 Amiga CD32 和 Sega Mega Drive 的轉換，後者由 Codemasters 發布。

overview_en:
The year is 1999. The world's most popular television show is Smash T.V., an ultra-violent contest between two armed-to-the-teeth combatants, set loose in a series of deadly arenas that are filled to bursting with hordes of mindless beasts and killer robots. The aim of the game is to blast everything in sight and try to grab more cash and prizes than the other guy. Toaster ovens, VCRs, fancy cars and luxury holidays are there for the taking... for anyone who can survive long enough to enjoy them.

Smash T.V. is an insane shoot-em-up from the brain of Eugene Jarvis, creator of Robotron: 2084. It retains that game's frantic style of play and two-joystick control method, but adds plenty of gore, violence, a hint of satire and that all-important two player mode.
overview_zh:
時間是 1999 年。世界上最受歡迎的電視節目是《Smash T.V.》，這是一場兩名全副武裝的戰鬥人員之間的極端暴力競賽，在一系列致命的競技場中展開，競技場中充滿了成群結隊的無意識野獸和殺手機器人。遊戲的目的是炸毀眼前的一切，並嘗試比其他人搶到更多的現金和獎品。烤麵包機、錄影機、豪華汽車和豪華假期都可供您享用……任何能活得足夠久的人都可以享受它們。

Smash T.V. 是《Robotron: 2084》的創作者尤金·賈維斯 (Eugene Jarvis) 創作的瘋狂射擊遊戲。它保留了該遊戲的瘋狂遊戲風格和兩操縱桿控制方法，但新增了大量血腥、暴力、諷刺意味以及最重要的兩人模式。

overview_en:
This remake of Street Fighter II featured a new scoring system that kept track of combos, first attacks, and reversals. Additionally, four new characters join the returning twelve characters from the original. Super Street Fighter II is also the first game in the SFII series to give full move sets to the boss characters. Previously in Street Fighter II: Champion Edition and Street Fighter II: Turbo, whilst the four boss characters were available, they did not have different animations for some punches and kicks. Although this was expected for Balrog (being a boxer), it was unusual to see a character doing a punch when pressing a kick button, or vice-versa.

Aside from the bosses' added moves, some of the main characters' moves were adjusted in some ways. For example, the differences between Ken and Ryu became more defined - Ryu focusing on deadlier fireballs, and Ken's fierce Dragon Punch being able to set opponents on fire.
overview_zh:
《街頭霸王 II》的重製版採用了新的評分系統，可記錄連擊、首次攻擊和逆轉。此外，四個新角色加入了原版中回歸的十二個角色。 《超級街頭霸王 II》也是 SFII 系列中第一款為 Boss 角色提供全套動作的遊戲。之前在《街頭霸王 II：冠軍版》和《街頭霸王 II：渦輪》中，雖然有四個 Boss 角色，但他們的某些拳打腳踢並沒有不同的動畫。儘管這對炎魔（作為拳擊手）來說是預料之中的，但在按下踢腿按鈕時看到角色出拳的情況並不常見，反之亦然。

除了增加了Boss的招式外，部分主角的招式也做了一些調整。例如，Ken和Ryu之間的差異變得更加明顯——Ryu專注於更致命的火球，而Ken兇猛的龍拳能夠讓對手著火。

title_en: Super Street Fighter II: The New Challengers
title_jp: スーパーストリートファイターII THE NEW CHALLENGERS
no_intro_name: Super Street Fighter II - The New Challengers (Japan)
overview_en:
A New Challenge Awaits

For two years, they have reigned supreme. Twelve of the most gifted fighters from across the world have battled each other in the World Warrior tournament. But the time has come for them to step aside - Now is the time of the New Challengers!

Cammy, Dee Jay, T. Hawk and Fei Long have earned the right to enter the World Warrior Tournament. Each of them possess a lethal combination of martial arts skills that they believe can destroy M. Bison. But can they survive the original Street Fighters and their new abilities? Only the true Street Fighters among you will find out!
overview_zh:
新的挑戰等待著

兩年來，他們一直佔據主導地位。來自世界各地的 12 名最有天賦的戰士在世界戰士錦標賽中相互較量。但他們退到一邊的時候到了——現在是新挑戰者的時候了！

Cammy、Dee Jay、T. Hawk 和 Fei Long 獲得了參加世界勇士錦標賽的權利。他們每個人都擁有致命的武術技能組合，他們相信這些技能可以摧毀野牛。但他們能在最初的《街頭霸王》和新能力中存活下來嗎？只有你們當中真正的街頭霸王才會發現！

overview_en:
Once known only as Thunder Blade, the ASH-002 is back in action as Super Thunder Blade, model ASH-091B. As part of the Air Force Special Operation Troop, you and Super Thunder Blade must take control of its state-of-the-art artillery to defeat the renegade guerrilla armies with plans to dominate the world. Luckily, Super Thunder Blade has the technology, but do you have what it takes?
